gept.example_en: I sweep the kitchen floor every evening before going to bed.
gept.example_zh: 我每天晚上睡覺前都會掃廚房地板。

gept.example_en: She vacuumed the living room carpet thoroughly before the guests arrived.
gept.example_zh: 在客人到來前，她仔細用吸塵器清掃了客廳地毯。

gept.example_en: I plan to declutter my closet this weekend and donate old clothes.
gept.example_zh: 這個週末我打算清理衣櫃並把舊衣服捐出去。

gept.example_en: Grandma loves to polish her silver spoons until they shine like mirrors.
gept.example_zh: 奶奶喜歡把銀湯匙擦亮到像鏡子一樣。

gept.example_en: Please mop the bathroom floor after taking a long shower.
gept.example_zh: 洗完長澡後請拖一下浴室地板。

gept.example_en: He dusts the bookshelves once a week to keep allergies under control.
gept.example_zh: 他每週撣一次書架灰塵以控制過敏。

gept.example_en: She scrubbed the bathtub until every trace of soap residue disappeared.
gept.example_zh: 她把浴缸刷到沒有任何皂垢殘留。

gept.example_en: Wipe the kitchen counter after preparing raw meat to avoid contamination.
gept.example_zh: 處理生肉後擦拭廚房檯面以避免污染。

gept.example_en: Rinse the dishes well to remove all the soap before drying.
gept.example_zh: 把碗盤沖洗乾淨，去除所有肥皂後再晾乾。

gept.example_en: Soak the stained shirt in cold water overnight before washing it.
gept.example_zh: 把有污漬的襯衫在冷水裡浸泡一晚再洗。

gept.example_en: She folds the laundry neatly and stacks it in the linen closet.
gept.example_zh: 她把洗好的衣物整齊摺好，疊放在床單櫃裡。

gept.example_en: Hang the wet towels outside so they dry quickly in the sun.
gept.example_zh: 把濕毛巾掛到外面，讓它們在陽光下快點曬乾。

gept.example_en: Disinfect doorknobs and light switches during the cold and flu season.
gept.example_zh: 在感冒和流感季節時要對門把和電燈開關消毒。

gept.example_en: She sanitizes the kitchen counters after preparing chicken or fish.
gept.example_zh: 她在處理雞肉或魚之後會對廚房檯面進行清潔殺菌。

gept.example_en: The children promised to tidy their rooms before watching television.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們答應在看電視前先整理自己的房間。

gept.example_en: I spent the whole afternoon trying to organize the messy garage.
gept.example_zh: 我花了一整個下午想整理那雜亂的車庫。

gept.example_en: Please clear the table after everyone has finished eating dinner.
gept.example_zh: 大家吃完晚餐後請把桌子清乾淨。

gept.example_en: Don't forget to empty the dishwasher before loading the dirty dishes.
gept.example_zh: 別忘了在放入髒碗盤前先清空洗碗機。

gept.example_en: Refill the soap dispenser when it gets close to running out.
gept.example_zh: 當洗手乳快用完時就要補充。

gept.example_en: I need to restock the pantry with rice and cooking oil this weekend.
gept.example_zh: 這個週末我要把儲藏室的米和食用油補齊。

gept.example_en: Dispose of old batteries at a designated collection point, not in the trash.
gept.example_zh: 舊電池要丟在指定回收點，不要丟進垃圾桶。

gept.example_en: Our neighborhood recycles paper, plastic, and glass on different days.
gept.example_zh: 我們社區在不同日子分別回收紙、塑膠和玻璃。

gept.example_en: She composts vegetable scraps to use as fertilizer in the garden.
gept.example_zh: 她把蔬菜廚餘做成堆肥，用來當花園的肥料。

gept.example_en: Scour the burnt pan with steel wool to remove the dark stains.
gept.example_zh: 用鋼絲絨用力擦洗燒焦的鍋子，去除黑色污漬。

gept.example_en: She bleaches the white towels once a month to keep them bright.
gept.example_zh: 她每個月會把白毛巾漂白一次，讓它們保持潔白。

gept.example_en: Use a plunger to declog the bathroom sink when water drains slowly.
gept.example_zh: 當浴室洗手台排水變慢時，用通樂搋疏通它。

gept.example_en: I had to unclog the kitchen drain after pasta sauce blocked it.
gept.example_zh: 義大利麵醬堵住廚房排水後，我不得不疏通它。

gept.example_en: He plunged the toilet a few times until the water flowed freely again.
gept.example_zh: 他用搋子通了幾下馬桶，直到水又能順暢流動。

gept.example_en: Open the windows to ventilate the bedroom after painting the walls.
gept.example_zh: 油漆完牆壁後打開窗戶讓臥室通風。

gept.example_en: I aired out the closet so the musty smell would disappear.
gept.example_zh: 我把衣櫃打開通風，讓霉味散掉。

gept.example_en: Let's clean up the living room before our guests arrive tonight.
gept.example_zh: 我們在客人今晚到達前把客廳整理乾淨吧。

gept.example_en: She asked the kids to pick up their toys before dinner.
gept.example_zh: 她請孩子們在晚餐前把玩具收好。

gept.example_en: After dinner, please put away the dishes in the cupboard.
gept.example_zh: 晚餐後請把碗盤收進櫥櫃裡。

gept.example_en: It is your turn to take out the trash this evening.
gept.example_zh: 今晚輪到你拿垃圾出去倒。

gept.example_en: I will cook tonight if you do the dishes afterward.
gept.example_zh: 如果你飯後洗碗，今晚就由我來煮。

gept.example_en: She tries to do the laundry every Saturday morning before noon.
gept.example_zh: 她盡量在每週六中午前洗衣服。

gept.example_en: My mother taught me to make the bed every morning after waking up.
gept.example_zh: 我媽媽教我每天早上起床後要整理床鋪。

gept.example_en: I change the sheets once a week and wash them in hot water.
gept.example_zh: 我每週換一次床單，並用熱水洗。

gept.example_en: He washes the dishes by hand because their dishwasher is broken.
gept.example_zh: 他用手洗碗盤，因為他們的洗碗機壞了。

gept.example_en: Use a clean cloth to dry the dishes before putting them away.
gept.example_zh: 收起碗盤前用乾淨的布把它們擦乾。

gept.example_en: Could you water the plants while I am away on vacation?
gept.example_zh: 我度假時你能幫忙澆花嗎？

gept.example_en: The neighbor agreed to feed the cat while we are out of town.
gept.example_zh: 鄰居答應在我們不在家時幫忙餵貓。

gept.example_en: I walk the dog every morning before going to work.
gept.example_zh: 我每天早上上班前都會遛狗。

gept.example_en: He cleaned the bathroom thoroughly using bleach and a sponge.
gept.example_zh: 他用漂白水和海綿徹底打掃了浴室。

gept.example_en: I usually wake up around six thirty on weekday mornings.
gept.example_zh: 我平日早上通常六點半左右起床。

gept.example_en: Even though I wake up at six, I rarely get up before seven.
gept.example_zh: 雖然我六點就醒了，但很少七點前起身。

gept.example_en: Children should brush their teeth twice a day for proper oral hygiene.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們應該一天刷兩次牙以維持良好的口腔衛生。

gept.example_en: She combs her long hair gently to avoid damaging the ends.
gept.example_zh: 她輕輕地梳她的長髮，以免損傷髮尾。

gept.example_en: He prefers to shave in the shower because the steam softens his beard.
gept.example_zh: 他喜歡在淋浴時刮鬍子，因為蒸氣能軟化他的鬍鬚。

gept.example_en: She dresses quickly because the bus to work arrives at seven.
gept.example_zh: 她快速穿衣，因為上班的公車七點就到。

gept.example_en: Please get dressed quickly; we are already running late for school.
gept.example_zh: 快點穿好衣服，我們上學已經遲到了。

gept.example_en: He undresses in the bedroom and tosses his socks into the basket.
gept.example_zh: 他在臥室脫衣，把襪子丟進籃子裡。

gept.example_en: I shower every night before bed rather than in the morning.
gept.example_zh: 我每天晚上睡前淋浴，而不是早上。

gept.example_en: She bathes her baby every other day in a small plastic tub.
gept.example_zh: 她每隔一天就用小塑膠浴盆幫寶寶洗澡。

gept.example_en: I commute about forty minutes each way by subway to my office.
gept.example_zh: 我每天搭地鐵單程通勤約四十分鐘到辦公室。

gept.example_en: She packs lunch for her children every weekday morning before school.
gept.example_zh: 她每個平日早上都會為孩子們準備午餐再送他們上學。

gept.example_en: After the long trip, I unpacked my suitcase and started laundry.
gept.example_zh: 長途旅行後，我打開行李箱開始洗衣服。

gept.example_en: I prepare the coffee maker the night before so mornings are easier.
gept.example_zh: 我前一晚就把咖啡機準備好，這樣早上比較輕鬆。

gept.example_en: She plans her weekly meals on Sunday evening to save shopping time.
gept.example_zh: 她週日晚上規劃每週菜單以節省購物時間。

gept.example_en: After moving, it took us a month to settle into the new apartment.
gept.example_zh: 搬家後，我們花了一個月才在新公寓安頓下來。

gept.example_en: I like to relax with a cup of tea after a long workday.
gept.example_zh: 漫長的工作日後，我喜歡喝杯茶放鬆。

gept.example_en: She unwinds by reading a novel in bed before falling asleep.
gept.example_zh: 她睡前躺在床上讀小說放鬆心情。

gept.example_en: Grandpa often dozes in his armchair after Sunday lunch.
gept.example_zh: 祖父常在週日午餐後在扶手椅上打盹。

gept.example_en: He snores so loudly that his wife sleeps with earplugs every night.
gept.example_zh: 他打呼太大聲，他太太每晚都得戴耳塞睡覺。

gept.example_en: She yawned widely during the long afternoon meeting.
gept.example_zh: 她在漫長的下午會議中打了個大大的呵欠。

gept.example_en: I stretch for five minutes every morning to wake up my muscles.
gept.example_zh: 我每天早上伸展五分鐘來喚醒肌肉。

gept.example_en: She exercises three times a week at the neighborhood gym.
gept.example_zh: 她每週在社區健身房運動三次。

gept.example_en: He jogs through the park every Sunday rain or shine.
gept.example_zh: 不論晴雨，他每個週日都會在公園慢跑。

gept.example_en: The birds outside my window wake me earlier than my alarm clock.
gept.example_zh: 窗外的鳥兒比我的鬧鐘還早把我吵醒。

gept.example_en: I usually snooze the alarm twice before finally getting out of bed.
gept.example_zh: 我通常會把鬧鐘按掉兩次才終於起床。

gept.example_en: I oversleep almost every Monday after staying up too late on Sunday.
gept.example_zh: 週日熬夜後，我幾乎每個週一都會睡過頭。

gept.example_en: She rushes through breakfast to catch the seven o'clock train.
gept.example_zh: 她匆匆吃完早餐去趕七點的火車。

gept.example_en: Hurry up or we will miss the morning yoga class again.
gept.example_zh: 快一點，不然我們又要錯過早上的瑜伽課了。

gept.example_en: He always tries to arrive at the office ten minutes early.
gept.example_zh: 他總是試著提前十分鐘到辦公室。

gept.example_en: I usually leave home at eight fifteen to avoid heavy traffic.
gept.example_zh: 我通常八點十五分出門以避開塞車。

gept.example_en: She returned home from the gym exhausted but happy.
gept.example_zh: 她運動完從健身房回家，疲憊但開心。

gept.example_en: Take time to rest your eyes during long hours of computer work.
gept.example_zh: 長時間使用電腦時要花點時間讓眼睛休息。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 重新充電；恢復精神
gept.example_en: Weekends are when I recharge my energy for the busy week ahead.
gept.example_zh: 週末是我為忙碌一週重新充電的時間。

gept.example_en: He likes to nap for twenty minutes after a heavy lunch.
gept.example_zh: 他喜歡在吃完豐盛午餐後小睡二十分鐘。

gept.example_en: She often daydreams about traveling to faraway tropical islands.
gept.example_zh: 她常做白日夢，想去遙遠的熱帶島嶼旅行。

gept.example_en: I reflect on my day for a few minutes before going to bed.
gept.example_zh: 我睡前會花幾分鐘反思一天。

gept.example_en: She journals every evening about the small joys of her day.
gept.example_zh: 她每天晚上寫日記記錄一天中的小確幸。

gept.example_en: He meditates for ten minutes each morning to clear his mind.
gept.example_zh: 他每天早上冥想十分鐘以淨化心靈。

gept.example_en: Many people pray before meals to express gratitude for their food.
gept.example_zh: 許多人會在用餐前祈禱以表達對食物的感謝。

gept.example_en: Could you please set the table while I finish cooking the rice?
gept.example_zh: 可以麻煩你擺餐桌嗎？我把米飯煮完。

gept.example_en: The kids clear the table together after every family dinner.
gept.example_zh: 每次家庭晚餐後孩子們會一起收拾餐桌。

gept.example_en: Don't forget to lock up the house before going on vacation.
gept.example_zh: 出門度假前別忘了把房子鎖好。

gept.example_en: Turn off the lights when you leave the room to save energy.
gept.example_zh: 離開房間時請關燈以節省能源。

gept.example_en: Turn on the heater for about ten minutes before showering.
gept.example_zh: 淋浴前先把暖氣機打開大約十分鐘。

gept.example_en: Always switch off appliances at the wall before going to bed.
gept.example_zh: 睡前一定要關掉牆上插座的電器開關。

gept.example_en: Remember to plug in your phone charger before you fall asleep.
gept.example_zh: 記得在睡著前把手機充電器插上。

gept.example_en: Unplug the toaster after use to prevent any fire hazard.
gept.example_zh: 使用後拔掉烤麵包機的插頭以防火災。

gept.example_en: We occasionally eat out on Friday nights to take a break from cooking.
gept.example_zh: 我們偶爾在週五晚上外食，讓自己從煮飯中休息一下。

gept.example_en: She frequently visits her grandmother who lives in the next town.
gept.example_zh: 她經常去探望住在隔壁鎮的祖母。

gept.example_en: After many attempts, he eventually fixed the leaking kitchen faucet.
gept.example_zh: 經過多次嘗試，他最終修好了漏水的廚房水龍頭。

gept.example_en: I prepared the salad; meanwhile, my husband grilled the chicken outside.
gept.example_zh: 我準備沙拉，同時我先生在外面烤雞肉。

gept.example_en: Nowadays many people order groceries online instead of going to the store.
gept.example_zh: 如今許多人會在網路上訂購雜貨，而不是去店裡。

gept.example_en: I recently started learning how to bake sourdough bread at home.
gept.example_zh: 我最近開始學在家烘焙酸種麵包。

gept.example_en: She is currently studying for her real estate license while working part-time.
gept.example_zh: 她目前一邊兼職一邊準備房地產經紀人執照考試。

gept.example_en: Previously, the family lived in a small apartment near the city center.
gept.example_zh: 這家人先前住在市中心附近的一間小公寓裡。

gept.example_en: Immediately after dinner, I usually wash the dishes and tidy the kitchen.
gept.example_zh: 晚餐後我通常立刻洗碗並整理廚房。

gept.example_en: The microwave heats up leftover soup almost instantly for a quick meal.
gept.example_zh: 微波爐幾乎即刻就能加熱剩湯，讓你快速用餐。

gept.example_en: The weather gradually warmed up as spring slowly arrived.
gept.example_zh: 隨著春天慢慢來臨，天氣逐漸變暖。

gept.example_en: Suddenly the lights went out and the whole neighborhood was dark.
gept.example_zh: 突然之間燈全滅了，整個社區一片漆黑。

gept.example_en: We rarely use the formal dining room except on holidays.
gept.example_zh: 我們很少使用正式餐廳，只有節日才會用。

gept.example_en: He seldom remembers to take out the recycling on Tuesday mornings.
gept.example_zh: 他很少記得在週二早上把回收物拿出去倒。

gept.example_en: The baby cries constantly during the long evenings when she is teething.
gept.example_zh: 寶寶長牙時，整個漫長的傍晚都不停地哭。

gept.example_en: The kitchen tap drips continually until somebody finally tightens the handle.
gept.example_zh: 廚房水龍頭一直滴水，直到有人把水龍頭把手鎖緊。

gept.example_en: The bus from our neighborhood to downtown runs hourly on weekends.
gept.example_zh: 我們社區到市區的公車週末每小時一班。

gept.example_en: She walks the dog daily, regardless of the weather conditions.
gept.example_zh: 不論天氣如何，她每天都會遛狗。

gept.example_en: Our family has a weekly movie night every Friday evening.
gept.example_zh: 我們家每週五晚上都有電影之夜。

gept.example_en: I pay my utility bills monthly through automatic bank transfers.
gept.example_zh: 我透過銀行自動轉帳每月繳水電費。

gept.example_en: The community organizes a clean-up day annually in early spring.
gept.example_zh: 社區每年在初春會舉辦一次清掃日。

gept.example_en: Our recycling truck visits the neighborhood biweekly on Wednesdays.
gept.example_zh: 我們的回收車每兩週三來社區一次。

gept.example_en: She is always punctual, often arriving five minutes before the meeting starts.
gept.example_zh: 她總是準時，常常在會議開始前五分鐘就到。

gept.example_en: The repairman arrived right on time to fix the washing machine.
gept.example_zh: 維修工準時到達修理洗衣機。

gept.example_en: Prepare your work clothes ahead of time so mornings feel less rushed.
gept.example_zh: 提前準備好上班衣服，這樣早上比較不慌亂。

gept.example_en: The renovation project is finally back on schedule after the brief delay.
gept.example_zh: 裝修工程經過短暫延誤後終於回到原本進度。

gept.example_en: The new house is several weeks behind schedule due to bad weather.
gept.example_zh: 由於天氣不佳，新家的工程比原訂進度落後幾週。

gept.example_en: We are temporarily living with my parents while our apartment is being renovated.
gept.example_zh: 我們的公寓在裝修期間暫時住在父母家。

gept.example_en: After retirement, they permanently moved to a small fishing village by the sea.
gept.example_zh: 退休後，他們永久搬到海邊的小漁村。

gept.example_en: I stopped by my neighbor's house briefly to drop off a package.
gept.example_zh: 我短暫地去鄰居家放個包裹。

gept.example_en: Lately I have been waking up earlier to enjoy a quiet morning routine.
gept.example_zh: 最近我開始早一點起床來享受安靜的晨間時光。

gept.example_en: Dinner will be ready soon, so please come and set the table.
gept.example_zh: 晚餐很快就好，請來擺餐桌。

gept.example_en: We watched a movie and went out for dessert afterward.
gept.example_zh: 我們看完電影後去吃了甜點。

gept.example_en: Wash the rice beforehand so it can soak while you prepare the side dishes.
gept.example_zh: 事先把米洗好，這樣準備配菜時米可以浸泡。

gept.example_en: She cooks dinner and helps her son with homework simultaneously every evening.
gept.example_zh: 她每晚同時煮晚餐並指導兒子寫功課。

gept.example_en: He repeatedly forgot to lock the back door before leaving the house.
gept.example_zh: 他出門前反覆忘記鎖後門。

gept.example_en: She visits her elderly father regularly on weekends.
gept.example_zh: 她週末定期去探望她年邁的父親。

gept.example_en: Once in a while we order pizza instead of cooking dinner ourselves.
gept.example_zh: 偶爾我們會叫披薩而不是自己做晚餐。

gept.example_en: From time to time the old refrigerator makes a strange humming noise.
gept.example_zh: 這台舊冰箱不時會發出奇怪的嗡嗡聲。

gept.example_en: The convenience store on our corner operates around the clock.
gept.example_zh: 我們街角的便利商店全天候營業。

gept.example_en: It started to drizzle as we walked home from the grocery store.
gept.example_zh: 我們從雜貨店走回家時開始下起毛毛雨。

gept.example_en: A gentle breeze blew through the open kitchen window all afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 整個下午微風從敞開的廚房窗戶吹進來。

gept.example_en: Summers here are extremely humid, so we run the dehumidifier constantly.
gept.example_zh: 這裡的夏天非常潮濕，所以我們不斷開除濕機。

gept.example_en: A fierce blizzard buried the neighborhood under nearly a meter of snow.
gept.example_zh: 一場猛烈暴風雪將社區埋在近一公尺深的雪下。

gept.example_en: A sudden downpour soaked everyone who was waiting at the bus stop.
gept.example_zh: 一陣突如其來的傾盆大雨把公車站等車的人都淋濕了。

gept.example_en: Local farmers worried about their crops during the long summer drought.
gept.example_zh: 當地農民在漫長的夏季乾旱期間擔心他們的作物。

gept.example_en: Heavy rain caused a small flood in our basement last week.
gept.example_zh: 上週的大雨在我們地下室造成了小洪水。

gept.example_en: A thin layer of frost covered the lawn early this morning.
gept.example_zh: 今天清晨草坪上覆蓋著一層薄霜。

gept.example_en: Thick fog hung over the neighborhood, making it hard to see across the street.
gept.example_zh: 濃霧籠罩社區，讓人很難看清馬路對面。

gept.example_en: A light mist hovered over the lake in the early morning hours.
gept.example_zh: 清晨湖面上飄著一層薄霧。

gept.example_en: Marble-sized hail damaged the roofs of several cars in the parking lot.
gept.example_zh: 彈珠大小的冰雹損壞了停車場上幾輛車的車頂。

gept.example_en: A summer thunderstorm knocked out power across the entire neighborhood.
gept.example_zh: 一場夏季雷雨使整個社區停電。

gept.example_en: Bright flashes of lightning lit up the sky for several seconds.
gept.example_zh: 明亮的閃電讓天空亮了好幾秒。

gept.example_en: Loud thunder woke the baby in the middle of the night.
gept.example_zh: 巨大的雷聲在半夜把寶寶吵醒了。

gept.example_en: Check the weather forecast before planning your weekend hiking trip.
gept.example_zh: 規劃週末健行前先查看天氣預報。

gept.example_en: The temperature dropped sharply overnight and we needed extra blankets.
gept.example_zh: 夜間氣溫驟降，我們得加蓋毛毯。

gept.example_en: The forecast says it will reach thirty-five degrees Celsius tomorrow afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 氣象預報說明天下午會達到攝氏三十五度。

gept.example_en: She still uses Fahrenheit because she grew up in the United States.
gept.example_zh: 她仍然使用華氏，因為她在美國長大。

gept.example_en: It is freezing outside, so wear your warmest winter coat.
gept.example_zh: 外面冷得結冰，穿你最暖的冬季大衣吧。

gept.example_en: The afternoon was boiling, and even the dog refused to go outside.
gept.example_zh: 下午熱得不得了，連狗都不肯出門。

gept.example_en: Tourists struggled to walk through the scorching desert at midday.
gept.example_zh: 遊客們在正午灼熱的沙漠中艱難地行走。

gept.example_en: Early mornings in autumn are chilly enough to need a light sweater.
gept.example_zh: 秋天的清晨涼到需要穿件薄毛衣。

gept.example_en: The towels are still damp because the dryer broke yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 毛巾還是濕的，因為烘衣機昨天壞了。

gept.example_en: Tonight feels muggy, so let's keep the bedroom window open.
gept.example_zh: 今晚感覺悶熱，所以我們把臥室窗戶開著吧。

gept.example_en: Autumn brings crisp mornings perfect for long walks in the park.
gept.example_zh: 秋天帶來涼爽清新的早晨，非常適合在公園散步。

gept.example_en: Winters here are mild, with temperatures rarely below freezing.
gept.example_zh: 這裡的冬天很溫和，氣溫很少低於冰點。

gept.example_en: The sky was overcast all morning but cleared up before lunch.
gept.example_zh: 整個早上天空都陰陰的，但中午前轉晴。

gept.example_en: It was a perfect sunny day for hanging laundry outside on the line.
gept.example_zh: 這是把衣服掛在外面曬的完美晴天。

gept.example_en: The morning started off cloudy but turned bright by lunchtime.
gept.example_zh: 早上天氣多雲，但中午就轉晴了。

gept.example_en: It was so windy that the patio umbrella nearly blew away.
gept.example_zh: 風大到陽台上的傘差點被吹走。

gept.example_en: A sudden gust of wind slammed the front door shut.
gept.example_zh: 一陣突如其來的強風把前門用力關上。

gept.example_en: A powerful storm tore branches off the tree in our backyard.
gept.example_zh: 一場強烈的暴風雨把我家後院樹上的樹枝吹斷了。

gept.example_en: The hailstorm cracked several windows on the south side of the house.
gept.example_zh: 這場冰雹風暴震裂了房子南側的好幾扇窗戶。

gept.example_en: School was cancelled because of the snowstorm that hit overnight.
gept.example_zh: 由於昨晚的暴雪，學校停課了。

gept.example_en: An intense heatwave lasted for nearly two weeks last August.
gept.example_zh: 去年八月有一波強烈熱浪持續了近兩週。

gept.example_en: A cold front is expected to arrive on Friday and lower temperatures sharply.
gept.example_zh: 預計週五將有冷鋒到來，氣溫將大幅下降。

gept.example_en: A beautiful rainbow appeared over the neighborhood after the brief rain.
gept.example_zh: 短暫降雨後，社區上空出現了一道美麗的彩虹。

gept.example_en: Morning dew sparkled on the grass as the sun rose slowly.
gept.example_zh: 太陽緩緩升起時，晨露在草地上閃閃發光。

gept.example_en: Long icicles formed under the roof during the cold winter nights.
gept.example_zh: 在寒冷的冬夜，屋簷下形成了長長的冰柱。

gept.example_en: The children jumped happily into every puddle on the way home from school.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們放學回家的路上開心地踩著每個水坑。

gept.example_en: Walking through the slush on the sidewalk soaked my sneakers completely.
gept.example_zh: 走在人行道上的雪泥裡讓我的運動鞋完全濕透。

gept.example_en: Each season brings different activities and household routines.
gept.example_zh: 每個季節都有不同的活動和家務節奏。

gept.example_en: In spring, we open all the windows to let fresh air into the house.
gept.example_zh: 春天時我們打開所有的窗戶，讓新鮮空氣進入屋內。

gept.example_en: Summer evenings are spent on the porch with cold lemonade.
gept.example_zh: 夏天的夜晚我們會坐在門廊上喝冰檸檬汁。

gept.example_en: Autumn leaves cover our entire front lawn within a few days.
gept.example_zh: 幾天之內秋葉就鋪滿了我們整個前院草坪。

gept.example_en: Winter mornings are cold, so I always heat up the bathroom first.
gept.example_zh: 冬天早晨很冷，所以我總是先把浴室暖起來。

gept.example_en: The monsoon season brings heavy rain every afternoon for weeks.
gept.example_zh: 雨季每天下午都會連續好幾週下大雨。

gept.example_en: On rainy days, we plan indoor activities like board games and baking.
gept.example_zh: 下雨天我們會安排室內活動，像是桌遊和烘焙。

gept.example_en: Spring is the best season for outdoor barbecues with the whole family.
gept.example_zh: 春天是和全家人一起戶外烤肉的最佳季節。

gept.example_en: They moved from the city to a quieter suburb after their first child.
gept.example_zh: 第一個孩子出生後，他們從市區搬到較安靜的郊區。

gept.example_en: A narrow alley behind the house leads to the community garden.
gept.example_zh: 房子後面的窄巷通往社區花園。

gept.example_en: Be careful at the intersection because cars rarely come to a complete stop.
gept.example_zh: 在這個十字路口要小心，因為車子很少完全停下來。

gept.example_en: Neighbors greet each other as they pass by on the sidewalk.
gept.example_zh: 鄰居們在人行道上經過時會互相打招呼。

gept.example_en: A bird built a small nest on top of the lamppost outside.
gept.example_zh: 一隻鳥在外面路燈柱頂上築了一個小巢。

gept.example_en: Please check the mailbox in case the package was delivered today.
gept.example_zh: 請查看信箱，看包裹今天是不是送來了。

gept.example_en: Always use the crosswalk when teaching children how to cross safely.
gept.example_zh: 教孩子安全過馬路時務必使用行人穿越道。

gept.example_en: A wooden fence separates our backyard from the neighbor's garden.
gept.example_zh: 一道木製圍籬把我們的後院和鄰居的花園隔開。

gept.example_en: The garden gate squeaks loudly every time we open it.
gept.example_zh: 每次我們打開花園大門時都會發出大聲的吱嘎聲。

gept.example_en: A thick hedge along the property line gives us extra privacy.
gept.example_zh: 沿著地界的茂密樹籬給了我們額外的隱私。

gept.example_en: Park your car close to the curb so other vehicles can pass.
gept.example_zh: 把車停靠近路緣，讓其他車輛可以通過。

gept.example_en: Cracked pavement on our street needs to be repaired soon.
gept.example_zh: 我們街上裂開的路面需要儘快修補。

gept.example_en: A deep pothole on Main Street damaged the tires of several cars.
gept.example_zh: 主街上一個深坑洞損壞了好幾輛車的輪胎。

gept.example_en: The faded street sign made it difficult to find the right address.
gept.example_zh: 褪色的路牌讓我們很難找到正確的地址。

gept.example_en: A new traffic light was installed at the busy intersection downtown.
gept.example_zh: 市中心繁忙的十字路口新裝了一個紅綠燈。

gept.example_en: Children waited patiently at the zebra crossing for the green light.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們在斑馬線旁耐心地等綠燈。

gept.example_en: The bus stop is just two blocks from our front door.
gept.example_zh: 公車站離我們家大門只有兩個街區。

gept.example_en: Our apartment is conveniently located near a major subway station.
gept.example_zh: 我們的公寓位置方便，靠近一個主要地鐵站。

gept.example_en: Children play soccer in the neighborhood park every Saturday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們每週六下午都在社區公園裡踢足球。

gept.example_en: The new playground has slides, swings, and a climbing wall for kids.
gept.example_zh: 新遊樂場為孩子們設有滑梯、鞦韆和攀岩牆。

gept.example_en: A small fountain in the town square attracts birds and tourists.
gept.example_zh: 鎮中心廣場的小噴泉吸引了鳥兒和遊客。

gept.example_en: Our local library hosts free reading sessions every Saturday morning.
gept.example_zh: 我們當地的圖書館每週六上午舉辦免費讀書會。

gept.example_en: I went to the post office to mail a birthday card to my cousin.
gept.example_zh: 我去郵局寄了一張生日卡給我表妹。

gept.example_en: The convenience store on the corner sells everything from snacks to umbrellas.
gept.example_zh: 街角的便利商店什麼都賣，從零食到雨傘。

gept.example_en: I do my weekly grocery shopping at the supermarket near the park.
gept.example_zh: 我每週都在公園附近的超市採買雜貨。

gept.example_en: The pharmacy stays open late, which is convenient when someone gets sick at night.
gept.example_zh: 這家藥局營業到很晚，當有人晚上生病時很方便。

gept.example_en: Our family doctor runs a small clinic two blocks from our house.
gept.example_zh: 我們的家庭醫師在離家兩個街區的地方開了一間小診所。

gept.example_en: The community center offers free yoga classes on Tuesday evenings.
gept.example_zh: 社區中心週二晚上提供免費瑜伽課程。

gept.example_en: Our neighborhood watch group meets monthly to discuss safety concerns.
gept.example_zh: 我們的社區守望相助小組每月聚會討論治安問題。

gept.example_en: This is a quiet residential area where children can play safely outside.
gept.example_zh: 這是個安靜的住宅區，孩子們可以安全地在外面玩。

gept.example_en: A commercial district with shops and restaurants is just a short walk away.
gept.example_zh: 商店和餐廳林立的商業區步行不遠就到。

gept.example_en: We sometimes take the bus downtown for dinner and a movie.
gept.example_zh: 我們有時搭公車到市中心吃飯看電影。

gept.example_en: Uptown has many quiet streets and small family-owned shops.
gept.example_zh: 上城區有很多安靜的街道和家族經營的小商店。

gept.example_en: The bakery is just one block away from our apartment building.
gept.example_zh: 麵包店就在離我們公寓大樓一個街區的地方。

gept.example_en: Maple Avenue is lined with tall trees and historic homes.
gept.example_zh: 楓樹大道兩旁種滿高大的樹木，並有許多老房子。

gept.example_en: The wide boulevard becomes a popular place for evening walks in summer.
gept.example_zh: 夏天時這條寬闊的林蔭大道是傍晚散步的熱門場所。

gept.example_en: Our quiet street ends in a dead end, so traffic is minimal.
gept.example_zh: 我們安靜的街道盡頭是條死路，所以幾乎沒有車。

gept.example_en: The cul-de-sac is a safe place for kids to ride their bikes.
gept.example_zh: 這條死巷是孩子們騎腳踏車的安全地方。

gept.example_en: The parking lot behind the building fills up quickly on weekends.
gept.example_zh: 週末時大樓後面的停車場很快就停滿。

gept.example_en: The garbage truck comes every Tuesday morning at around six o'clock.
gept.example_zh: 垃圾車每週二早上六點左右會來。

gept.example_en: Never park your car directly in front of a fire hydrant.
gept.example_zh: 千萬不要把車直接停在消防栓前面。

gept.example_en: Soft street lamp light made our evening walk feel safe and pleasant.
gept.example_zh: 柔和的街燈光讓我們的晚間散步感覺安全又愉快。

gept.example_en: Elderly neighbors often sit on the bench in front of the bakery.
gept.example_zh: 年長的鄰居們常坐在麵包店前的長椅上。

gept.example_en: Use a Phillips screwdriver to tighten the loose hinge on the cabinet door.
gept.example_zh: 用十字螺絲起子鎖緊櫃門上鬆動的鉸鏈。

gept.example_en: He grabbed the wrench to tighten the dripping kitchen faucet quickly.
gept.example_zh: 他抓起扳手快速鎖緊滴水的廚房水龍頭。

gept.example_en: She swept the leaves off the porch with an old wooden broom.
gept.example_zh: 她用一支舊木掃帚把門廊上的葉子掃乾淨。

gept.example_en: Sweep the crumbs onto the dustpan and dump them in the trash.
gept.example_zh: 把麵包屑掃進畚箕，再倒進垃圾桶。

gept.example_en: He uses a long garden hose to water all the plants quickly.
gept.example_zh: 他用一條長長的花園水管很快地把所有植物澆完。

gept.example_en: He hammered the loose nails back into the wooden floorboard.
gept.example_zh: 他用鎚子把鬆動的釘子敲回木地板。

gept.example_en: She used a small nail to hang the painting on the wall.
gept.example_zh: 她用一根小釘子把畫掛在牆上。

gept.example_en: One screw on the chair leg came loose and needs tightening.
gept.example_zh: 椅腳上一顆螺絲鬆了，需要鎖緊。

gept.example_en: The bolt on the garage door rusted and needed to be replaced.
gept.example_zh: 車庫門上的螺栓生鏽了，需要更換。

gept.example_en: He climbed the ladder to change the light bulb in the ceiling.
gept.example_zh: 他爬上梯子去更換天花板上的燈泡。

gept.example_en: Dad keeps his toolbox in the garage right next to the workbench.
gept.example_zh: 爸爸把工具箱放在車庫工作台旁邊。

gept.example_en: Use a tape measure to make sure the new sofa fits through the door.
gept.example_zh: 用捲尺確認新沙發能通過門口。

gept.example_en: Use a level to make sure the shelf is straight before drilling.
gept.example_zh: 在鑽孔前用水平儀確保架子是平的。

gept.example_en: He used a cordless drill to install the new curtain rod above the window.
gept.example_zh: 他用無線電鑽在窗戶上方安裝新的窗簾桿。

gept.example_en: I used pliers to remove the bent nail from the doorframe.
gept.example_zh: 我用鉗子從門框上拔出彎掉的釘子。

gept.example_en: Keep a flashlight near the bed in case of nighttime power outages.
gept.example_zh: 在床邊放一把手電筒以備夜間停電之用。

gept.example_en: Replace the batteries in the smoke detector every six months.
gept.example_zh: 每六個月更換一次煙霧偵測器的電池。

gept.example_en: Be careful not to overload the extension cord with too many devices.
gept.example_zh: 小心不要在延長線上插太多電器超載。

gept.example_en: Plug all your office electronics into one surge-protected power strip.
gept.example_zh: 把你所有的辦公電器都插在一個有突波保護的電源延長排插上。

gept.example_en: She filled a bucket with warm soapy water to mop the floor.
gept.example_zh: 她裝了一桶溫肥皂水準備拖地。

gept.example_en: Use a damp sponge to wipe down the kitchen counter after meals.
gept.example_zh: 用濕海綿在飯後擦拭廚房檯面。

gept.example_en: Keep an old rag handy for cleaning up unexpected spills.
gept.example_zh: 隨手放一塊舊抹布以便清理突發的潑灑。

gept.example_en: Keep a pair of kitchen scissors in the top drawer for opening packages.
gept.example_zh: 在最上層抽屜裡放一把廚房剪刀，方便開包裝。

gept.example_en: Use clear tape to fix the torn page back into the notebook.
gept.example_zh: 用透明膠帶把撕破的頁面黏回筆記本。

gept.example_en: A small drop of glue can repair the broken handle of the mug.
gept.example_zh: 一小滴膠水就能修好馬克杯斷掉的把手。

gept.example_en: Tie the package with a piece of string before mailing it.
gept.example_zh: 在郵寄前用一段繩子把包裹綁好。

gept.example_en: He used a thick rope to secure the boxes in the truck.
gept.example_zh: 他用粗繩把箱子固定在卡車上。

gept.example_en: Use a strong chain to lock your bike to the rack outside.
gept.example_zh: 用堅固的鎖鏈把腳踏車鎖在外面的車架上。

gept.example_en: She secured the garden shed with a heavy padlock.
gept.example_zh: 她用一把沉重的掛鎖鎖住花園棚屋。

gept.example_en: I always keep a spare key hidden behind the small flower pot.
gept.example_zh: 我總是把備用鑰匙藏在小花盆後面。

gept.example_en: Her colorful keychain helps her find her keys quickly in the bag.
gept.example_zh: 她色彩繽紛的鑰匙圈讓她能快速從包包裡找到鑰匙。

gept.example_en: A strong magnet holds the shopping list to the refrigerator door.
gept.example_zh: 一塊強力磁鐵把購物清單固定在冰箱門上。

gept.example_en: Use a clip to keep the bread bag tightly closed after opening.
gept.example_zh: 用夾子把開封後的麵包袋夾緊。

gept.example_en: I keep a small nailclipper in the bathroom drawer for weekly trimming.
gept.example_zh: 我在浴室抽屜放一支小指甲剪，方便每週修剪。

gept.example_en: Replace your toothbrush every three months or when the bristles become frayed.
gept.example_zh: 每三個月或刷毛變散時更換牙刷。

gept.example_en: He uses a new razor blade once a week to keep shaving comfortable.
gept.example_zh: 他每週換一次新的剃刀刀片以保持刮鬍舒適。

gept.example_en: A wooden soap dish keeps the bar of soap dry between uses.
gept.example_zh: 木製肥皂盒能讓肥皂在兩次使用之間保持乾燥。

gept.example_en: We buy toilet paper in bulk to save money on monthly expenses.
gept.example_zh: 我們大量購買衛生紙以節省每月開銷。

gept.example_en: Place a tissue box on the nightstand in case anyone wakes up sneezing.
gept.example_zh: 在床頭櫃上放一個面紙盒，以防有人半夜醒來打噴嚏。

gept.example_en: Always tie the trash bag tightly before taking it to the curb.
gept.example_zh: 在把垃圾袋拿到路邊前一定要綁緊。

gept.example_en: Every household should keep a plunger handy in case the toilet clogs.
gept.example_zh: 每個家庭都應該備有一個疏通器以防馬桶堵塞。

gept.example_en: Use a soft scrubber so you do not scratch the nonstick pan.
gept.example_zh: 用軟的菜瓜布以免刮傷不沾鍋。

gept.example_en: She used a squeegee to leave the bathroom mirror streak-free.
gept.example_zh: 她用玻璃刮刀把浴室鏡子擦得沒有水痕。

gept.example_en: Stand on the step stool to reach the items on the top shelf.
gept.example_zh: 站在踏凳上才能拿到最上層架子上的東西。

gept.example_en: They rent a small apartment near the university to save on transport.
gept.example_zh: 他們在大學附近租了間小公寓以節省交通費。

gept.example_en: The lease for our apartment expires in three months, so we are house hunting.
gept.example_zh: 我們公寓的租約三個月後到期，所以正在找房子。

gept.example_en: Our landlord agreed to repaint the walls before we moved in.
gept.example_zh: 我們搬進來之前，房東答應重新粉刷牆壁。

gept.example_en: The new tenant moved in last weekend and seems very friendly.
gept.example_zh: 新房客上週末搬進來，似乎很友善。

gept.example_en: Our monthly utility bills include water, electricity, and gas.
gept.example_zh: 我們每月的公用事業費包括水、電和瓦斯。

gept.example_en: They are still paying off the mortgage on their first home.
gept.example_zh: 他們還在償還第一間房子的房貸。

gept.example_en: The landlord asked for a security deposit equal to one month's rent.
gept.example_zh: 房東要求一個月租金的保證金。

gept.example_en: She prefers a furnished apartment because she travels often for work.
gept.example_zh: 她偏好附家具的公寓，因為她常常因工作出差。

gept.example_en: An unfurnished apartment is cheaper but requires buying everything yourself.
gept.example_zh: 無家具的公寓比較便宜，但需要自己買所有東西。

gept.example_en: A studio apartment is perfect for one person who doesn't need much space.
gept.example_zh: 套房很適合不需要太大空間的單身人士。

gept.example_en: They moved into a one-bedroom apartment after their roommates moved out.
gept.example_zh: 室友搬走後，他們搬進了一間一房公寓。

gept.example_en: A two-bedroom apartment gives the couple space for a small office.
gept.example_zh: 兩房公寓讓這對夫婦多出空間做小辦公室。

gept.example_en: Their townhouse has three floors and shares walls with the neighbors.
gept.example_zh: 他們的連棟住宅有三層樓，與鄰居共用牆面。

gept.example_en: The condo building has a gym and a swimming pool for residents.
gept.example_zh: 這棟公寓大樓有健身房和游泳池供住戶使用。

gept.example_en: The apartment complex offers free Wi-Fi in all common areas.
gept.example_zh: 這個公寓建築群在所有公共區域提供免費 Wi-Fi。

gept.example_en: As a homeowner, she is responsible for all repairs and maintenance.
gept.example_zh: 身為屋主，她需要負責所有的修繕和維護。

gept.example_en: Many young people are renters because home prices keep rising.
gept.example_zh: 許多年輕人都是租屋者，因為房價持續上漲。

gept.example_en: My housemate cooks dinner on Mondays and I cook on Thursdays.
gept.example_zh: 我的室友週一煮晚餐，我則在週四煮。

gept.example_en: Co-tenants must each sign the lease before moving in.
gept.example_zh: 共同承租人在搬進來前都必須簽署租約。

gept.example_en: She plans to sublet her apartment while she studies abroad next year.
gept.example_zh: 她計劃明年留學期間把公寓轉租出去。

gept.example_en: We will move in next Saturday once the painting is finished.
gept.example_zh: 油漆工程一完成，我們下週六就搬進來。

gept.example_en: He needs to move out of his parents' house and find his own place.
gept.example_zh: 他需要從父母家搬出來，找個自己的住處。

gept.example_en: The family had to relocate because of his new job in another city.
gept.example_zh: 因為他在另一個城市的新工作，這家人不得不搬遷。

gept.example_en: It usually takes a few weeks to fully settle in a new neighborhood.
gept.example_zh: 通常需要幾週的時間才能完全在新社區安頓下來。

gept.example_en: We hosted a small housewarming party to celebrate our new home.
gept.example_zh: 我們舉辦了一個小型喬遷派對來慶祝新家。

gept.example_en: They plan to renovate the kitchen before the holidays arrive.
gept.example_zh: 他們打算在節日來臨前翻修廚房。

gept.example_en: We remodeled the bathroom and added a glass shower enclosure.
gept.example_zh: 我們改建了浴室並加裝了玻璃淋浴間。

gept.example_en: The old house needed to be rewired for modern electrical safety standards.
gept.example_zh: 這棟舊房子需要重新配線以符合現代電氣安全標準。

gept.example_en: She repainted the living room a soft blue last weekend.
gept.example_zh: 她上週末把客廳重新粉刷成柔和的藍色。

gept.example_en: I plan to paint my bedroom walls a calming shade of green.
gept.example_zh: 我打算把臥室牆壁漆成令人平靜的綠色。

gept.example_en: She chose floral wallpaper to brighten up the small powder room.
gept.example_zh: 她選了花卉壁紙來點亮這間小客用洗手間。

gept.example_en: They installed bamboo flooring throughout the first floor of the house.
gept.example_zh: 他們在房子一樓全部鋪了竹木地板。

gept.example_en: Several tiles in the kitchen need to be replaced after the leak.
gept.example_zh: 漏水之後，廚房有幾塊磁磚需要更換。

gept.example_en: Old plumbing in the bathroom causes the water pressure to drop suddenly.
gept.example_zh: 浴室裡老舊的水管系統會讓水壓突然下降。

gept.example_en: Faulty wiring can cause electrical fires if it is not inspected regularly.
gept.example_zh: 如果不定期檢查，故障的線路可能引發電氣火災。

gept.example_en: Home insurance protects you from unexpected expenses due to fires or theft.
gept.example_zh: 房屋保險可保護你免於因火災或竊盜產生的意外開支。

gept.example_en: Property tax is due every year in our city by the end of June.
gept.example_zh: 在我們城市，房地產稅每年六月底前必須繳清。

gept.example_en: Our homeowners association charges a monthly fee for landscaping and maintenance.
gept.example_zh: 我們的屋主協會收取每月費用用於景觀和維護。

gept.example_en: The tenant received an eviction notice after missing three months of rent.
gept.example_zh: 這位房客在連續三個月未繳房租後收到了驅逐通知。

gept.example_en: He mows the lawn every other Saturday during the summer months.
gept.example_zh: 夏天時他每隔一個週六就會修剪一次草坪。

gept.example_en: Tomato seeds usually sprout within seven to ten days after planting.
gept.example_zh: 番茄種子通常在種下後七到十天內發芽。

gept.example_en: Pull the weeds out of the garden before they spread too widely.
gept.example_zh: 在雜草蔓延得太廣之前先把它們拔出來。

gept.example_en: Use organic fertilizer to help your vegetables grow strong and healthy.
gept.example_zh: 使用有機肥料能讓你的蔬菜長得茁壯健康。

gept.example_en: Healthy soil is the foundation of a productive home vegetable garden.
gept.example_zh: 健康的土壤是豐收家庭菜園的基礎。

gept.example_en: She plants new flowers along the garden path every spring.
gept.example_zh: 她每年春天都會在花園小徑旁種上新花。

gept.example_en: Plant the seeds about an inch deep and water them gently.
gept.example_zh: 把種子種在約一英寸深的地方，並輕輕澆水。

gept.example_en: Move the seedlings outside once the danger of frost has passed.
gept.example_zh: 等霜害的危險過去後，再把幼苗移到外面。

gept.example_en: She grows tomatoes in a small greenhouse behind the garage all winter.
gept.example_zh: 她整個冬天都在車庫後面的小溫室裡種番茄。

gept.example_en: She transplanted the herb seedlings into larger clay pots.
gept.example_zh: 她把香草幼苗移植到較大的陶土花盆裡。

gept.example_en: A row of tulips fills the flowerbed beside the front porch.
gept.example_zh: 一排鬱金香盛開在前廊旁的花圃裡。

gept.example_en: Our backyard vegetable patch produces enough tomatoes for the entire summer.
gept.example_zh: 我們後院的菜圃整個夏天都能產出足夠的番茄。

gept.example_en: Grandfather still works in his small orchard despite being eighty years old.
gept.example_zh: 祖父雖然已經八十歲了，仍在他的小果園裡幹活。

gept.example_en: Cherry trees blossom in early April in our neighborhood.
gept.example_zh: 我們社區的櫻花樹在四月初開花。

gept.example_en: Roses bloom in the front yard from late May through early August.
gept.example_zh: 前院的玫瑰從五月底開到八月初。

gept.example_en: The flowers began to wither after several days without water.
gept.example_zh: 花朵在好幾天沒澆水後開始枯萎。

gept.example_en: Prune the fruit trees in late winter while they are still dormant.
gept.example_zh: 在冬末果樹還在休眠期時修剪它們。

gept.example_en: He trims the hedge every two weeks to keep it neat and shapely.
gept.example_zh: 他每兩週修剪一次樹籬，讓它整齊美觀。

gept.example_en: She raked the fallen leaves into a pile beside the driveway.
gept.example_zh: 她把落葉耙成一堆放在私人車道旁。

gept.example_en: He used a shovel to dig a hole for the new apple tree.
gept.example_zh: 他用鏟子挖了個洞種新蘋果樹。

gept.example_en: A spade is essential for working in the vegetable garden every spring.
gept.example_zh: 鐵鏟是每年春天在菜園裡工作不可或缺的工具。

gept.example_en: Use a small trowel to plant seedlings in the flowerbed.
gept.example_zh: 用小泥鏟把幼苗種進花圃裡。

gept.example_en: He filled the wheelbarrow with mulch for the rose bushes.
gept.example_zh: 他把獨輪手推車裝滿了給玫瑰叢用的覆蓋物。

gept.example_en: Mom uses an old metal watering can for her indoor plants.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽用一個舊金屬灑水壺澆室內植物。

gept.example_en: The sprinkler waters the lawn automatically each morning at sunrise.
gept.example_zh: 灑水器每天日出時自動為草坪澆水。

gept.example_en: Spread mulch around the trees to keep the soil moist in summer.
gept.example_zh: 在樹周圍鋪上覆蓋物，讓土壤在夏天保持濕潤。

gept.example_en: Fresh herbs like basil and mint add flavor to summer salads.
gept.example_zh: 羅勒和薄荷等新鮮香草能為夏季沙拉增添風味。

gept.example_en: Grape vines cover the back wall and provide shade in summer.
gept.example_zh: 葡萄藤蔓覆蓋著後牆，在夏天提供遮蔭。

gept.example_en: Berry bushes along the fence give us fruit throughout the summer.
gept.example_zh: 沿著圍籬的莓果灌木整個夏天都為我們提供水果。

gept.example_en: Trim the shrubs into rounded shapes for a more formal garden look.
gept.example_zh: 把灌木叢修剪成圓形以呈現更正式的花園風格。

gept.example_en: A gentle wind scattered pink petals across the lawn.
gept.example_zh: 微風把粉紅色花瓣吹散在草坪上。

gept.example_en: Cut the rose stems at an angle to help them absorb water.
gept.example_zh: 以斜角剪玫瑰的莖，幫助它們吸水。

gept.example_en: The tree's roots spread far beyond what you can see above ground.
gept.example_zh: 這棵樹的根伸展得遠遠超過你在地面上看到的範圍。

gept.example_en: Squirrels run up and down the trunk of the old oak tree.
gept.example_zh: 松鼠在老橡樹的樹幹上跑上跑下。

gept.example_en: A heavy branch fell during the storm and damaged part of the fence.
gept.example_zh: 暴風雨期間一根大樹枝掉落，損壞了部分圍籬。

gept.example_en: Each leaf changes color from green to red in the autumn.
gept.example_zh: 秋天時每片葉子都會從綠色變成紅色。

gept.example_en: Squirrels gather acorns and bury them throughout the yard.
gept.example_zh: 松鼠在院子各處收集並埋藏橡實。

gept.example_en: Our cheerful welcome mat greets every visitor who steps onto the porch.
gept.example_zh: 我們可愛的歡迎踏墊歡迎每位踏上門廊的訪客。

gept.example_en: Always check the peephole before opening the door to a stranger.
gept.example_zh: 在為陌生人開門前一定要先檢查門上的窺視孔。

gept.example_en: The chimney needs to be cleaned before winter to prevent fires.
gept.example_zh: 煙囪需要在冬天前清理以防火災。

gept.example_en: We gathered around the fireplace to enjoy hot chocolate on snowy nights.
gept.example_zh: 下雪的夜晚我們圍在壁爐旁享用熱巧克力。

gept.example_en: A pair of cozy slippers sat on the hearth beside the warm fire.
gept.example_zh: 一雙舒適的拖鞋擺在溫暖的爐火旁的爐床上。

gept.example_en: A row of family photos lined the mantel above the fireplace.
gept.example_zh: 壁爐上方的壁爐架上排放著一排家庭照片。

gept.example_en: Comfortable attire is recommended for the long flight to Europe.
gept.example_zh: 建議穿舒適衣著搭乘長途飛往歐洲的航班。

gept.example_en: She put on a flowered apron before starting to bake cookies.
gept.example_zh: 她在開始烤餅乾前穿上了花圍裙。

gept.example_en: Soft slippers keep your feet warm on cold tile floors in winter.
gept.example_zh: 柔軟的拖鞋能讓你冬天在冰冷的磁磚地上保持腳暖。

gept.example_en: She bought matching pajamas for the whole family for the holiday photo.
gept.example_zh: 她為全家買了相配的睡衣拍節日照片。

gept.example_en: He slipped on a warm robe right after stepping out of the shower.
gept.example_zh: 他剛走出淋浴間就穿上了一件溫暖的浴袍。

gept.example_en: Pull the wool blanket over your legs while watching a movie.
gept.example_zh: 看電影時把羊毛毯蓋在腿上。

gept.example_en: My grandmother made a beautiful patchwork quilt for my wedding gift.
gept.example_zh: 我祖母為我做了一條漂亮的拼布棉被當作結婚禮物。

gept.example_en: She fluffs her pillow every morning while making the bed.
gept.example_zh: 她每天早上整理床鋪時都會把枕頭拍鬆。

gept.example_en: Change pillowcases weekly to keep your skin and hair clean.
gept.example_zh: 每週更換枕頭套，讓皮膚和頭髮保持乾淨。

gept.example_en: Cotton bedsheets feel cool and comfortable in hot summer weather.
gept.example_zh: 純棉床單在炎熱夏天感覺涼爽舒適。

gept.example_en: A thick comforter keeps us warm during cold winter nights.
gept.example_zh: 厚實的羽絨被在寒冷的冬夜讓我們保持溫暖。

gept.example_en: Hang the wet towel on the rack so it dries quickly.
gept.example_zh: 把濕毛巾掛在架子上，讓它快點乾。

gept.example_en: Use a soft washcloth to gently clean the baby's face after meals.
gept.example_zh: 用柔軟的洗臉巾在飯後輕輕地擦寶寶的臉。

gept.example_en: She wraps herself in a thick bathrobe after a long bubble bath.
gept.example_zh: 她在泡完長時間的泡泡浴後裹著厚浴袍。

gept.example_en: He marked the children's height on the kitchen doorframe each year.
gept.example_zh: 他每年都在廚房門框上為孩子們量身高做記號。

gept.example_en: Potted basil and rosemary line the sunny kitchen windowsill.
gept.example_zh: 盆栽的羅勒和迷迭香排列在陽光充足的廚房窗台上。

gept.example_en: Rain streaked down the windowpane all afternoon as we read inside.
gept.example_zh: 下午我們在屋裡看書時，雨水沿著窗玻璃流下。

gept.example_en: Hold onto the railing while walking down the steep wooden stairs.
gept.example_zh: 走下陡峭的木樓梯時請扶著欄杆。

gept.example_en: She polished the wooden banister until it gleamed in the sunlight.
gept.example_zh: 她把木製樓梯扶手擦得在陽光下閃閃發亮。

gept.example_en: A skylight in the bathroom brings in natural light all day long.
gept.example_zh: 浴室的天窗整天都引入自然光。

gept.example_en: Clean the dryer vent regularly to prevent lint buildup and fire risk.
gept.example_zh: 定期清理烘衣機通風口以防棉絮堆積和火災風險。

gept.example_en: The ductwork in the attic was inspected for leaks during the energy audit.
gept.example_zh: 在能源稽核時檢查了閣樓裡的管道系統是否漏氣。

gept.example_en: Proper insulation in the walls helps lower the heating bills significantly.
gept.example_zh: 牆壁裡良好的隔熱材料能大幅降低暖氣費用。

gept.example_en: Set the thermostat to twenty degrees before going to bed.
gept.example_zh: 睡前把溫控器設定到二十度。

gept.example_en: Flip the circuit breaker if the electricity in one room suddenly goes out.
gept.example_zh: 如果某個房間突然停電，請扳動斷路器。

gept.example_en: A blown fuse can cause appliances in the kitchen to stop working.
gept.example_zh: 一個燒掉的保險絲會讓廚房裡的電器無法運作。

gept.example_en: The technician comes to read the meter once a month.
gept.example_zh: 技術人員每月來抄一次表。

gept.example_en: Rural homes often rely on a septic tank for waste disposal.
gept.example_zh: 鄉村住家常常依靠化糞池來處理廢物。

gept.example_en: Take the garbage to the curb every Tuesday and Friday morning.
gept.example_zh: 每週二和週五早上把垃圾拿到路邊。

gept.example_en: Please pick up any rubbish you see in the community park.
gept.example_zh: 請撿起你在社區公園裡看到的任何垃圾。

gept.example_en: Volunteers gathered to pick up litter along the riverbank this morning.
gept.example_zh: 志工們今早集合在河岸邊撿垃圾。

gept.example_en: Construction debris was scattered around the renovated kitchen.
gept.example_zh: 裝修過的廚房周圍散落著建築碎片。

gept.example_en: Rust on the iron fence needs to be sanded and repainted soon.
gept.example_zh: 鐵欄杆上的鏽需要儘快打磨並重新粉刷。

gept.example_en: Mold can grow in damp bathrooms with poor ventilation.
gept.example_zh: 通風不良的潮濕浴室裡可能長黴菌。

gept.example_en: Wipe shower curtains weekly to keep mildew from forming.
gept.example_zh: 每週擦拭浴簾以防止黴斑形成。

gept.example_en: I removed the coffee stain from the carpet using baking soda.
gept.example_zh: 我用小蘇打粉去除地毯上的咖啡漬。

gept.example_en: Clean up the spill on the floor before someone slips.
gept.example_zh: 在有人滑倒前先把地上的灑出物清理乾淨。

gept.example_en: A small leak under the sink slowly damaged the wooden cabinet.
gept.example_zh: 水槽下的小漏水慢慢損壞了木製櫥櫃。

gept.example_en: A crack in the wall appeared after the recent earthquake.
gept.example_zh: 最近地震後牆上出現了一道裂縫。

gept.example_en: The new curriculum includes more science and technology courses for high school students.
gept.example_zh: 新課程為高中生增加了更多科學與科技課程。

gept.example_en: The professor handed out the syllabus on the first day of class.
gept.example_zh: 教授在開學第一天發放教學大綱。

gept.example_en: The teacher wrote the math problem on the blackboard for everyone to see.
gept.example_zh: 老師把數學題寫在黑板上讓大家看。

gept.example_en: Students took turns solving equations on the whiteboard at the front.
gept.example_zh: 學生們輪流到前面的白板上解方程式。

gept.example_en: Every morning we meet in homeroom before our first class starts.
gept.example_zh: 每天早上我們在第一堂課前到導師時間集合。

gept.example_en: Children love to play games on the playground during recess.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們喜歡在下課時間在操場上玩遊戲。

gept.example_en: Our classroom has air conditioning and a large interactive screen.
gept.example_zh: 我們的教室有空調和一塊大型互動螢幕。

gept.example_en: The graduation ceremony will be held in the main auditorium next Friday.
gept.example_zh: 畢業典禮將於下週五在主禮堂舉行。

gept.example_en: We conducted our chemistry experiments in the school laboratory this afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 今天下午我們在學校實驗室進行化學實驗。

gept.example_en: Most students eat lunch in the cafeteria between twelve and one.
gept.example_zh: 大多數學生在十二點到一點之間在自助餐廳吃午餐。

gept.example_en: The basketball tournament will take place in the new gymnasium tomorrow.
gept.example_zh: 明天籃球比賽將在新體育館舉行。

gept.example_en: The principal gave a welcome speech at the start of the semester.
gept.example_zh: 校長在學期開始時致歡迎詞。

gept.example_en: The headmaster announced new rules about mobile phones in school.
gept.example_zh: 校長宣布了關於校園手機的新規定。

gept.example_en: She hired a private tutor to help her son improve his English.
gept.example_zh: 她請了一位家教幫助兒子提升英文。

gept.example_en: The lecturer explained the theory clearly with several real-world examples.
gept.example_zh: 講師用幾個實際例子清楚地解釋了這個理論。

gept.example_en: Professor Lin has published many papers on artificial intelligence and ethics.
gept.example_zh: 林教授發表過許多關於人工智慧與倫理的論文。

gept.example_en: Our driving instructor was patient with every nervous student in the car.
gept.example_zh: 我們的駕駛教練對車裡每一位緊張的學生都很有耐心。

gept.example_en: My classmate helped me catch up after I missed two weeks of school.
gept.example_zh: 我缺課兩週後，同班同學幫我補上進度。

gept.example_en: I bumped into an old schoolmate at the train station yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 我昨天在火車站偶遇一位老校友。

gept.example_en: He is a famous alumnus who donated millions to his old university.
gept.example_zh: 他是一位著名校友，捐了數百萬給他的母校。

gept.example_en: The alumna returned to give a speech about her career journey.
gept.example_zh: 這位女校友回校演講，分享她的職涯歷程。

gept.example_en: As a freshman, he felt nervous walking onto campus the first day.
gept.example_zh: 作為大一新生，他第一天走進校園時感到緊張。

gept.example_en: By her sophomore year, she had already chosen her major.
gept.example_zh: 到了大二，她已經選好了主修。

gept.example_en: Most juniors begin preparing for internships in their third year.
gept.example_zh: 大多數大三生在三年級時開始準備實習。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 大四學生 (adj.) 高年級的
gept.example_en: Seniors are required to complete a final project before graduation.
gept.example_zh: 大四生畢業前必須完成一個畢業專題。

gept.example_en: She is an undergraduate majoring in biology at a prestigious university.
gept.example_zh: 她是一名生物系大學生，就讀於一所名校。

gept.example_en: He will graduate from law school with honors next June.
gept.example_zh: 他將於明年六月以優異成績從法學院畢業。

gept.example_en: Postgraduate students must submit a research proposal in their first semester.
gept.example_zh: 研究生必須在第一學期提交研究計畫。

gept.example_en: The young pianist is considered a musical prodigy across Asia.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕鋼琴家被認為是亞洲的音樂神童。

gept.example_en: You don't have to be a genius to succeed; hard work matters more.
gept.example_zh: 成功不必是天才，努力更重要。

gept.example_en: He is a respected scholar in the field of ancient Chinese history.
gept.example_zh: 他是中國古代史領域受人尊敬的學者。

gept.example_en: The researcher collected data from over a thousand students nationwide.
gept.example_zh: 這位研究員從全國一千多名學生那裡蒐集資料。

gept.example_en: As an educator, she believes every child deserves equal opportunity.
gept.example_zh: 身為教育工作者，她認為每個孩子都應有平等機會。

gept.example_en: The school counselor helps students plan their academic and career paths.
gept.example_zh: 學校輔導員幫助學生規劃學業與職涯。

gept.example_en: The librarian helped me find references for my history paper.
gept.example_zh: 圖書館員幫我找到歷史報告的參考資料。

gept.example_en: I find algebra difficult because of all the abstract symbols and rules.
gept.example_zh: 我覺得代數很難，因為有許多抽象的符號和規則。

gept.example_en: In geometry class we learned how to calculate the area of triangles.
gept.example_zh: 在幾何課我們學會了如何計算三角形的面積。

gept.example_en: Calculus is required for most engineering majors at our university.
gept.example_zh: 我們大學大多數工程科系都必修微積分。

gept.example_en: Statistics shows that reading regularly improves a student's vocabulary significantly.
gept.example_zh: 統計顯示，定期閱讀能顯著提升學生的詞彙量。

gept.example_en: Young children learn basic arithmetic such as addition and subtraction.
gept.example_zh: 幼童學習基本算術，例如加法與減法。

gept.example_en: In biology we studied how cells divide and form different tissues.
gept.example_zh: 在生物課我們學習細胞如何分裂並形成不同組織。

gept.example_en: Physics helps us understand how forces and energy work in nature.
gept.example_zh: 物理幫助我們理解自然界中力與能量的運作。

gept.example_en: Our geology professor took us on a field trip to study rocks.
gept.example_zh: 我們的地質學教授帶我們去戶外實察岩石。

gept.example_en: In geography class we learned about climate zones and population patterns.
gept.example_zh: 地理課上我們學習氣候帶與人口分布。

gept.example_en: Astronomy students often use telescopes to observe distant stars and planets.
gept.example_zh: 天文系學生常用望遠鏡觀察遙遠的星體與行星。

gept.example_en: Sociology examines how groups of people behave and interact within society.
gept.example_zh: 社會學探討群體如何在社會中行為與互動。

gept.example_en: She studied psychology to better understand human behavior and emotions.
gept.example_zh: 她念心理學以更了解人類行為與情緒。

gept.example_en: Philosophy encourages students to think critically about life and meaning.
gept.example_zh: 哲學鼓勵學生批判地思考人生與意義。

gept.example_en: English literature gave me a deep love for novels and poetry.
gept.example_zh: 英國文學使我深愛小說與詩歌。

gept.example_en: Linguistics studies how languages are structured, learned, and used by people.
gept.example_zh: 語言學研究語言如何被組織、學習與使用。

gept.example_en: Economics teaches us how individuals and nations make choices with limited resources.
gept.example_zh: 經濟學教我們個人與國家如何在有限資源下做選擇。

gept.example_en: Anthropology students often live in distant villages to study local cultures.
gept.example_zh: 人類學學生常住在偏遠村落以研究當地文化。

gept.example_en: Studying history helps us avoid repeating the mistakes of the past.
gept.example_zh: 學習歷史能幫助我們避免重蹈過去的錯誤。

gept.example_en: Self-discipline is essential for any student who wants to succeed academically.
gept.example_zh: 自律對任何想在學業上成功的學生都至關重要。

gept.example_en: Mathematics is my favorite subject because I enjoy solving complex problems.
gept.example_zh: 數學是我最喜歡的科目，因為我喜歡解難題。

gept.example_en: She decided to major in computer science after taking an introductory course.
gept.example_zh: 修了一門入門課後，她決定主修資訊科學。

gept.example_en: He took economics as a minor alongside his main engineering major.
gept.example_zh: 他在主修工程之外，輔修經濟學。

gept.example_en: Photography is a popular elective among students in the design department.
gept.example_zh: 攝影是設計系學生熱門的選修課。

gept.example_en: English is a compulsory subject in our junior high school.
gept.example_zh: 英文在我們國中是必修科目。

gept.example_en: Attendance at the orientation session is mandatory for all new students.
gept.example_zh: 所有新生都必須參加新生說明會。

gept.example_en: The Saturday workshop is optional but highly recommended by the teacher.
gept.example_zh: 週六的工作坊是選修，但老師大力推薦。

gept.example_en: The visiting scholar gave a fascinating lecture on climate change.
gept.example_zh: 訪問學者發表了一場關於氣候變遷的精彩演講。

gept.example_en: Our weekly seminar covers recent research on language acquisition.
gept.example_zh: 我們每週的研討會討論語言習得的最新研究。

gept.example_en: Scholars from ten countries attended the international symposium on robotics.
gept.example_zh: 十國學者出席了這場機器人學國際研討會。

gept.example_en: She presented her latest findings at an academic conference in London.
gept.example_zh: 她在倫敦的一場學術會議上發表了最新研究成果。

gept.example_en: The online forum allows students to discuss class topics after lectures.
gept.example_zh: 這個線上論壇讓學生在下課後討論課程主題。

gept.example_en: Our group had a long discussion about the novel's main characters.
gept.example_zh: 我們小組就小說的主角們進行了長時間的討論。

gept.example_en: Her argument was well-supported by data from several recent studies.
gept.example_zh: 她的論點有許多近期研究的數據支持。

gept.example_en: His reasoning was logical and easy for the audience to follow.
gept.example_zh: 他的推理合乎邏輯，聽眾很容易跟上。

gept.example_en: Studying philosophy taught me how to apply logic in everyday arguments.
gept.example_zh: 學習哲學教我如何在日常爭論中運用邏輯。

gept.example_en: He had to memorize a hundred new vocabulary words before the test.
gept.example_zh: 他必須在考試前背完一百個新單字。

gept.example_en: Each student was asked to recite a short poem in class.
gept.example_zh: 每位學生都被要求在課堂上朗誦一首短詩。

gept.example_en: Please summarize the main points of the article in three sentences.
gept.example_zh: 請用三句話概述這篇文章的重點。

gept.example_en: Write a one-page summary of the chapter before tomorrow's class.
gept.example_zh: 在明天上課前寫一頁該章節的摘要。

gept.example_en: Before writing the essay, she made a detailed outline of her ideas.
gept.example_zh: 寫文章前，她列了一份詳細的構想大綱。

gept.example_en: Let's brainstorm some creative ideas for our science project together.
gept.example_zh: 讓我們一起為這個科學專題集思廣益。

gept.example_en: Students are expected to paraphrase sources rather than copy them directly.
gept.example_zh: 學生應改寫資料來源，而非直接抄襲。

gept.example_en: I always highlight key sentences when I read a textbook chapter.
gept.example_zh: 讀課本章節時，我總會把重點句劃起來。

gept.example_en: Underline the words you don't know and look them up later.
gept.example_zh: 把你不認識的字劃線，稍後查詢。

gept.example_en: She annotates her textbooks with colorful sticky notes and short comments.
gept.example_zh: 她用彩色便利貼和簡短評論為課本加註。

gept.example_en: It took me a while to fully comprehend the professor's complicated theory.
gept.example_zh: 我花了一陣子才完全理解教授那複雜的理論。

gept.example_en: Reading comprehension improves with regular practice and varied materials.
gept.example_zh: 閱讀理解力會隨著規律練習與多元素材而提升。

gept.example_en: Reviewing notes regularly increases the retention of new information.
gept.example_zh: 定期複習筆記能提升對新資訊的記憶力。

gept.example_en: She reviews her notes every evening to prepare for the exam.
gept.example_zh: 她每晚複習筆記，為考試做準備。

gept.example_en: I need to revise three chapters before tomorrow's biology midterm.
gept.example_zh: 我必須在明天生物期中考前複習三章。

gept.example_en: They rehearsed their group presentation several times before the final delivery.
gept.example_zh: 他們在正式發表前多次排練小組報告。

gept.example_en: Daily practice is the key to mastering any musical instrument.
gept.example_zh: 每日練習是精通任何樂器的關鍵。

gept.example_en: The teacher gives us a short quiz every Friday morning.
gept.example_zh: 老師每週五早上都會給我們一個小測驗。

gept.example_en: I stayed up late studying for my history midterm last night.
gept.example_zh: 我昨晚熬夜準備歷史期中考。

gept.example_en: Finals week is always the most stressful time of the semester.
gept.example_zh: 期末考週總是學期中最緊張的時刻。

gept.example_en: The entrance exam covers math, English, and general knowledge sections.
gept.example_zh: 入學考試包含數學、英文與通識三部分。

gept.example_en: A written examination will be held at the end of this course.
gept.example_zh: 本課程結束時將舉行筆試。

gept.example_en: He passed the placement test with an impressively high score.
gept.example_zh: 他以高分通過了分級測驗。

gept.example_en: My grade in chemistry improved after I joined the study group.
gept.example_zh: 加入讀書小組後，我的化學成績進步了。

gept.example_en: She got the highest score in the English speaking test.
gept.example_zh: 她在英文口說測驗中拿到最高分。

gept.example_en: The teacher will mark our essays and return them next Wednesday.
gept.example_zh: 老師會批改我們的作文，下週三歸還。

gept.example_en: You need to submit an official transcript when applying for graduate school.
gept.example_zh: 申請研究所時你必須提交正式成績單。

gept.example_en: She proudly hung her diploma on the wall of her new office.
gept.example_zh: 她驕傲地把畢業證書掛在新辦公室的牆上。

gept.example_en: He earned a master's degree in environmental engineering last year.
gept.example_zh: 他去年取得了環境工程的碩士學位。

gept.example_en: After finishing the course, students receive an official certificate of completion.
gept.example_zh: 課程結束後，學生會收到正式的結業證書。

gept.example_en: This job requires a teaching qualification and at least three years of experience.
gept.example_zh: 這份工作需要教師資格與至少三年資歷。

gept.example_en: The teacher's evaluation of my project was very positive and encouraging.
gept.example_zh: 老師對我作品的評估非常正面且鼓勵人。

gept.example_en: Professors evaluate students based on tests, projects, and class participation.
gept.example_zh: 教授根據考試、作業與課堂參與來評估學生。

gept.example_en: We use various tools to assess each student's learning progress fairly.
gept.example_zh: 我們用各種工具公平評量每位學生的學習進度。

gept.example_en: Continuous assessment is more accurate than a single end-of-term exam.
gept.example_zh: 持續性評量比單一期末考更精確。

gept.example_en: The teacher gave detailed feedback on every student's draft essay.
gept.example_zh: 老師對每位學生的草稿都給予詳細回饋。

gept.example_en: Please write a short comment on each classmate's presentation slide.
gept.example_zh: 請對每位同學的報告投影片寫一段簡短評論。

gept.example_en: Constructive criticism helps students improve their work and grow academically.
gept.example_zh: 建設性的批評能幫助學生改進作品並在學術上成長。

gept.example_en: We had to critique a published paper as part of our assignment.
gept.example_zh: 作業的一部分是評論一篇已發表的論文。

gept.example_en: Most freshmen live in the dormitory on campus during their first year.
gept.example_zh: 大多數大一新生第一年住校內宿舍。

gept.example_en: My dorm room is small but I share it with a friendly roommate.
gept.example_zh: 我的宿舍房間很小，但室友人很友善。

gept.example_en: She won a scholarship to study abroad for one full academic year.
gept.example_zh: 她拿到獎學金可出國留學整整一學年。

gept.example_en: The research team received a generous grant from the government.
gept.example_zh: 這個研究團隊獲得政府一筆優渥的補助金。

gept.example_en: Tuition fees at private universities have risen dramatically over the years.
gept.example_zh: 私立大學的學費這些年大幅上漲。

gept.example_en: He spent two years writing his master's thesis on urban planning.
gept.example_zh: 他花了兩年時間撰寫關於都市計畫的碩士論文。

gept.example_en: Her doctoral dissertation explores how language develops in bilingual children.
gept.example_zh: 她的博士論文探討雙語兒童的語言發展。

gept.example_en: We have to write a thousand-word essay on environmental protection.
gept.example_zh: 我們必須寫一篇關於環境保護的千字文章。

gept.example_en: His paper on renewable energy was published in a respected journal.
gept.example_zh: 他關於再生能源的論文發表在一本知名期刊上。

gept.example_en: Each group will report their research findings at the end of term.
gept.example_zh: 每個小組將在學期末報告他們的研究發現。

gept.example_en: I read an interesting article about learning a second language quickly.
gept.example_zh: 我讀了一篇關於快速學第二語言的有趣文章。

gept.example_en: The professor has more than thirty publications in international journals.
gept.example_zh: 這位教授在國際期刊上有三十多篇出版品。

gept.example_en: The author sent her manuscript to the editor for careful review.
gept.example_zh: 作者把她的手稿寄給編輯仔細審閱。

gept.example_en: I revised my first draft three times before submitting the final paper.
gept.example_zh: 我把初稿修改了三次才交出最終版論文。

gept.example_en: The scientist tested her hypothesis with a carefully designed experiment.
gept.example_zh: 科學家用一個精心設計的實驗檢驗了她的假設。

gept.example_en: Einstein's theory of relativity changed our understanding of space and time.
gept.example_zh: 愛因斯坦的相對論改變了我們對時空的理解。

gept.example_en: The researcher described her methodology in great detail in chapter three.
gept.example_zh: 研究者在第三章詳細描述了她的方法論。

gept.example_en: She used a creative approach to teach grammar through storytelling.
gept.example_zh: 她用富有創意的方法透過說故事教授文法。

gept.example_en: Different students prefer different methods of learning new vocabulary.
gept.example_zh: 不同學生偏好不同的學習新單字方法。

gept.example_en: This memorization technique works well for long lists of foreign words.
gept.example_zh: 這個記憶技巧很適合用來記長串外語單字。

gept.example_en: Time management is an important strategy for any successful student.
gept.example_zh: 時間管理是任何成功學生的重要策略。

gept.example_en: Her analysis of the survey data revealed surprising patterns among teenagers.
gept.example_zh: 她對問卷數據的分析揭示了青少年中令人驚訝的模式。

gept.example_en: Students must analyze each paragraph to identify the main argument.
gept.example_zh: 學生必須分析每一段以找出主要論點。

gept.example_en: It is important to interpret data accurately before drawing any conclusions.
gept.example_zh: 在得出結論前準確詮釋數據非常重要。

gept.example_en: Her interpretation of the poem differed from the teacher's view.
gept.example_zh: 她對這首詩的詮釋與老師的看法不同。

gept.example_en: The conclusion of the report summarizes all the key research findings.
gept.example_zh: 報告的結論摘述了所有重要的研究發現。

gept.example_en: From the results, we can conclude that students benefit from group study.
gept.example_zh: 從結果可以得出結論：學生能從小組學習中受益。

gept.example_en: Always include a citation when you use someone else's ideas in writing.
gept.example_zh: 寫作中引用他人想法時，務必附上引文。

gept.example_en: The student cited three different sources in her research paper.
gept.example_zh: 這位學生在研究報告中引用了三個不同來源。

gept.example_en: She listed twenty references at the end of her dissertation.
gept.example_zh: 她在論文末尾列出了二十個參考資料。

gept.example_en: Your bibliography should follow the formatting style required by the journal.
gept.example_zh: 參考書目須依照期刊要求的格式排列。

gept.example_en: Plagiarism is a serious offense that can lead to academic punishment.
gept.example_zh: 剽竊是嚴重違規行為，可能導致學業處分。

gept.example_en: Students who plagiarize will fail the assignment automatically.
gept.example_zh: 剽竊的學生這份作業會直接被當。

gept.example_en: Our campus is large and surrounded by beautiful trees and gardens.
gept.example_zh: 我們的校園很大，四周環繞著美麗的樹木和花園。

gept.example_en: This semester I am taking five courses and one elective seminar.
gept.example_zh: 這學期我修五門課加一個選修研討會。

gept.example_en: Some universities divide the school year into four quarters instead of semesters.
gept.example_zh: 有些大學把學年分成四個學季而非學期。

gept.example_en: Her parents flew in from Taiwan to attend her graduation ceremony.
gept.example_zh: 她父母從台灣飛來參加她的畢業典禮。

gept.example_en: New students attend an orientation session to learn about campus services.
gept.example_zh: 新生參加迎新會以了解校園各項服務。

gept.example_en: Enrollment in online courses has grown rapidly over the past decade.
gept.example_zh: 線上課程的註冊人數在過去十年快速增長。

gept.example_en: I plan to enroll in a Spanish language course next semester.
gept.example_zh: 我打算下學期報名一門西班牙語課程。

gept.example_en: Students must register for next term's classes before the end of May.
gept.example_zh: 學生必須在五月底前選好下學期課程。

gept.example_en: She received admission to three top universities this year.
gept.example_zh: 她今年收到三所頂尖大學的錄取通知。

gept.example_en: Each applicant must submit two letters of recommendation with their forms.
gept.example_zh: 每位申請人必須隨表格附上兩封推薦信。

gept.example_en: These rules are applicable to all students living on campus.
gept.example_zh: 這些規則適用於所有住校的學生。

gept.example_en: He decided to transfer to another university to study marine biology.
gept.example_zh: 他決定轉學到另一所大學念海洋生物學。

gept.example_en: She spent one year on an exchange program in Germany.
gept.example_zh: 她在德國參加交換學生計畫一年。

gept.example_en: Studying abroad helps students develop independence and intercultural skills.
gept.example_zh: 出國留學能幫助學生培養獨立與跨文化能力。

gept.example_en: She works as an intern at a law firm three days a week.
gept.example_zh: 她每週在律師事務所實習三天。

gept.example_en: He started as an apprentice in the workshop at sixteen.
gept.example_zh: 他十六歲時就在工坊裡當學徒。

gept.example_en: His apprenticeship lasted three years before he became a certified electrician.
gept.example_zh: 他的學徒期持續三年，之後才成為合格電工。

gept.example_en: The mentorship program pairs each student with an experienced professional.
gept.example_zh: 指導計畫為每位學生配對一位資深專業人士。

gept.example_en: I followed an online tutorial to learn how to edit videos.
gept.example_zh: 我跟著線上教學影片學會了如何剪輯影片。

gept.example_en: He finished all his coursework two weeks before the deadline.
gept.example_zh: 他在期限前兩週完成所有課業。

gept.example_en: My math homework took me two hours to finish last night.
gept.example_zh: 我昨晚的數學作業花了我兩個小時。

gept.example_en: The teacher assigned a difficult task involving real-world data analysis.
gept.example_zh: 老師指派了一個牽涉真實數據分析的困難任務。

gept.example_en: Please read the third chapter before our next class meeting.
gept.example_zh: 請在下次上課前讀完第三章。

gept.example_en: Each paragraph should focus on one clear main idea.
gept.example_zh: 每個段落都應聚焦於一個清楚的主旨。

gept.example_en: Write five complete sentences using today's new vocabulary words.
gept.example_zh: 用今天的新單字寫五個完整句子。

gept.example_en: Reading novels in English greatly expanded my vocabulary range.
gept.example_zh: 閱讀英文小說大大擴展了我的詞彙範圍。

gept.example_en: Understanding basic grammar makes learning new languages much easier.
gept.example_zh: 理解基本文法能讓學新語言容易許多。

gept.example_en: Her English pronunciation has improved a lot after just six months.
gept.example_zh: 她的英文發音僅僅半年就進步很多。

gept.example_en: He spoke with a slight British accent that everyone found charming.
gept.example_zh: 他帶著一點英國口音，大家都覺得很迷人。

gept.example_en: Daily conversation practice is key to building fluency in any language.
gept.example_zh: 每日對話練習是建立任何語言流利度的關鍵。

gept.example_en: After living in Japan for five years, she became fluent in Japanese.
gept.example_zh: 在日本住了五年後，她的日語變得很流利。

gept.example_en: Many companies require English proficiency for international positions.
gept.example_zh: 許多公司要求國際職位具備英文能力。

gept.example_en: She is proficient in three programming languages used in industry.
gept.example_zh: 她精通三種業界常用的程式語言。

gept.example_en: Digital literacy is just as important as traditional reading skills today.
gept.example_zh: 今日數位識讀能力與傳統閱讀能力同樣重要。

gept.example_en: In her village, most adults are literate thanks to recent education programs.
gept.example_zh: 由於近期教育計畫，她村裡多數成人都識字。

gept.example_en: He felt embarrassed because he was illiterate well into his thirties.
gept.example_zh: 他直到三十多歲還不識字，深感難為情。

gept.example_en: Bilingual students often perform better on certain cognitive tasks.
gept.example_zh: 雙語學生在某些認知任務上常表現較佳。

gept.example_en: Growing up in Switzerland, she became a multilingual professional easily.
gept.example_zh: 在瑞士長大，她輕鬆地成為多語專業人士。

gept.example_en: He decided to learn one foreign language every five years.
gept.example_zh: 他決定每五年學一門外語。

gept.example_en: Please translate this short passage from English into Chinese.
gept.example_zh: 請把這段短文從英文翻譯成中文。

gept.example_en: Her translation of the novel won an international award last year.
gept.example_zh: 她翻譯的這本小說去年獲得了國際大獎。

gept.example_en: Look up the unfamiliar words in a dictionary as you read.
gept.example_zh: 閱讀時把不熟悉的字查字典。

gept.example_en: The textbook includes a glossary of all technical terms at the end.
gept.example_zh: 這本教科書在最後附有所有專業術語的詞彙表。

gept.example_en: Online encyclopedias have replaced printed ones in most modern classrooms.
gept.example_zh: 線上百科全書在多數現代教室裡已取代紙本版。

gept.example_en: Each student received a new textbook at the start of the year.
gept.example_zh: 每位學生在學年開始時都領到一本新教科書。

gept.example_en: Complete the workbook exercises on pages thirty to thirty-five tonight.
gept.example_zh: 今晚請完成練習簿三十到三十五頁的習題。

gept.example_en: She writes neat notes in a small leather notebook every class.
gept.example_zh: 她每節課都在一本小皮製筆記本上工整地寫筆記。

gept.example_en: My binder holds handouts from all five of my classes.
gept.example_zh: 我的活頁夾裡裝著五門課的所有講義。

gept.example_en: Keep all your worksheets in this folder for easy reference later.
gept.example_zh: 把所有講義放進這個文件夾以便日後查閱。

gept.example_en: She used a yellow highlighter to mark important sentences in her notes.
gept.example_zh: 她用黃色螢光筆標出筆記裡的重要句子。

gept.example_en: The teacher wrote the new vocabulary on the board with a blue marker.
gept.example_zh: 老師用藍色馬克筆把新單字寫在黑板上。

gept.example_en: There was chalk dust all over the teacher's sleeves after class.
gept.example_zh: 下課後老師的袖子上沾滿了粉筆灰。

gept.example_en: He borrowed my eraser to fix a mistake in his exam.
gept.example_zh: 他借了我的橡皮擦來修改考卷上的錯誤。

gept.example_en: Use a ruler to draw straight lines for your geometry diagrams.
gept.example_zh: 畫幾何圖時請用尺畫直線。

gept.example_en: You'll need a compass and a protractor for tomorrow's geometry test.
gept.example_zh: 明天的幾何測驗你需要圓規和量角器。

gept.example_en: Calculators are not allowed during the basic arithmetic portion of the exam.
gept.example_zh: 考試的基本算術部分不准使用計算機。

gept.example_en: The teacher connected her laptop to the projector to show slides.
gept.example_zh: 老師把筆電連到投影機放投影片。

gept.example_en: The lecturer used a microphone so everyone in the hall could hear.
gept.example_zh: 講師使用麥克風，讓禮堂裡每個人都能聽見。

gept.example_en: The speaker stepped up to the podium and adjusted the microphone.
gept.example_zh: 演講者走上講台調整了麥克風。

gept.example_en: Check the bulletin board for updates about scholarship application deadlines.
gept.example_zh: 請查看佈告欄了解獎學金申請期限的最新資訊。

gept.example_en: The teacher gave us a handout summarizing the main points of the lecture.
gept.example_zh: 老師發給我們一份摘述演講重點的講義。

gept.example_en: Complete the worksheet during class and turn it in before leaving.
gept.example_zh: 上課時完成練習單，離開前交出來。

gept.example_en: Each slide should contain only a few key points and one image.
gept.example_zh: 每張投影片只該包含幾個重點和一張圖。

gept.example_en: You will present your group project in front of the class on Friday.
gept.example_zh: 你週五要在全班面前報告小組專題。

gept.example_en: The presenter spoke clearly and made eye contact with the audience.
gept.example_zh: 報告人說話清晰，並與聽眾保持眼神接觸。

gept.example_en: The audience applauded loudly after the final group presentation.
gept.example_zh: 最後一組報告完畢後，聽眾熱烈鼓掌。

gept.example_en: Tomorrow's guest speaker will discuss careers in environmental science.
gept.example_zh: 明天的客座演講者將討論環境科學的職涯。

gept.example_en: Her graduation speech moved many parents and classmates to tears.
gept.example_zh: 她的畢業演講讓許多家長與同學感動落淚。

gept.example_en: The oral exam tests students' speaking and listening abilities at once.
gept.example_zh: 口試同時測驗學生的說與聽能力。

gept.example_en: You must submit a written report along with your oral presentation.
gept.example_zh: 除了口頭報告外，你還必須繳交書面報告。

gept.example_en: Her verbal skills improved greatly through participation in the debate club.
gept.example_zh: 參加辯論社讓她的口語能力大幅進步。

gept.example_en: Teachers should be aware of nonverbal signals from their students.
gept.example_zh: 老師應留意學生的非語言訊號。

gept.example_en: The diagram clearly shows how blood circulates through the human body.
gept.example_zh: 這張圖表清楚顯示血液如何在人體中循環。

gept.example_en: The bar chart compares the test scores of three different classes.
gept.example_zh: 這張長條圖比較了三個不同班級的考試成績。

gept.example_en: Plot the data points on the graph using different colors for each group.
gept.example_zh: 在圖表上用不同顏色繪出每組的數據點。

gept.example_en: Refer to the table on page eighty for the complete results.
gept.example_zh: 完整結果請參考第八十頁的表格。

gept.example_en: The figure below illustrates the relationship between study time and grades.
gept.example_zh: 下圖顯示讀書時間與成績之間的關係。

gept.example_en: We collected data from over five hundred students across three schools.
gept.example_zh: 我們從三所學校的五百多名學生那裡蒐集資料。

gept.example_en: Please complete this short survey about your learning preferences.
gept.example_zh: 請完成這份關於你學習偏好的簡短問卷。

gept.example_en: Students filled out a questionnaire about their daily reading habits.
gept.example_zh: 學生填寫了一份關於日常閱讀習慣的問卷。

gept.example_en: For our project we interviewed ten students about their study methods.
gept.example_zh: 為了專題，我們訪問了十位學生的讀書方法。

gept.example_en: Careful observation in the classroom revealed several patterns of behavior.
gept.example_zh: 在教室裡仔細觀察揭示了幾種行為模式。

gept.example_en: Researchers observe young children to study how language develops naturally.
gept.example_zh: 研究者觀察幼童以了解語言如何自然發展。

gept.example_en: The biology experiment showed how plants respond to different light conditions.
gept.example_zh: 這個生物實驗顯示植物如何對不同光照做出反應。

gept.example_en: The experimental method gave more reliable results than the survey approach.
gept.example_zh: 實驗法比問卷法得出更可靠的結果。

gept.example_en: We changed only one variable at a time during each test.
gept.example_zh: 每次測試我們只改變一個變數。

gept.example_en: The sample included two hundred students from urban and rural schools.
gept.example_zh: 樣本包含兩百名來自城市和鄉村學校的學生。

gept.example_en: Participants were chosen at random from a list of volunteers.
gept.example_zh: 參與者是從志願者名單中隨機挑選的。

gept.example_en: The control group did not receive any special learning materials.
gept.example_zh: 對照組沒有獲得任何特殊學習材料。

gept.example_en: The most important finding was that quiet study spaces improve concentration.
gept.example_zh: 最重要的發現是安靜的讀書空間能提升專注力。

gept.example_en: The results suggest that group projects increase student motivation.
gept.example_zh: 研究結果顯示小組專題能提升學生的動機。

gept.example_en: The outcome of the program exceeded everyone's original expectations.
gept.example_zh: 這個計畫的成果超出所有人原本的預期。

gept.example_en: There is strong evidence that sleep improves long-term memory.
gept.example_zh: 有強而有力的證據顯示睡眠能改善長期記憶。

gept.example_en: Mathematicians demand rigorous proof before accepting any new theorem.
gept.example_zh: 數學家在接受新定理前要求嚴謹的證明。

gept.example_en: The experiment proved that the new teaching method increases retention.
gept.example_zh: 這個實驗證明新的教學法能提升記憶力。

gept.example_en: The instructor demonstrated how to safely use the chemistry equipment.
gept.example_zh: 指導員示範如何安全使用化學設備。

gept.example_en: Her explanation of the formula finally made everything clear to me.
gept.example_zh: 她對公式的解釋終於讓我完全明白。

gept.example_en: Let me illustrate the idea with a simple real-life example.
gept.example_zh: 讓我用一個簡單的生活例子來說明這個概念。

gept.example_en: In your own words, define what democracy means to you personally.
gept.example_zh: 用你自己的話定義「民主」對你個人意味著什麼。

gept.example_en: Look up the definition of any word you don't recognize.
gept.example_zh: 任何你不認得的字，都去查它的定義。

gept.example_en: The concept of supply and demand is fundamental in economics.
gept.example_zh: 供需的概念是經濟學的基礎。

gept.example_en: He challenged the popular notion that talent matters more than practice.
gept.example_zh: 他挑戰了「天賦比練習更重要」這個普遍觀念。

gept.example_en: Honesty is a basic principle in academic writing and research.
gept.example_zh: 誠實是學術寫作與研究的基本原則。

gept.example_en: Memorize this formula carefully because it appears in many physics problems.
gept.example_zh: 仔細記住這個公式，因為它出現在許多物理題中。

gept.example_en: Solve this equation for x and show all your steps clearly.
gept.example_zh: 求出這個方程式的 x，並清楚列出所有步驟。

gept.example_en: Try to solve the problem on your own before asking for help.
gept.example_zh: 在求助之前，先試著自己解決問題。

gept.example_en: There may be more than one correct solution to this math problem.
gept.example_zh: 這道數學題可能不只有一個正確答案。

gept.example_en: The textbook ends with twenty practice problems for self-study.
gept.example_zh: 課本最後附有二十道自學練習題。

gept.example_en: Repetition is one of the most effective ways to memorize vocabulary.
gept.example_zh: 重複是記憶詞彙最有效的方法之一。

gept.example_en: Repeat each new word out loud three times to remember it.
gept.example_zh: 每個新單字大聲念三次以幫助記憶。

gept.example_en: Don't be afraid to make mistakes when learning a new language.
gept.example_zh: 學新語言時別怕犯錯。

gept.example_en: The essay contained several grammar errors that lowered his grade.
gept.example_zh: 這篇作文有幾處文法錯誤，降低了他的分數。

gept.example_en: Please correct any spelling mistakes before you submit your essay.
gept.example_zh: 交作文前請改正任何拼字錯誤。

gept.example_en: The teacher's corrections helped me improve my writing significantly.
gept.example_zh: 老師的修正大大幫助我改進寫作。

gept.example_en: Make sure your data is accurate before drawing any conclusions.
gept.example_zh: 在下任何結論前，確認你的數據準確無誤。

gept.example_en: Accuracy matters more than speed when solving complicated equations.
gept.example_zh: 解複雜方程式時，準確比速度更重要。

gept.example_en: Scientific writing requires precise language and clear definitions.
gept.example_zh: 科學寫作要求精確的語言與清晰的定義。

gept.example_en: The measurements were taken with great precision in the laboratory.
gept.example_zh: 這些測量在實驗室裡以極高精確度進行。

gept.example_en: Group discussion is an effective method for deeper learning.
gept.example_zh: 小組討論是深度學習的有效方法。

gept.example_en: Flashcards are an efficient way to learn new vocabulary quickly.
gept.example_zh: 字卡是快速學新單字的高效方法。

gept.example_en: I had a very productive study session at the library today.
gept.example_zh: 我今天在圖書館有一段非常有成效的讀書時間。

gept.example_en: It can be hard to focus when there are too many distractions around.
gept.example_zh: 周遭太多干擾時很難專注。

gept.example_en: Try to concentrate on one task at a time for best results.
gept.example_zh: 一次專心做一件事以得到最佳結果。

gept.example_en: My concentration drops sharply after about ninety minutes of study.
gept.example_zh: 我讀書大約九十分鐘後專注力會明顯下降。

gept.example_en: Pay close attention to the example before attempting the exercises.
gept.example_zh: 做習題前先仔細留意例題。

gept.example_en: Loud noises easily distract students during reading time.
gept.example_zh: 巨大的聲音容易讓學生在閱讀時間分心。

gept.example_en: Phones can be a major distraction during long study sessions.
gept.example_zh: 手機在長時間讀書時可能是主要的分心來源。

gept.example_en: Strong motivation is the most important factor for academic success.
gept.example_zh: 強烈的動機是學業成功最重要的因素。

gept.example_en: Her favorite teacher remains a lifelong source of inspiration.
gept.example_zh: 她最喜愛的老師至今仍是她終生的靈感來源。

gept.example_en: A few words of encouragement can change a struggling student's day.
gept.example_zh: 幾句鼓勵的話能改變一位辛苦學生的一天。

gept.example_en: He won an award for the best research paper of the year.
gept.example_zh: 他以最佳年度研究報告獲獎。

gept.example_en: The first prize in the math contest was a brand new laptop.
gept.example_zh: 數學競賽的首獎是一台全新的筆記型電腦。
