gept.example_en: Please hand in your assignments before leaving the classroom this afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 今天下午離開教室前請繳交你的作業。

gept.example_en: She kept on working despite feeling tired and ill all afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 儘管整個下午都感到疲倦不適，她仍繼續工作。

gept.example_en: The company had to lay off two hundred workers due to financial difficulties.
gept.example_zh: 由於財務困難，公司不得不解雇兩百名員工。

gept.example_en: I promised myself I would never let down the people who trust me.
gept.example_zh: 我向自己保證絕不讓信任我的人失望。

gept.example_en: Many young athletes look up to her because of her dedication and discipline.
gept.example_zh: 許多年輕運動員因為她的奉獻和自律而敬仰她。

gept.example_en: Against all odds, the small team managed to pull off an amazing victory.
gept.example_zh: 儘管處於劣勢，這支小隊還是設法贏得了驚人的勝利。

gept.example_en: We had to put off the meeting until next Monday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我們不得不把會議延到下週一下午。

gept.example_en: We ran out of coffee this morning, so I went to the store.
gept.example_zh: 今天早上我們的咖啡用完了，所以我去了趟商店。

gept.example_en: True friends stand by you even during the most difficult times of life.
gept.example_zh: 真正的朋友即使在你人生最艱難的時刻也會支持你。

gept.example_en: Her creative ideas always stand out during our weekly brainstorming sessions.
gept.example_zh: 她的創意點子在每週的腦力激盪會議中總是特別突出。

gept.example_en: There was so much information that I could not take it all in.
gept.example_zh: 資訊太多了，我沒辦法全部消化吸收。

gept.example_en: Our flight will take off at six in the morning sharp.
gept.example_zh: 我們的班機將於早上六點整準時起飛。

gept.example_en: Do not throw away those old magazines; we might recycle them later.
gept.example_zh: 別把那些舊雜誌丟掉，我們之後可能會回收它們。

gept.example_en: Always warm up properly before doing any intense physical exercise.
gept.example_zh: 做任何劇烈運動前務必先好好暖身。

gept.example_en: Watch out for that car coming around the corner at high speed.
gept.example_zh: 小心那輛高速從轉角衝過來的車。

gept.example_en: Walking through the city all day really wore me out completely.
gept.example_zh: 在城市裡走了一整天讓我筋疲力盡。

gept.example_en: I just had to bite the bullet and apologize to my boss publicly.
gept.example_zh: 我只得咬緊牙關公開向老闆道歉。

gept.example_en: Stop beating around the bush and tell me what really happened last night.
gept.example_zh: 別再拐彎抹角，告訴我昨晚到底發生了什麼事。

gept.word: cost an arm and a leg
gept.example_en: That designer handbag must have cost her an arm and a leg.
gept.example_zh: 那個設計師包包想必花了她一大筆錢。

gept.word: hit the nail on the head
gept.example_en: Your analysis really hit the nail on the head about our project problems.
gept.example_zh: 你對我們專案問題的分析真的一針見血。

gept.example_en: He told a funny story to break the ice at the awkward meeting.
gept.example_zh: 他在尷尬的會議上講了個有趣的故事來打破僵局。

gept.example_en: The math test was a piece of cake compared to last week's quiz.
gept.example_zh: 相較於上週的小考，這次數學測驗簡直易如反掌。

gept.example_en: She has been feeling under the weather since returning from her business trip.
gept.example_zh: 自從出差回來後，她一直覺得身體不太舒服。

gept.example_en: He visits his elderly grandmother once in a blue moon these days.
gept.example_zh: 他現在很難得才會去探望他的老祖母。

gept.example_en: Let us make sure everyone is on the same page before proceeding further.
gept.example_zh: 我們繼續之前先確認大家的想法一致。

gept.example_en: In a nutshell, the project succeeded because of teamwork and careful planning.
gept.example_zh: 簡而言之，這項專案因團隊合作和周詳計畫而成功。

gept.example_en: Can you keep an eye on my luggage while I use the restroom?
gept.example_zh: 我去洗手間時，你能幫我留意一下行李嗎？

gept.example_en: Do not believe everything he says; he is just pulling your leg.
gept.example_zh: 別相信他說的每句話，他只是在開你玩笑。

gept.example_en: Please do not spill the beans about the surprise party we are planning.
gept.example_zh: 請別洩漏我們正在計畫的驚喜派對的秘密。

gept.example_en: His constant lying was the last straw that ended our long friendship.
gept.example_zh: 他不斷說謊是壓垮我們長久友誼的最後一根稻草。

gept.example_en: Losing that job turned out to be a blessing in disguise for him.
gept.example_zh: 失去那份工作對他來說反而是因禍得福。

gept.example_en: He finally apologized after three weeks, but better late than never.
gept.example_zh: 他過了三週才終於道歉，不過遲做總比沒做好。

gept.example_en: I really need to hit the books this weekend for next week's exam.
gept.example_zh: 為了下週的考試，我這個週末真的得好好用功讀書。

gept.example_en: We have worked enough on this report; let us call it a day.
gept.example_zh: 我們已經做這份報告做很久了，今天就到此為止吧。

gept.example_en: The contractor cut corners on the construction, and now the walls are cracking.
gept.example_zh: 承包商在施工時偷工減料，現在牆壁都裂了。

gept.example_en: He got cold feet right before the wedding ceremony began that morning.
gept.example_zh: 婚禮儀式即將開始那個早上他臨陣退縮了。

gept.example_en: She is in hot water with her parents for staying out too late.
gept.example_zh: 她因在外面待太晚而和父母陷入麻煩。

gept.example_en: He has been on cloud nine ever since she agreed to marry him.
gept.example_zh: 自從她答應嫁給他後，他一直開心得飄飄然。

gept.example_en: Out of the blue, my old roommate sent me a long heartfelt letter.
gept.example_zh: 我的老室友突然寄給我一封長長的真情流露的信。

gept.example_en: My father and I rarely see eye to eye on political issues these days.
gept.example_zh: 我和父親近來在政治議題上很少能達成共識。

gept.example_en: The mayor has been under fire for his handling of the recent crisis.
gept.example_zh: 市長因處理近期危機的方式而備受批評。

gept.example_en: Even small daily actions can make a real difference to our environment.
gept.example_zh: 即使是日常的小行動也能對我們的環境產生真正的影響。

gept.example_en: A good leader must always take responsibility for the team's failures and successes.
gept.example_zh: 一位好的領導者必須為團隊的成敗負起責任。

gept.example_en: It is too early to draw a conclusion based on such limited evidence.
gept.example_zh: 根據如此有限的證據就下結論還太早。

gept.example_en: The campaign aims to raise awareness about mental health among young people.
gept.example_zh: 這項活動旨在提高年輕人對心理健康的意識。

gept.example_en: Parents should set a good example for their children in every situation.
gept.example_zh: 父母在任何情況下都應為孩子樹立好榜樣。

gept.example_en: After hours of discussion, the two sides finally reached an agreement.
gept.example_zh: 經過數小時的討論，雙方終於達成協議。

gept.example_en: He worked through the night to meet the tight project deadline.
gept.example_zh: 他熬夜工作以趕上緊迫的專案截止日期。

gept.example_en: We must take into account all relevant factors before making the final decision.
gept.example_zh: 做最終決定前，我們必須考慮所有相關因素。

gept.example_en: Please keep in mind that the deadline is next Friday at noon.
gept.example_zh: 請記住截止日期是下週五中午。

gept.example_en: Genetics plays a significant role in determining a person's overall health.
gept.example_zh: 基因在決定一個人整體健康狀況上扮演重要角色。

gept.example_en: You should pay close attention to the safety instructions before starting.
gept.example_zh: 開始之前你應該仔細注意安全須知。

gept.example_en: Climate change will have a profound impact on future generations.
gept.example_zh: 氣候變遷將對未來世代產生深遠的影響。

gept.example_en: It took her years to come to terms with the loss of her father.
gept.example_zh: 她花了好幾年才接受失去父親的事實。

gept.example_en: In light of recent events, the company has revised its safety policies.
gept.example_zh: 鑑於近期發生的事件，公司已修訂其安全政策。

gept.example_en: With regard to your request, I will respond within twenty-four hours.
gept.example_zh: 關於您的請求，我會在二十四小時內回覆。

gept.example_en: On behalf of the entire team, I want to thank you sincerely.
gept.example_zh: 我謹代表整個團隊向您致上誠摯的感謝。

gept.example_en: In terms of cost, this option is clearly the most reasonable one.
gept.example_zh: 就成本而言，這個選項顯然是最合理的。

gept.example_en: He missed the deadline, and as a result, he lost the contract.
gept.example_zh: 他錯過了截止期限，結果失去了這份合約。

gept.example_en: In addition to his salary, he receives generous health and dental benefits.
gept.example_zh: 除了薪水之外，他還享有優渥的健康和牙科福利。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 引人入勝的；令人信服的
gept.example_en: She presented a compelling argument that convinced even the most skeptical members.
gept.example_zh: 她提出了一個有說服力的論點，連最持懷疑態度的成員都被說服。

gept.example_en: The artist created an intricate pattern of flowers and birds on the vase.
gept.example_zh: 這位藝術家在花瓶上創作了錯綜複雜的花鳥圖案。

gept.example_en: His explanation sounded plausible, but I still had some lingering doubts.
gept.example_zh: 他的解釋聽起來合理，但我仍有些揮之不去的疑慮。

gept.example_en: Online shopping has become increasingly prevalent among older consumers in recent years.
gept.example_zh: 近年來網路購物在年長消費者中越來越普遍。

gept.example_en: Clean drinking water remains scarce in many remote rural communities worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 在世界各地許多偏遠農村社區，乾淨的飲用水仍然稀缺。

gept.example_en: The company has built a robust system to handle millions of users.
gept.example_zh: 這家公司建立了一個強大的系統來處理數百萬名使用者。

gept.example_en: His ambiguous answer left everyone wondering what he really meant to say.
gept.example_zh: 他模稜兩可的回答讓每個人都在猜測他真正想表達什麼。

gept.example_en: The witnesses gave contradictory accounts of the accident to the investigators.
gept.example_zh: 目擊者向調查人員提供了對事故相互矛盾的陳述。

gept.example_en: She gave a coherent presentation that clearly explained the complex research findings.
gept.example_zh: 她做了一個連貫的簡報，清楚解釋了複雜的研究發現。

gept.example_en: His teacher had a profound influence on his decision to study philosophy.
gept.example_zh: 他的老師對他決定攻讀哲學產生了深遠的影響。

gept.example_en: She has vivid memories of the summer she spent in rural Japan.
gept.example_zh: 她對在日本鄉村度過的那個夏天有著鮮明的回憶。

gept.example_en: There are subtle differences in meaning between these two similar English words.
gept.example_zh: 這兩個相似的英文單字在意義上有微妙的差異。

gept.example_en: The proposal is feasible, but it will require significant financial investment.
gept.example_zh: 這項提案是可行的，但需要大量的財務投資。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 可實行的；可生存的
gept.example_en: Solar energy is becoming a viable alternative to traditional fossil fuels.
gept.example_zh: 太陽能正在成為傳統化石燃料的可行替代方案。

gept.example_en: His instructions were so vague that nobody knew where to start working.
gept.example_zh: 他的指示太模糊，沒有人知道該從哪裡開始工作。

gept.example_en: Please give me a concise summary of the meeting's main points.
gept.example_zh: 請給我一份這次會議重點的簡潔摘要。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/動詞) 詳盡的；詳述
gept.example_en: Could you elaborate on your proposal so the committee understands it better?
gept.example_zh: 你能詳細說明你的提案，好讓委員會更清楚地理解嗎？

gept.example_en: The instructions were explicit about not opening the package before Christmas morning.
gept.example_zh: 這些指示明確規定聖誕節早上之前不能拆開包裹。

gept.example_en: There was an implicit understanding that we would not discuss the issue.
gept.example_zh: 我們之間有一種心照不宣的默契不討論這個議題。

gept.example_en: Our company benefits greatly from having a diverse workforce with varied backgrounds.
gept.example_zh: 我們公司因擁有來自不同背景的多元勞動力而受益良多。

gept.example_en: There is a distinct difference between hearing someone and actually listening to them.
gept.example_zh: 聽見某人說話與真正傾聽他們之間存在明顯的差異。

gept.example_en: Change is inevitable in any organization that wants to remain relevant.
gept.example_zh: 在任何想保持競爭力的組織中，改變是不可避免的。

gept.example_en: It is crucial to communicate clearly when working on international team projects.
gept.example_zh: 進行國際團隊專案時，清楚溝通至關重要。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 重大的；意義深遠的
gept.example_en: The team made significant progress on the project over the past month.
gept.example_zh: 過去一個月團隊在這項專案上取得了顯著的進展。

gept.example_en: The new policy will require a substantial amount of additional funding to implement.
gept.example_zh: 新政策的實施將需要大量額外的資金。

gept.example_en: It took considerable effort to convince him to change his original decision.
gept.example_zh: 花了相當大的力氣才說服他改變原本的決定。

gept.example_en: Make sure you get adequate sleep before tomorrow's important final examination.
gept.example_zh: 確保你在明天重要的期末考前獲得充足的睡眠。

gept.example_en: We do not have sufficient evidence to support such a serious accusation.
gept.example_zh: 我們沒有足夠的證據來支持如此嚴重的指控。

gept.example_en: She is meticulous about keeping accurate records of every business transaction.
gept.example_zh: 她對於保存每筆商業交易的準確紀錄一絲不苟。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 晦澀的；不為人知的
gept.example_en: The professor referenced an obscure poem that most students had never read.
gept.example_zh: 教授引用了一首大多數學生從未讀過的冷僻詩作。

gept.example_en: Please remove the redundant phrases to make your essay clearer and shorter.
gept.example_zh: 請刪除多餘的詞句，讓你的文章更清楚簡潔。

gept.example_en: The professor asked students to only include relevant information in their essays.
gept.example_zh: 教授要求學生在論文中只納入相關資訊。

gept.example_en: Your personal opinions are completely irrelevant to this scientific discussion today.
gept.example_zh: 你的個人意見和今天這場科學討論完全無關。

gept.example_en: You need to present a valid form of identification to enter the building.
gept.example_zh: 你需要出示有效的身分證明才能進入這棟建築。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 多用途的；多才多藝的
gept.example_en: This kitchen tool is versatile enough to handle almost any cooking task.
gept.example_zh: 這個廚房工具用途廣泛，幾乎能應付任何烹飪工作。

gept.example_en: Children are surprisingly resilient when facing difficult life changes and challenges.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們在面對艱難的人生變化和挑戰時表現得出奇地有韌性。

gept.example_en: The main criterion for promotion is consistent excellent performance over several years.
gept.example_zh: 升遷的主要標準是多年來持續優異的表現。

gept.example_en: The discovery represented a paradigm shift in how scientists view human consciousness.
gept.example_zh: 這項發現代表了科學家看待人類意識的典範轉移。

gept.example_en: The implications of this research could change medicine for future generations entirely.
gept.example_zh: 這項研究的影響可能徹底改變未來世代的醫學。

gept.example_en: There is an emotional dimension to this problem we should not ignore.
gept.example_zh: 這個問題有情感層面是我們不應忽視的。

gept.example_en: Scientists are still studying this strange weather phenomenon that appeared last summer.
gept.example_zh: 科學家仍在研究去年夏天出現的這種奇特氣象現象。

gept.example_en: You cannot understand his comment without knowing the full context of the conversation.
gept.example_zh: 不了解對話的完整脈絡，你就無法理解他的話。

gept.example_en: Her years of experience gave her valuable insight into customer behavior patterns.
gept.example_zh: 多年的經驗讓她對顧客行為模式有寶貴的洞察。

gept.example_en: The entire argument is based on a flawed premise about human nature.
gept.example_zh: 整個論點是建立在對人性的錯誤前提之上。

gept.example_en: Please explain the rationale behind your decision to leave the company.
gept.example_zh: 請解釋你決定離開公司背後的理由。

gept.example_en: Studies show a strong correlation between exercise and overall mental wellbeing.
gept.example_zh: 研究顯示運動與整體心理健康之間有強烈的相關性。

gept.example_en: It is important to make a clear distinction between facts and personal opinions.
gept.example_zh: 清楚區分事實與個人意見是很重要的。

gept.example_en: There is a noticeable discrepancy between his statements and the actual evidence.
gept.example_zh: 他的陳述與實際證據之間存在明顯的差異。

gept.example_en: You must accept the consequences of your actions, both good and bad.
gept.example_zh: 你必須承擔自己行為的後果，無論好壞。

gept.example_en: She has a tendency to worry about things she cannot control.
gept.example_zh: 她有種傾向會為她無法掌控的事情擔憂。

gept.example_en: Honesty is the most valuable attribute I look for in close friends.
gept.example_zh: 誠實是我在親密朋友身上最看重的特質。

gept.example_en: Every aspect of the design has been carefully considered by our team.
gept.example_zh: 設計的每個方面都經過我們團隊的仔細考量。

gept.example_en: Trust is a key element in every successful long-term relationship.
gept.example_zh: 信任是每段成功長期關係中的關鍵要素。

gept.example_en: Several factors contributed to the team's surprising success this past year.
gept.example_zh: 多項因素促成了團隊去年令人驚訝的成功。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 特徵；典型的
gept.example_en: Generosity is a characteristic she inherited from her late grandmother.
gept.example_zh: 慷慨是她從已故祖母身上繼承的特質。

gept.example_en: We should utilize all available resources to complete this important task efficiently.
gept.example_zh: 我們應該利用所有可用的資源來有效率地完成這項重要任務。

gept.example_en: The company will undertake a major restructuring project starting next quarter.
gept.example_zh: 公司將從下一季度開始進行重大的重組計畫。

gept.example_en: It took me hours to retrieve the deleted files from the old computer.
gept.example_zh: 我花了好幾個小時才從舊電腦中救回被刪除的檔案。

gept.example_en: The young athlete exhibits remarkable talent and determination at every competition.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕運動員在每場比賽中都展現出非凡的天賦與決心。

gept.example_en: The committee must allocate the limited budget among several competing departments.
gept.example_zh: 委員會必須在幾個競爭部門之間分配有限的預算。

gept.example_en: This material is strong enough to withstand extreme heat and pressure conditions.
gept.example_zh: 這種材料夠堅固，能承受極端的熱度與壓力。

gept.example_en: She acquired excellent language skills during her two years living in France.
gept.example_zh: 她在法國居住兩年期間獲得了優秀的語言能力。

gept.example_en: Children usually adapt to new environments faster than most adults do.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們通常比大多數成年人更快適應新環境。

gept.example_en: We may need to alter our travel plans because of the unexpected weather.
gept.example_zh: 由於意外的天氣狀況，我們可能得改變旅行計畫。

gept.example_en: Nobody could have anticipated the dramatic changes that would occur next year.
gept.example_zh: 沒有人能預料到隔年將發生的劇烈變化。

gept.example_en: The defendant continues to assert his complete innocence despite the overwhelming evidence.
gept.example_zh: 儘管證據確鑿，被告仍堅持主張自己完全無罪。

gept.example_en: It takes years of hard work to attain such a high professional level.
gept.example_zh: 要達到如此高的專業水準需要多年的努力。

gept.example_en: The committee comprises members from various backgrounds and professional fields.
gept.example_zh: 該委員會由來自不同背景與專業領域的成員組成。

gept.example_en: It is difficult to convey complex emotions through a short text message.
gept.example_zh: 要透過簡短的文字訊息傳達複雜的情感是很困難的。

gept.example_en: Many English words derive from ancient Latin and Greek root forms.
gept.example_zh: 許多英語單字源自古代拉丁語和希臘語的字根。

gept.example_en: The team devised a clever plan to reduce costs without affecting quality.
gept.example_zh: 團隊想出了一個聰明的計畫，能降低成本而不影響品質。

gept.example_en: His enthusiasm for the project gradually diminished over the past several months.
gept.example_zh: 他對這項專案的熱情在過去幾個月逐漸減弱。

gept.example_en: New evidence has emerged that completely changes our understanding of the case.
gept.example_zh: 新的證據浮現，徹底改變了我們對這起案件的理解。

gept.example_en: Regular reading can significantly enhance your vocabulary and overall communication skills.
gept.example_zh: 規律閱讀能大幅提升你的詞彙量和整體溝通能力。

gept.example_en: Traveling to different countries can really enrich your understanding of the world.
gept.example_zh: 到不同國家旅行能真正豐富你對世界的理解。

gept.example_en: Solar panels can generate enough electricity to power a small family home.
gept.example_zh: 太陽能板能產生足夠的電力供應一個小家庭使用。

gept.example_en: The government plans to impose stricter regulations on industrial waste disposal.
gept.example_zh: 政府計畫對工業廢棄物處理實施更嚴格的規定。

gept.example_en: We will incorporate your feedback into the next version of the product.
gept.example_zh: 我們將把您的回饋意見納入產品的下一個版本。

gept.example_en: He could not justify spending so much money on a single purchase.
gept.example_zh: 他無法為這筆如此昂貴的單筆消費辯解其合理性。

gept.example_en: It is important to maintain a healthy work-life balance for long-term wellbeing.
gept.example_zh: 維持健康的工作與生活平衡對長期福祉而言很重要。

gept.example_en: You must obtain written permission before using any copyrighted images in your essay.
gept.example_zh: 在你的文章中使用任何有版權的圖片前，必須先取得書面同意。

gept.example_en: She decided to pursue a career in environmental science after graduation.
gept.example_zh: 畢業後她決定追求環境科學領域的職業。

gept.example_en: Positive feedback from teachers can reinforce good study habits among young students.
gept.example_zh: 來自老師的正面回饋能強化年輕學生的良好學習習慣。

gept.example_en: The investigation revealed several serious safety violations at the construction site.
gept.example_zh: 調查揭露了建築工地上幾項嚴重的安全違規行為。

gept.example_en: Please specify the exact time and location when you reply to my email.
gept.example_zh: 請在回信時明確指出確切的時間和地點。

gept.example_en: It is difficult to sustain such a high level of effort indefinitely.
gept.example_zh: 要無限期維持如此高強度的努力是很困難的。

gept.example_en: Technology has transformed the way we communicate with friends and family members.
gept.example_zh: 科技已徹底改變了我們與朋友家人溝通的方式。

gept.example_en: Their research yielded some surprising results that contradicted earlier scientific assumptions.
gept.example_zh: 他們的研究得出了一些與先前科學假設相矛盾的驚人結果。

gept.example_en: My sister enjoys outdoor activities, whereas I prefer to stay inside reading.
gept.example_zh: 我姐姐喜歡戶外活動，而我則偏好待在室內閱讀。

gept.example_en: The road was difficult; nonetheless, we managed to reach the summit safely.
gept.example_zh: 這條路很難走，儘管如此，我們仍設法安全抵達了山頂。

gept.example_en: The weather has changed dramatically, and we must adjust our plans accordingly.
gept.example_zh: 天氣變化劇烈，我們必須相應地調整計畫。

gept.example_en: Some students enjoy group work; conversely, others prefer studying entirely alone quietly.
gept.example_zh: 有些學生喜歡小組合作，相反地，有些則偏好完全獨自安靜地學習。

gept.example_en: He failed to submit his paper on time and consequently received a lower grade.
gept.example_zh: 他未能準時繳交論文，因此得到較低的分數。

gept.example_en: The plan is expensive; furthermore, it would take years to fully implement.
gept.example_zh: 這項計畫費用高昂，此外，要完全執行還需要數年時間。

gept.example_en: This restaurant has excellent food; moreover, the service is consistently outstanding too.
gept.example_zh: 這家餐廳食物極佳，而且服務也始終非常出色。

gept.example_en: It is raining heavily; therefore, we should cancel the outdoor picnic today.
gept.example_zh: 雨下得很大，因此我們今天應該取消戶外野餐。

gept.example_en: He studied very hard and thus achieved excellent results on the final exam.
gept.example_zh: 他非常用功讀書，因此期末考取得了優異的成績。

gept.example_en: The bridge is closed for repairs; hence the heavy traffic on this side road.
gept.example_zh: 橋樑因維修而關閉，因此這條側道才會出現嚴重交通堵塞。

gept.example_en: She greeted everyone politely, and her brother behaved likewise throughout the dinner.
gept.example_zh: 她有禮貌地向每個人打招呼，而她的弟弟整個晚餐也表現得同樣有禮貌。

gept.example_en: Notwithstanding the challenges, the small team completed the project ahead of schedule.
gept.example_zh: 儘管面臨種種挑戰，這個小團隊仍提前完成了專案。

gept.example_en: The plan had several flaws; nevertheless, the committee decided to approve it.
gept.example_zh: 這項計畫有幾項缺陷，然而委員會仍決定批准它。

gept.example_en: You can take the train, or alternatively, we could drive there together.
gept.example_zh: 你可以搭火車，或者我們也可以一起開車過去。

gept.example_en: He specifically asked me not to mention anything about the project details.
gept.example_zh: 他特別要求我不要提及任何關於專案細節的事。

gept.example_en: The library is primarily intended for use by registered university students only.
gept.example_zh: 圖書館主要是供註冊在校的大學學生使用。

gept.example_en: His argument is essentially the same as the one we discussed yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 他的論點基本上和我們昨天討論的相同。

gept.example_en: He has not arrived yet, presumably because of the heavy traffic downtown.
gept.example_zh: 他還沒到，想必是因為市中心交通堵塞的緣故。

gept.example_en: She is arguably the best player on the national women's basketball team.
gept.example_zh: 可以說她是國家女子籃球隊上最出色的球員。

gept.example_en: He felt deep resentment toward his brother for inheriting the family business.
gept.example_zh: 他對哥哥繼承家族事業感到深深的怨恨。

gept.example_en: The children stared in awe at the massive blue whale in the museum.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們驚嘆地凝視著博物館裡那條巨大的藍鯨。

gept.example_en: A sense of melancholy filled her heart as autumn leaves began falling.
gept.example_zh: 當秋葉開始飄落時，一股憂鬱湧上她的心頭。

gept.example_en: The exhilaration of crossing the finish line made all the training worthwhile.
gept.example_zh: 跨越終點線的興奮感讓所有的訓練都值得了。

gept.example_en: She dreaded the thought of speaking in front of a large audience.
gept.example_zh: 她一想到要在一大群觀眾面前演講就感到害怕。

gept.example_en: He found true contentment in simple things like reading and gardening.
gept.example_zh: 他在閱讀和園藝這類簡單的事物中找到了真正的滿足。

gept.example_en: The parents experienced terrible anguish during the long search for their missing daughter.
gept.example_zh: 在尋找失蹤女兒的漫長過程中，父母經歷了極度的痛苦。

gept.example_en: She felt a strong yearning to return to her childhood hometown again.
gept.example_zh: 她對返回兒時故鄉懷有強烈的渴望。

gept.example_en: Sitting by the quiet lake at sunset was pure bliss for him.
gept.example_zh: 在日落時分坐在寧靜的湖邊對他來說是純粹的幸福。

gept.example_en: After losing everything, he sank into a deep state of despair.
gept.example_zh: 失去一切之後，他陷入了深深的絕望之中。

gept.example_en: A wave of euphoria swept through the crowd when the team scored.
gept.example_zh: 當隊伍進球時，一股狂喜的浪潮席捲了整個觀眾席。

gept.example_en: There is a wonderful serenity in this quiet old garden at dawn.
gept.example_zh: 這座寧靜的古老花園在黎明時分有種美妙的祥和感。

gept.example_en: His agitation grew as he waited for news about his grandfather's surgery.
gept.example_zh: 等待祖父手術消息時他的焦躁逐漸加深。

gept.example_en: She showed great compassion toward the homeless people in her community.
gept.example_zh: 她對社區裡的無家可歸者展現了極大的同情心。

gept.example_en: There was clear hostility between the two competing political party leaders.
gept.example_zh: 兩位競爭對手的政黨領袖之間明顯存在敵意。

gept.example_en: He agreed to help with great reluctance and an obvious sigh.
gept.example_zh: 他極不情願地嘆了一口氣後同意幫忙。

gept.example_en: Her enthusiasm for teaching young children inspired everyone in our department.
gept.example_zh: 她對教導年幼孩童的熱情激勵了我們部門裡的每個人。

gept.example_en: Public sentiment about the new policy has shifted dramatically over recent months.
gept.example_zh: 近幾個月來，公眾對新政策的看法已大幅轉變。

gept.example_en: They will endeavor to complete the construction project before the rainy season.
gept.example_zh: 他們將努力在雨季來臨前完成這項建設工程。

gept.example_en: Language was the biggest obstacle she faced when she first moved abroad.
gept.example_zh: 語言是她剛搬到國外時面臨最大的障礙。

gept.example_en: The team suffered a major setback when their lead developer resigned.
gept.example_zh: 當主要開發人員辭職時，團隊遭遇了重大的挫折。

gept.example_en: Many immigrants make great personal sacrifices for the future of their children.
gept.example_zh: 許多移民為了孩子的未來做出了巨大的個人犧牲。

gept.example_en: Despite his many achievements, he always maintained genuine humility in public settings.
gept.example_zh: 儘管成就斐然，他在公開場合總是保持著真誠的謙遜。

gept.example_en: Please use your discretion when handling such sensitive customer information at work.
gept.example_zh: 在工作中處理這類敏感的客戶資訊時請審慎使用判斷力。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/動詞) 故意的；仔細考慮
gept.example_en: The committee will deliberate carefully before announcing the final winner tomorrow afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 委員會在明天下午宣布最終得獎者之前會仔細審議。

gept.example_en: Do not hesitate to contact me if you have any further questions later.
gept.example_zh: 如果之後還有任何問題，請不要猶豫聯絡我。

gept.example_en: We must always strive for excellence in every project we undertake together.
gept.example_zh: 我們在一起進行的每個專案中都必須努力追求卓越。

gept.example_en: The twin sisters resemble each other so closely that even friends confuse them.
gept.example_zh: 這對雙胞胎姐妹長得如此相似，連朋友都會認錯。

gept.example_en: Her latest novel has surpassed all of her previous bestselling works combined.
gept.example_zh: 她最新的小說已經超越了她過去所有暢銷作品的總和。

gept.example_en: The teacher continued to emphasize the importance of careful reading every day.
gept.example_zh: 老師持續每天強調仔細閱讀的重要性。

gept.example_en: This new software will facilitate communication among employees in different time zones.
gept.example_zh: 這款新軟體將促進處於不同時區的員工之間的溝通。

gept.example_en: It is pointless to speculate about what might have happened that fateful night.
gept.example_zh: 猜測那個命運攸關的夜晚可能發生了什麼事是徒勞的。

gept.example_en: Please refrain from using your mobile phone during the live performance tonight.
gept.example_zh: 請在今晚的現場表演期間克制使用手機。

gept.example_en: He decided to abstain from drinking alcohol completely for personal health reasons.
gept.example_zh: 他基於個人健康因素決定完全戒酒。

gept.example_en: The teacher had to intervene when the argument between students became physical.
gept.example_zh: 當學生間的爭吵演變成肢體衝突時，老師不得不介入。

gept.example_en: The pleasant smell of homemade cookies lingered in the kitchen for hours.
gept.example_zh: 自製餅乾的香氣在廚房裡縈繞了好幾個小時。

gept.example_en: I reckon it will take us at least four hours to finish.
gept.example_zh: 我估計我們至少需要四個小時才能完成。

gept.example_en: The lawyer was able to refute every claim made by the opposing side.
gept.example_zh: 那位律師能夠反駁對方所提出的每一項主張。

gept.example_en: There are growing calls to abolish the outdated school dress code policy.
gept.example_zh: 越來越多人呼籲廢除這項過時的學校服裝規定。

gept.example_en: The new regulations prohibit smoking in all public indoor spaces and parks.
gept.example_zh: 新規定禁止在所有公共室內空間和公園內吸菸。

gept.example_en: It is the police department's duty to enforce traffic laws fairly and consistently.
gept.example_zh: 警察部門有責任公平且一致地執行交通法規。

gept.example_en: This conference room can comfortably accommodate up to fifty people seated.
gept.example_zh: 這間會議室可以舒適地容納多達五十人就座。

gept.example_en: The airline agreed to compensate passengers for the inconvenience of the long delay.
gept.example_zh: 航空公司同意補償乘客因長時間延誤帶來的不便。

gept.example_en: Volunteers will distribute warm blankets to the homeless community this winter.
gept.example_zh: 志工今年冬天會將溫暖的毛毯分發給無家可歸的社群。

gept.example_en: The two old friends continued to correspond by letter for many decades.
gept.example_zh: 這兩位老朋友持續以書信往來了好幾十年。

gept.example_en: Their wedding anniversary happens to coincide with our annual family vacation.
gept.example_zh: 他們的結婚紀念日剛好與我們每年的家庭度假同一天。

gept.example_en: Two cars collided at the busy intersection during yesterday's evening rush hour.
gept.example_zh: 兩輛汽車在昨晚的尖峰時段於繁忙的十字路口相撞。

gept.example_en: The unexpected storm disrupted all weekend events scheduled at the outdoor festival.
gept.example_zh: 這場突如其來的暴風雨擾亂了戶外節慶安排的所有週末活動。

gept.example_en: All employees must adhere to the new company policies starting from next Monday.
gept.example_zh: 所有員工從下週一起必須遵守新的公司政策。

gept.example_en: He had to resort to borrowing money from his elderly parents reluctantly.
gept.example_zh: 他不得不勉強訴諸向年邁的父母借錢。

gept.example_en: Please refer to the manual whenever you encounter problems using this complex machine.
gept.example_zh: 每當你在使用這台複雜機器遇到問題時，請參考說明書。

gept.example_en: She widened the aperture to let more light into the camera lens.
gept.example_zh: 她把光圈調大，讓更多光線進入相機鏡頭。

gept.example_en: The photo was ruined by too much exposure to bright sunlight.
gept.example_zh: 這張照片因為陽光曝光過度而毀了。

gept.example_en: He mounted the camera on a tripod to keep the shot steady.
gept.example_zh: 他把相機架在三腳架上以保持畫面穩定。

gept.example_en: Always replace the lens cap to protect the glass from scratches.
gept.example_zh: 請隨時蓋上鏡頭蓋以保護鏡片免於刮傷。

gept.example_en: The shutter clicked as he captured the perfect sunset moment.
gept.example_zh: 當他捕捉完美的夕陽瞬間時，快門喀嚓一聲響起。

gept.example_en: She developed her film negatives in the darkroom every weekend.
gept.example_zh: 她每個週末都在暗房沖洗她的底片。

gept.example_en: He used a chisel to carve intricate patterns into the wooden chair.
gept.example_zh: 他用鑿子在木椅上雕刻複雜的圖案。

gept.example_en: Smooth the edges with sandpaper before applying a coat of varnish.
gept.example_zh: 在上清漆之前先用砂紙磨平邊緣。

gept.example_en: He carried a heavy plank of oak into the workshop yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 他昨天把一塊厚重的橡木板搬進工作坊。

gept.example_en: Apply two coats of varnish to protect the wooden surface from moisture.
gept.example_zh: 塗上兩層清漆以保護木質表面不受潮。

gept.example_en: She bought soft wool yarn to knit a winter scarf for her mother.
gept.example_zh: 她買了柔軟的羊毛線，要為母親編織一條冬天的圍巾。

gept.example_en: Her grandmother taught her delicate needlework when she was only seven.
gept.example_zh: 她祖母在她七歲時就教她精緻的針線活。

gept.example_en: Wear a thimble to protect your finger while pushing the needle through.
gept.example_zh: 穿針時戴上頂針以保護你的手指。

gept.example_en: He practiced calligraphy with an ink brush every morning before breakfast.
gept.example_zh: 他每天早餐前都用毛筆練習書法。

gept.example_en: The artist set up her easel by the window for natural lighting.
gept.example_zh: 那位藝術家在窗邊架起畫架以利用自然光。

gept.example_en: She used clippers to trim the overgrown hedge along the fence.
gept.example_zh: 她用修枝剪修剪沿著籬笆過長的樹籬。

gept.example_en: The architect designed a stunning glass building overlooking the harbor.
gept.example_zh: 這位建築師設計了一棟俯瞰海港的驚豔玻璃建築。

gept.example_en: We called a plumber to fix the leaky pipe under the kitchen sink.
gept.example_zh: 我們叫了水管工來修理廚房水槽下漏水的水管。

gept.example_en: The electrician rewired the entire house in just three working days.
gept.example_zh: 電工只用了三個工作天就重新接好整棟房子的電線。

gept.example_en: The paramedic arrived quickly and stabilized the injured cyclist on the road.
gept.example_zh: 急救員迅速抵達，並在路上穩定了受傷的自行車騎士。

gept.example_en: The optometrist examined her eyes and prescribed her first pair of glasses.
gept.example_zh: 驗光師檢查了她的眼睛並為她配了第一副眼鏡。

gept.example_en: The veterinarian gave our puppy a checkup and required vaccinations today.
gept.example_zh: 獸醫今天替我們的小狗做了健康檢查和必要的疫苗接種。

gept.example_en: After losing her keys, she called a locksmith to change the lock.
gept.example_zh: 弄丟鑰匙後，她叫了鎖匠來更換門鎖。

gept.example_en: The florist arranged a beautiful bouquet of roses for the wedding.
gept.example_zh: 花商為婚禮準備了一束美麗的玫瑰花。

gept.example_en: The carpenter built sturdy custom shelves for our small living room.
gept.example_zh: 木匠為我們的小客廳打造了堅固的訂製層架。

gept.example_en: The mason laid bricks carefully to construct the new garden wall.
gept.example_zh: 泥水匠小心翼翼地砌磚建造新的花園圍牆。

gept.example_en: The welder joined the steel pipes together using a bright torch flame.
gept.example_zh: 焊工用明亮的焊槍火焰把鋼管焊接在一起。

gept.example_en: The chemist conducted experiments in the laboratory to develop a new compound.
gept.example_zh: 化學家在實驗室進行實驗以研發一種新化合物。

gept.example_en: A surveyor measured the boundary lines before construction of the building began.
gept.example_zh: 在建築物施工開始前測量員測量了邊界線。

gept.example_en: The narrow peninsula juts into the warm blue sea for several miles.
gept.example_zh: 這個狹長的半島延伸入溫暖的蔚藍海中好幾英里。

gept.example_en: The archipelago consists of more than two hundred small tropical islands.
gept.example_zh: 這個群島由超過兩百個熱帶小島組成。

gept.example_en: The high plateau offered a breathtaking view of the snowy mountain ranges.
gept.example_zh: 這片高原展現了壯觀雪山連綿的景色。

gept.example_en: The narrow gorge was carved by a powerful river over many centuries.
gept.example_zh: 這個狹窄的峽谷是數個世紀以來由一條強力河流刻鑿而成。

gept.example_en: The massive glacier has been slowly retreating due to rising global temperatures.
gept.example_zh: 這片巨大冰河因全球氣溫上升正在慢慢退縮。

gept.example_en: They hiked along the rim of the canyon at sunset for amazing views.
gept.example_zh: 他們在日落時沿著大峽谷邊緣健行以欣賞壯麗景色。

gept.example_en: The white cliff dropped sharply into the rough waters below us.
gept.example_zh: 白色懸崖陡峭地落入我們下方洶湧的水中。

gept.example_en: The peaceful valley was dotted with small farms and grazing sheep.
gept.example_zh: 這個寧靜的山谷散布著小農場和吃草的綿羊。

gept.example_en: Wildflowers bloomed across the green meadow throughout the warm spring months.
gept.example_zh: 野花在溫暖的春季月份遍布整片綠色草地綻放。

gept.example_en: The swamp was home to alligators, snakes, and many rare birds.
gept.example_zh: 沼澤是短吻鱷、蛇和許多稀有鳥類的棲息地。

gept.example_en: The clear blue lagoon was perfect for swimming and snorkeling all day.
gept.example_zh: 清澈的藍色潟湖整天都很適合游泳和浮潛。

gept.example_en: Divers explored the colorful coral reef teeming with tropical fish species.
gept.example_zh: 潛水員探索了滿是熱帶魚種色彩繽紛的珊瑚礁。

gept.example_en: Ships pass through the narrow strait between the two large islands daily.
gept.example_zh: 船隻每天穿越兩座大島之間的狹窄海峽。

gept.example_en: The skiers raced down the steep slope toward the village below.
gept.example_zh: 滑雪者沿著陡峭的斜坡向下方的村莊飛馳而下。

gept.example_en: Small villages were nestled in the green foothill of the mountain.
gept.example_zh: 小村莊坐落在這座山的青翠山麓上。

gept.example_en: We walked along the narrow ridge with stunning views on both sides.
gept.example_zh: 我們沿著狹窄的山脊行走，兩側都有令人驚嘆的景色。

gept.example_en: The volcanic crater filled with rainwater and became a deep clear lake.
gept.example_zh: 這個火山口積滿雨水後變成了一個又深又清的湖。

gept.example_en: The volcanic eruption sent ash high into the atmosphere for many days.
gept.example_zh: 火山爆發將火山灰送入大氣層高處長達好幾天。

gept.example_en: A sudden avalanche trapped several skiers on the mountain that afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 突然的雪崩在那天下午將數名滑雪者困在山上。

gept.example_en: The strong earthquake shook buildings and caused windows to shatter loudly.
gept.example_zh: 強烈地震震動了建築物並使窗戶大聲破裂。

gept.example_en: The massive tsunami struck the coastline shortly after the underwater earthquake.
gept.example_zh: 巨大的海嘯在海底地震後不久襲擊了沿海地區。

gept.example_en: Heavy rain triggered a landslide that blocked the main mountain road.
gept.example_zh: 豪雨引發山崩，阻斷了主要的山路。

gept.example_en: The wildfire destroyed thousands of acres of forest before being contained.
gept.example_zh: 野火在被控制之前摧毀了數千英畝的森林。

gept.example_en: Several aftershocks continued to rattle the city for days after the earthquake.
gept.example_zh: 地震後好幾次餘震持續震撼這座城市好幾天。

gept.example_en: Cold sleet pelted the windows during the long winter storm last night.
gept.example_zh: 昨晚漫長的冬季暴風中冰冷的雨夾雪打在窗戶上。

gept.example_en: A thick haze settled over the city, reducing visibility on the highways.
gept.example_zh: 濃厚的薄霧籠罩著城市，降低了高速公路上的能見度。

gept.example_en: Heavy smog over the industrial area made it difficult to breathe outdoors.
gept.example_zh: 工業區上空濃重的煙霧讓人在戶外很難呼吸。

gept.example_en: She baked a chicken casserole with vegetables for the family dinner tonight.
gept.example_zh: 她為今晚的家庭晚餐烤了一道有蔬菜的雞肉砂鍋菜。

gept.example_en: The chef prepared a tangy marinade of soy sauce, garlic, and ginger.
gept.example_zh: 廚師調製了一種帶有醬油、大蒜和薑的酸甜醃料。

gept.example_en: Brush a sweet honey glaze over the ham before placing it inside.
gept.example_zh: 將甜蜜的蜂蜜釉汁刷在火腿上後再放入烤箱。

gept.example_en: The bakery's bread had a crispy golden crust and a soft inside.
gept.example_zh: 這家麵包店的麵包外皮酥脆金黃，內部鬆軟。

gept.example_en: The dumplings had a delicious filling of pork, cabbage, and chives.
gept.example_zh: 這些餃子有著美味的豬肉、白菜和韭菜餡。

gept.example_en: He brushed the cookie crumbs off the table after his afternoon snack.
gept.example_zh: 他在下午點心後把桌上的餅乾屑擦掉。

gept.example_en: She drinks a fruit smoothie every morning with banana, berries, and yogurt.
gept.example_zh: 她每天早上喝一杯加香蕉、莓果和優格的水果冰沙。

gept.example_en: He cooked a fluffy omelette stuffed with cheese, mushrooms, and chopped ham.
gept.example_zh: 他煮了一個鬆軟的煎蛋捲，裡面包了起司、蘑菇和切碎的火腿。

gept.example_en: She bought a comfortable family sedan with good fuel efficiency last month.
gept.example_zh: 她上個月買了一輛舒適又省油的家庭轎車。

gept.example_en: The hatchback is perfect for city driving and weekend grocery trips.
gept.example_zh: 這款掀背車非常適合在城市開車和週末買菜。

gept.example_en: He drove his red convertible down the coastal highway with the top down.
gept.example_zh: 他開著紅色敞篷車沿著海岸公路行駛，車頂收起。

gept.example_en: He rode his motorcycle through winding mountain roads every Sunday morning.
gept.example_zh: 他每個星期天早上騎著摩托車穿越蜿蜒的山路。

gept.example_en: The dashboard lit up with a warning when the engine started to overheat.
gept.example_zh: 當引擎開始過熱時儀表板亮起了警告燈。

gept.example_en: Keep both hands firmly on the steering wheel while driving in heavy rain.
gept.example_zh: 在大雨中開車時，雙手要牢牢握住方向盤。

gept.example_en: A small stone cracked the windshield as he drove down the gravel road.
gept.example_zh: 他在碎石路上開車時，一顆小石頭撞裂了擋風玻璃。

gept.example_en: The bumper was dented when another car backed into the parking spot.
gept.example_zh: 另一輛車倒車進停車位時撞凹了保險桿。

gept.example_en: We started a carpool with three coworkers to save on gas money.
gept.example_zh: 我們和三位同事開始共乘以節省油錢。

gept.example_en: The brakes squealed loudly as the bus stopped suddenly at the corner.
gept.example_zh: 公車在轉角突然停下時煞車發出尖銳的聲響。

gept.example_en: Press the clutch fully before shifting into a different gear on hills.
gept.example_zh: 在山坡上換檔之前要完全踩下離合器。

gept.example_en: He moved the gearshift into reverse and slowly backed out of the driveway.
gept.example_zh: 他把排檔桿打到倒車檔並緩緩從車道倒出來。

gept.example_en: The odometer showed that the old car had traveled over two hundred thousand kilometers.
gept.example_zh: 里程表顯示這輛老車已行駛超過二十萬公里。

gept.example_en: The orthopedics department specializes in treating problems with bones and joints.
gept.example_zh: 骨科部門專門治療骨骼和關節相關的問題。

gept.example_en: She visited the dermatology clinic to treat the persistent rash on her arm.
gept.example_zh: 她到皮膚科診所治療她手臂上持續不退的紅疹。

gept.example_en: The pediatrics ward was decorated with bright colors to comfort young patients.
gept.example_zh: 小兒科病房以鮮豔色彩裝飾以安撫年幼的病人。

gept.example_en: He was referred to cardiology after experiencing chest pain and shortness of breath.
gept.example_zh: 他在出現胸痛和呼吸急促後被轉介到心臟科。

gept.example_en: Childhood immunization protects kids from many serious and preventable diseases.
gept.example_zh: 兒童預防接種能保護孩子免受許多嚴重且可預防的疾病。

gept.example_en: Doctors must sterilize all surgical instruments before any operation begins.
gept.example_zh: 醫生在任何手術開始前必須將所有手術器械消毒。

gept.example_en: The thermometer showed her fever had climbed to almost forty degrees Celsius.
gept.example_zh: 溫度計顯示她的發燒已經攀升到將近攝氏四十度。

gept.example_en: The doctor placed the stethoscope on his chest to check his heartbeat.
gept.example_zh: 醫生把聽診器放在他的胸口檢查心跳。

gept.example_en: The nurse filled the syringe carefully before administering the flu vaccine.
gept.example_zh: 護士在施打流感疫苗前小心地把注射器裝滿。

gept.example_en: Over the past decade, technology has changed the way we communicate.
gept.example_zh: 在過去的十年裡，科技改變了我們的溝通方式。

gept.example_en: The invention of the smartphone marked the beginning of a new digital era.
gept.example_zh: 智慧型手機的發明標誌著新數位時代的開始。

gept.example_en: The fall of the Berlin Wall began a new epoch in European history.
gept.example_zh: 柏林圍牆的倒塌開啟了歐洲歷史的一個新紀元。

gept.example_en: This historic temple has stood for more than a century without major damage.
gept.example_zh: 這座歷史悠久的寺廟已矗立超過一個世紀，沒有重大損毀。

gept.example_en: On the eve of the wedding, the bride felt both nervous and excited.
gept.example_zh: 婚禮前夕新娘感到既緊張又興奮。

gept.example_en: They rose at dawn to watch the sun appear over the calm ocean.
gept.example_zh: 他們在黎明起床觀看太陽出現在平靜的海洋上。

gept.example_en: At dusk, the streetlights flickered on and the city began to quiet.
gept.example_zh: 黃昏時路燈閃爍亮起，城市開始安靜下來。

gept.example_en: The garden looked magical bathed in the soft purple twilight of summer.
gept.example_zh: 花園沐浴在夏日柔和的紫色暮光中顯得很夢幻。

gept.example_en: The clock struck midnight just as the fireworks began over the harbor.
gept.example_zh: 當煙火在港口上方開始綻放時，時鐘正好敲響了午夜。

gept.example_en: We agreed to meet at noon for lunch at the new Italian restaurant.
gept.example_zh: 我們約好中午在新的義大利餐廳碰面吃午餐。

gept.example_en: The hikers reached the peak just in time for a spectacular sunrise.
gept.example_zh: 登山者及時抵達山頂觀看壯麗的日出。

gept.example_en: Couples gathered on the beach to watch the brilliant orange sunset together.
gept.example_zh: 情侶們聚集在海灘上一起觀看燦爛的橙色日落。

gept.example_en: The library is much quieter on a weekday than during the weekend.
gept.example_zh: 圖書館在平日比週末安靜得多。

gept.example_en: We will be away on holiday for a fortnight starting next Monday.
gept.example_zh: 我們從下星期一開始將出外度假兩週。

gept.example_en: The company publishes a financial report quarterly to inform shareholders of progress.
gept.example_zh: 公司每季發布一份財務報告以告知股東進展。

gept.example_en: The beaver built a sturdy dam across the small forest stream.
gept.example_zh: 那隻海狸在森林小溪上築起了一座堅固的水壩。

gept.example_en: A playful otter floated on its back, cracking open a clam shell.
gept.example_zh: 一隻頑皮的水獺仰躺漂浮著，敲開一顆蛤蜊殼。

gept.example_en: The crocodile lay motionless in the muddy water waiting for unsuspecting prey.
gept.example_zh: 鱷魚一動不動地躺在泥水中等待毫無防備的獵物。

gept.example_en: The hawk soared high above the field searching for small rodents below.
gept.example_zh: 鷹在田野上空高飛盤旋，尋找下方的小型囓齒動物。

gept.example_en: A green mantis sat perfectly still on the leaf waiting to ambush insects.
gept.example_zh: 一隻綠色螳螂一動不動地坐在葉子上等待伏擊昆蟲。

gept.example_en: The small hedgehog curled into a spiky ball when it sensed danger.
gept.example_zh: 當感到危險時，那隻小刺蝟蜷縮成一顆帶刺的球。

gept.example_en: A curious raccoon raided our garbage cans every single night last week.
gept.example_zh: 上週每晚都有一隻好奇的浣熊翻找我們的垃圾桶。

gept.example_en: The huge hippopotamus stayed in the river to cool off during the heat.
gept.example_zh: 那隻巨大的河馬待在河裡以在炎熱中降溫。

gept.example_en: The rhinoceros has been hunted nearly to extinction for its valuable horn.
gept.example_zh: 犀牛因其珍貴的角而被獵殺到近乎絕種。

gept.example_en: The spotted leopard rested gracefully on a tree branch in the afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 那隻有斑點的豹優雅地下午在樹枝上休息。

gept.example_en: The giraffe used its long neck to reach the highest leaves easily.
gept.example_zh: 長頸鹿用牠的長脖子輕鬆地吃到最高的葉子。

gept.example_en: The ostrich ran across the dry plain at surprisingly fast speeds.
gept.example_zh: 鴕鳥以驚人的速度奔跑穿越乾燥的平原。

gept.example_en: A flock of pink flamingo gathered at the shallow lake every evening.
gept.example_zh: 一群粉紅色的紅鶴每天傍晚都聚集在淺湖邊。

gept.example_en: The woodpecker tapped rhythmically against the trunk searching for hidden insects.
gept.example_zh: 啄木鳥有節奏地敲擊樹幹尋找藏身的昆蟲。

gept.example_en: A graceful white swan glided silently across the still surface of the lake.
gept.example_zh: 一隻優雅的白天鵝靜靜地在平靜的湖面上滑行。

gept.example_en: The magnolia tree in our yard produces beautiful white flowers every spring.
gept.example_zh: 我們院子裡的木蘭樹每年春天都開出美麗的白色花朵。

gept.example_en: Thick green ivy climbed up the old stone walls of the historic mansion.
gept.example_zh: 濃密的綠色常春藤爬上了那座歷史豪宅的舊石牆。

gept.example_en: The maple leaves turned brilliant red and gold during the cool autumn days.
gept.example_zh: 楓葉在涼爽的秋日轉為亮麗的紅色和金色。

gept.example_en: Tall cypress trees lined both sides of the long driveway to the estate.
gept.example_zh: 高大的柏樹排列在通往莊園長車道的兩側。

gept.example_en: The white birch trees stood out against the dark green pine forest.
gept.example_zh: 白色的樺樹在深綠色的松樹林中格外醒目。

gept.example_en: The carpenter chose cedar wood for its pleasant smell and natural durability.
gept.example_zh: 木匠選擇雪松木是因為它宜人的氣味和天然耐用性。

gept.example_en: A tall cactus stood in the corner of the sunny living room.
gept.example_zh: 一株高大的仙人掌立在陽光充足的客廳角落。

gept.example_en: She arranged a bouquet of white lily flowers for the dining table.
gept.example_zh: 她為餐桌準備了一束白色百合花。

gept.example_en: Bright red tulip blooms filled the public gardens every April morning.
gept.example_zh: 鮮紅的鬱金香花朵在每個四月的早晨布滿了公共花園。

gept.example_en: The little girl picked a daisy and tucked it behind her ear.
gept.example_zh: 小女孩摘了一朵雛菊把它別在耳後。

gept.example_en: The tall sunflower turned its bright yellow face toward the morning sun.
gept.example_zh: 高大的向日葵把它鮮黃色的臉轉向早晨的太陽。

gept.example_en: She gave him a quick wink to signal that everything was alright.
gept.example_zh: 她快速向他眨了眨眼，示意一切都沒問題。

gept.example_en: She painted each fingernail a different bright color for the holiday party.
gept.example_zh: 她為了節日派對把每片指甲塗成不同的鮮豔顏色。

gept.example_en: The piercing on her earlobe healed quickly after just two short weeks.
gept.example_zh: 她耳垂上的穿洞只用了兩個短短的星期就癒合了。

gept.example_en: His charming dimple appeared every time he gave us a wide smile.
gept.example_zh: 每次他露出燦爛笑容時迷人的酒窩就會出現。

gept.example_en: A small freckle appeared on her nose after the long summer holiday.
gept.example_zh: 漫長的暑假後她鼻子上出現了一個小雀斑。

gept.example_en: She wore a beautiful silk dress to the elegant evening reception last night.
gept.example_zh: 她昨晚穿著一件美麗的絲綢洋裝出席優雅的晚宴。

gept.example_en: He prefers wearing comfortable denim jeans for casual weekend activities outside.
gept.example_zh: 他比較喜歡穿舒適的牛仔褲進行週末戶外的休閒活動。

gept.example_en: The expensive leather jacket fit him perfectly and smelled wonderfully rich.
gept.example_zh: 那件昂貴的皮夾克非常合身，並散發出濃郁迷人的氣味。

gept.example_en: The royal robe was made of deep purple velvet with golden embroidery.
gept.example_zh: 皇室長袍以深紫色絲絨製成，並有金色刺繡。

gept.example_en: Linen sheets feel cool and comfortable during the hot humid summer nights.
gept.example_zh: 亞麻床單在炎熱潮濕的夏夜感覺涼爽又舒適。

gept.example_en: This sweater is made from soft merino wool from New Zealand sheep.
gept.example_zh: 這件毛衣是用紐西蘭綿羊的柔軟美麗諾羊毛製成的。

gept.example_en: The polyester shirt dries quickly but does not feel as soft as cotton.
gept.example_zh: 這件聚酯纖維襯衫乾得很快，但摸起來不像棉那麼柔軟。

gept.example_en: The luxurious bathroom featured polished white marble floors and gold fixtures.
gept.example_zh: 這間豪華浴室有著拋光的白色大理石地板和金色配件。

gept.example_en: They installed a beautiful black granite countertop in their newly renovated kitchen.
gept.example_zh: 他們在新翻修的廚房裡安裝了美麗的黑色花崗岩檯面。

gept.example_en: She collects handmade ceramic bowls from local artisans during her travels.
gept.example_zh: 她在旅行時收集當地工匠手工製作的陶瓷碗。

gept.example_en: The delicate porcelain teacups were a wedding gift from her grandmother.
gept.example_zh: 這些精緻的瓷器茶杯是她祖母送的結婚禮物。

gept.example_en: An ancient bronze statue stood proudly in the center of the museum hall.
gept.example_zh: 一座古老的青銅雕像驕傲地立在博物館大廳的中央。

gept.example_en: The copper pots in the kitchen needed polishing every couple of weeks.
gept.example_zh: 廚房裡的銅鍋每隔幾週就需要拋光一次。

gept.example_en: The cans are made of lightweight aluminum that can be recycled easily.
gept.example_zh: 這些罐子由輕量的鋁製成，可以輕易回收。

gept.example_en: She used a hole punch to prepare the documents for the new binder.
gept.example_zh: 她用打孔器為新文件夾打孔準備這些文件。

gept.example_en: He pinned the schedule to the corkboard with a small red thumbtack.
gept.example_zh: 他用一個小紅圖釘把行程表釘在軟木板上。

gept.example_en: She tied the bundle of letters together with a thick rubber band.
gept.example_zh: 她用一條粗橡皮筋把這捆信件綁在一起。

gept.example_en: He used correction fluid to cover the mistake in his handwritten essay.
gept.example_zh: 他用修正液蓋住他手寫文章中的錯誤。

gept.example_en: The pencil sharpener sat next to the computer on the student's desk.
gept.example_zh: 削鉛筆機就放在學生書桌上的電腦旁。

gept.example_en: She wrote vocabulary words on each index card for tomorrow's study session.
gept.example_zh: 她在每張索引卡上寫下單字以準備明天的學習。

gept.example_en: She has been playing the clarinet in the school band for three years.
gept.example_zh: 她在學校樂隊吹單簧管已經三年了。

gept.example_en: The trombone player slid the brass tube smoothly to change musical notes.
gept.example_zh: 長號演奏者順暢地滑動黃銅管來變換音符。

gept.example_en: He carried a small harmonica in his pocket to play during long bus rides.
gept.example_zh: 他口袋裡放著一個小口琴在長途巴士旅程中演奏。

gept.example_en: The elegant harp produced beautiful, soothing sounds throughout the wedding ceremony.
gept.example_zh: 優雅的豎琴在整個婚禮儀式中發出美妙撫慰的聲音。

gept.example_en: He played the saxophone passionately at the smoky jazz club downtown.
gept.example_zh: 他在市中心煙霧瀰漫的爵士俱樂部熱情地演奏薩克斯風。

gept.example_en: The trumpet solo at the concert moved many audience members to tears.
gept.example_zh: 音樂會上的小喇叭獨奏感動了許多觀眾流下淚水。

gept.example_en: She practiced the cello for two hours every single evening after dinner.
gept.example_zh: 她每天晚飯後練習大提琴兩個小時。

gept.example_en: The young girl played a soft melody on her silver flute beautifully.
gept.example_zh: 小女孩用她的銀色長笛優美地吹奏一段輕柔的旋律。

gept.example_en: The child shook the tambourine cheerfully in time with the lively music.
gept.example_zh: 小孩興高采烈地隨著歡快的音樂搖動鈴鼓。

gept.example_en: They rented a kayak to paddle along the calm coastal waters together.
gept.example_zh: 他們租了一艘皮艇沿著平靜的沿海水域一起划行。

gept.example_en: He cleared every hurdle effortlessly to win the gold medal at the championship.
gept.example_zh: 他輕鬆跨過每個跨欄並在錦標賽贏得金牌。

gept.example_en: We went bowling with the team to celebrate winning the project bid.
gept.example_zh: 我們和團隊一起去打保齡球慶祝贏得專案的標案。

gept.example_en: She threw the javelin further than anyone else at the regional competition.
gept.example_zh: 她在區域比賽中投擲標槍的距離比其他人都遠。

gept.example_en: He set a new school record in the shot put event this weekend.
gept.example_zh: 他這個週末在鉛球項目創下了新的學校紀錄。

gept.example_en: He waxed his snowboard carefully before heading to the mountain slopes.
gept.example_zh: 他在前往山坡之前仔細地為他的滑雪板上蠟。

gept.example_en: She balanced on the paddleboard for the first time without falling off.
gept.example_zh: 她第一次在槳板上保持平衡而沒有掉下去。

gept.example_en: They tossed a colorful frisbee back and forth on the sunny beach.
gept.example_zh: 他們在陽光普照的沙灘上來回拋著彩色飛盤。

gept.example_en: The children bounced happily on the backyard trampoline for an entire afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們在後院的彈簧床上開心地彈跳了一整個下午。

gept.example_en: She inserted the plug into the outlet to charge her dying phone.
gept.example_zh: 她把插頭插入插座為電量耗盡的手機充電。

gept.example_en: There are too few electrical sockets in the small old apartment building.
gept.example_zh: 這棟小型老舊公寓裡的電源插座太少了。

gept.example_en: They used a sturdy pulley system to lift heavy materials up the scaffold.
gept.example_zh: 他們用堅固的滑輪系統把重物吊上鷹架。

gept.example_en: Pull this red lever firmly to stop the conveyor belt immediately.
gept.example_zh: 用力拉這個紅色的槓桿可以立即停止輸送帶。

gept.example_en: He turned the valve clockwise to shut off the gas before the repair.
gept.example_zh: 他在修理前順時針轉動閥門以關閉瓦斯。

gept.example_en: Check the pressure gauge before driving on the highway for long distances.
gept.example_zh: 在高速公路上長途駕駛前要檢查壓力計。

gept.example_en: Students use a protractor to measure angles precisely in geometry class.
gept.example_zh: 學生在幾何課上使用量角器精確測量角度。

gept.example_en: His grandfather still uses an old wooden abacus to calculate household expenses.
gept.example_zh: 他祖父仍然用一個古老的木製算盤計算家庭開支。

gept.example_en: They observed Saturn's rings through a powerful telescope on the clear summer night.
gept.example_zh: 他們在晴朗的夏夜透過一台強力望遠鏡觀察土星的環。

gept.example_en: She examined the cells under the microscope during the biology laboratory session.
gept.example_zh: 她在生物實驗課上用顯微鏡觀察細胞。

gept.example_en: The old hourglass slowly drained sand from the top chamber to the bottom.
gept.example_zh: 那個古老的沙漏緩緩地把沙從上層流到下層。

gept.example_en: A stone sundial sat in the center of the carefully maintained garden.
gept.example_zh: 一座石製日晷立在精心維護的花園中央。

gept.example_en: The teacher spun the globe slowly to show students the world's countries.
gept.example_zh: 老師慢慢旋轉地球儀向學生展示世界各國。

gept.example_en: A bright welcome banner hung above the door for the surprise birthday party.
gept.example_zh: 一條鮮豔的歡迎橫幅掛在門上方為驚喜生日派對而設。

gept.example_en: She tied a beautiful red ribbon around the perfectly wrapped birthday gift.
gept.example_zh: 她在包裝完美的生日禮物上綁了一條美麗的紅色緞帶。

gept.example_en: A button fell off his shirt during the long uncomfortable meeting today.
gept.example_zh: 在今天漫長又不舒服的會議中他襯衫上的一顆鈕扣掉了。

gept.example_en: The zipper on her favorite jacket broke after years of regular use.
gept.example_zh: 她最喜歡的夾克拉鍊在多年定期使用後壞了。

gept.example_en: He adjusted the buckle on his leather belt to fit his slimmer waist.
gept.example_zh: 他調整了皮帶上的帶扣以配合他變瘦的腰圍。

gept.example_en: Bend down to tie your shoelace before tripping over it again today.
gept.example_zh: 在你今天又絆倒之前彎下身把鞋帶綁好。

gept.example_en: Wear a thick glove when you handle hot pots from the oven.
gept.example_zh: 從烤箱拿熱鍋時要戴上厚手套。

gept.example_en: The little girl lost one red mitten in the snow yesterday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 小女孩昨天下午在雪中弄丟了一隻紅色的連指手套。

gept.example_en: She wrapped a warm wool scarf around her neck before heading outside.
gept.example_zh: 她在出門前把一條溫暖的羊毛圍巾圍在脖子上。

gept.example_en: He left his umbrella on the train and got completely soaked walking home.
gept.example_zh: 他把雨傘忘在火車上，走回家時全身濕透了。

gept.example_en: She bought a bright yellow raincoat for her daughter to wear to school.
gept.example_zh: 她為女兒買了一件鮮黃色的雨衣去學校穿。

gept.example_en: She wore comfortable leather sandals for the long walk on the beach.
gept.example_zh: 她穿著舒適的皮製涼鞋在沙灘上長距離散步。

gept.example_en: His hiking boots provided excellent ankle support on the rocky uneven trail.
gept.example_zh: 他的登山靴在多岩石不平的小徑上提供了極佳的腳踝支撐。

gept.example_en: He turned his baseball cap backward and ran out for soccer practice.
gept.example_zh: 他把棒球帽反戴並跑出去進行足球練習。

gept.example_en: She forgot her sunglasses at home and squinted in the bright noon sun.
gept.example_zh: 她把太陽眼鏡忘在家裡，在明亮的正午陽光下瞇著眼。

gept.example_en: He realized his leather wallet was missing only after returning from the store.
gept.example_zh: 他從商店回來後才發現他的皮夾不見了。

gept.example_en: She rummaged through her purse looking for her car keys for ages.
gept.example_zh: 她在手提包裡翻找了好久要找她的車鑰匙。

gept.example_en: He poured the red wine carefully into a tall crystal goblet.
gept.example_zh: 他小心地把紅酒倒進一個高高的水晶高腳杯裡。

gept.example_en: She placed the teacup gently on the matching porcelain saucer.
gept.example_zh: 她輕輕地把茶杯放在配套的瓷茶碟上。

gept.example_en: Drain the cooked pasta in a colander before adding the rich tomato sauce.
gept.example_zh: 在加入濃郁的番茄醬之前先用濾鍋瀝乾煮好的義大利麵。

gept.example_en: She used a wide spatula to flip the pancakes without breaking them.
gept.example_zh: 她用一把寬寬的鍋鏟翻煎餅，沒有把它們弄破。

gept.example_en: He used long metal tongs to turn the steaks on the hot grill.
gept.example_zh: 他用長長的金屬夾子在熱烤架上翻動牛排。

gept.example_en: Use a grater to shred the cheese finely over the pasta before serving.
gept.example_zh: 上菜前用磨碎器將起司細細刨在義大利麵上。

gept.example_en: She used a sharp peeler to remove the skin from each potato quickly.
gept.example_zh: 她用一把鋒利的削皮器快速地把每顆馬鈴薯削皮。

gept.example_en: Sift the flour through a fine sieve to remove any small lumps.
gept.example_zh: 用細篩過篩麵粉以去除任何小結塊。

gept.example_en: He served the hearty vegetable soup with a large wooden ladle.
gept.example_zh: 他用一支大的木製長柄勺盛上豐盛的蔬菜湯。

gept.example_en: She used a small funnel to pour the cooking oil into the bottle.
gept.example_zh: 她用一個小漏斗把食用油倒入瓶子裡。

gept.example_en: He twisted the corkscrew into the wine bottle and pulled out the cork.
gept.example_zh: 他把開瓶器旋入葡萄酒瓶中並拔出軟木塞。

gept.example_en: She kept a small bottle opener attached to her colorful keyring.
gept.example_zh: 她在彩色鑰匙圈上掛了一個小開瓶器。

gept.example_en: Use the electric can opener to open the large tin of tuna.
gept.example_zh: 用電動開罐器打開那個大鮪魚罐頭。

gept.example_en: They caught several large crab in the wire trap by the rocky shore.
gept.example_zh: 他們在岩岸邊的鐵絲籠裡抓到好幾隻大螃蟹。

gept.example_en: The chef grilled the fresh shrimp with garlic, butter, and chopped parsley.
gept.example_zh: 廚師用大蒜、奶油和切碎的歐芹烤新鮮的蝦。

gept.example_en: They celebrated their anniversary with a luxurious lobster dinner at the harbor.
gept.example_zh: 他們在港口邊享用奢華的龍蝦晚餐慶祝週年紀念。

gept.example_en: The chef prepared steamed clam in white wine and aromatic fresh herbs.
gept.example_zh: 廚師用白酒和芳香的新鮮香草烹製蒸蛤蜊。

gept.example_en: He caught a large trout in the mountain stream early that morning.
gept.example_zh: 他那天清晨在山溪中釣到一條大鱒魚。

gept.example_en: She made a delicious tuna sandwich for lunch with crisp lettuce and mayo.
gept.example_zh: 她做了一個美味的鮪魚三明治當午餐，配上脆生菜和美乃滋。

gept.example_en: He spread sardine paste on toasted bread for a quick afternoon snack.
gept.example_zh: 他把沙丁魚醬塗在烤麵包上當作快速的下午點心。

gept.example_en: Barley is one of the oldest grains used to make hearty beer.
gept.example_zh: 大麥是用來釀造豐厚啤酒最古老的穀物之一。

gept.example_en: She eats a warm bowl of oats with honey and berries every morning.
gept.example_zh: 她每天早上吃一碗加蜂蜜和莓果的溫暖燕麥粥。

gept.example_en: Sweet yellow corn was the main side dish at the summer picnic.
gept.example_zh: 甜甜的黃色玉米是夏日野餐的主要配菜。

gept.example_en: She sliced the crisp red radish thinly to add to the fresh salad.
gept.example_zh: 她把脆脆的紅蘿蔔切薄片加入新鮮沙拉中。

gept.example_en: Cool cucumber slices add a refreshing crunch to the simple summer sandwich.
gept.example_zh: 涼爽的黃瓜片為簡單的夏日三明治增添清爽的口感。

gept.example_en: He grilled the purple eggplant with olive oil, sea salt, and garlic.
gept.example_zh: 他用橄欖油、海鹽和大蒜烤紫色茄子。

gept.example_en: She baked a sweet pumpkin pie for the autumn holiday family dinner.
gept.example_zh: 她為秋季的節日家庭晚餐烤了一個甜甜的南瓜派。

gept.example_en: He sautéed zucchini with onions and fresh basil for a light dinner.
gept.example_zh: 他用洋蔥和新鮮羅勒拌炒櫛瓜當作清淡的晚餐。

gept.example_en: Fresh spinach contains lots of iron and tastes great with garlic.
gept.example_zh: 新鮮的菠菜含有豐富的鐵質，跟大蒜搭配味道很棒。

gept.example_en: She mashed ripe avocado on toast with a sprinkle of sea salt.
gept.example_zh: 她把成熟的酪梨壓在吐司上並撒上一點海鹽。

gept.example_en: They picked baskets of sweet strawberry at the local farm last Saturday.
gept.example_zh: 他們上週六在當地農場採了一籃籃甜美的草莓。

gept.example_en: She added a handful of blueberry to her yogurt and homemade granola.
gept.example_zh: 她把一把藍莓加入她的優格和自製格蘭諾拉麥片中。

gept.example_en: He topped the cheesecake with fresh raspberry and a drizzle of chocolate.
gept.example_zh: 他在起司蛋糕上放上新鮮覆盆子並淋上巧克力。

gept.example_en: They cooled off in the summer heat with chilled slices of watermelon.
gept.example_zh: 他們在夏日的炎熱中以冰涼的西瓜片消暑。

gept.example_en: He grilled juicy pineapple rings to serve alongside the spicy pork chops.
gept.example_zh: 他烤了多汁的鳳梨片配著辣味豬排一起上桌。

gept.example_en: They drank fresh coconut water straight from the shell on the tropical beach.
gept.example_zh: 他們在熱帶海灘上直接從殼裡喝新鮮椰子水。

gept.example_en: Ripe papaya is a sweet tropical fruit that aids healthy digestion.
gept.example_zh: 成熟的木瓜是一種能幫助健康消化的甜美熱帶水果。

gept.example_en: She blended a sweet mango smoothie with yogurt and crushed ice cubes.
gept.example_zh: 她用優格和碎冰塊調出甜美的芒果冰沙。

gept.example_en: The ruby red pomegranate seeds added color and crunch to the salad.
gept.example_zh: 紅寶石般的石榴籽為沙拉增添了色彩和脆感。

gept.example_en: Roasted chestnut tastes wonderful on cold winter evenings near the fireplace.
gept.example_zh: 烤栗子在寒冷的冬夜爐火旁吃起來非常美味。

gept.example_en: She sprinkled chopped walnut over the warm oatmeal for added crunch.
gept.example_zh: 她在溫熱的燕麥粥上撒上切碎的核桃增加口感。

gept.example_en: He drank a glass of almond milk every morning with his breakfast.
gept.example_zh: 他每天早上配著早餐喝一杯杏仁奶。

gept.example_en: She spread peanut butter thickly on warm slices of homemade bread.
gept.example_zh: 她把花生醬厚厚地塗在溫熱的自製麵包片上。

gept.example_en: He snacked on roasted cashew nuts during the long evening movie session.
gept.example_zh: 他在漫長的晚間電影時段中吃烤腰果當點心。

gept.example_en: She added a handful of raisin to the oatmeal cookies for natural sweetness.
gept.example_zh: 她在燕麥餅乾裡加入一把葡萄乾增加自然的甜味。

gept.example_en: He preferred black licorice over chocolate, though most of his friends disagreed.
gept.example_zh: 他比較喜歡黑色甘草糖勝過巧克力，雖然他大多朋友不同意。

gept.example_en: The children roasted marshmallow over the campfire on long wooden sticks.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們用長長的木棍在營火上烤棉花糖。

gept.example_en: She drizzled warm caramel sauce over a generous scoop of vanilla ice cream.
gept.example_zh: 她把溫熱的焦糖醬淋在一大球香草冰淇淋上。

gept.example_en: He chewed the sticky toffee carefully, worried about damaging his dental work.
gept.example_zh: 他小心地嚼著黏黏的太妃糖，擔心會弄壞他的牙齒治療。

gept.example_en: They sailed their luxurious white yacht along the coast of the Mediterranean.
gept.example_zh: 他們駕著他們豪華的白色遊艇沿著地中海的海岸航行。

gept.example_en: The new legislation on climate change passed after months of heated debate in parliament.
gept.example_zh: 關於氣候變遷的新法律在國會中經過數月激烈辯論後通過。

gept.example_en: Citizens voted in a national referendum to decide whether to join the alliance.
gept.example_zh: 公民們在全國公投中投票決定是否加入該聯盟。

gept.example_en: The old statute was finally repealed after decades of public criticism.
gept.example_zh: 那條古老的法規在數十年的公眾批評後終於被廢除。

gept.example_en: The small nation fought hard to protect its sovereignty from foreign interference.
gept.example_zh: 這個小國奮力保護其主權免受外國干涉。

gept.example_en: This case falls outside the jurisdiction of the local court system entirely.
gept.example_zh: 此案件完全不在地方法院系統的司法管轄範圍內。

gept.example_en: Lawmakers proposed an amendment to strengthen consumer protections in the bill.
gept.example_zh: 立法者提出修正案以加強法案中的消費者保護。

gept.example_en: The bipartisan agreement surprised many observers who expected continued political gridlock.
gept.example_zh: 這項兩黨協議讓許多預期政治僵局將持續的觀察者感到意外。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 黨團會議；政黨核心會議
gept.example_en: The party caucus met privately before announcing their final policy position.
gept.example_zh: 該黨黨團會議先私下開會後才宣布最終政策立場。

gept.example_en: The incumbent senator faces a tough challenge from a popular newcomer this year.
gept.example_zh: 現任參議員今年面臨一位受歡迎新人的嚴峻挑戰。

gept.example_en: A powerful lobbyist tried to influence the committee's vote on environmental regulations.
gept.example_zh: 一位有影響力的遊說者試圖影響委員會對環保法規的投票。

gept.example_en: Voters gave the new government a clear mandate to reform the tax system.
gept.example_zh: 選民賦予新政府明確的授權來改革稅務制度。

gept.example_en: The party released its election manifesto outlining promises on housing and healthcare.
gept.example_zh: 該黨發布了競選宣言，闡述對住房和醫療的承諾。

gept.example_en: Critics argued the country had drifted from democracy toward an oligarchy of wealthy elites.
gept.example_zh: 批評者認為該國已從民主漂流向富裕菁英的寡頭政治。

gept.example_en: Some scholars warn that growing wealth gaps may transform democracies into plutocracies.
gept.example_zh: 一些學者警告，日益擴大的財富差距可能將民主轉變為富豪統治。

gept.example_en: Rising populism has reshaped political landscapes across many western democracies recently.
gept.example_zh: 民粹主義的興起最近重塑了許多西方民主國家的政治版圖。

gept.example_en: The country slowly slid from a fragile democracy into an authoritarian autocracy.
gept.example_zh: 該國緩慢地從脆弱的民主滑落為威權獨裁政治。

gept.example_en: The company faces lengthy litigation over alleged violations of consumer protection laws.
gept.example_zh: 該公司因涉嫌違反消費者保護法而面臨漫長的訴訟。

gept.example_en: The defendant maintained her innocence throughout the entire two-month trial.
gept.example_zh: 被告在整個兩個月的審判中堅稱自己無罪。

gept.example_en: The plaintiff sought millions in damages for the workplace injury she suffered.
gept.example_zh: 原告為其遭受的工作傷害尋求數百萬美元的損害賠償。

gept.example_en: The lawyer issued a subpoena requiring the witness to appear in court immediately.
gept.example_zh: 律師發出傳票要求證人立即出庭。

gept.example_en: The grand jury returned an indictment against the former executive on fraud charges.
gept.example_zh: 大陪審團對前高層主管以詐欺罪名提出起訴。

gept.example_en: His sworn deposition contradicted statements he had made publicly earlier this year.
gept.example_zh: 他宣誓的證詞與他今年稍早公開發表的聲明相矛盾。

gept.example_en: The suspect presented a solid alibi proving he was abroad during the crime.
gept.example_zh: 嫌疑人提出了堅實的不在場證明，證實案發時他人在國外。

gept.example_en: The acquittal came as a relief after years of stressful legal proceedings.
gept.example_zh: 在多年壓力沉重的法律程序後，無罪釋放令人鬆了一口氣。

gept.example_en: The judge granted an injunction stopping construction until environmental concerns are addressed.
gept.example_zh: 法官核准禁制令，在環境疑慮獲得處理前暫停施工。

gept.example_en: The witness was charged with perjury after evidence revealed she had lied.
gept.example_zh: 證據揭露她說謊後，該證人被控偽證罪。

gept.example_en: The prosecutor presented compelling evidence linking the defendant to the financial crimes.
gept.example_zh: 檢察官提出令人信服的證據，將被告與金融犯罪連結起來。

gept.example_en: The defendant entered a plea of not guilty during the morning hearing.
gept.example_zh: 被告在上午的聽證會上提出無罪抗辯。

gept.example_en: Police obtained a warrant before searching the suspect's home for stolen property.
gept.example_zh: 警方在搜查嫌疑人住所尋找失竊物品前取得搜查令。

gept.example_en: A controversial clause in the contract allowed the company to terminate employees suddenly.
gept.example_zh: 合約中一條有爭議的條款允許公司突然解僱員工。

gept.example_en: Judges must remain impartial regardless of personal feelings about the parties involved.
gept.example_zh: 無論對當事人有何個人感受，法官都必須保持公正。

gept.example_en: The family sought political asylum after fleeing persecution in their home country.
gept.example_zh: 這家人在逃離原籍國的迫害後尋求政治庇護。

gept.example_en: Successful integration of newcomers requires support from both communities and the government.
gept.example_zh: 新移民的成功融合需要社區和政府雙方的支持。

gept.example_en: Forced assimilation policies have caused tremendous damage to indigenous cultures worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 強制同化政策對全球原住民文化造成了巨大傷害。

gept.example_en: Policies that marginalize minority groups often deepen existing social tensions and inequalities.
gept.example_zh: 邊緣化少數族群的政策往往加深現有的社會緊張與不平等。

gept.example_en: Education can empower young women to pursue careers once considered impossible for them.
gept.example_zh: 教育能賦予年輕女性能力去追求曾被認為對她們不可能的職業。

gept.example_en: Her advocacy for disability rights influenced major policy changes at the national level.
gept.example_zh: 她對身心障礙者權益的倡導影響了國家層級的重大政策變革。

gept.example_en: The grassroots movement gained momentum through social media and community organizing efforts.
gept.example_zh: 這個基層運動透過社群媒體和社區組織努力獲得動力。

gept.example_en: Gentrification has displaced many low-income families from neighborhoods they called home.
gept.example_zh: 仕紳化已迫使許多低收入家庭離開他們稱為家的社區。

gept.example_en: Racial segregation in schools left lasting scars on generations of children.
gept.example_zh: 學校中的種族隔離在世代孩童心中留下持久的傷痕。

gept.example_en: Politicians fueling xenophobia often blame immigrants for complex economic problems they didn't cause.
gept.example_zh: 煽動仇外心理的政客常將他們未造成的複雜經濟問題歸咎於移民。

gept.example_en: Understanding intersectionality helps explain how multiple identities shape an individual's experiences of discrimination.
gept.example_zh: 理解交織性有助於解釋多重身分如何形塑個人遭受歧視的經驗。

gept.example_en: Strict voter ID laws can disenfranchise elderly and low-income citizens who lack documentation.
gept.example_zh: 嚴格的選民身分法可能剝奪缺乏文件的長者和低收入公民的權利。

gept.example_en: Her philanthropy has funded hundreds of scholarships for students from underserved communities nationwide.
gept.example_zh: 她的慈善事業已為全國弱勢社區的學生資助了數百份獎學金。

gept.example_en: An anonymous benefactor donated millions to renovate the historic public library building.
gept.example_zh: 一位匿名捐助者捐贈數百萬用於翻新這座歷史悠久的公共圖書館建築。

gept.example_en: Environmental stewardship requires balancing economic development with the preservation of natural resources.
gept.example_zh: 環境管理職責需要在經濟發展與自然資源保護之間取得平衡。

gept.example_en: Long-term sustainability must guide every decision we make about energy and resource consumption.
gept.example_zh: 長期永續性必須引導我們對能源和資源消耗所做的每項決定。

gept.example_en: Companies are racing to reduce their carbon footprint through cleaner manufacturing processes and renewable energy.
gept.example_zh: 企業競相透過更清潔的製造流程和再生能源來減少其碳足跡。

gept.example_en: Cutting greenhouse gas emissions remains essential to limiting catastrophic global temperature increases.
gept.example_zh: 削減溫室氣體排放對於限制災難性的全球氣溫上升仍至關重要。

gept.example_en: Massive reforestation projects could absorb significant amounts of carbon dioxide from the atmosphere.
gept.example_zh: 大規模的重新造林計畫可從大氣中吸收大量二氧化碳。

gept.example_en: Desertification threatens millions of farmers whose livelihoods depend on increasingly degraded land.
gept.example_zh: 沙漠化威脅著數百萬以日益退化土地為生的農民。

gept.example_en: Decades of overfishing have devastated cod populations in the once-abundant North Atlantic waters.
gept.example_zh: 數十年的過度捕撈摧毀了曾經豐富的北大西洋海域中的鱈魚族群。

gept.example_en: Protecting the watershed ensures clean drinking water for millions of downstream residents and farms.
gept.example_zh: 保護流域可確保下游數百萬居民和農場的清潔飲用水。

gept.example_en: Each biome supports unique communities of plants and animals adapted to specific conditions.
gept.example_zh: 每個生物群系都支持著適應特定條件的獨特動植物群落。

gept.example_en: Wolves act as a keystone species whose presence shapes entire forest ecosystems profoundly.
gept.example_zh: 狼是關鍵物種，其存在深遠地形塑了整個森林生態系統。

gept.example_en: Invasive species often outcompete native organisms and drastically reduce local biodiversity over time.
gept.example_zh: 入侵物種常與原生生物競爭，並隨時間大幅降低當地生物多樣性。

gept.example_en: Acid rain caused by industrial emissions has damaged countless forests and lakes globally.
gept.example_zh: 工業排放造成的酸雨已損害全球無數的森林和湖泊。

gept.example_en: Factories that smelt metal release pollutants that contribute to regional air quality problems.
gept.example_zh: 冶煉金屬的工廠會釋放造成區域空氣品質問題的污染物。

gept.example_en: The government announced strict fiscal measures to address the growing national debt crisis.
gept.example_zh: 政府宣布嚴格的財政措施以應對日益嚴重的國家債務危機。

gept.example_en: The central bank adjusted monetary policy to combat rising inflation across the economy.
gept.example_zh: 中央銀行調整貨幣政策以對抗整個經濟體中上升的通膨。

gept.example_en: Farmers received a government subsidy to help offset losses from the devastating drought.
gept.example_zh: 農民收到政府補貼以幫助抵消災難性乾旱造成的損失。

gept.example_en: New tariffs on imported steel raised prices for manufacturers across multiple industries quickly.
gept.example_zh: 對進口鋼鐵的新關稅迅速提高了多個產業製造商的價格。

gept.example_en: The country's trade deficit widened as exports declined and imports continued to grow.
gept.example_zh: 由於出口下降而進口持續成長，該國的貿易赤字擴大。

gept.example_en: The unexpected budget surplus allowed the city to fund several new community projects.
gept.example_zh: 意外的預算盈餘讓該市能夠資助數個新的社區計畫。

gept.example_en: Years of austerity measures sparked widespread protests against cuts to essential public services.
gept.example_zh: 多年的撙節措施引發了反對削減基本公共服務的廣泛抗議。

gept.example_en: The bank maintained sufficient liquidity to handle unexpected withdrawals during the financial crisis.
gept.example_zh: 該銀行維持足夠的流動性以應對金融危機期間的意外提款。

gept.example_en: Critics argue that unregulated capitalism inevitably concentrates wealth in fewer and fewer hands.
gept.example_zh: 批評者認為，不受監管的資本主義不可避免地將財富集中在越來越少的人手中。

gept.example_en: Democratic socialism emphasizes strong public services funded by progressive taxation policies.
gept.example_zh: 民主社會主義強調由累進稅收政策資助的強大公共服務。

gept.example_en: Oil remains one of the most strategically important commodities traded on global markets.
gept.example_zh: 石油仍是全球市場上交易最具戰略重要性的商品之一。

gept.example_en: Real estate has historically been considered a relatively safe asset for long-term investment.
gept.example_zh: 房地產歷來被認為是相對安全的長期投資資產。

gept.example_en: The aging factory had become more of a liability than an asset for shareholders.
gept.example_zh: 這座老舊工廠對股東來說已成為負債而非資產。

gept.example_en: Employees received company equity as part of their compensation package this fiscal year.
gept.example_zh: 員工本財年的薪酬包中包含公司股權作為部分報酬。

gept.example_en: The startup achieved a billion-dollar valuation despite reporting losses for three consecutive years.
gept.example_zh: 這家新創公司儘管連續三年報告虧損，仍達到十億美元的估值。

gept.example_en: Analysts remained bullish on tech stocks despite recent volatility in the broader market.
gept.example_zh: 儘管大盤近期波動，分析師仍對科技股看漲。

gept.example_en: Investors turned bearish after disappointing earnings reports rattled confidence across multiple sectors.
gept.example_zh: 在令人失望的財報動搖了多個產業的信心後，投資者轉為看跌。

gept.example_en: Government censorship of independent media has intensified since the disputed election results emerged.
gept.example_zh: 自從有爭議的選舉結果出現以來，政府對獨立媒體的審查日益加劇。

gept.example_en: State-run propaganda portrayed the dissidents as dangerous threats to national security and stability.
gept.example_zh: 國營宣傳將異議人士描繪為對國家安全和穩定的危險威脅。

gept.example_en: Social media platforms struggle to slow the rapid spread of harmful health misinformation.
gept.example_zh: 社群媒體平台難以減緩有害健康錯誤資訊的快速傳播。

gept.example_en: Foreign actors have used disinformation campaigns to manipulate public opinion during elections.
gept.example_zh: 外國勢力曾利用假訊息活動操縱選舉期間的輿論。

gept.example_en: Journalists must carefully fact-check every claim before publishing stories about politically charged topics.
gept.example_zh: 記者在發表政治敏感話題的報導前必須仔細查核每項說法。

gept.example_en: Maintaining objectivity is challenging when reporting on issues that affect journalists personally.
gept.example_zh: 在報導影響記者個人的議題時，保持客觀性具有挑戰性。

gept.example_en: Critics accused the network of sensationalism for endlessly replaying graphic footage of the disaster.
gept.example_zh: 批評者指責該電視台不斷重播災難的駭人畫面是煽情主義。

gept.example_en: Tabloid newspapers focus heavily on celebrity gossip rather than substantive political reporting.
gept.example_zh: 小報側重於名人八卦而非實質的政治報導。

gept.example_en: Many quality newspapers placed their content behind a paywall to sustain serious journalism.
gept.example_zh: 許多優質報紙將內容置於付費牆後，以維持嚴肅新聞業。

gept.example_en: Misleading clickbait headlines erode public trust in legitimate news sources over time.
gept.example_zh: 誤導性的點擊誘餌標題長期下來會侵蝕大眾對合法新聞來源的信任。

gept.example_en: The whistleblower revealed massive financial fraud despite enormous personal risks and threats.
gept.example_zh: 這位吹哨者不顧巨大的個人風險和威脅揭露了大規模的金融詐騙。

gept.example_en: Investigative reporting exposed corruption that had been hidden from the public for decades.
gept.example_zh: 調查性報導揭露了對公眾隱瞞了數十年的腐敗。

gept.example_en: The column is syndicated to over two hundred newspapers across three different continents.
gept.example_zh: 該專欄被聯合發表於三大洲超過兩百份報紙。

gept.example_en: Her faith provided strength during the darkest moments of her long medical journey.
gept.example_zh: 她的信仰在她漫長就醫旅程最黑暗的時刻提供了力量。

gept.example_en: The country maintained a strictly secular government separating religious institutions from political power.
gept.example_zh: 該國維持嚴格的世俗政府，將宗教機構與政治權力分開。

gept.example_en: Different denominations interpret the central doctrine of salvation in remarkably different ways.
gept.example_zh: 不同教派對救贖這核心教條的詮釋有著顯著差異。

gept.example_en: Philosophers have debated questions of morality and ethics for thousands of years already.
gept.example_zh: 哲學家們已就道德與倫理問題辯論了數千年。

gept.example_en: The clergy played influential roles in community life throughout much of European history.
gept.example_zh: 神職人員在歐洲歷史的大部分時間中於社區生活扮演有影響力的角色。

gept.example_en: Millions undertake a pilgrimage to sacred sites each year despite the long arduous journey.
gept.example_zh: 儘管旅途漫長艱辛，每年仍有數百萬人前往聖地朝聖。

gept.example_en: Scholars debated different translations of the ancient scripture for hundreds of years.
gept.example_zh: 學者們對這部古老經文的不同譯本爭論了數百年。

gept.example_en: She studied theology at university before pursuing a career as a hospital chaplain.
gept.example_zh: 她在大學主修神學，之後成為一名醫院牧師。

gept.example_en: He described himself as agnostic, neither confirming nor denying belief in any deity.
gept.example_zh: 他自稱不可知論者，既不確認也不否認對任何神祇的信仰。

gept.example_en: As an atheist, she found meaning through humanist philosophy and community involvement instead.
gept.example_zh: 身為無神論者，她改透過人文主義哲學和社區參與來尋找意義。

gept.example_en: Existentialism emphasizes individual freedom and the responsibility of creating one's own meaning.
gept.example_zh: 存在主義強調個人自由以及創造自我意義的責任。

gept.example_en: Utilitarianism judges actions by whether they produce the greatest good for the most people.
gept.example_zh: 功利主義依據行為是否為最多人帶來最大利益來進行判斷。

gept.example_en: Deontology holds that certain actions are morally required regardless of their consequences.
gept.example_zh: 義務論認為某些行為在道德上是必要的，無論其後果如何。

gept.example_en: Epistemology examines fundamental questions about what we can truly know and how.
gept.example_zh: 知識論探討關於我們真正能知道什麼以及如何知道的根本問題。

gept.example_en: Metaphysics explores the deepest nature of reality, existence, time, and causality.
gept.example_zh: 形而上學探索現實、存在、時間和因果關係的最深層本質。

gept.example_en: The dynasty ruled the empire for nearly three centuries before finally collapsing.
gept.example_zh: 該王朝統治帝國近三個世紀後才最終崩潰。

gept.example_en: The feudal system bound peasants to land owned by powerful aristocratic noble families.
gept.example_zh: 封建制度將農民束縛在由強大貴族家族擁有的土地上。

gept.example_en: European colonization fundamentally transformed indigenous societies across the Americas for centuries.
gept.example_zh: 歐洲殖民地化在數個世紀中根本性地改變了美洲的原住民社會。

gept.example_en: Post-war decolonization led to the rapid creation of dozens of newly independent nations.
gept.example_zh: 戰後的去殖民化導致數十個新獨立國家的迅速建立。

gept.example_en: Critics analyzed how imperialism continued to shape global economic relationships long after independence.
gept.example_zh: 批評者分析帝國主義如何在獨立之後長期繼續形塑全球經濟關係。

gept.example_en: The revolution overthrew the monarchy and established a republic within just two years.
gept.example_zh: 這場革命推翻了君主制並在短短兩年內建立了共和國。

gept.example_en: The peasant uprising spread quickly through villages frustrated by years of harsh taxation.
gept.example_zh: 農民起義迅速擴散到因多年苛稅而沮喪的村莊之間。

gept.example_en: The cultural renaissance produced extraordinary art, science, and literature across European societies.
gept.example_zh: 這場文化復興在歐洲社會中產生了非凡的藝術、科學和文學成就。

gept.example_en: The Enlightenment promoted reason, science, and individual rights against traditional religious authority.
gept.example_zh: 啟蒙運動倡導理性、科學和個人權利以對抗傳統的宗教權威。

gept.example_en: Archaeologists discovered an ancient artifact that completely rewrote the region's known history.
gept.example_zh: 考古學家發現了一件改寫了該地區已知歷史的古代文物。

gept.example_en: The excavation revealed remains of a sophisticated settlement dating back four thousand years.
gept.example_zh: 這次挖掘揭露了可追溯至四千年前的精密聚落遺跡。

gept.example_en: Scholars spent decades deciphering hieroglyphs carved into the walls of ancient temple chambers.
gept.example_zh: 學者們花了數十年破譯刻在古代神廟室內牆上的象形文字。

gept.example_en: The chronicle documented daily events at the royal court over a turbulent decade.
gept.example_zh: 這部編年史記載了動盪十年間皇家宮廷的日常事件。

gept.example_en: It is customary to remove your shoes before entering a traditional Japanese home.
gept.example_zh: 進入傳統日式住宅前脫鞋是慣例。

gept.example_en: The diaspora maintained close ties to their homeland through cultural festivals and remittances.
gept.example_zh: 這個離散族群透過文化節慶和匯款維持與祖國的密切聯繫。

gept.example_en: Mass government surveillance programs have raised serious concerns about citizens' privacy rights worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 大規模的政府監控計畫已引發全球對公民隱私權的嚴重關切。

gept.example_en: Many smartphones now use biometric authentication like fingerprints or facial recognition for security.
gept.example_zh: 許多智慧型手機現在使用指紋或臉部辨識等生物辨識認證來確保安全。

gept.example_en: Convincing deepfake videos pose serious threats to elections and public discourse globally.
gept.example_zh: 逼真的深度偽造影片對全球選舉和公共論述構成嚴重威脅。

gept.example_en: Companies deploy chatbot systems to handle routine customer inquiries quickly and efficiently around-the-clock.
gept.example_zh: 企業部署聊天機器人系統，全天候快速有效地處理常見的客戶詢問。

gept.example_en: Cybersecurity experts warned that critical infrastructure remained dangerously vulnerable to coordinated attacks.
gept.example_zh: 網路安全專家警告，關鍵基礎設施仍對協調攻擊極度脆弱。
