gept.example_en: Dried apricots add a chewy sweetness to homemade granola.
gept.example_zh: 杏桃乾能為自製格蘭諾拉麥片增添耐嚼的甜味。

gept.example_en: A perfectly ripe plum is juicy enough that you should eat it over the sink.
gept.example_zh: 完美熟成的李子多汁到應該站在水槽邊吃。

gept.example_en: The young goalie made an incredible save in the final minute of the match.
gept.example_zh: 年輕的守門員在比賽最後一分鐘做出了不可思議的撲救。

gept.example_en: A creative midfielder controls the rhythm of the entire game.
gept.example_zh: 有創造力的中場球員能掌控整場比賽的節奏。

gept.example_en: The center defender headed the ball clear of the penalty area.
gept.example_zh: 中後衛把球頂出禁區外。

gept.example_en: All youth soccer players must wear shin guards during practices and games.
gept.example_zh: 所有青少年足球員在練習和比賽時都必須戴護脛。

gept.example_en: Coaches now require every boxer to wear a properly fitted mouthguard.
gept.example_zh: 教練們現在規定每位拳擊手都得配戴合適的護齒套。

gept.example_en: Don't forget to scrape mud off your cleats before walking inside the house.
gept.example_zh: 進屋前別忘了把釘鞋上的泥巴刮掉。

gept.example_en: He restrings his tennis racquet every six weeks during competition season.
gept.example_zh: 比賽季時他每六週就會幫網球拍重新穿線。

gept.example_en: A feather shuttlecock flies very differently from a plastic training one.
gept.example_zh: 羽毛製羽毛球的飛行方式和塑膠訓練用球差異很大。

gept.example_en: The rubber puck slid silently across the smooth, polished ice.
gept.example_zh: 橡膠冰球無聲地滑過光滑拋光的冰面。

gept.example_en: His jersey number ten was retired after he led the team to three championships.
gept.example_zh: 他帶領球隊拿下三屆冠軍後，背號十號就被退休了。

gept.example_en: The coach gave an inspiring speech in the locker room at halftime.
gept.example_zh: 教練在中場休息時在更衣室發表了一段激勵人心的演說。

gept.example_en: The scoreboard above center field showed only three minutes remaining.
gept.example_zh: 中外野上方的計分板顯示只剩三分鐘。

gept.example_en: The injured player watched the rest of the match from the sideline.
gept.example_zh: 受傷的球員從邊線旁觀看了下半場比賽。

gept.example_en: The coach called a timeout to discuss the team's defensive strategy.
gept.example_zh: 教練叫了暫停以討論球隊的防守戰術。

gept.example_en: He calmly slotted the penalty into the bottom corner of the net.
gept.example_zh: 他冷靜地把罰球射進球門下角。

gept.example_en: Fill out your customs declaration before stepping off the airplane.
gept.example_zh: 下飛機前先填好海關申報單。

gept.example_en: The security check line at the airport moved unusually quickly this morning.
gept.example_zh: 機場安檢的隊伍今早出乎意料地很快通過。

gept.example_en: The immigration officer stamped my passport and welcomed me to the country.
gept.example_zh: 移民官在我的護照上蓋章，並歡迎我進入該國。

gept.example_en: Meet me at baggage claim once you've collected your suitcase.
gept.example_zh: 等你領完行李後在行李提領處見我。

gept.example_en: Our departure gate was changed twice in the last thirty minutes.
gept.example_zh: 我們的登機門在最後三十分鐘內換了兩次。

gept.example_en: Passengers walked along the jet bridge directly into the airplane cabin.
gept.example_zh: 乘客沿著空橋直接走進機艙。

gept.example_en: She always requests a window seat so she can watch the clouds.
gept.example_zh: 她總是要求靠窗座位，這樣她可以看雲。

gept.example_en: On long flights he prefers an aisle seat so he can stretch his legs easily.
gept.example_zh: 長途飛行他偏好走道座位，這樣可以方便伸展雙腿。

gept.example_en: Buying travel insurance is wise before any trip abroad.
gept.example_zh: 出國旅行前購買旅遊險是明智之舉。

gept.example_en: Pack a universal travel adapter so you can charge your devices anywhere.
gept.example_zh: 打包一個萬用旅行轉接頭，到哪裡都能幫設備充電。

gept.example_en: Buy a local sim card at the airport to avoid expensive roaming charges.
gept.example_zh: 在機場買一張當地SIM卡，可以省下昂貴的漫遊費。

gept.example_en: The currency exchange counter charges a smaller fee than the hotel front desk.
gept.example_zh: 貨幣兌換櫃台收的手續費比飯店櫃檯便宜。

gept.example_en: Always keep a little foreign currency for tips when you arrive in a new country.
gept.example_zh: 到一個新國家時，務必保留一些外幣以便給小費。

gept.example_en: Few banks still accept traveler's checks for everyday purchases.
gept.example_zh: 現在很少銀行還會接受旅行支票用於日常消費。

gept.example_en: The teller asked her to sign the withdrawal slip before handing over the cash.
gept.example_zh: 行員請她在提款單上簽名後才把現金交給她。

gept.example_en: Write the total amount clearly on the deposit slip before joining the queue.
gept.example_zh: 在排隊前先在存款單上清楚寫上總金額。

gept.example_en: His atm card was swallowed by the machine after he entered the wrong pin three times.
gept.example_zh: 他連續輸錯密碼三次後，提款卡就被機器吞了。

gept.example_en: Online banking saves him a trip to the branch every payday.
gept.example_zh: 網路銀行讓他每次發薪日都省下跑分行的時間。

gept.example_en: With the new mobile banking app, you can deposit checks by taking a photo.
gept.example_zh: 用新的行動銀行app拍照就能存入支票。

gept.example_en: International wire transfers usually have a transfer fee of around twenty dollars.
gept.example_zh: 國際電匯通常會收取大約二十美元的轉帳手續費。

gept.example_en: The hotel adds a ten percent service charge to every meal billed to the room.
gept.example_zh: 飯店會在每一筆掛房內的餐費上加收一成服務費。

gept.example_en: Pay the bill before the deadline to avoid a steep late fee.
gept.example_zh: 在期限前付清帳單，以免被收高額逾期費用。

gept.example_en: This account requires a minimum balance of one thousand dollars at all times.
gept.example_zh: 這個帳戶必須隨時保持一千美元的最低存款額。

gept.example_en: They keep important documents in a safe deposit box at the bank.
gept.example_zh: 他們把重要文件存放在銀行的保險箱裡。

gept.example_en: The new banknote design includes several hidden security features.
gept.example_zh: 新版紙鈔的設計包含多項隱藏的防偽功能。

gept.example_en: She emptied her coin purse onto the counter to count the change.
gept.example_zh: 她把零錢包倒在櫃台上以便清點零錢。

gept.example_en: He dropped his loose change into a jar at the end of every workday.
gept.example_zh: 他每個工作日結束時都會把零錢丟進罐子裡。

gept.example_en: Please give me the change in small bills so I can tip easily.
gept.example_zh: 請把找的零錢換成小面額鈔票，這樣我比較方便給小費。

gept.example_en: The cashier quickly recognized the counterfeit bill and called her manager.
gept.example_zh: 收銀員很快看出那是偽鈔，馬上叫了經理。

gept.example_en: The exchange counter at the airport opens at six o'clock every morning.
gept.example_zh: 機場的兌換櫃台每天早上六點開門。

gept.example_en: Pink begonias filled the hanging baskets along the entire porch.
gept.example_zh: 粉紅秋海棠開滿了整個門廊的吊籃。

gept.example_en: A single white camellia floated on the surface of the tea ceremony bowl.
gept.example_zh: 一朵白山茶花漂浮在茶道的茶碗水面上。

gept.example_en: The sweet smell of hyacinth filled the entire kitchen for a whole week.
gept.example_zh: 風信子的甜香整整一週都瀰漫在廚房裡。

gept.example_en: A graceful weeping willow leaned over the small wooden footbridge.
gept.example_zh: 一株優雅的垂柳斜垂在小木橋上方。

gept.example_en: Plum blossoms bloom in winter, often while snow still covers the branches.
gept.example_zh: 梅花在冬天綻放，常常枝頭還積著雪。

gept.example_en: Juniper berries give gin its distinctive piney aroma.
gept.example_zh: 杜松子讓琴酒擁有獨特的松木香氣。

gept.example_en: Each ladder back chair was hand-carved from a single piece of oak.
gept.example_zh: 每一張梯背椅都是用整塊橡木手工雕刻而成。

gept.example_en: Grandma fell asleep in the wooden rocking chair on the front porch.
gept.example_zh: 奶奶在前門廊的木製搖椅上睡著了。

gept.example_en: Prop your tired feet up on the small footstool to relax.
gept.example_zh: 把疲累的雙腳放上小腳凳放鬆一下。

gept.example_en: A long shoe horn helps elderly people put on shoes without bending down.
gept.example_zh: 長柄鞋拔能幫助年長者穿鞋時不必彎腰。

gept.example_en: Please place your shoes neatly on the wooden shoe rack by the entrance.
gept.example_zh: 請把鞋子整齊放在門口的木鞋架上。

gept.example_en: The wooden napkin holder on the dining table needs to be refilled.
gept.example_zh: 餐桌上的木製餐巾紙架需要補貨了。

gept.example_en: Could you please pass me the small glass salt shaker?
gept.example_zh: 可以請你把那個小玻璃鹽罐遞給我嗎？

gept.example_en: Twist the pepper mill a few times over the soup for fresh fragrance.
gept.example_zh: 在湯上轉幾下胡椒研磨罐，能帶來新鮮的香氣。

gept.example_en: The children pressed star shapes into the dough with a cookie cutter.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們用餅乾模在麵團上壓出星星形狀。

gept.example_en: Hang the damp dish towel over the oven handle so it can air dry.
gept.example_zh: 把濕的擦碗布掛在烤箱把手上讓它自然風乾。

gept.example_en: He tied the apron strings tightly behind his back before starting to cook.
gept.example_zh: 他開始下廚前把圍裙帶在背後綁緊。

gept.example_en: Grilled swordfish steaks taste similar to a meaty white fish.
gept.example_zh: 烤旗魚排嚐起來像是肉感十足的白肉魚。

gept.example_en: Red snapper is delicious when steamed whole with ginger and scallions.
gept.example_zh: 紅鯛魚整條與薑絲蔥段清蒸非常美味。

gept.example_en: Pan-fry flounder with brown butter and capers for a quick weeknight dinner.
gept.example_zh: 用焦化奶油與酸豆煎比目魚，是週間快速晚餐。

gept.example_en: At Louisiana festivals, families share huge piles of boiled crayfish.
gept.example_zh: 在路易斯安那的節慶，家庭會共享一大堆水煮小龍蝦。

gept.example_en: He opened a sardine can and ate the fish straight on a piece of toast.
gept.example_zh: 他打開沙丁魚罐頭，直接把魚放在吐司上吃。

gept.example_en: A pair of bluebirds raised their chicks in our cherry tree last year.
gept.example_zh: 去年一對藍鳥在我們的櫻桃樹上養育雛鳥。

gept.example_en: The woodlark sang from the very top of the tallest pine.
gept.example_zh: 林雲雀從最高大的松樹頂端唱起歌來。

gept.example_en: A snowy egret stood perfectly still in the shallow rice paddy.
gept.example_zh: 一隻雪白色的白鷺在淺水稻田中一動也不動地佇立。

gept.example_en: A great blue heron speared a small fish with one swift motion.
gept.example_zh: 一隻大藍鷺以迅捷的動作叉起一條小魚。

gept.example_en: Storks build their huge nests right on top of European chimneys.
gept.example_zh: 鸛鳥會在歐洲的煙囪頂端築起巨大的巢。

gept.example_en: A small horned toad scurried across the hot, dusty desert path.
gept.example_zh: 一隻小角蜥快速地穿越炎熱的沙塵小徑。

gept.example_en: A green sea turtle slowly swam past us along the coral reef.
gept.example_zh: 一隻綠海龜沿著珊瑚礁緩緩從我們身邊游過。

gept.example_en: A komodo dragon can grow longer than two meters in the wild.
gept.example_zh: 科莫多巨蜥在野外能長到超過兩公尺。

gept.example_en: A beekeeper carefully lifted one frame from the wooden beehive.
gept.example_zh: 養蜂人小心地從木製蜂窩中取出一片巢框。

gept.example_en: Spray plenty of insect repellent on your ankles before hiking through tall grass.
gept.example_zh: 在高草叢健行前，要在腳踝噴上充足的防蟲液。

gept.example_en: A glistening spider web stretched between the two windowpanes overnight.
gept.example_zh: 一夜之間，兩片窗格間就拉起一張閃亮的蜘蛛網。

gept.example_en: Apply a soothing cream to the insect bite to reduce the itch.
gept.example_zh: 在被蟲咬的地方擦舒緩乳霜可以減輕搔癢。

gept.example_en: Refill the birdseed feeder every other day during the cold winter months.
gept.example_zh: 在寒冷的冬季每隔一天就要補一次鳥飼料餵食器。

gept.example_en: Several sparrows splashed happily in the stone birdbath all morning.
gept.example_zh: 好幾隻麻雀整個早上開心地在石製澡盆裡戲水。

gept.example_en: A red cardinal returned to our birdfeeder every morning at sunrise.
gept.example_zh: 一隻紅雀每天日出時都會回到我們的餵鳥器旁。

gept.example_en: A patient birdwatcher waited five hours just to spot a rare warbler.
gept.example_zh: 一位有耐心的賞鳥者等了五個小時，就為了看一隻稀有的鶯。

gept.example_en: Our small vegetable garden produces enough tomatoes for the entire neighborhood.
gept.example_zh: 我們的小菜園產的番茄足以供應整個社區。

gept.example_en: They stayed at a friendly backpacker hostel near the old town square.
gept.example_zh: 他們住在老城廣場附近一間友善的背包客棧。

gept.example_en: The travel agency arranged everything from flights to local guides.
gept.example_zh: 那家旅行社安排了從機票到當地導遊的所有事項。

gept.example_en: Our cheerful tour guide spoke four languages fluently and told great jokes.
gept.example_zh: 我們開朗的導遊精通四種語言，還很會說笑話。

gept.example_en: Review your monthly bank statement carefully to spot any unfamiliar transactions.
gept.example_zh: 仔細檢查每月的銀行對帳單以察覺任何陌生交易。

gept.example_en: Most employers deposit salary payments directly into your checking account.
gept.example_zh: 大多數雇主會把薪資直接匯入你的支票帳戶。

gept.example_en: She moves a fixed amount into her savings account on the first of every month.
gept.example_zh: 她每月一號都會把固定金額轉入儲蓄帳戶。

gept.example_en: The newlyweds opened a joint account to pay their shared household bills.
gept.example_zh: 這對新婚夫婦開了一個聯名帳戶來繳家用帳單。

gept.example_en: A frozen account often unfreezes once the customer verifies their identity.
gept.example_zh: 凍結的帳戶通常在客戶完成身分驗證後就會解凍。

gept.example_en: Some landlords prefer a money order instead of a personal check.
gept.example_zh: 有些房東偏好收匯票而不是個人支票。

gept.example_en: As an introvert, she preferred quiet evenings with a book to crowded parties.
gept.example_zh: 身為內向者，她偏好安靜的夜晚讀本書，勝過擁擠的派對。

gept.example_en: The extrovert in the office quickly befriended every new colleague who joined the team.
gept.example_zh: 辦公室裡的外向者很快就和每位加入團隊的新同事成為朋友。

gept.example_en: A perfectionist by nature, he revised the report five times before submitting it.
gept.example_zh: 他天生是個完美主義者，提交報告前修改了五次。

gept.example_en: The optimist believed that every setback was simply a stepping stone toward future success.
gept.example_zh: 那位樂觀主義者相信每次挫折都只是邁向未來成功的踏腳石。

gept.example_en: A pessimist always expects the worst outcome, even when the situation looks promising.
gept.example_zh: 悲觀主義者總是預期最壞的結果，即使情況看來樂觀。

gept.example_en: As a realist, she weighed the risks carefully before making any major life decision.
gept.example_zh: 身為現實主義者，她在做任何重大人生決定前都會仔細權衡風險。

gept.example_en: The young idealist dreamed of building a society where everyone enjoyed equal opportunities.
gept.example_zh: 年輕的理想主義者夢想建立一個人人享有平等機會的社會。

gept.example_en: Being a workaholic, he stayed at the office past midnight nearly every weekday.
gept.example_zh: 身為工作狂，他幾乎每個工作日都待在辦公室到半夜過後。

gept.example_en: He had always been a loner, content to spend weekends hiking in solitude.
gept.example_zh: 他一直都是個獨來獨往的人，週末喜歡獨自健行而感到滿足。

gept.example_en: The teacher gently scolded the daydreamer for staring out the window during the lecture.
gept.example_zh: 老師溫和地責備那位上課時望著窗外發呆的愛幻想者。

gept.example_en: As an overthinker, she analyzed every casual remark for hidden meanings.
gept.example_zh: 身為一個想太多的人，她會分析每句隨口的話是否有隱含意義。

gept.example_en: Successful entrepreneurs are often risk-takers willing to invest in unproven ideas.
gept.example_zh: 成功的創業家通常是冒險者，願意投資未經驗證的點子。

gept.example_en: The new intern proved to be a go-getter, completing tasks ahead of every deadline.
gept.example_zh: 新來的實習生證明自己是個積極進取的人，每項任務都提前完成。

gept.example_en: As a people-pleaser, he found it nearly impossible to say no to favors.
gept.example_zh: 身為一個討好他人的人，他幾乎不可能拒絕別人的請託。

gept.example_en: Her methodical approach to research impressed the entire academic committee.
gept.example_zh: 她對研究有條理的做法令整個學術委員會印象深刻。

gept.example_en: His impulsive decision to quit the job left his family worried about finances.
gept.example_zh: 他衝動辭職的決定讓家人擔心經濟狀況。

gept.example_en: She was so high-strung before exams that her hands trembled while writing.
gept.example_zh: 她考前神經太緊繃，書寫時雙手都在發抖。

gept.example_en: The laid-back manager rarely raised his voice, even during stressful product launches.
gept.example_zh: 那位悠閒的經理即使在壓力大的產品發表期間也很少提高音量。

gept.example_en: He felt self-conscious about his accent when speaking in front of native speakers.
gept.example_zh: 在母語人士面前說話時，他對自己的口音感到不自在。

gept.example_en: An open-minded leader welcomes feedback even when it challenges her own views.
gept.example_zh: 心胸開闊的領導者即使在意見挑戰自己看法時也會欣然接受。

gept.example_en: His narrow-minded refusal to consider other cultures cost him several friendships abroad.
gept.example_zh: 他心胸狹隘地拒絕了解其他文化，使他在國外失去了幾段友誼。

gept.example_en: The auditor was scrupulous about documenting every transaction in proper detail.
gept.example_zh: 那位審計員對每筆交易都一絲不苟地詳細記錄。

gept.example_en: He was fastidious about cleanliness and could not stand a single dish in the sink.
gept.example_zh: 他對清潔極為挑剔，連水槽裡一個碗都受不了。

gept.example_en: A conscientious worker, she stayed late to finish what others had abandoned.
gept.example_zh: 她是個認真盡責的員工，總是留下來完成別人放棄的工作。

gept.example_en: Her tenacious pursuit of the story uncovered corruption few journalists had suspected.
gept.example_zh: 她堅韌不拔地追查那則新聞，揭發了少有記者懷疑的貪腐。

gept.example_en: Living a frugal lifestyle allowed her to save enough for an early retirement.
gept.example_zh: 過著節儉的生活讓她存夠了錢提早退休。

gept.example_en: The gullible tourist paid triple the normal price without questioning the vendor.
gept.example_zh: 那位易受騙的遊客毫不質疑就付了三倍的正常價格。

gept.example_en: After years in politics, he grew cynical about every promise made by candidates.
gept.example_zh: 從政多年後，他對候選人的每個承諾都變得玩世不恭。

gept.example_en: She was skeptical of the bold claims made in the advertisement.
gept.example_zh: 她對廣告中大膽的主張持懷疑態度。

gept.example_en: The inquisitive child asked dozens of questions during the museum tour.
gept.example_zh: 那位好奇的孩子在博物館導覽期間問了數十個問題。

gept.example_en: A tactful manager delivers criticism in ways that protect dignity and motivation.
gept.example_zh: 圓融的經理在傳達批評時會兼顧員工的尊嚴和工作動力。

gept.example_en: His haughty manner alienated potential clients during the early business meetings.
gept.example_zh: 他傲慢的態度在初期的商業會議中疏遠了潛在客戶。

gept.example_en: The conceited actor refused to share the spotlight with any costar.
gept.example_zh: 那位自負的演員拒絕與任何合演者分享鎂光燈。

gept.example_en: Living abroad taught her to be self-reliant in nearly every aspect of daily life.
gept.example_zh: 在國外生活教會她在日常生活幾乎各方面都要自立。

gept.example_en: A self-aware leader recognizes personal blind spots and actively seeks honest feedback.
gept.example_zh: 有自覺的領導者會察覺自身盲點，並積極尋求誠實的回饋。

gept.example_en: Self-discipline allowed him to finish his novel while holding a demanding day job.
gept.example_zh: 自律讓他在從事繁忙的正職工作時也完成了他的小說。

gept.example_en: Even seasoned professionals occasionally struggle with periods of self-doubt.
gept.example_zh: 即使是經驗豐富的專業人士偶爾也會經歷自我懷疑的時期。

gept.example_en: Healthy self-esteem develops gradually through small successes and supportive relationships.
gept.example_zh: 健康的自尊透過小小的成功和支持性的關係逐漸發展。

gept.example_en: Excessive narcissism in leadership often leads to poor decisions and team turnover.
gept.example_zh: 領導者過度自戀經常導致錯誤的決策和團隊流動。

gept.example_en: Her quiet altruism led her to donate most of her bonus to local charities.
gept.example_zh: 她默默的利他精神讓她將大部分獎金捐給當地慈善機構。

gept.example_en: His generosity extended beyond money to time, mentorship, and patient listening.
gept.example_zh: 他的慷慨不僅止於金錢，還包括時間、指導與耐心傾聽。

gept.example_en: The philanthropist funded scholarships for first-generation college students nationwide.
gept.example_zh: 那位慈善家資助全國第一代大學生的獎學金。

gept.example_en: The old photograph filled her with nostalgia for childhood summers at the lake.
gept.example_zh: 那張舊照片讓她對童年湖邊的夏日充滿懷舊之情。

gept.example_en: Her indifference to the news shocked friends who expected a stronger reaction.
gept.example_zh: 她對那則新聞的漠不關心使期待她有強烈反應的朋友感到震驚。

gept.example_en: A growing sense of unease made him glance repeatedly over his shoulder.
gept.example_zh: 日益增長的不安感使他不斷回頭張望。

gept.example_en: Her elation at receiving the scholarship was visible to everyone in the room.
gept.example_zh: 她獲得獎學金時的興高采烈，房裡每個人都看得見。

gept.example_en: She made no effort to hide her contempt for dishonest business practices.
gept.example_zh: 她毫不掩飾自己對不誠實商業行為的蔑視。

gept.example_en: The tourists stood awe-struck before the towering ancient cathedral.
gept.example_zh: 遊客們在高聳的古老大教堂前感到敬畏。

gept.example_en: He gave a wistful smile as he flipped through the old yearbook.
gept.example_zh: 他翻著舊畢業紀念冊時露出惆悵的微笑。

gept.example_en: Saying goodbye to her students was a bittersweet end to her teaching career.
gept.example_zh: 向學生告別是她教學生涯苦樂參半的結束。

gept.example_en: The friendly rivalry between the two siblings pushed both to excel academically.
gept.example_zh: 兩兄弟姊妹間友好的競爭關係促使他們在學業上都表現優異。

gept.example_en: True intimacy develops only when both partners feel safe being completely vulnerable.
gept.example_zh: 只有當雙方都能安心展現脆弱時，真正的親密才會發展。

gept.example_en: The betrayal by his closest friend made him cautious in all future relationships.
gept.example_zh: 最好朋友的背叛使他在日後所有關係中都變得謹慎。

gept.example_en: The estrangement between father and son lasted nearly twenty painful years.
gept.example_zh: 父子之間的疏遠持續了將近二十年痛苦的歲月。

gept.example_en: After months of mediation, a quiet reconciliation finally took place at Thanksgiving.
gept.example_zh: 經過數個月的調解，感恩節時雙方終於悄悄和解。

gept.example_en: Many teenagers experience a feeling of alienation when moving to a new city.
gept.example_zh: 許多青少年在搬到新城市時會經歷疏離感。

gept.example_en: Children form strong emotional attachments to their primary caregivers in early years.
gept.example_zh: 兒童在幼年時期會與主要照顧者形成強烈的情感依戀。

gept.example_en: He spoke with great fondness about the small village where he grew up.
gept.example_zh: 他懷著深深的喜愛談起他成長的小村莊。

gept.example_en: What began as a teenage infatuation eventually grew into a lasting marriage.
gept.example_zh: 最初青少年時期的迷戀最終發展成一段長久的婚姻。

gept.example_en: Their courtship lasted three years before he finally proposed at the lighthouse.
gept.example_zh: 他們求愛三年後，他終於在燈塔向她求婚。

gept.example_en: The couple entered matrimony in a small ceremony with only close family present.
gept.example_zh: 那對伴侶在一場只有近親出席的小型儀式中步入婚姻。

gept.example_en: The teacher's devotion to her students earned her a national award.
gept.example_zh: 那位教師對學生的奉獻為她贏得了全國性的獎項。

gept.example_en: She felt an immediate affinity with the new neighbor who shared her love of jazz.
gept.example_zh: 她對同樣熱愛爵士樂的新鄰居立刻產生親近感。

gept.example_en: She tended to ruminate over small mistakes long after others had forgotten them.
gept.example_zh: 她常會在別人早已遺忘後，仍反覆思索那些小錯誤。

gept.example_en: It is easier to empathize with someone after experiencing similar hardship yourself.
gept.example_zh: 自己經歷過類似困境後，比較容易同理他人。

gept.example_en: Neighbors gathered to sympathize with the family after the devastating fire.
gept.example_zh: 鄰居們聚集在一起，對那場毀滅性大火後的家庭表示同情。

gept.example_en: He learned to introspect daily through journaling and quiet meditation.
gept.example_zh: 他透過寫日記和靜坐冥想學會每天內省。

gept.example_en: The architect could envision the finished building long before construction began.
gept.example_zh: 建築師早在動工前就能展望完工後的建築樣貌。

gept.example_en: She struggled to recollect the name of her first elementary school teacher.
gept.example_zh: 她努力回想小學第一位老師的名字。

gept.example_en: Experienced nurses can often intuit when a patient's condition is about to change.
gept.example_zh: 經驗豐富的護士通常能憑直覺感知到病人病情即將變化。

gept.example_en: The senator visited her constituency every other weekend to hear voter concerns.
gept.example_zh: 那位參議員每隔週末都會回選區傾聽選民的擔憂。

gept.example_en: The young activist organized weekly rallies in front of the city hall.
gept.example_zh: 年輕的行動主義者每週都在市政廳前組織集會。

gept.example_en: Hundreds of protesters gathered peacefully to demand stronger climate policies.
gept.example_zh: 數百名抗議者和平聚集，要求更強有力的氣候政策。

gept.example_en: A coalition of three small parties formed the new government after the election.
gept.example_zh: 由三個小黨組成的聯盟在大選後組建了新政府。

gept.example_en: The two candidates differ sharply in political ideology despite similar policy proposals.
gept.example_zh: 儘管政策提案相似，兩位候選人在政治意識形態上卻有顯著差異。

gept.example_en: Citizens fought for centuries to secure the liberty they enjoy today.
gept.example_zh: 公民們奮鬥了數百年，才獲得他們今日享有的自由。

gept.example_en: The revolution promised to free the people from generations of tyranny.
gept.example_zh: 那場革命承諾將人民從世代的暴政中解放。

gept.example_en: The country became a republic after centuries under a monarchy.
gept.example_zh: 該國在歷經數百年的君主制後成為了共和國。

gept.example_en: Britain remains a constitutional monarchy with both a sovereign and elected officials.
gept.example_zh: 英國至今仍是君主立憲制，同時擁有君主和民選官員。

gept.example_en: His quiet patriotism showed in years of volunteer work for veterans.
gept.example_zh: 他低調的愛國心展現在多年來為退伍軍人做志工的服務上。

gept.example_en: Rising nationalism has reshaped political conversations across many European countries.
gept.example_zh: 日益高漲的民族主義重塑了許多歐洲國家的政治對話。

gept.example_en: New citizens pledged allegiance to their adopted country at the formal ceremony.
gept.example_zh: 新公民在正式儀式上宣誓效忠他們選擇歸化的國家。

gept.example_en: Partisan disagreements stalled the budget negotiations for nearly three weeks.
gept.example_zh: 黨派分歧使預算協商停滯了將近三週。

gept.example_en: The senator launched a filibuster to delay the vote on the controversial bill.
gept.example_zh: 那位參議員發動冗長辯論以拖延有爭議法案的表決。

gept.example_en: Universal suffrage was achieved only after long campaigns by determined activists.
gept.example_zh: 普及投票權是經過決心堅定的活動人士長期奔走才實現的。

gept.example_en: The party's nominee promised major reforms in healthcare and education.
gept.example_zh: 該黨被提名人承諾在醫療和教育上進行重大改革。

gept.example_en: The frontrunner held a comfortable lead in the polls just before voting day.
gept.example_zh: 那位領先者在投票日前夕的民調中佔有舒適的領先。

gept.example_en: The underdog candidate surprised everyone by winning the election decisively.
gept.example_zh: 那位不被看好的候選人以壓倒性勝利贏得大選，令所有人驚訝。

gept.example_en: A recount was ordered after the margin of victory turned out to be razor-thin.
gept.example_zh: 由於勝負差距極為微小，當局下令重新計票。

gept.example_en: Congress voted to impeach the official following months of investigation.
gept.example_zh: 經過數月調查後，國會投票彈劾了那位官員。

gept.example_en: In Britain, a barrister typically represents clients in higher courts during trials.
gept.example_zh: 在英國，出庭律師通常在審判時於高等法院代表客戶。

gept.example_en: They consulted a local solicitor before signing the lengthy property agreement.
gept.example_zh: 在簽署冗長的不動產協議前，他們先諮詢了當地的事務律師。

gept.example_en: The bailiff escorted the witness to the stand and announced the judge's entrance.
gept.example_zh: 法警引領證人到證人席，並宣布法官進場。

gept.example_en: She took the witness-stand and answered every question with calm composure.
gept.example_zh: 她走上證人席，以鎮定的態度回答每個問題。

gept.example_en: The sentencing hearing was scheduled for two weeks after the guilty verdict.
gept.example_zh: 量刑聽證會被安排在有罪判決後兩週舉行。

gept.example_en: The conviction was overturned on appeal due to procedural errors at trial.
gept.example_zh: 由於審判中的程序錯誤，該定罪在上訴後被推翻。

gept.example_en: Both parties reached a settlement just hours before the trial was set to begin.
gept.example_zh: 雙方在審判即將開始前幾小時達成和解。

gept.example_en: The courtroom fell silent as the judge prepared to read the verdict.
gept.example_zh: 當法官準備宣讀判決時，整個法庭一片寂靜。

gept.example_en: The judge struck the gavel sharply to restore order in the noisy courtroom.
gept.example_zh: 法官重重敲下法槌，恢復吵雜法庭的秩序。

gept.example_en: The judge dismissed the statement as hearsay and instructed the jury to ignore it.
gept.example_zh: 法官將該陳述視為傳聞而駁回，並指示陪審團不予理會。

gept.example_en: He was charged with a misdemeanor that carried only a small fine.
gept.example_zh: 他被控告一項輕罪，只需繳交小額罰款。

gept.example_en: A felony conviction can affect a person's voting rights and employment prospects.
gept.example_zh: 重罪定罪可能影響一個人的投票權與就業前景。

gept.example_en: The governor granted clemency to the prisoner who had shown remarkable rehabilitation.
gept.example_zh: 州長對那位展現出非凡更生表現的囚犯施予寬大赦免。

gept.example_en: The president issued a pardon for several individuals convicted of nonviolent offenses.
gept.example_zh: 總統赦免了幾位被判非暴力罪行的人。

gept.example_en: The new law offered amnesty to undocumented workers who came forward voluntarily.
gept.example_zh: 新法律對自願出面的無證件勞工提供大赦。

gept.example_en: The defendant was released on bail pending the start of the trial next month.
gept.example_zh: 被告以保釋金獲釋，等待下個月開始的審判。

gept.example_en: The paralegal prepared the contracts and briefed the attorney before each meeting.
gept.example_zh: 法務助理在每場會議前準備合約並向律師簡報。

gept.example_en: The magistrate handles minor offenses and preliminary hearings in this district.
gept.example_zh: 治安法官在此區處理輕微罪行和預備聽證。

gept.example_en: The case ultimately reached the supreme-court after several years of appeals.
gept.example_zh: 那個案件經過數年上訴後最終上達最高法院。

gept.example_en: The district-court handles most civil cases filed within its territorial boundaries.
gept.example_zh: 地方法院處理大部分在其轄區內提起的民事案件。

gept.example_en: They resolved their custody dispute through the family-court rather than public hearings.
gept.example_zh: 他們透過家事法庭而非公開聽證會解決了監護權爭議。

gept.example_en: The juvenile-court emphasizes rehabilitation over punishment for young offenders.
gept.example_zh: 少年法院對年輕犯罪者強調更生而非懲罰。

gept.example_en: The appellate-court reviewed the trial transcript before issuing its ruling.
gept.example_zh: 上訴法院在作出裁決前審閱了審判紀錄。

gept.example_en: She filed her dispute with the landlord in small-claims court last Monday.
gept.example_zh: 她週一在小額訴訟法庭對房東提起爭議。

gept.example_en: An international tribunal was established to investigate war crimes in the region.
gept.example_zh: 國際法庭成立以調查該地區的戰爭罪行。

gept.example_en: The priest performed the sacrament of baptism for the infant on Sunday.
gept.example_zh: 神父在週日為那名嬰兒舉行洗禮聖事。

gept.example_en: The Sunday liturgy has remained largely unchanged for several centuries.
gept.example_zh: 週日的禮拜儀式幾個世紀以來大致維持不變。

gept.example_en: The pastor's sermon focused on forgiveness and reconciliation within families.
gept.example_zh: 牧師的講道聚焦於家庭內部的寬恕與和解。

gept.example_en: The congregation rose to sing a familiar hymn together.
gept.example_zh: 會眾起立合唱一首熟悉的聖歌。

gept.example_en: Her baptism took place in a quiet riverside ceremony attended by close friends.
gept.example_zh: 她的洗禮在河邊的安靜儀式中舉行，由親近的朋友陪伴。

gept.example_en: The small congregation welcomed visitors warmly after every Sunday service.
gept.example_zh: 那個小會眾在每次週日禮拜後都熱情歡迎訪客。

gept.example_en: He spent a year at a remote monastery studying meditation and ancient texts.
gept.example_zh: 他在偏遠的修道院待了一年，研習冥想與古籍。

gept.example_en: The convent had operated continuously since the early seventeenth century.
gept.example_zh: 那座女修道院自十七世紀初便持續運作。

gept.example_en: A small chapel stood at the corner of the campus, open to students of all faiths.
gept.example_zh: 校園角落有一座小教堂，對所有信仰的學生開放。

gept.example_en: The historic synagogue had served the local community for over a century.
gept.example_zh: 那座歷史悠久的猶太會堂已為當地社區服務了一個多世紀。

gept.example_en: The grand mosque attracted visitors and worshippers from across the entire region.
gept.example_zh: 那座宏偉的清真寺吸引了來自整個地區的訪客和信徒。

gept.example_en: The medieval abbey now serves as both a museum and a working monastery.
gept.example_zh: 那座中世紀修道院如今既是博物館，也是運作中的修院。

gept.example_en: The monk had lived in silent contemplation for nearly thirty years.
gept.example_zh: 那位僧侶在靜默冥想中已生活了將近三十年。

gept.example_en: The elderly nun taught Latin and ancient history at the village school.
gept.example_zh: 那位年長的修女在村裡的學校教授拉丁文和古代歷史。

gept.example_en: The local priest visited every parishioner who was hospitalized last winter.
gept.example_zh: 當地神父去年冬天探訪了每一位住院的教區信徒。

gept.example_en: The missionary spent twenty years building schools in remote mountain villages.
gept.example_zh: 那位傳教士花了二十年在偏遠山村建設學校。

gept.example_en: The mountain is considered sacred by the indigenous people of this region.
gept.example_zh: 這座山被該地區的原住民視為神聖之地。

gept.example_en: Many cultures believe that certain texts contain divine wisdom for daily living.
gept.example_zh: 許多文化相信某些經典蘊含了日常生活的神聖智慧。

gept.example_en: Her spiritual journey deepened during the long retreat in the mountains.
gept.example_zh: 她在山中漫長的閉關期間，心靈之旅有了更深入的體會。

gept.example_en: Basic numeracy is essential for managing personal finances and household budgets.
gept.example_zh: 基本算術能力對管理個人財務和家庭預算來說不可或缺。

gept.example_en: True mastery of a language takes years of consistent practice and immersion.
gept.example_zh: 真正精通一種語言需要多年持續的練習和沉浸。

gept.example_en: His competence in handling difficult clients impressed even the senior partners.
gept.example_zh: 他應對棘手客戶的能力連資深合夥人都印象深刻。

gept.example_en: She showed a remarkable aptitude for mathematics from a very early age.
gept.example_zh: 她從很小的年紀就展現出對數學非凡的天賦。

gept.example_en: The company recruits from a global talent-pool of recent engineering graduates.
gept.example_zh: 該公司從全球工程系應屆畢業生的人才庫中招募人才。

gept.example_en: Researchers study how sleep affects cognition in elementary school children.
gept.example_zh: 研究人員探討睡眠如何影響小學兒童的認知。

gept.example_en: The recall-test measured how many words students remembered after a brief delay.
gept.example_zh: 記憶測驗測量學生在短暫延遲後能記住多少單字。

gept.example_en: She earned her master's in public health from a leading European university.
gept.example_zh: 她在一所頂尖的歐洲大學取得了公共衛生碩士學位。

gept.example_en: After eight years of research, he finally completed his doctorate in neuroscience.
gept.example_zh: 歷經八年研究，他終於完成神經科學的博士學位。

gept.example_en: A bachelor's in computer science is required for most entry-level developer positions.
gept.example_zh: 大部分入門級開發人員職位都需要計算機科學的學士學位。

gept.example_en: She earned an associate's degree at the community college before transferring.
gept.example_zh: 她在轉學前於社區大學取得了副學士學位。

gept.example_en: His teaching certification allowed him to work in schools across the entire state.
gept.example_zh: 他的教師認證讓他能在整個州內的學校任教。

gept.example_en: Employers often verify each credential listed on a candidate's professional resume.
gept.example_zh: 雇主通常會核對候選人專業履歷上列出的每項資歷。

gept.example_en: Nursing licensure requires both an accredited degree and a passing exam score.
gept.example_zh: 護理師執照的取得需要認可的學位和及格的考試成績。

gept.example_en: Graduate programs typically request an official transcript-grade from every prior institution.
gept.example_zh: 研究所通常要求申請者提交曾就讀每所院校的正式成績單。

gept.example_en: The mentoring program pairs new employees with experienced staff for the first year.
gept.example_zh: 該指導計畫在第一年將新進員工與資深員工配對。

gept.example_en: Executive coaching helped her develop a more confident leadership style.
gept.example_zh: 高階主管教練輔導幫助她培養出更自信的領導風格。

gept.example_en: Private tutoring after school helped him catch up in algebra and geometry.
gept.example_zh: 放學後的私人家教幫助他在代數和幾何方面跟上進度。

gept.example_en: The summer internship-program offered students hands-on experience at major hospitals.
gept.example_zh: 夏季實習計畫為學生提供在大型醫院的實地經驗。

gept.example_en: The medical externship gave her exposure to rural healthcare for the first time.
gept.example_zh: 那次醫療校外實習讓她首次接觸到鄉村醫療。

gept.example_en: The weekly colloquium featured visiting researchers from universities around the world.
gept.example_zh: 每週的研討會邀請來自世界各地大學的訪問研究員演講。

gept.example_en: She delivered the keynote at the annual technology conference in Singapore.
gept.example_zh: 她在新加坡的年度科技大會上發表主題演講。

gept.example_en: The panel-discussion brought together experts with very different perspectives on the issue.
gept.example_zh: 那場座談會邀集對該議題持有截然不同觀點的專家。

gept.example_en: After the keynote, attendees joined a breakout-session on emerging educational technologies.
gept.example_zh: 主題演講後，與會者參加了關於新興教育科技的分組討論。

gept.example_en: Group facilitation skills are increasingly valued in modern collaborative workplaces.
gept.example_zh: 在現代協作型職場中，團體引導技巧愈來愈受到重視。

gept.example_en: Discussing salaries openly remains a social taboo in many corporate cultures.
gept.example_zh: 公開談論薪資在許多企業文化中仍是社會禁忌。

gept.example_en: Public education campaigns have helped reduce the stigma around mental health treatment.
gept.example_zh: 公共教育宣導有助於減少對心理健康治療的污名化。

gept.example_en: Remote work quickly became the new norm during the global health crisis.
gept.example_zh: 全球健康危機期間，遠距工作迅速成為新的常態。

gept.example_en: It is convention in this office to greet colleagues with a brief morning nod.
gept.example_zh: 在這間辦公室裡，向同事點頭打招呼是早晨的慣例。

gept.example_en: An old superstition holds that breaking a mirror brings seven years of bad luck.
gept.example_zh: 古老的迷信認為打破鏡子會帶來七年厄運。

gept.example_en: Healthy dissent within a team often leads to stronger collective decisions.
gept.example_zh: 團隊內健康的異議經常能促成更穩健的集體決策。

gept.example_en: The committee rarely achieved unanimity, but they always reached workable compromises.
gept.example_zh: 委員會很少達成一致同意，但總能找到可行的妥協方案。

gept.example_en: The online discussion-forum allowed students to debate readings outside of class hours.
gept.example_zh: 線上討論論壇讓學生能在課堂之外辯論指定讀物。

gept.example_en: The roundtable brought together community leaders to address housing affordability.
gept.example_zh: 那場圓桌會議邀集社區領袖討論住宅負擔得起的問題。

gept.example_en: The faculty published an open-letter calling for greater transparency from administrators.
gept.example_zh: 教師們發表了一封公開信，呼籲行政單位提高透明度。

gept.example_en: The team adopted a new collaboration-tool to coordinate work across three time zones.
gept.example_zh: 團隊採用了新的協作工具來協調跨三個時區的工作。

gept.example_en: Strong interpersonal skills are essential for any successful management career.
gept.example_zh: 成功的管理職涯都需要良好的人際交往能力。

gept.example_en: Adaptability has become one of the most valuable skills in modern workplaces.
gept.example_zh: 適應力已成為現代職場中最寶貴的技能之一。

gept.example_en: Her resilience after the layoff inspired others who faced similar challenges.
gept.example_zh: 她在被資遣後展現的韌性鼓舞了面臨類似挑戰的人。

gept.example_en: His resourcefulness solved the supply problem when conventional approaches failed.
gept.example_zh: 當傳統方法失敗時，他的機智解決了供應問題。

gept.example_en: Her strong work-ethic was evident in the long hours she dedicated to research.
gept.example_zh: 她投入研究的漫長時間清楚顯示了她強烈的工作倫理。

gept.example_en: The new policy aimed at the empowerment of frontline staff to solve customer issues.
gept.example_zh: 新政策旨在賦權第一線員工解決客戶問題。

gept.example_en: The leadership team met monthly to strategize about long-term growth.
gept.example_zh: 領導團隊每月開會制定長期成長策略。

gept.example_en: The new drama series airs during prime-time every Wednesday evening.
gept.example_zh: 那部新戲劇每週三晚的黃金時段播出。

gept.example_en: Graduation was a major milestone-event for the entire extended family.
gept.example_zh: 畢業是整個大家庭重要的里程碑事件。

gept.example_en: The countdown to launch day filled the entire team with excitement.
gept.example_zh: 距發布日的倒數計時讓整個團隊充滿興奮之情。

gept.example_en: She served as interim director until the board completed its search.
gept.example_zh: 在董事會完成遴選前，她擔任臨時主任。

gept.example_en: Working in a deadline-driven environment taught her to manage stress productively.
gept.example_zh: 在期限導向的環境工作，教會她有效率地管理壓力。

gept.example_en: Long-term planning ensures that resources are used wisely across multiple years.
gept.example_zh: 長期規劃確保資源能在多年間妥善運用。

gept.example_en: Short-term wins helped maintain team motivation during the multi-year project.
gept.example_zh: 短期的勝利在這個跨年度專案中有助於維持團隊動力。

gept.example_en: A logical argument requires both clear premises and valid conclusions to be persuasive.
gept.example_zh: 具有說服力的論證需要清晰的前提和有效的結論。

gept.example_en: Some decisions are intuitive while others demand careful long-term analysis.
gept.example_zh: 有些決定靠直覺，有些則需要審慎的長期分析。

gept.example_en: A systematic approach to debugging often reveals issues that random testing misses.
gept.example_zh: 系統性的除錯方法往往能找出隨機測試遺漏的問題。

gept.example_en: Critical-thinking skills help students evaluate information they find online.
gept.example_zh: 批判性思考技能幫助學生評估網路上找到的資訊。

gept.example_en: Strong problem-solving abilities are valued in nearly every professional field.
gept.example_zh: 優秀的解決問題能力幾乎在所有專業領域都受到重視。

gept.example_en: The teacher asked open-ended questions to encourage deeper student reflection.
gept.example_zh: 老師提出開放式問題以鼓勵學生更深入的反思。

gept.example_en: Let's consider a hypothetical scenario where the supplier suddenly raises prices.
gept.example_zh: 我們來想像一個假設情境，供應商突然調漲價格。

gept.example_en: Speculation about the company's future grew after the chief executive's sudden resignation.
gept.example_zh: 執行長突然辭職後，對該公司未來的推測愈來愈多。

gept.example_en: The presumption of innocence is a cornerstone of modern criminal justice systems.
gept.example_zh: 無罪推定是現代刑事司法制度的基石。

gept.example_en: The verdict-final was announced after three days of intense jury deliberation.
gept.example_zh: 經過三天激烈的陪審團審議後，最終裁決終於宣布。

gept.example_en: Strong reasoning-skill helps lawyers construct persuasive arguments in complex cases.
gept.example_zh: 優秀的推理能力幫助律師在複雜案件中建構有說服力的論證。

gept.example_en: The professor was admired for the clarity of her explanations of difficult concepts.
gept.example_zh: 那位教授因解釋艱澀概念時的清晰而備受讚賞。

gept.example_en: The contract contained too much ambiguity to be enforced in court reliably.
gept.example_zh: 那份合約過於模稜兩可，難以在法庭上可靠地執行。

gept.example_en: A clear accountability-system helped the agency restore public confidence after scandals.
gept.example_zh: 清楚的問責制度幫助該機關在醜聞後恢復了大眾信任。

gept.example_en: Reputation-management has become essential for both businesses and public figures online.
gept.example_zh: 聲譽管理已成為企業和公眾人物在網路上不可或缺的工作。

gept.example_en: The annual shareholder meeting addressed concerns about declining quarterly earnings.
gept.example_zh: 年度股東會議處理了季度盈利下滑的擔憂。

gept.example_en: Each constituent received a personal reply from the senator's office.
gept.example_zh: 每位選民都收到參議員辦公室的個別回覆。

gept.example_en: An informed citizenry is essential for the proper functioning of any democracy.
gept.example_zh: 知情的全體公民對任何民主政體的正常運作至關重要。

gept.example_en: Public-opinion shifted dramatically after the documentary aired on national television.
gept.example_zh: 那部紀錄片在全國電視台播出後，公眾輿論大幅轉變。

gept.example_en: Groupthink can lead even talented teams to overlook obvious risks.
gept.example_zh: 團體迷思可能讓即使是優秀的團隊也忽略明顯的風險。

gept.example_en: Many investors jumped on the bandwagon just before the market suddenly cooled.
gept.example_zh: 許多投資者在市場突然降溫前才趕上了這波從眾風潮。

gept.example_en: Peer-pressure influences many teenagers' choices about clothing, music, and social media.
gept.example_zh: 同儕壓力影響許多青少年對服裝、音樂和社群媒體的選擇。

gept.example_en: Her social-circle expanded considerably after she joined the local hiking club.
gept.example_zh: 她加入當地健行俱樂部後，社交圈擴大了不少。

gept.example_en: Introversion does not mean shyness; many introverts simply prefer quieter environments.
gept.example_zh: 內向性並不等同於害羞，許多內向者只是偏好安靜的環境。

gept.example_en: Extroversion alone does not determine success in any specific professional role.
gept.example_zh: 外向性本身並不決定任何特定專業職位的成功。

gept.example_en: She has a cheerful disposition that brightens everyone's day at the office.
gept.example_zh: 她開朗的性情讓辦公室裡每個人的一天都更明亮。

gept.example_en: His professional demeanor impressed clients during the first consultation.
gept.example_zh: 首次諮詢時，他的專業舉止令客戶印象深刻。

gept.example_en: The young pianist showed remarkable poise during her first international competition.
gept.example_zh: 那位年輕的鋼琴家在首次國際比賽中展現出非凡的沉著。

gept.example_en: He faced his illness with quiet dignity that inspired everyone around him.
gept.example_zh: 他以默默的尊嚴面對疾病，鼓舞了周圍的每個人。

gept.example_en: Her natural charisma attracted attention whenever she entered a crowded room.
gept.example_zh: 她與生俱來的魅力，每當她走進擁擠的房間都會引人注目。

gept.example_en: The veteran actor had a commanding presence that filled every scene.
gept.example_zh: 那位資深演員有著主導全場的氣場，充滿每個場景。

gept.example_en: There was a calming aura around the meditation teacher that students immediately noticed.
gept.example_zh: 那位冥想老師散發著平靜的氣息，學生們都立刻察覺。

gept.example_en: The cafe's warm ambience made it a favorite spot for studying graduate students.
gept.example_zh: 那間咖啡館溫暖的氛圍使它成為研究生最愛的讀書地點。

gept.example_en: The new office has a relaxed vibe that encourages casual collaboration.
gept.example_zh: 新辦公室散發出輕鬆的氛圍，鼓勵隨興的協作。

gept.example_en: Understanding his backstory helped me appreciate why he reacted that way.
gept.example_zh: 了解他的背景故事，讓我能體會他為何那樣反應。

gept.example_en: Studying abroad fundamentally changed her worldview and career aspirations.
gept.example_zh: 留學從根本上改變了她的世界觀和職涯志向。

gept.example_en: A growth mindset encourages continuous learning even after repeated failures.
gept.example_zh: 成長心態鼓勵在反覆失敗後仍持續學習。

gept.example_en: His positive outlook helped him recover quickly from the unexpected setback.
gept.example_zh: 他正面的展望幫助他從意外的挫折中迅速恢復。

gept.example_en: Her deep insight-deep into customer behavior shaped the entire marketing campaign.
gept.example_zh: 她對顧客行為的深刻洞察形塑了整個行銷活動。

gept.example_en: Her insightful comments transformed the discussion in a meaningful direction.
gept.example_zh: 她富有洞察力的評論將討論引導到有意義的方向。

gept.example_en: The documentary raised thought-provoking questions about modern food systems.
gept.example_zh: 那部紀錄片提出了關於現代食物系統發人深省的問題。

gept.example_en: He spent a reflective hour by the window before drafting his resignation letter.
gept.example_zh: 他在窗邊度過反思的一小時，才起草辭職信。

gept.example_en: Being mindful of her tone helped her communicate difficult feedback constructively.
gept.example_zh: 留心自己的語氣幫助她以建設性的方式傳達困難的回饋。

gept.example_en: She found long walks meditative and used them to process workplace stress.
gept.example_zh: 她覺得長距離散步具有冥想效果，並用來消化職場壓力。

gept.example_en: His thoughtfulness in remembering small details made everyone feel genuinely valued.
gept.example_zh: 他記得小細節的體貼讓每個人都覺得自己真的被重視。

gept.example_en: The candidate's earnestness during the interview impressed the entire hiring panel.
gept.example_zh: 那位求職者面試時的認真，令整個招聘小組印象深刻。

gept.example_en: His sincerity in the apology helped repair the strained working relationship.
gept.example_zh: 他在道歉中展現的真誠幫助修補了緊張的工作關係。

gept.example_en: Her genuineness made strangers feel comfortable opening up almost immediately.
gept.example_zh: 她的真誠讓陌生人幾乎立刻就能放心敞開心扉。

gept.example_en: His openness about past struggles inspired colleagues to seek help when needed.
gept.example_zh: 他對過去掙扎的坦率態度，鼓勵同事在需要時尋求協助。

gept.example_en: Her candor during performance reviews helped employees grow more rapidly.
gept.example_zh: 她在績效考核時的直率幫助員工成長得更快。

gept.example_en: The team appreciated her frankness about the challenging financial outlook.
gept.example_zh: 團隊感激她對艱困財務前景的坦率說明。

gept.example_en: His discreetness in handling personal matters earned widespread trust among colleagues.
gept.example_zh: 他在處理個人事務上的謹慎，贏得同事們普遍的信任。

gept.example_en: The diplomat handled the sensitive negotiation with remarkable tact.
gept.example_zh: 那位外交官以非凡的圓融處理了敏感的談判。

gept.example_en: She handled the awkward conversation with finesse no one expected from a newcomer.
gept.example_zh: 她以新人罕見的巧妙處理了那場尷尬的對話。

gept.example_en: Her business savvy helped the startup navigate two difficult funding rounds.
gept.example_zh: 她在商業上的精明幫助那家新創公司度過兩輪艱困的募資。

gept.example_en: His shrewdness in reading markets made him a sought-after investment adviser.
gept.example_zh: 他解讀市場的精明使他成為炙手可熱的投資顧問。

gept.example_en: A thoughtful-leader considers long-term consequences before making any major decision.
gept.example_zh: 思慮周詳的領導者在做任何重大決定前都會考慮長期後果。

gept.example_en: Honesty is a core tenet of the company's professional code of conduct.
gept.example_zh: 誠實是該公司專業行為守則的核心信條。

gept.example_en: Her personal creed centered on lifelong learning and steady kindness toward strangers.
gept.example_zh: 她個人的信條圍繞著終生學習與對陌生人始終如一的善意。

gept.example_en: The small religious sect maintained traditions dating back several hundred years.
gept.example_zh: 那個小教派維持著可追溯數百年的傳統。

gept.example_en: Members of every denomination were welcome to attend the community service.
gept.example_zh: 歡迎每個教派的成員參加這場社區禮拜。

gept.example_en: Questioning the orthodoxy of established economic theory can be professionally risky.
gept.example_zh: 質疑既有經濟理論的正統可能對職業生涯帶來風險。

gept.example_en: He faced the difficult diagnosis with a quiet stoicism his family deeply admired.
gept.example_zh: 他以家人深感敬佩的沉穩堅忍面對艱難的診斷。

gept.example_en: Modern materialism has been blamed for rising household debt across many countries.
gept.example_zh: 現代物質主義被認為是許多國家家庭負債上升的元兇。

gept.example_en: Embracing minimalism helped her clear her apartment and her cluttered schedule.
gept.example_zh: 擁抱極簡主義幫助她清理了公寓和雜亂的行程。

gept.example_en: American culture often celebrates individualism more strongly than collective responsibility.
gept.example_zh: 美國文化通常更強調個人主義而非集體責任。

gept.example_en: The couple exchanged heartfelt vows during the outdoor ceremony last Saturday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 這對新人上週六下午在戶外婚禮上交換了真摯的誓詞。

gept.example_en: Each bridesmaid wore a matching lavender dress and carried a small bouquet.
gept.example_zh: 每位伴娘都穿著相配的薰衣草色洋裝，並手持一束小花束。

gept.example_en: My brother served as a groomsman and gave a touching speech at the reception.
gept.example_zh: 我哥哥擔任伴郎，並在婚宴上發表了感人的致詞。

gept.example_en: The bride tossed her bouquet to the eager crowd of single women behind.
gept.example_zh: 新娘將手中的花束拋向身後一群熱切的單身女子。

gept.example_en: The wedding reception was held at a luxurious hotel ballroom near downtown.
gept.example_zh: 婚宴在市中心附近一間豪華的飯店宴會廳舉行。

gept.example_en: The officiant guided the couple through their wedding vows with warmth and grace.
gept.example_zh: 主婚人以溫暖優雅的方式引導新人完成婚禮誓詞。

gept.example_en: Their matrimonial bond grew stronger after surviving many years of shared struggles.
gept.example_zh: 在共同經歷多年的奮鬥後，他們的婚姻紐帶變得更加堅固。

gept.example_en: They spent their honeymoon exploring beautiful tropical islands in Southeast Asia together.
gept.example_zh: 他們一同前往東南亞探索美麗的熱帶島嶼度蜜月。

gept.example_en: Guests purchased thoughtful kitchen gifts from the couple's online wedding registry website.
gept.example_zh: 賓客們從新人的線上婚禮禮品登記網站購買了實用的廚房用品。

gept.example_en: The father of the bride gave an emotional toast that brought everyone to tears.
gept.example_zh: 新娘的父親發表了一段感人的祝酒詞，讓所有人都熱淚盈眶。

gept.example_en: His daughter delivered a moving eulogy that celebrated her late father's remarkable life.
gept.example_zh: 他的女兒發表了一篇動人的悼詞，緬懷她已故父親非凡的一生。

gept.example_en: Please accept my sincere condolences for the recent loss of your beloved grandmother.
gept.example_zh: 請接受我對您敬愛的祖母最近過世最誠摯的哀悼。

gept.example_en: The polished wooden casket was carried slowly into the church by six pallbearers.
gept.example_zh: 那具拋光的木製棺木由六位扶棺者緩緩抬進教堂。

gept.example_en: Hundreds of mourners gathered at the cemetery to pay their final respects quietly.
gept.example_zh: 數百名哀悼者聚集在墓園，靜靜地致上最後的敬意。

gept.example_en: The local newspaper published a lengthy obituary highlighting her decades of community service.
gept.example_zh: 當地報紙刊登了一篇長篇訃聞，表彰她數十年來對社區的奉獻。

gept.example_en: His four sons proudly served as pallbearers at the dignified graveside service yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 昨日他的四個兒子在莊嚴的墓邊儀式上自豪地擔任扶棺者。

gept.example_en: The family chose cremation over traditional burial according to their grandfather's specific wishes.
gept.example_zh: 家屬依照祖父明確的意願選擇火葬而非傳統的土葬。

gept.example_en: They placed the ceramic urn on the mantelpiece beside her favorite framed photograph.
gept.example_zh: 他們將陶瓷骨灰罈放在壁爐架上，旁邊擺著她最喜愛的相框。

gept.example_en: The interment will take place at the family cemetery this coming Sunday morning.
gept.example_zh: 安葬儀式將於本週日早晨在家族墓園舉行。

gept.example_en: She pushed the baby stroller through the park while chatting with another mother.
gept.example_zh: 她推著嬰兒推車穿過公園，同時與另一位母親聊天。

gept.example_en: He softly sang an old lullaby until the restless baby finally fell asleep.
gept.example_zh: 他輕柔地哼唱一首古老的搖籃曲，直到躁動的嬰兒終於入睡。

gept.example_en: The toddler refused to nap without his favorite blue rubber pacifier nearby.
gept.example_zh: 那個學步兒沒有他最喜歡的藍色橡膠奶嘴在旁就拒絕午睡。

gept.example_en: New parents often spend hundreds of dollars monthly on disposable diapers for newborns.
gept.example_zh: 新手父母每月經常花費數百元為新生兒購買拋棄式尿布。

gept.example_en: The exhausted child threw a loud tantrum in the middle of the supermarket aisle.
gept.example_zh: 那個疲憊的孩子在超市走道中央大聲發脾氣。

gept.example_en: She tied a colorful bib around her baby before feeding him mashed sweet potato.
gept.example_zh: 她在餵寶寶吃地瓜泥前，為他繫上一條色彩繽紛的圍兜。

gept.example_en: The newborn slept peacefully in a wicker bassinet placed beside the parents' bed.
gept.example_zh: 新生兒安詳地睡在放置於父母床邊的藤編搖籃中。

gept.example_en: The nurse gently swaddled the newborn in a soft cotton blanket to calm him.
gept.example_zh: 護士輕柔地用柔軟的棉毯包裹新生兒以安撫他。

gept.example_en: During the teething phase, babies often drool excessively and chew on everything available.
gept.example_zh: 在長牙期，嬰兒經常會大量流口水並咬任何手邊的東西。

gept.example_en: Their newborn suffered from severe colic and cried for hours every single evening.
gept.example_zh: 他們的新生兒患有嚴重的腹絞痛，每晚都哭鬧好幾個小時。

gept.example_en: The town held a grand jubilee to mark its two-hundredth founding anniversary celebration.
gept.example_zh: 小鎮舉行盛大的週年慶典以紀念其建鎮兩百週年。

gept.example_en: A solemn commemoration was held in remembrance of those who lost their lives.
gept.example_zh: 舉行了莊嚴的紀念活動以追憶那些失去生命的人。

gept.example_en: Their golden anniversary party was attended by relatives flying in from many countries.
gept.example_zh: 他們的金婚紀念派對有來自許多國家的親戚搭機前來參加。

gept.example_en: The annual neighborhood jamboree featured live music, free food, and games for kids.
gept.example_zh: 年度社區歡慶聚會有現場音樂、免費食物以及給孩子們的遊戲。

gept.example_en: An experienced headhunter helped him land an executive position at a prestigious tech company.
gept.example_zh: 一位經驗豐富的獵人頭顧問幫他在一家知名科技公司獲得高階職位。

gept.example_en: She got her current job through a personal referral from her former college professor.
gept.example_zh: 她目前的工作是透過大學前教授的個人推薦而獲得的。

gept.example_en: Only five candidates made the final shortlist for the senior product designer role.
gept.example_zh: 只有五位候選人進入資深產品設計師職位的最終入圍名單。

gept.example_en: Always tailor your cover letter to match the specific requirements of each job posting.
gept.example_zh: 求職信永遠應該針對每個職缺的具體要求量身打造。

gept.example_en: Hundreds of students attended the campus job fair seeking summer internship opportunities.
gept.example_zh: 數百名學生參加了校園就業博覽會，尋找暑期實習機會。

gept.example_en: The company's onboarding process lasts two weeks and covers all essential workplace procedures.
gept.example_zh: 公司的到職培訓流程為期兩週，涵蓋所有必要的職場程序。

gept.example_en: After fifteen years of service, he received a generous severance package upon retirement.
gept.example_zh: 在服務十五年後，他在退休時收到了豐厚的資遣方案。

gept.example_en: They saved diligently throughout their careers to enjoy their golden years travelling abroad.
gept.example_zh: 他們在職業生涯中認真儲蓄，以便享受退休後在海外旅遊的美好歲月。

gept.example_en: Building a substantial nest egg requires consistent saving habits over several decades of work.
gept.example_zh: 累積一筆可觀的存款需要在數十年工作中保持持續的儲蓄習慣。

gept.example_en: My monthly health insurance premium increased significantly after I turned fifty last year.
gept.example_zh: 我每月的健康保險費在我去年五十歲後大幅增加。

gept.example_en: She filed an insurance claim immediately after the minor car accident occurred yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 她在昨天發生輕微車禍後立即提出了保險理賠申請。

gept.example_en: He named his eldest daughter as the primary beneficiary of his life insurance policy.
gept.example_zh: 他將大女兒指定為他人壽保險的主要受益人。

gept.example_en: The underwriter carefully reviewed his medical history before approving the new policy application.
gept.example_zh: 承保人在核准新保單申請前仔細審查了他的病史。

gept.example_en: Each doctor visit requires a twenty-dollar copayment under our family health plan.
gept.example_zh: 根據我們的家庭健康計畫，每次看診需支付二十美元的共付額。

gept.example_en: An actuary calculates risk and helps insurance companies determine appropriate premium pricing structures.
gept.example_zh: 精算師計算風險並協助保險公司決定適當的保費定價結構。

gept.example_en: As the only living relative, he became the sole heir to her vast fortune.
gept.example_zh: 作為唯一在世的親屬，他成為她龐大財富的唯一繼承人。

gept.example_en: The young heiress inherited the family estate after her grandmother passed away peacefully.
gept.example_zh: 那位年輕的女繼承人在祖母安詳辭世後繼承了家族財產。

gept.example_en: Her lawyer was appointed as executor of the estate according to her detailed will.
gept.example_zh: 根據她詳細的遺囑，她的律師被指定為遺產執行人。

gept.example_en: He left a generous bequest to the local children's hospital in his final will.
gept.example_zh: 他在最後的遺囑中留下一筆慷慨的遺贈給當地兒童醫院。

gept.example_en: Her grandfather's lasting legacy includes a scholarship fund for underprivileged music students.
gept.example_zh: 她祖父留下的長久傳承包括一個資助弱勢音樂學生的獎學金基金。

gept.example_en: The probate process can take many months before assets are finally distributed to heirs.
gept.example_zh: 遺囑認證程序可能需要數月時間才能將資產最終分配給繼承人。

gept.example_en: The bank acts as trustee for the educational fund established for her grandchildren.
gept.example_zh: 銀行擔任為她孫輩所設立的教育基金的信託管理人。

gept.example_en: He died intestate, causing significant legal complications for his surviving family members.
gept.example_zh: 他未立遺囑就過世了，給在世的家庭成員帶來嚴重的法律問題。

gept.example_en: She added a codicil to her will to include her newborn grandson as beneficiary.
gept.example_zh: 她在遺囑中加上附錄，將剛出生的孫子列為受益人。

gept.example_en: The buyer deposited the down payment into escrow until the home inspection was completed.
gept.example_zh: 買方將頭期款存入第三方託管，直到房屋檢查完成為止。

gept.example_en: The real estate listing showed five bedrooms, three bathrooms, and a spacious backyard.
gept.example_zh: 那筆房屋待售物件顯示有五間臥室、三間浴室和寬敞的後院。

gept.example_en: Many families faced foreclosure after losing their primary income during the economic recession.
gept.example_zh: 許多家庭在經濟衰退期間失去主要收入後面臨房屋被法拍。

gept.example_en: Closing costs typically include attorney fees, title insurance, and various administrative expenses.
gept.example_zh: 交割費用通常包括律師費、產權保險以及各種行政開支。

gept.example_en: Their friendly realtor showed them twelve different houses across three suburban neighborhoods.
gept.example_zh: 他們親切的房地產經紀人帶他們看了三個郊區社區的十二棟不同房屋。

gept.example_en: Saving for a twenty-percent down payment took the young couple nearly six years.
gept.example_zh: 為了存到百分之二十的頭期款，這對年輕夫婦花了將近六年時間。

gept.example_en: They used an equity loan to finance their major kitchen and bathroom renovation project.
gept.example_zh: 他們利用房屋淨值貸款來支付廚房與浴室的大型翻新工程。

gept.example_en: The notary witnessed both parties signing the property deed before officially transferring ownership.
gept.example_zh: 公證人見證雙方簽署房屋契約後才正式轉移所有權。

gept.example_en: The title search revealed no outstanding liens against the historic downtown property.
gept.example_zh: 產權調查顯示市中心歷史建築並無任何未清償的留置權。

gept.example_en: The demolition of the old factory building took crews almost three full weeks.
gept.example_zh: 舊工廠建築的拆除工程花了工程隊將近三個星期。

gept.example_en: Workers spent two weeks pouring the concrete foundation before framing the new house.
gept.example_zh: 工人花了兩週時間澆灌混凝土地基，才開始為新房屋搭建框架。

gept.example_en: The drywall installer finished hanging panels throughout the entire second floor by Friday.
gept.example_zh: 石膏板安裝工在週五前完成了整個二樓的板材安裝。

gept.example_en: The general contractor hired specialized subcontractors for electrical, plumbing, and roofing work.
gept.example_zh: 總承包商雇用了專門的分包商負責水電與屋頂工程。

gept.example_en: He used silicone caulk to seal gaps around the bathtub and shower tiles.
gept.example_zh: 他使用矽利康密封劑來封住浴缸與淋浴磁磚周圍的縫隙。

gept.example_en: The kitchen renovation included installing beautiful granite countertops and modern stainless steel appliances.
gept.example_zh: 廚房翻新包括安裝美麗的花崗岩流理臺面以及現代化的不鏽鋼家電。

gept.example_en: I took my injured cat to the nearest vet clinic late last night.
gept.example_zh: 我昨晚很晚才帶受傷的貓到最近的獸醫診所。

gept.example_en: Regular grooming keeps your dog's coat shiny and helps prevent skin problems effectively.
gept.example_zh: 定期的寵物美容能讓您的狗毛保持光亮並有效預防皮膚問題。

gept.example_en: Always keep your dog on a leash when walking through busy public parks.
gept.example_zh: 在繁忙的公共公園散步時，請務必為您的狗繫上牽繩。

gept.example_en: The veterinarian recommended that we neuter our male puppy at around six months.
gept.example_zh: 獸醫建議我們在公幼犬大約六個月大時為牠絕育。

gept.example_en: We decided to spay our female cat before she reached reproductive maturity.
gept.example_zh: 我們決定在母貓達到生育年齡前為牠絕育。

gept.example_en: Cleaning the litter box daily prevents unpleasant odors from spreading throughout the apartment.
gept.example_zh: 每天清理貓砂盆可防止難聞的氣味在公寓裡擴散。

gept.example_en: The puppy happily destroyed his new chew toy within just thirty minutes of receiving it.
gept.example_zh: 那隻小狗在拿到新啃咬玩具不到三十分鐘內就開心地把它咬壞了。

gept.example_en: We boarded our golden retriever at a reputable kennel during our two-week vacation.
gept.example_zh: 我們在兩週的假期期間，將黃金獵犬寄放在一家信譽良好的寵物旅館。

gept.example_en: All rescue animals should be microchipped before being adopted into permanent new homes.
gept.example_zh: 所有救援動物在被永久新家收養前都應該植入晶片。

gept.example_en: The flea collar protects your dog from parasites for up to eight months continuously.
gept.example_zh: 防蚤項圈可持續保護您的狗免受寄生蟲侵擾長達八個月。

gept.example_en: She joined a local playgroup so her toddler could interact with other children.
gept.example_zh: 她加入了當地的親子遊戲團體，好讓她的學步兒能與其他孩子互動。

gept.example_en: Most children begin attending preschool between the ages of three and four years old.
gept.example_zh: 大多數孩子在三到四歲之間開始上學齡前教育。

gept.example_en: They hired a French au pair to help care for their twins this summer.
gept.example_zh: 他們聘請了一位法國互惠生在今年夏天協助照顧他們的雙胞胎。

gept.example_en: The baby happily played with colorful blocks inside her padded portable playpen.
gept.example_zh: 嬰兒開心地在有襯墊的攜帶式遊戲圍欄裡玩著色彩繽紛的積木。

gept.example_en: State law requires children under eight to ride in approved booster seats while traveling.
gept.example_zh: 州法律規定八歲以下兒童乘車時必須使用合格的兒童增高座椅。

gept.example_en: She applied waterproof mascara before heading to the beach for the weekend trip.
gept.example_zh: 她在週末出發去海邊前塗上了防水睫毛膏。

gept.example_en: Finding the right foundation cosmetic shade for your skin tone requires careful comparison.
gept.example_zh: 找到適合膚色的粉底色號需要仔細比較。

gept.example_en: The bright red lipstick added a touch of glamour to her evening outfit.
gept.example_zh: 那支鮮紅色的口紅為她的晚宴造型增添了一絲華麗。

gept.example_en: Drawing a perfect eyeliner wing requires steady hands and considerable daily practice.
gept.example_zh: 畫出完美的眼線翹尾需要穩定的手部技巧與大量的日常練習。

gept.example_en: A touch of pink blush on the cheeks gives her face a healthy glow.
gept.example_zh: 在臉頰上輕掃一點粉紅腮紅，讓她的臉蛋顯得紅潤健康。

gept.example_en: She dabbed concealer under her eyes to hide the dark circles from sleepless nights.
gept.example_zh: 她在眼下輕拍遮瑕膏，掩蓋因失眠夜晚留下的黑眼圈。

gept.example_en: Setting powder cosmetic helps keep makeup looking fresh throughout long humid summer days.
gept.example_zh: 定妝蜜粉有助於在漫長潮濕的夏日中保持妝容清新。

gept.example_en: Applying primer before foundation helps makeup last much longer and look smoother overall.
gept.example_zh: 在粉底前塗抹妝前乳能使妝容持久更久，整體看起來也更平滑。

gept.example_en: She brushed shimmery highlighter cosmetic on her cheekbones for a dewy radiant glow.
gept.example_zh: 她在顴骨上刷上閃爍的打亮餅，營造出水潤光透的光澤感。

gept.example_en: She decided to get a soft perm to add volume to her straight hair.
gept.example_zh: 她決定燙個自然的捲髮以增加直髮的蓬鬆度。

gept.example_en: He decided to dye his graying hair back to its original dark brown color.
gept.example_zh: 他決定將漸灰的頭髮染回原本的深棕色。

gept.example_en: Applying hair conditioner twice a week keeps damaged hair soft and easy to manage.
gept.example_zh: 每週使用兩次護髮乳能讓受損髮絲保持柔順且易於整理。

gept.example_en: This new shampoo claims to reduce dandruff significantly within just two weeks of use.
gept.example_zh: 這款新洗髮精聲稱能在兩週內顯著減少頭皮屑。

gept.example_en: The stylist will blowdry your hair after the wash and gentle scalp massage.
gept.example_zh: 美髮師會在洗髮和輕柔的頭皮按摩後為您吹乾頭髮。

gept.example_en: She visits her favorite neighborhood hair salon once every six weeks for trimming.
gept.example_zh: 她每六週會去她最愛的社區美髮沙龍修剪一次頭髮。

gept.example_en: He used a small amount of hair gel to keep his hairstyle in place.
gept.example_zh: 他用了少量髮膠來固定髮型。

gept.example_en: Many celebrities use hair extensions to achieve longer or fuller looks for events.
gept.example_zh: 許多名人使用接髮來營造更長或更豐盈的造型出席活動。

gept.example_en: Applying vitamin C serum every morning helps brighten dull skin and reduce dark spots.
gept.example_zh: 每天早上塗抹維他命C精華液有助於提亮暗沉肌膚並減少黑斑。

gept.example_en: After cleansing, swipe toner gently across your face to balance the skin's natural pH.
gept.example_zh: 清潔後，輕柔地將化妝水擦拭於臉上以平衡肌膚的天然酸鹼值。

gept.example_en: Dermatologists recommend that you exfoliate your skin only two times per week maximum.
gept.example_zh: 皮膚科醫師建議您每週最多去角質兩次。

gept.example_en: She applied a hydrating face mask cosmetic before her important business meeting tomorrow.
gept.example_zh: 她在明天重要的商務會議前敷了一片保濕面膜。

gept.example_en: She treats herself to a relaxing professional facial at the spa once monthly.
gept.example_zh: 她每月犒賞自己一次在水療中心做放鬆的專業臉部護理。

gept.example_en: Choose a gentle cleanser that suits your skin type for daily morning and evening use.
gept.example_zh: 選擇一款適合您膚質的溫和洗面乳，供每日早晚使用。

gept.example_en: The dermatologist prescribed strong medication for her persistent and severe acne breakouts.
gept.example_zh: 皮膚科醫師為她持續且嚴重的痘痘問題開立了強效藥物。

gept.example_en: The dentist found two small cavities during my routine six-month dental checkup yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 牙醫在我昨天六個月例行牙科檢查中發現了兩個小蛀牙。

gept.example_en: He needed a dental filling after the dentist discovered decay in his molar.
gept.example_zh: 在牙醫發現他臼齒蛀蝕後，他需要進行補牙。

gept.example_en: Most teenagers wear braces for approximately two years to straighten misaligned teeth properly.
gept.example_zh: 大多數青少年配戴牙齒矯正器約兩年時間以矯正不齊的牙齒。

gept.example_en: Daily flossing prevents gum disease and removes food particles stuck between teeth.
gept.example_zh: 每天使用牙線可預防牙齦疾病並清除卡在牙齒間的食物殘渣。

gept.example_en: She needed a root canal after suffering severe pain in her infected back tooth.
gept.example_zh: 在後排牙齒感染引起劇烈疼痛後，她需要進行根管治療。

gept.example_en: The orthodontist adjusted her braces every four weeks for the entire treatment period.
gept.example_zh: 齒列矯正醫師在整個治療期間每四週調整一次她的矯正器。

gept.example_en: The cracked tooth needed a porcelain crown dental to restore its proper function.
gept.example_zh: 那顆裂掉的牙齒需要安裝瓷牙冠以恢復其正常功能。

gept.example_en: Regular brushing removes plaque that builds up on teeth throughout the entire day.
gept.example_zh: 定期刷牙可清除整天累積在牙齒上的牙菌斑。

gept.example_en: Untreated gum disease can eventually lead to tooth loss and serious health complications.
gept.example_zh: 未經治療的牙齦疾病最終可能導致掉牙以及嚴重的健康併發症。

gept.example_en: She prefers wearing contact lenses to glasses when exercising or playing outdoor sports.
gept.example_zh: 她在運動或進行戶外活動時偏好戴隱形眼鏡而非眼鏡。

gept.example_en: Annual eye examinations help detect glaucoma early before significant vision loss occurs permanently.
gept.example_zh: 每年的眼科檢查有助於及早發現青光眼，避免發生永久性視力喪失。

gept.example_en: Many elderly patients undergo simple surgery to remove cataracts and restore their clear vision.
gept.example_zh: 許多年長病患接受簡單的手術以摘除白內障並恢復清晰的視力。

gept.example_en: He has been nearsighted since childhood and cannot read distant signs without glasses.
gept.example_zh: 他從小就有近視，沒戴眼鏡就看不清遠處的標誌。

gept.example_en: As people age, many become farsighted and require reading glasses for close work.
gept.example_zh: 隨著年齡增長，許多人變得遠視，近距離工作時需要老花眼鏡。

gept.example_en: His astigmatism causes blurry vision at all distances without his corrective prescription lenses.
gept.example_zh: 他的散光在沒戴矯正眼鏡時會導致各種距離的視線模糊。

gept.example_en: The doctor prescribed antibiotic eyedrops to treat the painful eye infection within a week.
gept.example_zh: 醫師開立抗生素眼藥水，預計一週內治療這個疼痛的眼部感染。

gept.example_en: After the exhausting hike, she fell into a deep peaceful slumber within minutes.
gept.example_zh: 經過疲憊的徒步旅行後，她在幾分鐘內就進入了深沉安寧的睡眠。

gept.example_en: As a child, he was a frequent sleepwalker who roamed around the house nightly.
gept.example_zh: 他小時候經常夢遊，每晚都會在屋子裡四處走動。

gept.example_en: Most vivid and memorable dreams occur during the REM sleep stage of the cycle.
gept.example_zh: 最生動且令人印象深刻的夢通常發生在睡眠週期中的快速動眼睡眠階段。

gept.example_en: His doctor diagnosed sleep apnea after a thorough overnight observation at the sleep clinic.
gept.example_zh: 在睡眠中心徹夜觀察後，醫師診斷他患有睡眠呼吸中止症。

gept.example_en: A burglar broke into our neighbor's empty house through an unlocked basement window.
gept.example_zh: 竊賊從未上鎖的地下室窗戶闖入我們鄰居的空屋。

gept.example_en: Credit card fraud has become increasingly common with the rise of online shopping platforms.
gept.example_zh: 隨著線上購物平台興起，信用卡詐欺已變得越來越常見。

gept.example_en: The loud alarm scared the intruder away before he could steal anything valuable.
gept.example_zh: 響亮的警報聲嚇跑了入侵者，他來不及偷走任何貴重物品。

gept.example_en: The surveillance camera captured clear footage of the suspect entering the office building.
gept.example_zh: 監視攝影機拍下了嫌犯進入辦公大樓的清晰畫面。

gept.example_en: The motion sensor immediately alerted security when an intruder approached the back gate.
gept.example_zh: 當有入侵者接近後門時，動作感應器立即向保全發出警報。

gept.example_en: Detectives conducted a long stakeout outside the suspect's apartment for three consecutive nights.
gept.example_zh: 刑警在嫌犯公寓外連續三晚進行長時間的監視守候。

gept.example_en: Identity theft can severely damage your credit score and take years to fully resolve.
gept.example_zh: 身分盜竊可能嚴重損害您的信用評分，並需數年才能完全恢復。

gept.example_en: Officials ordered the immediate evacuation of coastal areas as the typhoon approached land.
gept.example_zh: 當颱風逼近陸地時，官員下令立即疏散沿海地區。

gept.example_en: Hundreds of displaced residents found temporary shelter emergency at the local community gymnasium.
gept.example_zh: 數百名流離失所的居民在當地社區體育館找到了臨時的緊急避難所。

gept.example_en: The severe storm caused a citywide blackout that lasted for nearly twelve hours.
gept.example_zh: 那場猛烈的暴風雨造成全市停電，持續了將近十二個小時。

gept.example_en: The emergency siren alert warned everyone to seek shelter immediately from approaching tornadoes.
gept.example_zh: 緊急警報聲提醒所有人立即尋找避難所躲避來襲的龍捲風。

gept.example_en: Hundreds of relief workers arrived to distribute food and water to disaster survivors.
gept.example_zh: 數百名救援工作者抵達現場，向災難倖存者分發食物與水。

gept.example_en: Every household should prepare a basic survival kit containing water, food, and first-aid supplies.
gept.example_zh: 每個家庭都應準備一個基本求生包，包含水、食物和急救用品。

gept.example_en: The rescue team worked through the night to find survivors trapped under collapsed buildings.
gept.example_zh: 救援隊徹夜搜救受困於倒塌建築下的倖存者。

gept.example_en: Apply antiseptic to the cut immediately to prevent infection from harmful bacteria entering.
gept.example_zh: 立即在傷口上塗抹消毒藥水以防止有害細菌進入造成感染。

gept.example_en: Knowing CPR can save someone's life during a sudden cardiac arrest emergency situation.
gept.example_zh: 懂得心肺復甦術能在突發心臟驟停的緊急情況下救人一命。

gept.example_en: The paramedic applied a splint to stabilize his broken arm before the ambulance arrived.
gept.example_zh: 救護員在救護車抵達前用夾板固定他骨折的手臂。

gept.example_en: Automated defibrillators are now installed in many public places including shopping malls everywhere.
gept.example_zh: 自動心臟去顫器現在已安裝在許多公共場所，包括各地的購物中心。

gept.example_en: A tourniquet should only be applied to stop severe bleeding when other methods fail.
gept.example_zh: 止血帶只應在其他方法無效時用於止住嚴重出血。

gept.example_en: The nurse covered the wound with sterile gauze before securing it with medical tape.
gept.example_zh: 護士用無菌紗布覆蓋傷口，然後用醫療膠帶固定。

gept.example_en: First responders arrived within minutes after receiving the emergency call from the accident scene.
gept.example_zh: 緊急救援人員在接到事故現場的緊急電話後幾分鐘內就抵達。

gept.example_en: In the old days, ladies kept smelling salts to revive themselves from sudden fainting.
gept.example_zh: 在過去，女士們會隨身帶著嗅鹽以便在突然昏厥時甦醒。

gept.example_en: The school organized a donation drive to support victims of the recent natural disaster.
gept.example_zh: 學校籌辦了一場募款活動以協助近期天然災害的受害者。

gept.example_en: The annual charity fundraiser raised over fifty thousand dollars for the children's hospital.
gept.example_zh: 年度慈善募款活動為兒童醫院籌得超過五萬美元。

gept.example_en: Several local businesses agreed to sponsor the marathon raising money for cancer research.
gept.example_zh: 幾家本地企業同意贊助為癌症研究募款的馬拉松賽事。

gept.example_en: She left her corporate job to work full-time for an environmental nonprofit organization.
gept.example_zh: 她離開企業工作，全職投入一個環保非營利組織服務。

gept.example_en: Many viewers called in to pledge donations during the public television fundraising event.
gept.example_zh: 許多觀眾在公共電視募款活動期間打電話進來認捐。

gept.example_en: His generous gesture created tremendous goodwill among everyone in the local farming community.
gept.example_zh: 他慷慨的舉動在當地農業社區所有人心中創造了極大的善意。

gept.example_en: He paid monthly alimony to his ex-wife for ten years after their divorce.
gept.example_zh: 離婚後，他連續十年每月支付贍養費給前妻。

gept.example_en: After a long legal battle, she finally won full custody of her two young children.
gept.example_zh: 經過漫長的法律纏訟後，她終於贏得了兩個年幼孩子的完整監護權。

gept.example_en: They signed a detailed prenup before getting married to protect their individual assets.
gept.example_zh: 他們在結婚前簽署了詳細的婚前協議以保障各自的資產。

gept.example_en: The five-year-old flower girl scattered rose petals along the entire wedding aisle.
gept.example_zh: 五歲的花童沿著整條婚禮走道撒下玫瑰花瓣。

gept.example_en: The little ring bearer carried the wedding bands proudly on a small velvet cushion.
gept.example_zh: 小小戒指捧持人自豪地捧著放在小天鵝絨墊子上的婚戒。

gept.example_en: She tried on dozens of wedding gowns before finding the perfect one for her.
gept.example_zh: 她試穿了幾十件結婚禮服才找到最適合她的那一件。

gept.example_en: The groom rented an elegant black tuxedo for his formal evening wedding ceremony.
gept.example_zh: 新郎為他正式的晚間婚禮儀式租了一件優雅的黑色燕尾服。

gept.example_en: The mother of the bride wore a beautiful corsage made of white roses.
gept.example_zh: 新娘的母親佩戴了一朵由白玫瑰製成的美麗胸花。

gept.example_en: Each groomsman wore a small white boutonniere matching the bridal bouquet's delicate flowers.
gept.example_zh: 每位伴郎都佩戴一朵與新娘花束相配的小白色襟花。

gept.example_en: The black hearse led the slow funeral procession toward the family cemetery plot.
gept.example_zh: 黑色靈車緩緩引領著送葬隊伍前往家族墓地。

gept.example_en: His epitaph reads, "Loving father, faithful friend, and devoted husband to his beloved wife."
gept.example_zh: 他的墓誌銘寫著：「慈愛的父親、忠誠的朋友，以及深愛妻子的丈夫。」

gept.example_en: The marble tombstone was engraved with her name, birth date, and a touching poem.
gept.example_zh: 那塊大理石墓碑上刻著她的名字、出生日期以及一首感人的詩。

gept.example_en: Friends held a candlelight vigil at the park to remember the accident victims.
gept.example_zh: 朋友們在公園舉行燭光守夜以紀念車禍罹難者。

gept.example_en: A memorial service for the beloved teacher will be held at the school chapel.
gept.example_zh: 敬愛老師的追思禮拜將在學校的小禮拜堂舉行。

gept.example_en: The family gathered at the crematorium for a private and intimate farewell ceremony.
gept.example_zh: 家屬聚集在火葬場舉行私人且親密的告別儀式。

gept.example_en: She received dozens of sympathy cards from coworkers after her father's sudden passing.
gept.example_zh: 在父親突然過世後，她收到了同事們寄來的幾十張慰問卡。

gept.example_en: A large floral wreath stood beside the casket throughout the entire funeral service.
gept.example_zh: 一個大型花圈在整個喪禮儀式期間都立在棺木旁邊。

gept.example_en: The funeral home staff handled all arrangements with great care and professional dignity.
gept.example_zh: 殯儀館的工作人員以極大的關懷與專業的尊嚴處理所有安排。

gept.example_en: Their experienced midwife helped deliver their first baby at home safely last spring.
gept.example_zh: 他們經驗豐富的助產士去年春天協助他們的第一胎在家中安全出生。

gept.example_en: Parents often sing classic nursery rhymes to help their young children learn language.
gept.example_zh: 父母常常哼唱經典的童謠，幫助年幼的孩子學習語言。

gept.example_en: Her close friends threw her a wonderful baby shower with cute games and gifts.
gept.example_zh: 她的好友們為她舉辦了一場精彩的迎嬰派對，有可愛的遊戲和禮物。

gept.example_en: The toddler drank apple juice happily from his colorful new plastic sippy cup.
gept.example_zh: 那個學步兒開心地用他色彩繽紛的新塑膠學習杯喝蘋果汁。

gept.example_en: She placed her one-year-old in the wooden highchair and offered him soft bananas.
gept.example_zh: 她把一歲的兒子放在木製高腳餐椅上，餵他軟香蕉。

gept.example_en: Always secure your infant tightly in an approved rear-facing car seat when driving.
gept.example_zh: 開車時請務必將嬰兒緊緊固定在合格的後向式安全座椅上。

gept.example_en: Her stylish diaper bag contained everything her baby could possibly need for the day.
gept.example_zh: 她時尚的媽媽包裡裝著寶寶一整天可能需要的所有東西。

gept.example_en: She bought several comfortable nursing bras to wear during her breastfeeding postpartum months.
gept.example_zh: 她買了幾件舒適的哺乳內衣，在產後哺乳的幾個月內穿著。

gept.example_en: Our family reunion gathering happens every five years at our grandparents' lakeside cabin.
gept.example_zh: 我們的家族重聚聚會每五年在祖父母湖邊的小屋舉辦一次。

gept.example_en: The twenty-year alumni reunion brought together classmates from all around the entire world.
gept.example_zh: 二十週年校友聚會將來自世界各地的同班同學齊聚一堂。

gept.example_en: His coworkers organized a wonderful retirement party with speeches, gifts, and shared memories.
gept.example_zh: 他的同事們為他籌辦了一場美好的退休派對，有致詞、禮物和共同回憶。

gept.example_en: She delivered an emotional farewell speech thanking everyone for years of supportive friendship.
gept.example_zh: 她發表了一段感人的告別演說，感謝大家多年來支持的友誼。

gept.example_en: Many retirees rely heavily on their pension plan to cover monthly living expenses.
gept.example_zh: 許多退休人士非常依賴退休金計畫來支付每月生活開支。

gept.example_en: She contributes ten percent of her salary to her employer-matched 401k account monthly.
gept.example_zh: 她每月將百分之十的薪水存入由雇主相對提撥的401k帳戶。

gept.example_en: Most American retirees receive monthly social security payments to supplement their personal savings.
gept.example_zh: 大多數美國退休人士每月領取社會安全給付以補充個人儲蓄。

gept.example_en: Job hunting can feel discouraging at times, but persistence and networking usually lead to success.
gept.example_zh: 求職有時讓人沮喪，但堅持與人脈經營通常會帶來成功。

gept.example_en: The interviewer asked thoughtful questions about my previous work experience and career goals.
gept.example_zh: 面試官詢問了關於我過去工作經驗與職業目標的深思熟慮的問題。

gept.example_en: As the interviewee, she prepared thoroughly by researching the company's history and recent achievements.
gept.example_zh: 作為面試者，她透過徹底研究公司歷史與近期成就來做好充分準備。

gept.example_en: Read the entire job description carefully before submitting your application and tailored cover letter.
gept.example_zh: 在提交申請和量身打造的求職信之前，請仔細閱讀完整的職務說明。

gept.example_en: Her former professor wrote a glowing reference letter highlighting her exceptional research abilities.
gept.example_zh: 她從前的教授寫了一封熱情的推薦信，凸顯她出色的研究能力。

gept.example_en: The hiring manager will contact selected candidates within two weeks for in-person interviews.
gept.example_zh: 招聘經理將在兩週內聯繫入選的候選人進行親自面試。

gept.example_en: The competitive offer included a generous signing bonus on top of his annual base salary.
gept.example_zh: 這份具競爭力的工作邀約除了年度基本薪資外還包含豐厚的簽約獎金。

gept.example_en: Buying life insurance early provides financial security for your family in case of tragedy.
gept.example_zh: 及早購買人壽保險可在不幸發生時為您的家人提供經濟保障。

gept.example_en: Their employer-provided health insurance covers most routine medical visits and prescription drugs.
gept.example_zh: 他們雇主提供的健康保險涵蓋大部分例行就診與處方藥物。

gept.example_en: His auto insurance premium increased significantly after he was involved in two recent accidents.
gept.example_zh: 在他近期發生兩次事故後，他的汽車保險費大幅上漲。

gept.example_en: The home warranty covers major appliance repairs for the first year after purchase.
gept.example_zh: 房屋保固在購買後第一年內涵蓋主要家電的維修。

gept.example_en: Most car insurance policies require minimum liability coverage to legally drive on public roads.
gept.example_zh: 大多數汽車保險規定需有最低的責任險才能合法在公共道路上行駛。

gept.example_en: Every adult should prepare a clear will testament to avoid complicated legal disputes later.
gept.example_zh: 每位成年人都應該準備一份清楚的遺囑以避免日後複雜的法律糾紛。

gept.example_en: A living will specifies your medical care preferences if you become unable to communicate.
gept.example_zh: 預立醫療指示載明您在無法溝通時希望接受的醫療照護方式。

gept.example_en: She granted her son power of attorney to manage her finances during her hospitalization.
gept.example_zh: 她在住院期間授權兒子委任授權書以管理她的財務。

gept.example_en: Proper estate planning can significantly reduce taxes and ensure your wishes are properly honored.
gept.example_zh: 妥善的遺產規劃能大幅減少稅務負擔並確保您的意願得到適當履行。

gept.example_en: The realtor scheduled an open house this Sunday afternoon from one until four o'clock.
gept.example_zh: 房地產經紀人安排了本週日下午一點到四點的房屋參觀日。

gept.example_en: They decided to refinance their mortgage to take advantage of significantly lower interest rates.
gept.example_zh: 他們決定為房貸再融資以利用大幅降低的利率優勢。

gept.example_en: The thorough home inspection revealed several minor electrical issues needing prompt professional attention.
gept.example_zh: 徹底的房屋檢驗發現了幾個需要立即專業處理的小型電氣問題。

gept.example_en: Disputes between neighbors often arise over the exact location of the shared property line.
gept.example_zh: 鄰居之間經常因共享地界線的確切位置而產生爭議。

gept.example_en: They hired a reliable contractor renovation specialist to remodel their outdated master bathroom.
gept.example_zh: 他們聘請了一位可靠的翻修承包商來改造他們過時的主浴室。

gept.example_en: You must obtain a permit construction from the city before beginning any structural work.
gept.example_zh: 在開始任何結構性工程前，您必須向市政府取得建築許可。

gept.example_en: Kitchen remodeling typically offers one of the best returns on home improvement investment.
gept.example_zh: 廚房改造工程通常是住宅裝修投資中報酬率最高的項目之一。

gept.example_en: The general contractor coordinates all subcontractors and oversees the entire renovation project schedule.
gept.example_zh: 總承包商負責協調所有分包商並監督整個翻修工程的進度。

gept.example_en: They installed beautiful open shelving in the kitchen to display their collection of dishes.
gept.example_zh: 他們在廚房安裝了漂亮的開放式置物架以展示他們收藏的餐盤。

gept.example_en: The white subway tile backsplash brightened up their previously dark and outdated kitchen significantly.
gept.example_zh: 白色地鐵磚廚房檔水板大幅提亮了他們原本陰暗過時的廚房。

gept.example_en: They trained their puppy to sleep peacefully in his cozy crate every single night.
gept.example_zh: 他們訓練他們的小狗每晚都安詳地睡在舒適的運輸籠裡。

gept.example_en: They visited the local shelter and completed the pet adoption process for two kittens.
gept.example_zh: 他們參訪了當地收容所並完成了兩隻小貓的寵物認養程序。

gept.example_en: She dropped her toddler off at the daycare facility before driving to work daily.
gept.example_zh: 她每天開車上班前都先把學步兒送到托兒所。

gept.example_en: Apply sunblock generously fifteen minutes before going outside on bright sunny summer days.
gept.example_zh: 在晴朗的夏日外出前十五分鐘請大量塗抹防曬乳。

gept.example_en: After her braces were removed, she had to wear a retainer every single night.
gept.example_zh: 她的矯正器拆掉後，每晚都必須配戴維持器。

gept.example_en: The optician helped him select stylish new frames and adjusted them for perfect fit.
gept.example_zh: 配鏡師幫他挑選時尚的新鏡框，並調整到完美貼合。

gept.example_en: She purchased new prescription lenses after her annual vision exam revealed slight changes.
gept.example_zh: 在年度視力檢查發現視力略有變化後，她購買了新的矯正鏡片。

gept.example_en: Choosing a higher deductible insurance amount typically results in lower monthly premium payments.
