gept.example_zh: 選擇較高的保險自付額通常會帶來較低的每月保費支出。

gept.example_en: He uses foam earplugs every night to block out his wife's loud snoring.
gept.example_zh: 他每晚都使用泡棉耳塞來隔絕妻子響亮的鼾聲。

gept.example_en: She wears a silk sleep mask to block all light during her afternoon naps.
gept.example_zh: 她戴著絲質眼罩來阻擋午睡時所有的光線。

gept.example_en: The heavy weighted blanket helps her feel calmer and sleep more soundly each night.
gept.example_zh: 重力毯讓她每晚感覺更平靜並睡得更安穩。

gept.example_en: They kept their valuable jewelry and important documents inside a bank safe deposit box.
gept.example_zh: 他們將貴重珠寶與重要文件存放在銀行的保險箱中。

gept.example_en: Building home equity over decades provides significant financial security for retirement years ahead.
gept.example_zh: 數十年來累積房屋淨值能為未來的退休歲月提供重要的財務保障。

gept.example_en: The skilled tile contractor finished installing the bathroom floor in only two days.
gept.example_zh: 技術熟練的磁磚工只用兩天就完成了浴室地板的鋪設。

gept.example_en: They polished the original hardwood floor to its beautiful natural golden honey color.
gept.example_zh: 他們將原本的實木地板拋光至美麗的天然金色蜂蜜色澤。

gept.example_en: Their friendly insurance agent helped them choose appropriate coverage for the entire family.
gept.example_zh: 他們親切的保險業務員協助他們為全家選擇適當的保險方案。

gept.example_en: Important original documents are kept in a safety deposit at our trusted local bank.
gept.example_zh: 重要的原始文件存放在我們信賴的當地銀行的安全存款箱中。

gept.example_en: They take their friendly golden retriever to the dog park every Saturday morning.
gept.example_zh: 他們每週六早上帶他們友善的黃金獵犬到寵物公園玩。

gept.example_en: They hired a reliable pet sitter to care for their cats during their vacation.
gept.example_zh: 他們聘請了一位可靠的寵物保姆在度假期間照顧他們的貓。

gept.example_en: They volunteered at the local animal shelter every weekend, walking dogs and cleaning kennels.
gept.example_zh: 他們每個週末都在當地動物收容所擔任志工，遛狗並清潔籠舍。

gept.example_en: Schools require an updated vaccination record before children can enroll for the academic year.
gept.example_zh: 學校在孩子註冊新學年前要求提供最新的疫苗接種紀錄。

gept.example_en: Her seven-year-old still uses a booster seat car for safety on long highway trips.
gept.example_zh: 她七歲的孩子在長途高速公路旅行中仍使用兒童加高汽車座椅以策安全。

gept.example_en: My daughter found a wonderful playmate at the local playground after just one visit.
gept.example_zh: 我女兒在當地遊樂場只去了一次就找到了一位很棒的玩伴。

gept.example_en: Always use gentle makeup remover before washing your face thoroughly with mild cleanser nightly.
gept.example_zh: 請每晚先使用溫和的卸妝液，再用溫和的潔面乳徹底洗臉。

gept.example_en: She wears a light floral perfume that smells fresh and not overpowering at all.
gept.example_zh: 她噴一款清淡的花香香水，氣味清新而毫不濃烈。

gept.example_en: He applied a small amount of cologne to his wrists and neck before the date.
gept.example_zh: 他在約會前在手腕與頸部塗上少量古龍水。

gept.example_en: He bought an electric hair clipper to give himself simple haircuts at home regularly.
gept.example_zh: 他買了一支電動理髮器以便定期在家自己理髮。

gept.example_en: Using gentle face wash twice daily keeps oily skin clean without causing excessive dryness.
gept.example_zh: 每天兩次使用溫和的洗面乳能讓油性肌膚保持清潔而不會過度乾燥。

gept.example_en: The crisis hotline provides free confidential support to people experiencing emotional distress around the clock.
gept.example_zh: 危機熱線全天候為情緒困擾的人提供免費且保密的支援。

gept.example_en: Schools conduct fire safety drills regularly so children learn how to evacuate safely.
gept.example_zh: 學校定期進行消防安全演習，讓孩子學習如何安全疏散。

gept.example_en: Our neighborhood crime watch group meets monthly to discuss safety concerns and prevention strategies.
gept.example_zh: 我們的社區治安守望小組每月開會討論安全顧慮與預防策略。

gept.example_en: Test your home smoke alarm batteries every six months to ensure they work properly.
gept.example_zh: 每六個月測試一次家用煙霧警報器的電池以確保正常運作。

gept.example_en: She looked through the viewfinder and adjusted the focus before pressing the shutter.
gept.example_zh: 她透過取景器查看，按下快門前先調整焦距。

gept.example_en: He used a telephoto lens to photograph the distant eagle without disturbing it.
gept.example_zh: 他用遠攝鏡頭拍攝遠方的老鷹而不驚擾牠。

gept.example_en: The close-up of her smile became the most memorable shot in the entire film.
gept.example_zh: 她微笑的特寫成為整部電影中最令人難忘的鏡頭。

gept.example_en: The mountains made a stunning backdrop for the wedding photographs taken at sunset.
gept.example_zh: 群山為日落時拍攝的婚禮照片提供了壯麗的背景。

gept.example_en: Good composition can turn an ordinary scene into a striking photograph.
gept.example_zh: 好的構圖能將平凡的景象轉變成醒目的照片。

gept.example_en: She kept a snapshot of her childhood friends in her wallet for years.
gept.example_zh: 她多年來把童年朋友的快照放在皮夾裡。

gept.example_en: A wide-angle lens captures more of the scene in tight indoor spaces.
gept.example_zh: 廣角鏡頭能在狹窄室內空間裡捕捉到更多景物。

gept.example_en: The fisheye photograph made the small skate park look surprisingly vast.
gept.example_zh: 魚眼照片讓那個小滑板場看起來意外地廣闊。

gept.example_en: The editor asked her to retouch the photo to remove small skin blemishes.
gept.example_zh: 編輯請她修圖以去除小瑕疵。

gept.example_en: The overexposed photo lost all detail in the bright sunlit sky.
gept.example_zh: 曝光過度的照片在明亮陽光的天空中失去所有細節。

gept.example_en: The underexposed image made the entire room look unnecessarily dark and gloomy.
gept.example_zh: 曝光不足的影像讓整個房間看起來不必要地陰暗。

gept.example_en: That model is incredibly photogenic and looks great from every possible angle.
gept.example_zh: 那位模特兒非常上相，從任何角度看都很棒。

gept.example_en: The flashbulb fired brightly and momentarily startled the small sleeping kitten.
gept.example_zh: 閃光燈明亮地閃了一下，瞬間嚇到熟睡的小貓。

gept.example_en: Old family portraits in sepia give the photographs a nostalgic warm feeling.
gept.example_zh: 棕褐色調的舊家族肖像為照片帶來懷舊溫暖的感覺。

gept.example_en: He printed the design in grayscale to check the contrast before adding colors.
gept.example_zh: 他以灰階列印設計圖以在加入色彩前檢查對比度。

gept.example_en: The screenwriter spent two years researching before finishing the historical drama.
gept.example_zh: 那位編劇花了兩年研究才完成這部歷史劇。

gept.example_en: The prequel explores the villain's tragic childhood before the main story begins.
gept.example_zh: 前傳探討反派在正篇開始之前的悲慘童年。

gept.example_en: The narrator's calm voiceover guided the audience through the documentary's complex topic.
gept.example_zh: 敘述者沉穩的旁白引導觀眾理解紀錄片的複雜主題。

gept.example_en: The casting director auditioned hundreds of actors before choosing the perfect lead.
gept.example_zh: 選角導演試鏡了上百位演員才決定完美的主角人選。

gept.example_en: She prepared for the audition by rehearsing her monologue every night for weeks.
gept.example_zh: 她連續數週每晚排練獨白以準備試鏡。

gept.example_en: A quick montage showed the hero's training over several months of effort.
gept.example_zh: 一段快速蒙太奇展現了主角數月的訓練過程。

gept.example_en: The famous singer made a brief cameo in the comedy that thrilled fans.
gept.example_zh: 那位名歌手在喜劇中短暫客串，令粉絲興奮不已。

gept.example_en: The plotline twists in unexpected ways and keeps viewers guessing until the end.
gept.example_zh: 劇情以意想不到的方式扭轉，讓觀眾猜到最後。

gept.example_en: The protagonist faces moral dilemmas that force her to question her own values.
gept.example_zh: 主角面臨道德兩難，迫使她質疑自己的價值觀。

gept.example_en: A well-written antagonist makes the hero's victory feel truly earned and satisfying.
gept.example_zh: 塑造完善的反派讓主角的勝利更顯得來之不易又令人滿足。

gept.example_en: A brief flashback showed why the old detective could never forget that case.
gept.example_zh: 一段短暫的倒敘展現了為何老探員始終忘不了那個案子。

gept.example_en: The climax of the thriller takes place on the rooftop during a thunderstorm.
gept.example_zh: 驚悚片的高潮發生在雷雨中的屋頂上。

gept.example_en: The popular spinoff series follows a minor character from the original show.
gept.example_zh: 那部受歡迎的衍生影集講述原劇中一個小角色的故事。

gept.example_en: The latest reboot of the classic franchise attracted a brand-new younger audience.
gept.example_zh: 那部經典系列的最新重啟之作吸引了全新的年輕觀眾。

gept.example_en: The film features an impressive ensemble of award-winning actors from many countries.
gept.example_zh: 這部電影由來自多國的得獎演員組成令人讚嘆的全體陣容。

gept.example_en: The novel went into a third reprint within just six months of release.
gept.example_zh: 這本小說發行短短六個月內就出了第三版。

gept.example_en: The anthology gathers short stories from twenty contemporary Asian writers.
gept.example_zh: 這本選集收錄了二十位當代亞洲作家的短篇故事。

gept.example_en: Her debut novel became a bestseller almost overnight after a glowing review.
gept.example_zh: 她的處女作小說在一篇好評後幾乎一夜成為暢銷書。

gept.example_en: He prefers the hardback edition because it lies flat when fully opened.
gept.example_zh: 他偏愛精裝版，因為完全打開時能平放。

gept.example_en: That imprint specializes in translated literary fiction from across Latin America.
gept.example_zh: 那個出版品牌專門出版翻譯自整個拉丁美洲的文學小說。

gept.example_en: The book uses an elegant classic typeface that is easy on tired eyes.
gept.example_zh: 這本書使用優雅的經典字體，讓疲倦的雙眼閱讀起來不費力。

gept.example_en: A famous novelist wrote a generous blurb for the back cover.
gept.example_zh: 一位著名小說家為書背寫了一段慷慨的推薦短文。

gept.example_en: The author's endorsement from a Nobel laureate boosted early sales significantly.
gept.example_zh: 作者獲得諾貝爾得主背書，大幅提升早期銷售。

gept.example_en: A respected historian wrote the foreword to this important academic biography.
gept.example_zh: 一位受尊敬的歷史學家為這本重要的學術傳記撰寫前言。

gept.example_en: She published her crime novels under a pseudonym to keep her identity private.
gept.example_zh: 她以筆名出版犯罪小說以保持身分隱密。

gept.example_en: A skilled translator preserves both meaning and tone across two very different languages.
gept.example_zh: 優秀的翻譯者能在兩種截然不同的語言間同時保留意義和語氣。

gept.example_en: The illustrator drew vivid pictures that brought every page of the children's book alive.
gept.example_zh: 插畫家畫出生動圖畫，讓童書的每一頁都活了起來。

gept.example_en: A harsh reviewer can sometimes hurt a new book's chances in the market.
gept.example_zh: 嚴厲的評論者有時會傷害新書在市場上的機會。

gept.example_en: She wrote a powerful op-ed about education reform in this morning's newspaper.
gept.example_zh: 她在今早報紙上寫了一篇強而有力的評論文章談教育改革。

gept.example_en: The columnist offers a witty take on weekly political events every Sunday.
gept.example_zh: 那位專欄作家每週日對政治事件提出機智見解。

gept.example_en: He prefers reading the broadsheet for its in-depth international analysis each morning.
gept.example_zh: 他偏愛每早讀大報的深度國際分析。

gept.example_en: The latest dispatch from the war zone described scenes of brave volunteer work.
gept.example_zh: 來自戰區的最新通訊報導描述了勇敢的志願工作場景。

gept.example_en: The newsroom buzzed with activity as the deadline rapidly approached.
gept.example_zh: 截稿時間迅速逼近時，新聞編輯室裡一片忙碌。

gept.example_en: Every TV pundit predicted a close election, but the result was very surprising.
gept.example_zh: 每位電視評論員都預測選情接近，但結果非常令人意外。

gept.example_en: She checks her social media newsfeed first thing every weekday morning.
gept.example_zh: 她每個平日早晨第一件事就是查看社群媒體的新聞訊息源。

gept.example_en: The muckraker uncovered a major corruption scandal at the city hall last year.
gept.example_zh: 那位揭弊記者去年揭發了市政府的重大貪污醜聞。

gept.example_en: The dateline at the top showed the story was filed from a remote village.
gept.example_zh: 頂部的電頭顯示這則報導是從一個偏遠村莊發稿的。

gept.example_en: Many netizens criticized the company's decision in a heated online discussion.
gept.example_zh: 許多網民在熱烈的網路討論中批評該公司的決定。

gept.example_en: The funny meme of the dancing cat spread across the internet within hours.
gept.example_zh: 那隻跳舞貓的搞笑迷因在幾小時內傳遍網路。

gept.example_en: Choose a username that does not reveal too much personal information online.
gept.example_zh: 選擇一個不會洩漏太多個資的使用者名稱。

gept.example_en: Riding a bicycle to work reduces your daily carbon footprint significantly.
gept.example_zh: 騎自行車上班能顯著減少你每日的碳足跡。

gept.example_en: Carrying a reusable water bottle helps cut down on single-use plastic waste.
gept.example_zh: 攜帶可重複使用的水瓶有助於減少一次性塑膠廢棄物。

gept.example_en: Hydropower provides a reliable source of clean electricity for many mountainous regions.
gept.example_zh: 水力發電為許多山區提供穩定的乾淨電力來源。

gept.example_en: The old wooden windmill once ground grain for the entire local village.
gept.example_zh: 那座舊木造風車曾為整個當地村莊磨穀。

gept.example_en: Volunteers gathered every Saturday to help reforest the hillside damaged by wildfires.
gept.example_zh: 志工每週六聚集起來協助重新造林被野火破壞的山坡。

gept.example_en: She loves to upcycle old furniture into stylish modern home decor pieces.
gept.example_zh: 她喜歡將舊家具升級回收成時尚的現代家居裝飾。

gept.example_en: Cattle farms produce methane, a powerful greenhouse gas that warms the planet.
gept.example_zh: 畜牧場產生甲烷，這是一種強力溫室氣體，會使地球變暖。

gept.example_en: The program crashed when an unexpected error occurred during runtime.
gept.example_zh: 程式在執行時發生意外錯誤而當機。

gept.example_en: All customer records are stored in a secure encrypted database on the server.
gept.example_zh: 所有客戶資料都儲存在伺服器上一個加密的安全資料庫中。

gept.example_en: The backend team handles server logic while the front-end team builds the interface.
gept.example_zh: 後端團隊處理伺服器邏輯，前端團隊則建構介面。

gept.example_en: A good frontend developer ensures the website looks great on every device.
gept.example_zh: 優秀的前端工程師確保網站在每種裝置上都很美觀。

gept.example_en: This handy plugin adds spell-checking features to the basic text editor.
gept.example_zh: 這個方便的外掛為基本文字編輯器加入拼字檢查功能。

gept.example_en: The new app has a clean interface that even beginners can easily navigate.
gept.example_zh: 新應用程式有簡潔的介面，連新手也能輕鬆操作。

gept.example_en: Please update to the latest version to get the most recent security patches.
gept.example_zh: 請更新到最新版本以取得最新的安全修補。

gept.example_en: Once the review is complete, we can merge the new feature into the main branch.
gept.example_zh: 審核完成後，我們就可以將新功能合併到主分支。

gept.example_en: Always write a clear message when you make a commit to the shared repository.
gept.example_zh: 向共用儲存庫提交時，務必寫清楚的訊息。

gept.example_en: Store the daily temperatures in an array to calculate the weekly average easily.
gept.example_zh: 將每日溫度存入陣列，可以輕鬆計算週平均值。

gept.example_en: The variable can only hold an integer, not a decimal or text value.
gept.example_zh: 該變數只能存放整數，不能放小數或文字值。

gept.example_en: A boolean variable can only take one of two values: true or false.
gept.example_zh: 布林變數只能取兩個值之一：真或假。

gept.example_en: Recursion solves problems by having a function call itself with smaller inputs.
gept.example_zh: 遞迴透過讓函式以較小的輸入呼叫自己來解決問題。

gept.example_en: Always indent the code inside a loop to show its logical structure clearly.
gept.example_zh: 迴圈內的程式碼一定要縮排，以清楚顯示其邏輯結構。

gept.example_en: The new engineer spent a week reading the codebase before writing her first feature.
gept.example_zh: 新工程師花了一週閱讀程式碼庫才開始寫她的第一個功能。

gept.example_en: Outdated dependency packages can introduce serious security holes into modern web applications.
gept.example_zh: 過時的依賴項套件可能為現代網路應用程式帶入嚴重的安全漏洞。

gept.example_en: Each module handles a single responsibility so the code remains organized.
gept.example_zh: 每個模組只處理一項職責，使程式碼保持井然有序。

gept.example_en: The mobile app calls the login endpoint to verify the user's credentials.
gept.example_zh: 行動應用程式呼叫登入端點以驗證使用者的憑證。

gept.example_en: Test the risky code inside a safe sandbox before deploying it to production.
gept.example_zh: 在部署到正式環境之前，先在安全的沙盒中測試有風險的程式碼。

gept.example_en: The team always deploys to staging first to catch problems before customers see them.
gept.example_zh: 團隊總是先部署到預備環境，以在客戶看到問題之前發現它們。

gept.example_en: They performed an emergency rollback when the update caused users widespread login problems.
gept.example_zh: 當更新導致用戶大規模登入問題時，他們執行了緊急回滾。

gept.example_en: The developers shipped a hotfix overnight to address the critical security bug.
gept.example_zh: 開發者連夜推出緊急修補程式以解決關鍵的安全漏洞。

gept.example_en: We need to refactor this old function before adding any new features to it.
gept.example_zh: 在為這個舊函式加入任何新功能之前，我們需要先重構它。

gept.example_en: Each iteration of the design improved usability based on detailed user feedback.
gept.example_zh: 每次設計的迭代都根據詳細的使用者意見改進了可用性。

gept.example_en: The startup uses an agile method to release small updates every two weeks.
gept.example_zh: 那家新創公司使用敏捷方法每兩週推出小型更新。

gept.example_en: The daily scrum meeting lasts only fifteen minutes but keeps the whole team aligned.
gept.example_zh: 每日站立會議只持續十五分鐘，但讓整個團隊保持步調一致。

gept.example_en: She sketched the algorithm in pseudocode before writing any actual program code.
gept.example_zh: 她在寫任何實際程式碼之前先用虛擬碼勾勒演算法。

gept.example_en: The plus sign takes two operands and returns the sum of the values.
gept.example_zh: 加號接受兩個運算元並回傳這些值的總和。

gept.example_en: The asterisk operator multiplies two numbers in nearly every programming language.
gept.example_zh: 星號運算子在幾乎所有程式語言中都用來相乘兩個數字。

gept.example_en: Use an iterator to walk through every element in the long list one by one.
gept.example_zh: 使用迭代器逐一走訪長串列中的每個元素。

gept.example_en: The researcher trained the model on a large dataset of medical images.
gept.example_zh: 研究員用一個大型的醫療影像資料集訓練模型。

gept.example_en: The database schema defines exactly which fields each user record must contain.
gept.example_zh: 資料庫結構描述精確定義每筆用戶記錄必須包含哪些欄位。

gept.example_en: Every photo file contains hidden metadata showing the date and camera model.
gept.example_zh: 每個照片檔都包含隱藏的元資料，顯示日期和相機型號。

gept.example_en: The simple database query returned the names of all customers from Taipei.
gept.example_zh: 那個簡單的資料庫查詢回傳了所有來自台北的客戶姓名。

gept.example_en: A warm bowl of miso soup is a comforting start to a Japanese breakfast.
gept.example_zh: 一碗溫熱的味噌湯是日式早餐令人慰藉的開場。

gept.example_en: The chef fried the shrimp tempura until the batter was light and golden.
gept.example_zh: 廚師將蝦天婦羅炸到麵衣輕盈金黃。

gept.example_en: Fresh tuna sashimi melts in your mouth when sliced properly by a skilled chef.
gept.example_zh: 由熟練廚師切得恰到好處的新鮮鮪魚生魚片入口即化。

gept.example_en: Spicy kimchi is served with almost every Korean meal as a flavorful side.
gept.example_zh: 辛辣的韓式泡菜幾乎在每一頓韓式餐點中作為風味小菜。

gept.example_en: Bibimbap mixes warm rice, vegetables, meat, and a fried egg in one bowl.
gept.example_zh: 韓式拌飯將熱飯、蔬菜、肉和煎蛋拌在一個碗中。

gept.example_en: They wrapped grilled beef and salsa in a soft taco for a quick lunch.
gept.example_zh: 他們把烤牛肉和莎莎醬包進軟塔可餅當作快速午餐。

gept.example_en: My favorite burrito is stuffed with beans, rice, cheese, and grilled chicken.
gept.example_zh: 我最愛的墨西哥捲餅裡塞滿豆子、米飯、起司和烤雞。

gept.example_en: Cooking creamy mushroom risotto requires patience and constant gentle stirring.
gept.example_zh: 烹煮綿密的蘑菇燉飯需要耐心和持續輕柔的攪拌。

gept.example_en: Soft potato gnocchi served with butter and sage is a classic Italian comfort dish.
gept.example_zh: 軟綿綿的馬鈴薯麵疙瘩配奶油鼠尾草是經典的義式療癒菜餚。

gept.example_en: Crispy falafel wrapped in pita with fresh vegetables makes a great vegetarian lunch.
gept.example_zh: 酥脆的鷹嘴豆球包進口袋餅配新鮮蔬菜，是很棒的素食午餐。

gept.example_en: Smooth hummus with warm pita bread is popular across the entire Middle East.
gept.example_zh: 滑順的鷹嘴豆泥配熱口袋餅在整個中東都很受歡迎。

gept.example_en: Hungarian goulash is a hearty stew flavored with paprika and slow-cooked beef.
gept.example_zh: 匈牙利燉牛肉是用紅椒粉和慢燉牛肉調味的豐盛燉菜。

gept.example_en: A bowl of warm borscht topped with sour cream is perfect on cold winter days.
gept.example_zh: 一碗溫熱羅宋湯加上酸奶油，最適合寒冬享用。

gept.example_en: Sweet baklava made of layered pastry and chopped nuts is dripping with honey.
gept.example_zh: 層層酥皮和碎堅果做成的甜果仁蜜餅淋滿了蜂蜜。

gept.example_en: A steaming bowl of beef pho is the perfect breakfast on a chilly Vietnamese morning.
gept.example_zh: 在寒冷的越南清晨，一碗熱騰騰的牛肉河粉是完美的早餐。

gept.example_en: Polish pierogi can be stuffed with potato, cheese, or sweet fruit fillings.
gept.example_zh: 波蘭餃子可以包入馬鈴薯、起司或甜果內餡。

gept.example_en: The crispy empanada was filled with seasoned ground beef and a hard-boiled egg.
gept.example_zh: 那個酥脆的南美餡餅包著調味絞牛肉和水煮蛋。

gept.example_en: Peruvian ceviche cures fresh raw fish in lime juice with onions and chili.
gept.example_zh: 祕魯檸檬醃生魚用萊姆汁、洋蔥和辣椒醃漬新鮮生魚。

gept.example_en: The homemade tiramisu was layered with espresso-soaked ladyfingers and mascarpone cream.
gept.example_zh: 自製提拉米蘇層層疊著浸過濃縮咖啡的手指餅乾和馬斯卡彭奶油。

gept.example_en: They each ordered a scoop of pistachio gelato as a refreshing summer treat.
gept.example_zh: 他們各點了一球開心果義式冰淇淋作為清爽的夏日享受。

gept.example_en: The street vendor folded a thin crepe filled with chocolate and sliced banana.
gept.example_zh: 街邊小販折起一片薄可麗餅，裡面包著巧克力和切片香蕉。

gept.example_en: Hot wonton soup with shrimp dumplings warmed everyone after the long cold hike.
gept.example_zh: 熱餛飩湯配蝦餃在漫長寒冷的健行後溫暖了每個人。

gept.example_en: They gathered for dim-sum brunch every Sunday at their favorite Cantonese restaurant.
gept.example_zh: 他們每週日都在最愛的廣式餐廳聚會吃點心早午餐。

gept.example_en: Warm apple strudel dusted with sugar is a traditional Viennese dessert.
gept.example_zh: 撒上糖粉的溫熱蘋果果餡卷是傳統的維也納甜點。

gept.example_en: A tiny dab of wasabi adds sharp heat to a piece of fresh sushi.
gept.example_zh: 一點點山葵能為一塊新鮮壽司增添辛辣的刺激。

gept.example_en: Athletes from over two hundred countries gather for the summer olympics every four years.
gept.example_zh: 來自兩百多國的運動員每四年齊聚夏季奧運。

gept.example_en: The paralympics showcase incredible athletes who refuse to let disability stop them.
gept.example_zh: 帕運展現了拒絕讓身障阻止他們的傑出運動員。

gept.example_en: The four runners practiced the baton handoff for the relay race every morning.
gept.example_zh: 四位跑者每天早上練習接力賽的接棒。

gept.example_en: The steeplechase combines running, hurdles, and water jumps over three thousand meters.
gept.example_zh: 障礙賽在三千公尺距離內結合跑步、跨欄和跨越水池。

gept.example_en: The heptathlon tests an athlete in seven different events over two intense days.
gept.example_zh: 七項全能在兩天激烈賽程中考驗運動員七種不同項目。

gept.example_en: Winning the decathlon is considered the ultimate test of all-around athletic ability.
gept.example_zh: 贏得十項全能被視為全方位運動能力的終極考驗。

gept.example_en: Windsurfing requires perfect balance, strong shoulders, and a good reading of the wind.
gept.example_zh: 風帆衝浪需要完美平衡、強壯肩膀以及對風向的良好判讀。

gept.example_en: The luge athlete reaches incredible speeds while lying flat on her small sled.
gept.example_zh: 無舵雪橇選手平躺在她的小雪橇上達到驚人速度。

gept.example_en: The bobsled team pushed hard at the start before jumping inside their sleek vehicle.
gept.example_zh: 雪車隊伍在起點奮力推動後跳進他們流線型的車內。

gept.example_en: Curling looks slow on television but actually demands great strategy and precision.
gept.example_zh: 冰壺在電視上看起來緩慢，但實際上需要絕佳的策略和精準度。

gept.example_en: The biathlon combines cross-country skiing with extremely precise target rifle shooting.
gept.example_zh: 冬季兩項結合越野滑雪與極為精準的步槍射擊。

gept.example_en: The horse performed elegant dressage movements that earned the rider top marks.
gept.example_zh: 那匹馬完成優雅的盛裝舞步動作，為騎士贏得最高分。

gept.example_en: Two sumo wrestlers tried to push each other out of the small circular ring.
gept.example_zh: 兩位相撲選手試圖將對方推出小小的圓形場地。

gept.example_en: Students bow respectfully every time they enter or leave the traditional dojo.
gept.example_zh: 學生每次進出傳統道場時都會恭敬地鞠躬。

gept.example_en: The boxer won by knockout in the very first round of the fight.
gept.example_zh: 那位拳擊手在第一回合就以擊倒獲勝。

gept.example_en: The match went into a tiebreaker after both players reached six games each.
gept.example_zh: 雙方都打到六比六後，比賽進入決勝局。

gept.example_en: The young cellist performed a moving solo with the city's symphony orchestra.
gept.example_zh: 那位年輕大提琴家與該市的交響樂團演奏了動人的獨奏。

gept.example_en: The cathedral organist practiced the new piece quietly before Sunday morning service.
gept.example_zh: 大教堂的風琴演奏者在週日早晨禮拜前靜靜練習新曲目。

gept.example_en: The famous pianist gave a brilliant recital lasting nearly two hours.
gept.example_zh: 那位著名鋼琴家舉行了一場近兩小時的精彩獨奏會。

gept.example_en: The mournful sound of the bagpipe echoed across the misty Scottish hillside.
gept.example_zh: 風笛哀傷的聲音迴盪在霧氣繚繞的蘇格蘭山坡上。

gept.example_en: The Indian sitar player plucked the strings to create a deeply meditative atmosphere.
gept.example_zh: 那位印度西塔琴手撥動琴弦，營造深沉靜謐的氛圍。

gept.example_en: Many children learn the recorder as their very first musical instrument at school.
gept.example_zh: 許多孩子在學校第一個學的樂器就是直笛。

gept.example_en: The wooden bars of the marimba produce a warmer tone than a metal vibraphone.
gept.example_zh: 馬林巴琴的木製琴條比金屬鐵琴發出更溫暖的音色。

gept.example_en: The bassoon adds a deep voice to the woodwind section of the orchestra.
gept.example_zh: 巴松管為管弦樂團的木管組增添深沉的聲音。

gept.example_en: The tuba player carried his huge instrument carefully onto the stage.
gept.example_zh: 大號演奏者小心翼翼地將他巨大的樂器抬上舞台。

gept.example_en: She played a soft minor chord that made the whole song feel melancholy.
gept.example_zh: 她彈了一個柔和的小調和弦，讓整首歌帶有憂鬱感。

gept.example_en: The conductor slowed the tempo to give the lyrical melody more emotional weight.
gept.example_zh: 指揮放慢節奏速度，讓抒情旋律帶有更多情感重量。

gept.example_en: She picked up the small crochet-hook and continued working on the lacy bedspread.
gept.example_zh: 她拿起小鉤針，繼續編織那件有蕾絲花紋的床罩。

gept.example_en: The weaver sat at her old wooden spinning-wheel for hours every single afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 織工每天下午都在她那台舊木紡車前坐上好幾個小時。

gept.example_en: The skilled potter shaped a delicate vase from a lump of grey clay.
gept.example_zh: 熟練的陶工把一塊灰色黏土塑成精緻的花瓶。

gept.example_en: The ceramic bowls bake inside the hot kiln for nearly eighteen hours.
gept.example_zh: 陶碗在熱窯裡烘烤近十八個小時。

gept.example_en: Children love shaping animals out of soft clay during the art class.
gept.example_zh: 美術課上孩子們喜歡用軟黏土塑形成各種動物。

gept.example_en: The delicate engraving on the silver watch shows the original owner's full name.
gept.example_zh: 銀錶上精細的雕刻顯示原主人的全名。

gept.example_en: His skilled woodwork transformed an old fallen tree into beautiful useful furniture.
gept.example_zh: 他精湛的木工把一棵倒下的老樹變成美麗實用的家具。

gept.example_en: Watching glassblowing is fascinating as the artist shapes glowing molten glass quickly.
gept.example_zh: 觀看玻璃吹製令人著迷，藝術家迅速塑形熾熱的熔融玻璃。

gept.example_en: The artisan can weave intricate patterns into a single rug over many weeks.
gept.example_zh: 工匠能在許多週內將複雜圖案編入一塊地毯。

gept.example_en: Indonesian batik artists use wax to create stunning patterns on cotton cloth.
gept.example_zh: 印尼蠟染藝術家用蠟在棉布上創造令人驚豔的圖案。

gept.example_en: They wore matching tie-dye T-shirts at the small summer music festival.
gept.example_zh: 他們在那個小型夏季音樂節上穿著相同的紮染T恤。

gept.example_en: She hung a beautiful pine wreath on the front door for the winter holidays.
gept.example_zh: 她在冬季節日將美麗的松木花圈掛在前門上。

gept.example_en: The children made a garland of small wildflowers for their grandmother's birthday.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們為祖母的生日做了一個小野花花環。

gept.example_en: The bride lifted her white veil before kissing the groom at the altar.
gept.example_zh: 新娘在祭壇前親吻新郎之前掀起白色面紗。

gept.example_en: The mysterious traveler wore a long dark cloak that hid his face completely.
gept.example_zh: 神秘的旅人穿著長長的深色斗篷，完全遮住臉。

gept.example_en: Ancient Roman soldiers wore a simple woolen tunic beneath their armor.
gept.example_zh: 古羅馬士兵在盔甲下穿簡單的羊毛束腰外衣。

gept.example_en: She wore an elegant red gown to the charity ball last Saturday evening.
gept.example_zh: 上週六晚上她穿著優雅的紅色禮服參加慈善舞會。

gept.example_en: The traditional feathered headdress is reserved for special ceremonial occasions only.
gept.example_zh: 傳統的羽毛頭飾僅在特殊典禮場合配戴。

gept.example_en: The golden crown sparkled under the bright lights of the throne room.
gept.example_zh: 金色王冠在王座大廳明亮燈光下閃閃發光。

gept.example_en: Many Muslim women wear a hijab as a visible expression of their faith.
gept.example_zh: 許多穆斯林女性配戴頭巾作為信仰的明顯表達。

gept.example_en: The elegant red cheongsam suited her perfectly at the traditional wedding banquet.
gept.example_zh: 那件優雅的紅色旗袍在傳統婚宴上非常適合她。

gept.example_en: He wore a tilted black beret that gave him a fashionable artistic look.
gept.example_zh: 他歪戴著一頂黑色貝雷帽，營造出時髦的藝術氣質。

gept.example_en: The waiter wore a traditional red fez at the historic Turkish restaurant downtown.
gept.example_zh: 在市中心的歷史悠久土耳其餐廳裡，服務生戴著傳統的紅色土耳其帽。

gept.example_en: A small silver tassel hung gracefully from each corner of the embroidered scarf.
gept.example_zh: 刺繡圍巾的每個角落都優雅地掛著一個小銀色流蘇。

gept.example_en: Her interest in botany led her to identify hundreds of local wildflower species.
gept.example_zh: 她對植物學的興趣使她辨識出數百種當地野花。

gept.example_en: He studied zoology because he wanted to work as a wildlife conservation officer.
gept.example_zh: 他學動物學是因為想擔任野生動物保育人員。

gept.example_en: Modern astrophysics tries to explain how galaxies first formed in the early universe.
gept.example_zh: 現代天體物理學試圖解釋星系如何在早期宇宙中首次形成。

gept.example_en: Biochemistry studies the chemical reactions happening constantly inside every living cell.
gept.example_zh: 生物化學研究每個活細胞內部不斷發生的化學反應。

gept.example_en: Epidemiology investigates how diseases spread through populations and how to stop them.
gept.example_zh: 流行病學研究疾病如何在人群中傳播以及如何阻止它們。

gept.example_en: He studied criminology before joining the police force as a detective.
gept.example_zh: 他在加入警隊擔任偵探前先學了犯罪學。

gept.example_en: Demography helps the government predict how many new schools the city will need.
gept.example_zh: 人口統計學幫助政府預測該市需要多少新學校。

gept.example_en: The etymology of this word can be traced back to ancient Greek roots.
gept.example_zh: 這個字的詞源可追溯到古希臘字根。

gept.example_en: Musicology examines how musical styles have evolved across different cultures and centuries.
gept.example_zh: 音樂學研究音樂風格如何在不同文化和世紀中演變。

gept.example_en: Aesthetics asks important questions about what makes something genuinely beautiful or moving.
gept.example_zh: 美學提出重要問題：什麼讓某物真正美麗或感人。

gept.example_en: Semantics is the branch of linguistics that examines the meaning of words.
gept.example_zh: 語意學是語言學中研究字詞意義的分支。

gept.example_en: Phonetics studies how speech sounds are produced, transmitted, and perceived.
gept.example_zh: 語音學研究語音如何被產生、傳送和感知。

gept.example_en: Morphology examines how smaller meaningful parts combine to form complete words.
gept.example_zh: 構詞學研究較小的有意義部分如何組合成完整的字。

gept.example_en: Ancient Greek philosophers used dialectic discussion to sharpen ideas through structured debate.
gept.example_zh: 古希臘哲學家透過有結構的辯論用辯證法磨利思想。

gept.example_en: Ontology asks fundamental questions about what truly exists in the world.
gept.example_zh: 本體論提出關於世界中真正存在什麼的根本問題。

gept.example_en: Phenomenology examines how people actually experience the world from their own perspective.
gept.example_zh: 現象學研究人們如何從自己的觀點實際體驗世界。

gept.example_en: Try not to slouch in your chair during the important client meeting.
gept.example_zh: 在重要客戶會議中盡量別在椅子上彎腰駝背。

gept.example_en: She tends to lean forward slightly when she finds a conversation truly interesting.
gept.example_zh: 當她發現對話真的有趣時，往往會微微前傾。

gept.example_en: It is considered rude to stare at strangers in many cultures around the world.
gept.example_zh: 在世界許多文化中，盯著陌生人看被認為是失禮的。

gept.example_en: In Japan it is polite to bow when greeting someone older than you.
gept.example_zh: 在日本，向比自己年長的人問候時鞠躬是有禮貌的。

gept.example_en: The waiter saw her beckon politely and immediately came over to her table.
gept.example_zh: 服務生看到她禮貌地招手示意，立刻過來她的桌邊。

gept.example_en: The whole audience began to clap loudly the moment the final song ended.
gept.example_zh: 最後一首歌結束的那一刻，全場觀眾開始大聲鼓掌。

gept.example_en: He gave the dog a gentle pat on the head as a quiet reward.
gept.example_zh: 他輕拍狗狗的頭以作為安靜的獎賞。

gept.example_en: He used clear data to convince the committee that his plan would work.
gept.example_zh: 他用清楚的數據說服委員會相信他的計畫可行。

gept.example_en: After months of talks, both companies signed a profitable long-term agreement.
gept.example_zh: 經過數月談判，兩家公司簽署了一份有利可圖的長期協議。

gept.example_en: The negotiations reached a stalemate after both sides refused to make further concessions.
gept.example_zh: 雙方都拒絕進一步讓步後，談判陷入僵局。

gept.example_en: Both parties accepted the arbitrator's binding decision and moved on with their business.
gept.example_zh: 雙方接受仲裁人具約束力的決定並繼續他們的業務。

gept.example_en: A patient negotiator listens carefully before suggesting a creative compromise solution.
gept.example_zh: 有耐心的談判者會先仔細傾聽，再提出有創意的妥協方案。

gept.example_en: They submitted a detailed proposal to the board late on Friday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 他們在週五下午晚些時候向董事會提交了詳細的提案。

gept.example_en: Choosing a cheaper supplier is always a tradeoff between cost and product quality.
gept.example_zh: 選擇較便宜的供應商始終是成本與產品品質之間的取捨。

gept.example_en: The skilled officer worked to de-escalate the tense situation with calm questions.
gept.example_zh: 那位熟練的警官用平靜的問句努力緩和緊張局勢。

gept.example_en: In ancient Greece, champions were crowned with a laurel wreath as their prize.
gept.example_zh: 在古希臘，冠軍會被加冕桂冠作為獎賞。

gept.example_en: Each university has its own unique crest that symbolizes its long history.
gept.example_zh: 每所大學都有自己獨特的徽章象徵其悠久歷史。

gept.example_en: Each honoree gave a short emotional speech accepting their lifetime achievement award.
gept.example_zh: 每位受表揚者都發表了短暫感人的致詞，接受終身成就獎。

gept.example_en: The Nobel laureate delivered an inspiring lecture about her decades of patient research.
gept.example_zh: 那位諾貝爾桂冠得主就她數十年耐心研究發表了鼓舞人心的演講。

gept.example_en: The audience gave the conductor a long standing ovation after the brilliant performance.
gept.example_zh: 觀眾在精彩演出後給予指揮長時間的起立喝采。

gept.example_en: Loud applause filled the hall as the team walked onto the stage.
gept.example_zh: 當隊伍走上舞台時，響亮的掌聲充滿整個大廳。

gept.example_en: The concert was a moving tribute to musicians lost during the difficult year.
gept.example_zh: 這場音樂會是對那艱困一年中失去的音樂家動人的致敬。

gept.example_en: Each winner received a heavy bronze medallion engraved with the event's official emblem.
gept.example_zh: 每位優勝者都獲頒一面厚重的青銅大獎章，上面刻著大會的官方徽章。

gept.example_en: The firefighter received an official commendation for his brave rescue work last summer.
gept.example_zh: 那位消防員因去年夏天的勇敢救援工作獲得正式表揚。

gept.example_en: The young recruit gave a sharp salute as the senior officer walked past.
gept.example_zh: 當資深軍官走過時，那位年輕新兵敬了個利落的禮。

gept.example_en: The director paid homage to the classic film by including a subtle scene reference.
gept.example_zh: 那位導演透過放入一個細微的場景致敬經典電影。

gept.example_en: Her testimonial about the program convinced many parents to enroll their children too.
gept.example_zh: 她對這個計畫的推薦詞說服了許多父母也讓孩子報名。

gept.example_en: The swearing-in ceremony of the new president was broadcast around the country.
gept.example_zh: 新總統的宣誓就職典禮在全國播出。

gept.example_en: The closing ceremony of the games featured spectacular fireworks above the stadium.
gept.example_zh: 運動會的閉幕典禮以體育場上方壯觀的煙火為亮點。

gept.example_en: The unveiling of the new statue drew a large respectful crowd to the park.
gept.example_zh: 新雕像的揭幕儀式吸引大批恭敬的群眾來到公園。

gept.example_en: The annual charity gala raised over a million dollars for local schools.
gept.example_zh: 年度慈善盛會為當地學校募得超過一百萬元。

gept.example_en: The wedding banquet lasted four hours and featured ten elaborate delicious courses.
gept.example_zh: 婚宴持續四小時，包含十道精緻美味的菜餚。

gept.example_en: A long procession of musicians and dancers led the festival through the old streets.
gept.example_zh: 長長的音樂家和舞者隊伍帶領節慶穿過古老街道。

gept.example_en: The elder gave a warm blessing to the young couple before their long journey.
gept.example_zh: 長者在年輕情侶踏上長途旅程前給予溫暖的祝福。

gept.example_en: His homecoming after three years abroad was full of tears and warm hugs.
gept.example_zh: 他在國外三年後返鄉，充滿了淚水和溫暖的擁抱。

gept.example_en: The mayor performed the ribbon-cutting at the official opening of the new public library.
gept.example_zh: 市長在新公立圖書館的正式開幕中執行剪綵儀式。

gept.example_en: The groundbreaking for the new hospital is scheduled for next Monday morning.
gept.example_zh: 新醫院的動土典禮預計在下週一早上舉行。

gept.example_en: The christening of the new ship attracted a large crowd to the busy harbor.
gept.example_zh: 新船的命名儀式吸引大批群眾來到繁忙的港口。

gept.example_en: The consecration of the new chapel will take place this Sunday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 新教堂的祝聖典禮將於本週日下午舉行。

gept.example_en: The choir performed Mozart's beautiful requiem at the famous historic cathedral.
gept.example_zh: 合唱團在那座著名的歷史悠久大教堂演奏莫札特優美的安魂曲。

gept.example_en: The simple burial took place in the small cemetery beside the family farm.
gept.example_zh: 簡單的葬禮在家族農場旁的小墓園舉行。

gept.example_en: The colorful beadwork on her handbag took the artist over forty patient hours.
gept.example_zh: 她手提包上的彩色串珠工藝花了藝術家四十多個耐心的小時。

gept.example_en: A handmade dreamcatcher hung above the bed to protect the child from nightmares.
gept.example_zh: 床上方掛著一個手工捕夢網以保護孩子免於惡夢。

gept.example_en: He wrapped a traditional keffiyeh around his head to protect himself from the desert sun.
gept.example_zh: 他在頭上裹著傳統的阿拉伯頭巾以抵擋沙漠陽光。

gept.example_en: She had to squint at the small print of the long restaurant menu.
gept.example_zh: 她得瞇著眼才能看清楚那本長長餐單上的小字。

gept.example_en: The teammates exchanged a happy high-five after winning the close championship game.
gept.example_zh: 在贏得驚險的冠軍賽後，隊友們開心地擊掌慶祝。

gept.example_en: He offered an olive-branch to his rival by inviting him for a friendly lunch.
gept.example_zh: 他邀請對手吃頓友好的午餐，作為遞出橄欖枝的舉動。

gept.example_en: Many retirees prefer to invest in stable blue-chip stocks with regular dividend payments.
gept.example_zh: 許多退休人士偏好投資穩定的績優股，這類股票會定期配息。

gept.example_en: High volatility makes the market exciting for traders but scary for cautious investors.
gept.example_zh: 高波動性讓市場對交易員而言刺激，但對謹慎投資人來說令人害怕。

gept.example_en: Every investor should carefully read the prospectus before buying shares in a new fund.
gept.example_zh: 每位投資人在購買新基金股份前都應仔細閱讀公開說明書。

gept.example_en: The new filter blocks most spam messages before they reach your main inbox.
gept.example_zh: 新的篩選器在垃圾訊息抵達你的主要收件匣前就攔截了大部分。

gept.example_en: The country pledged to reach net-zero carbon emissions by the year twenty fifty.
gept.example_zh: 該國承諾在二零五零年達到淨零碳排放。

gept.example_en: The stack-trace clearly showed which function had thrown the unexpected error.
gept.example_zh: 堆疊追蹤清楚顯示是哪個函式拋出了非預期的錯誤。

gept.meaning_zh: (v.) 棄用；標示為過時不建議再用（軟體用語）
gept.example_en: The new framework deprecates the old configuration syntax in favor of YAML.
gept.example_zh: 新框架棄用舊的設定語法，改採 YAML。

gept.example_en: She spent the whole afternoon trying to debug a memory leak in the server.
gept.example_zh: 她整個下午都在除錯伺服器的記憶體洩漏問題。

gept.example_en: We added logging middleware to track every incoming request.
gept.example_zh: 我們加了日誌中介軟體來追蹤每一個進來的請求。

gept.example_en: The request payload was too large and got rejected by the gateway.
gept.example_zh: 請求的負載過大，被閘道器拒絕了。

gept.meaning_zh: (v.) 序列化（把物件轉成可儲存或傳輸的格式）
gept.example_en: You must serialize the object to JSON before sending it over the network.
gept.example_zh: 傳到網路上之前必須把物件序列化成 JSON。

gept.example_en: The client will deserialize the response into a list of user objects.
gept.example_zh: 客戶端會把回應反序列化成一串使用者物件。

gept.example_en: Modern web apps rely heavily on asynchronous calls to stay responsive.
gept.example_zh: 現代網頁應用大量依賴非同步呼叫來保持回應快速。

gept.example_en: Synchronous database queries can block the entire request thread.
gept.example_zh: 同步的資料庫查詢可能會卡住整條請求執行緒。

gept.example_en: Go was designed with concurrency in mind from the very beginning.
gept.example_zh: Go 從一開始就是為了並行而設計的。

gept.example_en: The video kept stopping to buffer because of the slow connection.
gept.example_zh: 因為連線太慢，影片不停停下來緩衝。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 快取；(v.) 把資料存入快取
gept.example_en: We cache the results of expensive queries for up to one hour.
gept.example_zh: 我們會把昂貴查詢的結果快取最多一小時。

gept.example_en: The API throttles clients that send more than one hundred requests per minute.
gept.example_zh: API 會節流每分鐘發超過一百次請求的客戶端。

gept.example_en: We rate-limit anonymous users to prevent abuse of the free tier.
gept.example_zh: 我們對匿名使用者限速，防止濫用免費方案。

gept.example_en: Nginx is used to load-balance traffic across three application servers.
gept.example_zh: 我們用 Nginx 在三台應用伺服器之間做負載平衡。

gept.example_en: We needed a more scalable architecture once we hit a million users.
gept.example_zh: 用戶到達一百萬之後，我們需要更具擴展性的架構。

gept.example_en: Horizontal scaling means adding more machines rather than upgrading one.
gept.example_zh: 水平擴展是指增加更多機器，而不是升級單一台機器。

gept.example_en: Vertical scaling can be simpler but has a hard ceiling on a single server.
gept.example_zh: 垂直擴展比較簡單，但在單機上會碰到硬上限。

gept.example_en: Each microservice runs in its own Docker container for isolation.
gept.example_zh: 每個微服務都在自己的 Docker 容器中執行以隔離環境。

gept.example_en: Kubernetes is the standard tool for container orchestration today.
gept.example_zh: Kubernetes 是今日容器編排的標準工具。

gept.example_en: Every deployment must pass automated tests before reaching production.
gept.example_zh: 每次部署在進到正式環境前都得通過自動化測試。

gept.example_en: Our CI pipeline runs unit tests, linting, and security scans in parallel.
gept.example_zh: 我們的 CI 管線會並行跑單元測試、靜態檢查和安全掃描。

gept.example_en: Please push your changes to the main repository after the review.
gept.example_zh: 審查通過後請把你的改動推到主程式碼倉庫。

gept.example_en: If the file is missing, the program throws a FileNotFound exception.
gept.example_zh: 如果檔案不見，程式會丟出一個 FileNotFound 例外。

gept.example_en: Pass a callback that will be invoked once the upload finishes.
gept.example_zh: 傳入一個回呼函式，上傳完成時它會被呼叫。

gept.example_en: The team prefers to iterate on small releases rather than ship one huge update.
gept.example_zh: 團隊偏好以小型發佈迭代，而不是一次推出一個大改版。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 抽象（隱藏複雜細節，只保留必要介面）
gept.example_en: A good abstraction hides messy internals behind a simple interface.
gept.example_zh: 好的抽象把混亂的內部隱藏在簡單的介面後面。

gept.example_en: Use a class to encapsulate the database connection and its helper methods.
gept.example_zh: 用類別把資料庫連線及其輔助方法封裝起來。

gept.example_en: Polymorphism lets the same method behave differently depending on the object.
gept.example_zh: 多型讓同一個方法因物件不同而表現不同。

gept.example_en: Avoid deep inheritance chains, since they make the code hard to follow.
gept.example_zh: 避免過深的繼承鏈，因為那會讓程式碼難以閱讀。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 樣板程式碼（重複的固定寫法）
gept.example_en: The new framework removes a lot of boilerplate that we used to write by hand.
gept.example_zh: 新框架去掉了很多以前要手寫的樣板程式碼。

gept.example_en: She shared a useful snippet for parsing dates across different locales.
gept.example_zh: 她分享了一段在不同語系下解析日期的實用程式片段。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 正規表達式（regular expression 的簡稱）
gept.example_en: A simple regex can quickly validate the format of an email address.
gept.example_zh: 一個簡單的正規表達式就能快速驗證電子郵件格式。

gept.example_en: Python syntax forces consistent indentation throughout every code block.
gept.example_zh: Python 語法要求每個程式區塊都要一致縮排。

gept.example_en: Use semantic HTML tags so screen readers can understand the page.
gept.example_zh: 使用語義化的 HTML 標籤，讓螢幕閱讀器能理解頁面。

gept.example_en: Proper indexing made the search query ten times faster.
gept.example_zh: 建好索引讓搜尋查詢快了十倍。

gept.example_en: The dashboard uses an aggregation pipeline to compute weekly active users.
gept.example_zh: 儀表板用聚合管線計算每週活躍使用者。

gept.example_en: The new server doubled the throughput without raising response times.
gept.example_zh: 新伺服器在不拉高回應時間下，把吞吐量翻了一倍。

gept.example_en: Players complained about high latency on the new game servers.
gept.example_zh: 玩家抱怨新遊戲伺服器的延遲很高。

gept.example_en: A regional outage took half of the data centers offline for two hours.
gept.example_zh: 一場區域性服務中斷讓一半的資料中心離線兩個小時。

gept.example_en: Every major outage is followed by a blameless postmortem meeting.
gept.example_zh: 每次重大停機後都會召開一場不究責的事後檢討會議。

gept.example_en: The contract has an automatic rollover unless either party objects.
gept.example_zh: 除非任一方反對，這份合約會自動延展。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 遙測（遠端收集到的運作資料）
gept.example_en: The mobile app sends telemetry so we can spot crashes early.
gept.example_zh: 行動應用會傳送遙測資料，讓我們能及早發現當機。

gept.example_en: Good observability means logs, metrics, and traces all flow into one tool.
gept.example_zh: 良好的可觀測性代表日誌、指標、追蹤都匯流到同一個工具。

gept.example_en: A regression test caught the bug before it reached customers.
gept.example_zh: 一個回歸測試在錯誤波及客戶之前就抓到了它。

gept.example_en: Read traffic is routed to replicas to reduce load on the primary server.
gept.example_zh: 讀取流量被導向複本，以減輕主伺服器的負擔。

gept.example_en: When the primary node crashed, failover to the standby was automatic.
gept.example_zh: 主節點當機時，會自動切換到備援節點。

gept.example_en: Redundancy in the network ensures that one broken cable does not disconnect the office.
gept.example_zh: 網路的冗餘設計確保一條斷線不會讓整間辦公室斷網。

gept.example_en: It only takes a minute to provision a new virtual machine in the cloud.
gept.example_zh: 在雲端配置一台新虛擬機只要一分鐘。

gept.example_en: Each team has its own Kubernetes namespace to keep workloads separated.
gept.example_zh: 每個團隊都有自己的 Kubernetes 命名空間以分隔工作負載。

gept.example_en: The app asked for permission to access the camera and microphone.
gept.example_zh: 這個應用程式要求存取相機和麥克風的權限。

gept.example_en: Without the private key, decryption of the message is practically impossible.
gept.example_zh: 沒有私鑰，解開那則訊息實際上不可能。

gept.example_en: The ciphertext looked like random noise until we applied the correct key.
gept.example_zh: 在套用正確金鑰之前，那段密文看起來就像隨機雜訊。

gept.example_en: Passwords are stored as a salted hash, not in plain text.
gept.example_zh: 密碼以加鹽雜湊形式儲存，並非以明文。

gept.example_en: Compare the checksum of the downloaded file to verify it was not tampered with.
gept.example_zh: 比對下載檔案的檢查和，確認它沒被竄改。

gept.example_en: The researcher disclosed a critical vulnerability in the popular library.
gept.example_zh: 研究員揭露了那個熱門函式庫的一個重大漏洞。

gept.meaning_zh: (v.) 利用；(n.) 漏洞利用程式
gept.example_en: Attackers exploit unpatched systems within hours of a public disclosure.
gept.example_zh: 攻擊者會在漏洞公開後幾小時內就利用尚未修補的系統。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 欺騙；偽冒（如偽造寄件人）
gept.example_en: Email spoofing makes a message appear to come from a trusted sender.
gept.example_zh: 電子郵件偽冒會讓訊息看起來像來自可信的寄件者。

gept.example_en: The intrusion detection system flagged unusual traffic from a foreign IP.
gept.example_zh: 入侵偵測系統標記了一個來自境外 IP 的異常流量。

gept.meaning_zh: (n./adj.) 零日（漏洞剛被發現尚未修補）
gept.example_en: A zero-day exploit can compromise systems before any patch exists.
gept.example_zh: 零日漏洞利用可能在任何修補出現前就攻陷系統。

gept.example_en: Regular patching is one of the simplest ways to reduce risk.
gept.example_zh: 定期打補丁是降低風險最簡單的方法之一。

gept.example_en: Spyware silently recorded everything she typed on her keyboard.
gept.example_zh: 間諜軟體無聲地記錄了她在鍵盤上輸入的一切。

gept.meaning_zh: (v.) 匿名化（移除可辨識個資）
gept.example_en: We anonymize all customer data before sharing it with the research team.
gept.example_zh: 我們在把資料分享給研究團隊前會匿名化所有客戶資料。

gept.example_en: Compliance with GDPR is required for any product handling EU customer data.
gept.example_zh: 處理歐盟客戶資料的任何產品都必須遵守 GDPR 規範。

gept.example_en: An external audit found several weaknesses in our access controls.
gept.example_zh: 一次外部稽核在我們的存取控制中找出多項弱點。

gept.example_en: Blockchain works like a shared ledger that no single party controls.
gept.example_zh: 區塊鏈像是一本沒有任何單一方掌控的共享帳本。

gept.example_en: The server returns an access token that expires after one hour.
gept.example_zh: 伺服器會回傳一個一小時後過期的存取 token。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 過擬合（過度學習訓練資料）
gept.example_en: The model showed clear signs of overfitting on the small training set.
gept.example_zh: 模型在這個小型訓練集上出現明顯的過擬合跡象。

gept.example_en: Underfitting suggests the model is too simple for the underlying pattern.
gept.example_zh: 欠擬合代表模型對於背後的規律來說太過簡單。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 嵌入向量（把文字或物件轉成向量表示）
gept.example_en: Each word is converted into an embedding before being fed to the network.
gept.example_zh: 每個字在送入網路前都會被轉換成一個嵌入向量。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 切詞；分詞（把文字切成 token）
gept.example_en: Tokenization splits text into smaller pieces the model can understand.
gept.example_zh: 切詞會把文字切成模型能理解的較小單位。

gept.example_en: We fine-tune the base model on legal documents for our customers.
gept.example_zh: 我們會在法律文件上微調基礎模型，給我們的客戶使用。

gept.meaning_zh: (v.) 幻覺；（AI 用語）杜撰錯誤資訊
gept.example_en: Large language models sometimes hallucinate facts that sound plausible but are false.
gept.example_zh: 大型語言模型有時會幻覺出聽起來合理但其實錯誤的資訊。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 提示；提示詞；(adj.) 迅速的
gept.example_en: A well-crafted prompt can dramatically improve the model's response quality.
gept.example_zh: 精心設計的提示詞能大幅提升模型回應的品質。

gept.meaning_zh: (adj.) 有監督的（有標註資料的學習）
gept.example_en: Supervised learning requires a large dataset with high-quality labels.
gept.example_zh: 有監督學習需要大量含高品質標註的資料集。

gept.meaning_zh: (adj.) 非監督的（無標註資料的學習）
gept.example_en: Clustering is a classic example of unsupervised learning.
gept.example_zh: 分群是非監督學習的經典例子。

gept.example_en: A deep neural network has many hidden layers between input and output.
gept.example_zh: 深度神經網路在輸入與輸出之間有許多隱藏層。

gept.example_en: Gradient descent gradually adjusts the weights to reduce the error.
gept.example_zh: 梯度下降會逐步調整權重以降低誤差。

gept.example_en: A simple regression-model can predict house prices from a handful of features.
gept.example_zh: 一個簡單的回歸模型就能用少數幾個特徵預測房價。

gept.example_en: The spam classifier reaches over ninety-nine percent accuracy on new emails.
gept.example_zh: 這個垃圾郵件分類器在新郵件上達到超過百分之九十九的準確率。

gept.example_en: The system flags any anomaly in spending as a possible fraud.
gept.example_zh: 系統會把任何消費異常標記為可能的詐欺。

gept.example_en: When the perfect answer is too slow, we fall back to a simple heuristic.
gept.example_zh: 當完美的答案太慢時，我們改用簡單的啟發式方法。

gept.example_en: Good feature-engineering often matters more than the choice of model.
gept.example_zh: 好的特徵工程通常比模型的選擇還重要。

gept.example_en: Our data-pipeline cleans and aggregates logs before storing them in the warehouse.
gept.example_zh: 我們的資料管線會在把日誌存進資料倉儲前先清洗並彙整。

gept.example_en: The data warehouse holds years of historical sales data for analysis.
gept.example_zh: 資料倉儲存放著多年來可供分析的歷史銷售資料。

gept.example_en: A clear visualization makes the data far easier to interpret than a long table.
gept.example_zh: 清楚的視覺化遠比長長的表格更容易讓人解讀資料。

gept.example_en: Her cofounder handles engineering while she leads sales and marketing.
gept.example_zh: 她的共同創辦人負責工程，她則主導業務與行銷。

gept.example_en: The fundraising round closed two weeks earlier than the team expected.
gept.example_zh: 這輪募資比團隊預期提早兩週結束。

gept.meaning_zh: (v.) 自力創業（不靠外部投資）
gept.example_en: They decided to bootstrap the company instead of raising venture capital.
gept.example_zh: 他們決定自力創業，而不去募創投資金。

gept.example_en: The incubator offers office space, mentorship, and a small starting grant.
gept.example_zh: 這個育成中心提供辦公空間、導師指導和一小筆啟動補助。

gept.example_en: The accelerator program runs for three months and ends in a demo day.
gept.example_zh: 加速器計畫為期三個月，最後以一場展示日作結。

gept.example_en: Several venture firms competed to lead the next funding round.
gept.example_zh: 好幾家創投公司爭著要領投下一輪募資。

gept.example_en: Issuing new shares causes dilution for all existing investors.
gept.example_zh: 發行新股會稀釋所有現有投資人的持股。

gept.example_en: We need to lower the burn-rate before talking to new investors.
gept.example_zh: 在跟新投資人談之前，我們得先降低燒錢速度。

gept.example_en: The company prioritizes growth over short-term profitability.
gept.example_zh: 公司把成長擺在短期獲利能力之前。

gept.example_en: Hardware businesses usually have lower margins than software ones.
gept.example_zh: 硬體生意的利潤率通常比軟體生意低。

gept.example_en: Subscriptions have become our most reliable revenue-stream.
gept.example_zh: 訂閱已成為我們最穩定的收入來源。

gept.example_en: Most software companies now sell their products on a subscription basis.
gept.example_zh: 多數軟體公司現在都採訂閱制販售產品。

gept.meaning_zh: (n./adj.) 免費增值（基本免費，進階收費）
gept.example_en: The app uses a freemium model with optional paid features.
gept.example_zh: 這個應用程式採免費增值模式，附帶可選的付費功能。

gept.example_en: It took two years to figure out how to monetize the popular free app.
gept.example_zh: 他們花了兩年才搞清楚怎麼讓這款熱門免費應用變現。

gept.example_en: Reducing churn is as valuable as acquiring new customers.
gept.example_zh: 降低流失率和取得新客戶一樣有價值。

gept.example_en: The acquisition gave the company instant access to a new market.
gept.example_zh: 這次收購讓公司立刻打入一個新市場。

gept.example_en: The divestiture of the loss-making division improved the parent company's margins.
gept.example_zh: 出售那個虧損部門讓母公司的利潤率改善了。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 首次公開發行（Initial Public Offering 的縮寫）
gept.example_en: The company is preparing for an IPO on the New York Stock Exchange.
gept.example_zh: 這家公司正準備在紐約證交所首次公開發行。

gept.example_en: Depreciation of the new equipment is spread over five years.
gept.example_zh: 新設備的折舊會分攤在五年內。

gept.example_en: Amortization of the loan reduces the outstanding balance every month.
gept.example_zh: 貸款的攤銷讓未償餘額每個月都減少。

gept.example_en: Even profitable businesses can fail because of weak cashflow.
gept.example_zh: 即使有獲利的公司也可能因現金流不佳而倒閉。

gept.example_en: Accounts receivable are amounts owed to the company by its customers.
gept.example_zh: 應收帳款是客戶積欠公司的金額。

gept.example_en: Accounts payable show what the company still owes its suppliers.
gept.example_zh: 應付帳款顯示公司仍欠供應商的金額。

gept.example_en: The audit-report highlighted weaknesses in inventory controls.
gept.example_zh: 稽核報告指出存貨控管上的弱點。

gept.example_en: Government expenditure on healthcare has risen sharply this decade.
gept.example_zh: 本十年政府在醫療上的支出明顯上升。

gept.example_en: Our projection assumes a fifteen percent growth rate next year.
gept.example_zh: 我們的預測假設明年有百分之十五的成長率。

gept.example_en: The government announced a major stimulus package to revive growth.
gept.example_zh: 政府宣布一項重大振興方案以重新帶動成長。

gept.example_en: Logistics costs jumped when fuel prices doubled within a year.
gept.example_zh: 燃料價格在一年內翻倍，物流成本也跟著大漲。

gept.example_en: The store ran out of warehouse-stock before the holiday season ended.
gept.example_zh: 假期還沒結束，這家店的倉庫庫存就已售罄。

gept.example_en: Inventory was reduced by forty percent through the year-end clearance sale.
gept.example_zh: 年終清倉特賣把存貨減少了百分之四十。

gept.example_en: Procurement negotiated a long-term contract with the new supplier.
gept.example_zh: 採購部跟新供應商談下了一份長期合約。

gept.example_en: The retail-chain opened twenty new stores across the country last year.
gept.example_zh: 這家連鎖零售店去年在全國各地開了二十家新店。

gept.example_en: Ecommerce sales now account for nearly half of the company's revenue.
gept.example_zh: 電子商務銷售如今幾乎占公司營收的一半。

gept.example_en: Independent sellers can list their products on the online marketplace for free.
gept.example_zh: 獨立賣家可以免費把商品上架到這個線上交易平台。

gept.example_en: The new landing page improved conversion by almost thirty percent.
gept.example_zh: 新的到達頁面把轉換率提升了將近百分之三十。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 名單開發；引導潛在客戶
gept.example_en: The webinar is mainly a lead-generation tool for the sales team.
gept.example_zh: 這場線上講座主要是業務團隊的名單開發工具。

gept.example_en: Cold outreach is still effective when the message is personalized.
gept.example_zh: 陌生開發只要訊息夠個人化，仍然相當有效。

gept.example_en: Consistent branding across channels helps customers recognize the company instantly.
gept.example_zh: 跨通路一致的品牌塑造能讓顧客立刻認出這家公司。

gept.example_en: The new positioning targets young professionals in large cities.
gept.example_zh: 新的市場定位鎖定大都市裡的年輕專業人士。

gept.example_en: Customer segmentation lets us send more relevant offers to each group.
gept.example_zh: 客戶分眾讓我們能對每個族群發送更相關的優惠。

gept.example_en: Tests showed the lump was benign and required no further treatment.
gept.example_zh: 檢查顯示那個腫塊是良性，不需要進一步治療。

gept.example_en: A malignant tumor can spread to other parts of the body if untreated.
gept.example_zh: 惡性腫瘤若不治療，可能擴散到身體其他部位。

gept.example_en: She has lived with chronic back pain for nearly twenty years.
gept.example_zh: 她已經與慢性背痛共處將近二十年。

gept.example_en: Acute pain in the chest can signal a serious cardiac problem.
gept.example_zh: 胸口的急性疼痛可能代表嚴重的心臟問題。

gept.example_en: Doctors gave a hopeful prognosis after the early-stage diagnosis.
gept.example_zh: 在早期診斷之後，醫師給出了樂觀的預後。

gept.example_en: Fatigue is a common symptom of many different illnesses.
gept.example_zh: 疲倦是許多不同疾病的常見症狀。

gept.example_en: The blood test measures the level of antibodies against the virus.
gept.example_zh: 這項血液檢查會測量對抗該病毒的抗體濃度。

gept.example_en: Each vaccine introduces an antigen that trains the immune system.
gept.example_zh: 每種疫苗都會引入一種抗原來訓練免疫系統。

gept.example_en: The new pathogen spread quickly through international travel networks.
gept.example_zh: 這種新病原體透過國際旅行網路快速擴散。

gept.example_en: Health authorities quickly contained the outbreak before it spread further.
gept.example_zh: 衛生當局在疫情擴散前就迅速控制住了這次爆發。

gept.example_en: Measles is one of the most infectious diseases known to medicine.
gept.example_zh: 麻疹是醫學上已知傳染性最強的疾病之一。

gept.example_en: Pharmacology studies how drugs interact with the human body.
gept.example_zh: 藥理學研究藥物如何與人體交互作用。

gept.example_en: Drowsiness is a common side-effect of many cold medications.
gept.example_zh: 嗜睡是許多感冒藥常見的副作用。

gept.example_en: The drug must complete three phases of clinical-trial testing before approval.
gept.example_zh: 這款藥必須完成三期臨床試驗測試才能獲准上市。

gept.example_en: Carbon dating relies on the slow decay of a radioactive isotope.
gept.example_zh: 碳定年法仰賴一種放射性同位素的緩慢衰變。

gept.example_en: Radioactive waste must be stored safely for thousands of years.
gept.example_zh: 放射性廢料必須安全存放數千年。

gept.example_en: Physicists smash particles together to discover the building blocks of matter.
gept.example_zh: 物理學家撞擊粒子以發現物質的基本構成。

gept.example_en: Nuclear fusion could one day provide nearly limitless clean energy.
gept.example_zh: 核融合也許有一天能提供幾乎無限的乾淨能源。

gept.example_en: Today's nuclear power plants generate electricity from controlled fission.
gept.example_zh: 現今的核電廠是透過受控核分裂發電的。

gept.example_en: Gravity pulls every object toward the center of the earth.
gept.example_zh: 重力把每個物體拉向地球中心。

gept.example_en: The velocity of the rocket changes as it climbs through the atmosphere.
gept.example_zh: 火箭穿越大氣層時，它的速度會持續變化。

gept.example_en: Each neuron in the brain connects to thousands of others.
gept.example_zh: 大腦裡每個神經元都與數千個其他神經元相連。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 突觸（神經元之間的連結）
gept.example_en: Signals jump from one neuron to the next across a tiny synapse.
gept.example_zh: 訊號透過一個極小的突觸從一個神經元跳到下一個。

gept.example_en: The prefrontal cortex helps us plan and control our impulses.
gept.example_zh: 前額葉皮質幫助我們規劃並控制衝動。

gept.example_en: An enzyme in the saliva starts breaking down starch as you chew.
gept.example_zh: 唾液中的一種酵素會在你咀嚼時開始分解澱粉。

gept.example_en: Stress hormones rise when the body senses a sudden threat.
gept.example_zh: 當身體感受到突如其來的威脅時，壓力荷爾蒙會上升。

gept.example_en: Scientists sequenced the entire human genome about two decades ago.
gept.example_zh: 科學家在大約二十年前完成了整個人類基因體的定序。

gept.example_en: A single mutation in the gene can dramatically change protein behavior.
gept.example_zh: 基因中單一突變就可能大幅改變蛋白質的行為。

gept.example_en: A single offshore wind-turbine can power hundreds of homes.
gept.example_zh: 一台離岸風力發電機就能供應數百戶家庭用電。

gept.example_en: Some airlines have begun mixing biofuel with traditional jet fuel.
gept.example_zh: 有些航空公司已開始把生質燃料與傳統噴射機燃料混合使用。

gept.example_en: Methane is a far more potent greenhouse-gas than carbon dioxide.
gept.example_zh: 甲烷是比二氧化碳強得多的溫室氣體。

gept.example_en: Eating less meat is one way to shrink your carbon-footprint.
gept.example_zh: 少吃肉是縮小你碳足跡的方法之一。

gept.example_en: The company buys carbon credits to offset emissions from its corporate flights.
gept.example_zh: 這家公司購買碳權，以抵銷公司航班產生的排放。

gept.example_en: Modern water filtration removes nearly all bacteria and many chemicals.
gept.example_zh: 現代的水過濾幾乎能除去所有細菌與許多化學物質。

gept.example_en: Coastal cities increasingly rely on desalination during long droughts.
gept.example_zh: 沿海城市在長期乾旱期間越來越依賴海水淡化。

gept.example_en: Annual calibration of the sensors keeps the readings reliable over time.
gept.example_zh: 每年校準感測器能讓讀數長期保持可靠。

gept.example_en: Engineers found structural damage to the bridge after the earthquake.
gept.example_zh: 工程師在地震後發現橋梁出現結構上的損傷。

gept.example_en: A small mechanical failure caused the entire production line to stop.
gept.example_zh: 一個小小的機械故障讓整條生產線停了下來。

gept.example_en: Strong investigative journalism is essential for a healthy democracy.
gept.example_zh: 強而有力的調查報導對健全的民主來說至關重要。

gept.example_en: A catchy slogan helped the brand stick in people's minds.
gept.example_zh: 一句朗朗上口的口號讓這個品牌深植人心。

gept.example_en: The new tagline focuses on simplicity rather than technical specifications.
gept.example_zh: 新的廣告標語著重於簡約，而不是技術規格。

gept.example_en: Her social media feed is filled with photos from her recent trip.
gept.example_zh: 她的社群媒體動態被最近一趟旅行的照片塞滿。

gept.meaning_zh: (adj.) 演算法的；由演算法決定的
gept.example_en: Algorithmic recommendations decide what most users see on the platform.
gept.example_zh: 演算法推薦決定了多數使用者在平台上看到的內容。

gept.example_en: Content moderation balances free expression with user safety.
gept.example_zh: 內容管理在言論自由與使用者安全之間取得平衡。

gept.example_en: The company sent out a press-release to announce its new partnership.
gept.example_zh: 這家公司發出新聞稿宣布新的合作關係。

gept.example_en: A spokesperson declined to comment on the ongoing investigation.
gept.example_zh: 發言人拒絕對正在進行中的調查發表評論。

gept.example_en: The committee voted to formally censure the official for misconduct.
gept.example_zh: 委員會表決正式譴責這名官員的不當行為。

gept.example_en: The magazine landed an exclusive interview with the reclusive author.
gept.example_zh: 這本雜誌爭取到與這位深居簡出的作家的獨家訪問。

gept.example_en: The young reporter got a major scoop on the corruption scandal.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕記者搶到了這起貪污醜聞的重大獨家。

gept.example_en: The Sunday paper ran a long feature-story on the city's housing crisis.
gept.example_zh: 週日報刊登了一篇關於城市住房危機的長篇特寫報導。

gept.example_en: She became the youngest byliner ever on the magazine's front page.
gept.example_zh: 她成為這本雜誌封面有史以來最年輕的署名作者。

gept.example_en: Employee stakeholding can align personal incentives with company success.
gept.example_zh: 員工持股能讓個人誘因與公司成功保持一致。

gept.example_en: Remote-work has become a standard option at many technology companies.
gept.example_zh: 遠端工作已成為許多科技公司的標準選項。

gept.example_en: Proper offboarding ensures access to sensitive systems is revoked quickly.
gept.example_zh: 妥善的離職流程能確保敏感系統的權限被迅速收回。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 技術堆疊；一疊；(v.) 堆疊
gept.example_en: The team is comfortable with a modern stack of Go, React, and PostgreSQL.
gept.example_zh: 團隊熟悉以 Go、React、PostgreSQL 組成的現代技術堆疊。

gept.example_en: Better tooling can reduce build times and developer frustration.
gept.example_zh: 更好的工具鏈能縮短建置時間並減少開發者的挫折感。

gept.example_en: The throughline of the article is that small changes compound over time.
gept.example_zh: 這篇文章的主軸是：小小的改變會隨時間積累放大。

gept.meaning_zh: (v./n.) 程式碼風格檢查；纖維屑
gept.example_en: The CI pipeline will lint every file before allowing the build to pass.
gept.example_zh: CI 管線會先檢查每個檔案的程式碼風格，建置才能通過。

gept.example_en: A good linter catches many small mistakes long before review.
gept.example_zh: 好的程式碼檢查工具能在審查之前就抓出許多小錯誤。

gept.example_en: We added a small shim so the new library could work on old browsers.
gept.example_zh: 我們加了一小段相容層程式碼，讓新函式庫能在舊瀏覽器上運作。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 相容性補丁（補上瀏覽器缺的功能）
gept.example_en: The polyfill provides modern array methods for users on older browsers.
gept.example_zh: 這個相容性補丁讓使用舊瀏覽器的用戶也能用上新的陣列方法。

gept.meaning_zh: (v.) 轉譯（一種程式語言轉成另一種）
gept.example_en: We transpile TypeScript into JavaScript before deploying to production.
gept.example_zh: 我們會先把 TypeScript 轉譯成 JavaScript，再部署到正式環境。

gept.example_en: Modern bundler tools can split code into many small chunks for faster loading.
gept.example_zh: 現代打包工具能把程式切成許多小區塊，加快載入速度。

gept.example_en: We minify JavaScript and CSS files to reduce page load time.
gept.example_zh: 我們會把 JavaScript 和 CSS 檔案壓縮以縮短頁面載入時間。

gept.example_en: Throttling protects the API from sudden traffic spikes.
gept.example_zh: 節流能保護 API 不受突發流量衝擊。

gept.example_en: Heavy queueing of jobs slowed down the entire processing system.
gept.example_zh: 大量工作排隊讓整個處理系統慢了下來。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 扇出（一筆訊息分送到多個消費者）
gept.example_en: The notification service uses a fanout pattern to reach all subscribers.
gept.example_zh: 通知服務用扇出模式把訊息送到所有訂閱者。

gept.meaning_zh: (adj.) 等冪的（重複執行結果不變）
gept.example_en: Make the API idempotent so retried calls do not cause duplicate orders.
gept.example_zh: 把 API 做成等冪的，重試的呼叫才不會造成重複訂單。

gept.example_en: Stateful services need careful handling when failing over to a replica.
gept.example_zh: 有狀態的服務在切換到副本時需要小心處理。

gept.meaning_zh: (v.) 容器化（包進 Docker 等容器）
gept.example_en: We containerize every microservice for consistent deployment across clouds.
gept.example_zh: 我們把每個微服務都容器化，以便在不同雲端做一致部署。

gept.example_en: Splitting the monolith into microservices let each team release on its own schedule.
gept.example_zh: 把單體拆成微服務後，各團隊都能依自己的時程發版。

gept.example_en: The old monolith was hard to update without breaking unrelated features.
gept.example_zh: 舊的單體應用程式很難在不弄壞其他功能下做更新。

gept.example_en: Decoupling the modules makes it far easier to test each one independently.
gept.example_zh: 把模組解耦能讓每一個都更容易獨立測試。

gept.example_en: The command-line tool can scaffold a new project in under a minute.
gept.example_zh: 這個命令列工具可以在一分鐘內產生一個新專案的骨架。

gept.example_en: Our deployment settings are stored in a single yaml file at the project root.
gept.example_zh: 我們的部署設定都放在專案根目錄的一個 YAML 檔裡。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) WebSocket（一種雙向即時通訊協定）
gept.example_en: The chat app uses a websocket to push new messages instantly.
gept.example_zh: 聊天應用用 WebSocket 即時推送新訊息。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) Webhook（事件觸發的反向回呼網址）
gept.example_en: GitHub will call a webhook every time someone opens a pull request.
gept.example_zh: 每次有人開 PR，GitHub 都會呼叫一個 webhook。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) REST API（一種網路服務介面風格）
gept.example_en: The mobile app talks to our backend through a simple rest-api.
gept.example_zh: 行動應用透過一個簡單的 REST API 與我們的後端溝通。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) GraphQL（一種彈性查詢的 API 規範）
gept.example_en: GraphQL lets the client ask for exactly the fields it needs.
gept.example_zh: GraphQL 讓客戶端能精準索取它真正需要的欄位。

gept.example_en: Attackers spoof the sender address to make phishing emails look real.
gept.example_zh: 攻擊者偽造寄件人地址，讓釣魚信看起來像真的。

gept.example_en: The official patcher applies updates without removing user settings.
gept.example_zh: 官方修補工具在套用更新時不會移除使用者設定。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 取得系統最高權限（手機 root）；扎根
gept.example_en: Rooting your phone voids the warranty in most countries.
gept.example_zh: 幫手機 root 在多數國家會讓保固失效。

gept.example_en: Please whitelist our domain so confirmation emails reach your inbox.
gept.example_zh: 請把我們的網域加入白名單，確認信才能送達你的信箱。

gept.example_en: The site blacklists IPs that fail to log in more than ten times in a row.
gept.example_zh: 這個網站會把連續失敗登入超過十次的 IP 列入黑名單。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 驗證碼（區分真人與機器人）
gept.example_en: A captcha appears whenever the system detects suspicious automated traffic.
gept.example_zh: 系統偵測到可疑的自動化流量時，就會出現驗證碼。

gept.example_en: Strict underwriting standards lowered the bank's default rate.
gept.example_zh: 嚴格的承保標準降低了銀行的違約率。

gept.example_en: Only creditworthy applicants will be approved for the lowest interest rate.
gept.example_zh: 只有信用良好的申請者才能獲准享有最低利率。

gept.example_en: She bought an annuity that pays a fixed amount every month after retirement.
gept.example_zh: 她買了一張退休後每月給付固定金額的年金。

gept.example_en: Traders look for arbitrage opportunities between different exchanges.
gept.example_zh: 交易員會在不同交易所之間尋找套利機會。

gept.example_en: Migrant workers remit billions of dollars to their home countries each year.
gept.example_zh: 外籍移工每年向母國匯出數十億美元。

gept.example_en: Investment advisors have a fiduciary duty to put clients' interests first.
gept.example_zh: 投資顧問負有把客戶利益放在第一位的受託責任。

gept.example_en: The shopkeeper wrote every transaction by hand in a thick ledger-book.
gept.example_zh: 店主把每一筆交易都親手寫在厚厚的帳冊裡。

gept.example_en: Any delay in production has a downstream effect on delivery times.
gept.example_zh: 生產上任何延誤都會對交貨時間造成下游影響。

gept.example_en: We import most of our upstream components from two factories overseas.
gept.example_zh: 我們大多數的上游零件是從海外兩家工廠進口的。

gept.example_en: A long stockout of the popular model pushed customers to competitors.
gept.example_zh: 這款熱門機型長時間缺貨，把顧客推向競爭對手。

gept.meaning_zh: (n./v.) 延期交貨訂單；積欠訂單
gept.example_en: The store placed the items on backorder for at least three weeks.
gept.example_zh: 店家把這些商品列為至少要三週的延期交貨訂單。

gept.example_en: Fast fulfillment is one of the company's biggest competitive advantages.
gept.example_zh: 快速訂單履行是這家公司最大的競爭優勢之一。

gept.example_en: Each product has a lifecycle of introduction, growth, maturity, and decline.
gept.example_zh: 每樣產品都有導入期、成長期、成熟期與衰退期。

gept.example_en: We compare retention rates between each monthly signup cohort.
gept.example_zh: 我們會比較每月註冊同期群組的留存率。

gept.meaning_zh: (v./n.) 向上銷售（推薦更高階方案）
gept.example_en: The waiter tried to upsell us on a more expensive bottle of wine.
gept.example_zh: 服務生試圖向我們推銷一瓶更貴的酒。

gept.meaning_zh: (v./n.) 交叉銷售（推薦相關商品）
gept.example_en: Banks often cross-sell credit cards to their existing checking customers.
gept.example_zh: 銀行常向既有的支票帳戶客戶交叉銷售信用卡。

gept.example_en: Evergreen content keeps attracting traffic for years after publication.
gept.example_zh: 常青內容在發布多年後仍能持續吸引流量。

gept.example_en: The new packaging line doubled the throughput-rate of the warehouse.
gept.example_zh: 新的包裝線讓倉庫的吞吐速率翻了一倍。

gept.example_en: Dopamine is a neurotransmitter linked to motivation and reward.
gept.example_zh: 多巴胺是一種與動機和獎勵有關的神經傳導物質。

gept.example_en: Damage to the vasculature can lead to serious circulation problems.
gept.example_zh: 血管系統受損可能造成嚴重的循環問題。

gept.example_en: Regular aerobic exercise lowers the risk of cardiovascular disease.
gept.example_zh: 規律有氧運動能降低心血管疾病的風險。

gept.example_en: Smoking damages the lining of the entire respiratory system.
gept.example_zh: 抽菸會傷害整個呼吸系統的內襯。

gept.example_en: Gastrointestinal symptoms led the doctor to order more tests.
gept.example_zh: 胃腸方面的症狀讓醫生安排了更多檢查。

gept.example_en: It took six months to rehabilitate her knee after the surgery.
gept.example_zh: 她的膝蓋在手術後花了六個月才復健完畢。

gept.example_en: Telemedicine became a routine option for follow-up visits after the pandemic.
gept.example_zh: 在疫情過後，遠距醫療成為複診的常規選項。

gept.example_en: Her wearable tracks heart rate and sleep quality every night.
gept.example_zh: 她的穿戴式裝置每晚都會追蹤心率與睡眠品質。

gept.example_en: Photovoltaic panels turn sunlight directly into electricity.
gept.example_zh: 光伏面板能把陽光直接轉換成電力。

gept.example_en: A typical home consumes a few kilowatt-hours of electricity each day.
gept.example_zh: 一般家庭每天用電大約幾度（千瓦時）。

gept.example_en: The new solar farm can produce two hundred megawatts of electricity.
gept.example_zh: 這個新太陽能電廠能產出兩百兆瓦的電力。

gept.example_en: Fine particulate pollution can travel deep into the lungs.
gept.example_zh: 細懸浮微粒污染可能深入肺部。

gept.example_en: Long exposure to ultraviolet light can damage the skin and eyes.
gept.example_zh: 長時間暴露在紫外線下會傷害皮膚與眼睛。

gept.example_en: Researchers use satellite-data to track changes in forest cover worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 研究人員用衛星資料追蹤全球森林覆蓋的變化。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 聯合發稿；節目轉播聯播
gept.example_en: The column reaches millions through syndication to over a hundred papers.
gept.example_zh: 這個專欄透過超過一百家報紙的聯合發稿觸及數百萬人。

gept.example_en: The candidate kept her answer to a memorable ten-second soundbite.
gept.example_zh: 這位候選人把她的回答控制成一句讓人印象深刻、十秒鐘的短話。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 單一程式倉庫（多專案放同一 repo）
gept.example_en: Switching to a monorepo simplified dependency management across the teams.
gept.example_zh: 改用單一程式倉庫讓跨團隊的依賴管理變簡單了。

gept.example_en: The templating engine fills placeholders with values from the database.
gept.example_zh: 樣板引擎會用資料庫的值填入預留欄位。

gept.example_en: The default throttle-rate of one hundred requests per minute is enough for most clients.
gept.example_zh: 每分鐘一百次請求的預設限流速率對多數客戶端來說已經足夠。

gept.example_en: The satellite uplink kept the remote camp connected throughout the storm.
gept.example_zh: 衛星上行連結讓這個偏遠營地在整場風暴期間都保持連線。

gept.example_en: The downlink delivered weather data from the satellite every fifteen minutes.
gept.example_zh: 下行連結每十五分鐘把氣象資料從衛星傳下來。

gept.example_en: An ergonomic chair can prevent long-term back pain for office workers.
gept.example_zh: 符合人體工學的椅子能預防上班族長期的背痛。

gept.example_en: Civics class taught us how local government works and why voting matters.
gept.example_zh: 公民課教我們地方政府如何運作，以及投票為何重要。

gept.example_en: Each municipality manages its own water supply and waste collection services.
gept.example_zh: 每個自治市管理自己的供水和垃圾收集服務。

gept.example_en: The small township holds an annual fair to celebrate its founding.
gept.example_zh: 這個小鎮區每年舉辦市集慶祝建鎮。

gept.example_en: Tokyo is a sprawling metropolis with one of the largest populations in the world.
gept.example_zh: 東京是一座龐大的大都會，人口位居世界前列。

gept.example_en: The demographics of this neighborhood have shifted dramatically in the past decade.
gept.example_zh: 這個社區的人口結構在過去十年發生了劇烈變化。

gept.example_en: The festival celebrates the city's diverse ethnic communities through food and music.
gept.example_zh: 這個節慶透過飲食與音樂慶祝城市多元的族群社區。

gept.example_en: Many tribal communities still preserve their ancient languages and customs.
gept.example_zh: 許多部落社群仍然保存著古老的語言與習俗。

gept.example_en: The museum displays aboriginal artwork created over thousands of years.
gept.example_zh: 博物館展出創作於數千年前的原住民藝術品。

gept.example_en: Many migrant workers travel north each summer to harvest fruit.
gept.example_zh: 許多移工每年夏天往北遷移採收水果。

gept.example_en: Thousands of families migrate from the countryside to cities every year.
gept.example_zh: 每年有成千上萬的家庭從鄉村遷移到城市。

gept.example_en: It can take years for newcomers to assimilate into a foreign culture.
gept.example_zh: 新移民可能需要數年才能融入異國文化。

gept.example_en: The school works hard to integrate students from many different backgrounds.
gept.example_zh: 學校努力讓來自不同背景的學生融合在一起。

gept.example_en: Singapore is famous for being a vibrant multicultural society.
gept.example_zh: 新加坡以其活力充沛的多元文化社會聞名。

gept.example_en: A tolerant society welcomes different viewpoints and ways of life.
gept.example_zh: 寬容的社會歡迎不同的觀點與生活方式。

gept.example_en: Stereotyping people by appearance is unfair and often inaccurate.
gept.example_zh: 依外表將人定型既不公平也常不準確。

gept.example_en: Schools have launched programs aimed at preventing racism among young students.
gept.example_zh: 學校已推出旨在防止學生間種族歧視的計畫。

gept.example_en: Sexism in the workplace can prevent women from being promoted fairly.
gept.example_zh: 職場性別歧視可能使女性無法公平地獲得升遷。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 女性主義者 (adj.) 女性主義的
gept.example_en: Her grandmother was a feminist who fought for equal voting rights.
gept.example_zh: 她的祖母是位女性主義者，曾為平等投票權奮鬥。

gept.example_en: A peaceful demonstration filled the city square on Saturday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 週六下午一場和平的示威擠滿了市中心廣場。

gept.example_en: Smartphones have brought a revolutionary change to how we communicate.
gept.example_zh: 智慧型手機為我們的溝通方式帶來革命性的改變。

gept.example_en: Teenagers often show rebellion by dressing differently from their parents.
gept.example_zh: 青少年常以與父母不同的穿著表現叛逆。

gept.example_en: He chose to rebel against the strict rules of the household.
gept.example_zh: 他選擇反抗家中嚴格的規矩。

gept.example_en: Polling stations opened at seven in the morning across the country.
gept.example_zh: 全國各地的投票所早上七點開放。

gept.example_en: She has been fascinated by politics ever since high school debate club.
gept.example_zh: 她自高中辯論社以來就對政治深感興趣。

gept.example_en: The retiring senator was respected as a wise and patient statesman.
gept.example_zh: 這位即將退休的參議員被視為睿智且耐心的政治家。

gept.example_en: A diplomatic answer can avoid hurting anyone's feelings.
gept.example_zh: 圓滑的回答可以避免傷害任何人的感受。

gept.example_en: The country faced economic sanctions after the human rights report.
gept.example_zh: 該國在人權報告發布後面臨經濟制裁。

gept.example_en: Each legislator must carefully read every bill before voting.
gept.example_zh: 每位立法者在投票前都必須仔細閱讀每項法案。

gept.example_en: The legislative branch has the power to make and change laws.
gept.example_zh: 立法部門有制定與修改法律的權力。

gept.example_en: Britain follows a parliamentary system led by the prime minister.
gept.example_zh: 英國採行由首相領導的議會制度。

gept.example_en: The senator spoke for over an hour on the new education bill.
gept.example_zh: 這位參議員就新的教育法案發表了一個多小時的演說。

gept.example_en: The bill must still be approved by the senate before becoming law.
gept.example_zh: 這項法案還須經參議院通過才能成為法律。

gept.example_en: The new mayor promised to plant ten thousand trees during her term.
gept.example_zh: 新任市長承諾在任期內種植一萬棵樹。

gept.example_en: The governor declared a state of emergency after the heavy floods.
gept.example_zh: 州長在嚴重洪災後宣布進入緊急狀態。

gept.example_en: The new administration plans to focus on improving public transportation.
gept.example_zh: 新政府計畫專注於改善公共交通。

gept.example_en: Starting a small business often involves navigating layers of bureaucracy.
gept.example_zh: 創辦小型企業常須穿越層層官僚體系。

gept.example_en: Bureaucratic delays prevented the project from starting on schedule.
gept.example_zh: 官僚作業上的拖延使這個專案無法準時開工。

gept.example_en: An independent judiciary is essential to a fair democratic society.
gept.example_zh: 獨立的司法機關對公正的民主社會至關重要。

gept.example_en: She filed a lawsuit against the company for breaking the contract.
gept.example_zh: 她對公司提起訴訟，控告其違反合約。

gept.example_en: Three witnesses agreed to testify in court next month.
gept.example_zh: 三名證人同意下個月出庭作證。

gept.example_en: The hotel staff was courteous and helpful throughout our stay.
gept.example_zh: 飯店員工在我們住宿期間始終彬彬有禮且樂於協助。

gept.example_en: Politeness costs nothing but can earn you many friends.
gept.example_zh: 禮貌不費分毫，卻能為你贏得許多朋友。

gept.example_en: He apologized for his rudeness during the meeting yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 他為自己昨天會議上的無禮道歉。

gept.example_en: It is considered impolite to talk loudly on the train in Japan.
gept.example_zh: 在日本，在火車上大聲說話被視為不禮貌。

gept.example_en: The informality of the meeting helped everyone speak freely.
gept.example_zh: 會議的不拘禮節讓大家都能暢所欲言。

gept.example_en: Graduation is a rite that marks the end of student life.
gept.example_zh: 畢業典禮是標誌學生生活結束的一個儀式。

gept.example_en: Tea is served in a ceremonial way during the traditional festival.
gept.example_zh: 在傳統節慶中，茶以儀式化的方式呈上。

gept.example_en: The town was full of festivity as the lantern parade began.
gept.example_zh: 燈籠遊行開始時，全鎮充滿節慶氣氛。

gept.example_en: Red lanterns gave the street a warm and festive atmosphere.
gept.example_zh: 紅燈籠為街道增添了溫暖喜慶的氣氛。

gept.example_en: The school held a quiet observance on the anniversary of the earthquake.
gept.example_zh: 學校在地震週年日舉行了一場肅穆的紀念活動。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 盛宴；大餐 (v.) 盡情享用
gept.example_en: The family prepared a huge feast for the new year reunion.
gept.example_zh: 全家為新年團圓準備了一桌豐盛大餐。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 紀念碑；紀念物 (adj.) 紀念的
gept.example_en: A bronze memorial was built to honor the firefighters who died.
gept.example_zh: 建造了一座銅像紀念碑來紀念殉職的消防員。

gept.example_en: The parade commemorates the soldiers who served in the war.
gept.example_zh: 這場遊行紀念曾服役於戰爭的士兵們。

gept.example_en: Her opening monologue made the entire audience burst into laughter.
gept.example_zh: 她開場的獨白讓全場觀眾爆笑不已。

gept.example_en: Her novel is praised for its elegant and flowing prose.
gept.example_zh: 她的小說以優雅流暢的散文受到讚賞。

gept.example_en: The poem's final verse leaves readers with a sense of hope.
gept.example_zh: 這首詩的最後一節給讀者留下了希望感。

gept.example_en: Children learn new words easily through songs and rhyme.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們透過歌曲和押韻很容易學習新單字。

gept.example_en: Each stanza of the poem describes a different season.
gept.example_zh: 這首詩的每一節描寫不同的季節。

gept.example_en: The novelist often uses water as a metaphor for memory.
gept.example_zh: 這位小說家常以水作為記憶的隱喻。

gept.example_en: Her smile was as bright as sunlight is a classic simile.
gept.example_zh: 她的微笑像陽光般燦爛，是經典的明喻。

gept.example_en: The poet's imagery brings the autumn forest vividly to life.
gept.example_zh: 詩人的意象讓秋日森林生動地浮現眼前。

gept.example_en: The film is a clever satire of modern office culture.
gept.example_zh: 這部電影是對現代辦公室文化的巧妙諷刺。

gept.example_en: He wrote a sonnet for his wife on their wedding anniversary.
gept.example_zh: 他在結婚週年紀念日為妻子寫了一首十四行詩。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 史詩 (adj.) 史詩般的；宏大的
gept.example_en: The Odyssey is an ancient epic about a long journey home.
gept.example_zh: 《奧德賽》是一部關於漫長返鄉之旅的古老史詩。

gept.example_en: The short story is an allegory about greed and forgiveness.
gept.example_zh: 這篇短篇小說是關於貪婪與寬恕的寓言。

gept.example_en: She published a memoir about growing up in a fishing village.
gept.example_zh: 她出版了一本關於在漁村成長經歷的回憶錄。

gept.example_en: His prize-winning novella can be read in a single afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 他獲獎的中篇小說可以在一個下午內讀完。

gept.example_en: Greek mythology features many gods, heroes, and dramatic stories.
gept.example_zh: 希臘神話中有許多神祇、英雄和戲劇性的故事。

gept.example_en: The fable about the tortoise and the hare teaches patience.
gept.example_zh: 龜兔賽跑的寓言教導我們耐心。

gept.example_en: The teacher used a simple parable to explain forgiveness.
gept.example_zh: 老師用一個簡單的比喻故事來解釋寬恕。

gept.example_en: The novel's epilogue reveals what happened ten years later.
gept.example_zh: 小說的結語揭露了十年後發生的事。

gept.example_en: The prologue sets the mysterious tone of the whole novel.
gept.example_zh: 序言為整部小說定下了神秘的基調。

gept.example_en: I prefer paperback editions because they are lighter and cheaper.
gept.example_zh: 我比較喜歡平裝版，因為比較輕也比較便宜。

gept.example_en: The hardcover edition includes beautiful color illustrations.
gept.example_zh: 精裝版收錄了精美的彩色插圖。

gept.example_en: Please write a one-page synopsis of your novel for the publisher.
gept.example_zh: 請為出版商撰寫一頁的小說情節摘要。

gept.example_en: His careful penmanship made every letter a pleasure to read.
gept.example_zh: 他工整的書寫讓每一封信都讀來愉悅。

gept.example_en: Her handwriting is so neat that it looks almost printed.
gept.example_zh: 她的字跡工整到看起來幾乎像印刷的。

gept.example_en: The orchestra performed a famous symphony by Beethoven last night.
gept.example_zh: 管弦樂團昨晚演奏了一首貝多芬著名的交響曲。

gept.example_en: The soprano hit the high note effortlessly during the final aria.
gept.example_zh: 女高音在終曲詠嘆調中輕鬆唱出最高音。

gept.example_en: The young tenor received a standing ovation after his debut.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕的男高音首演後獲得起立鼓掌。

gept.example_en: She sang a beautiful duet with her younger brother at the wedding.
gept.example_zh: 她在婚禮上和弟弟唱了一首動人的二重唱。

gept.example_en: The string quartet has been playing together for over twenty years.
gept.example_zh: 這個弦樂四重奏已經一起演奏超過二十年。
