gept.example_en: The young soloist played the violin concerto from memory.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕的獨奏者憑記憶演奏了小提琴協奏曲。

gept.example_en: The school choir won first prize in the regional competition.
gept.example_zh: 學校合唱團在區域比賽中獲得首獎。

gept.example_en: He is a talented lyricist who writes songs about everyday life.
gept.example_zh: 他是位才華洋溢的作詞家，撰寫關於日常生活的歌曲。

gept.example_en: Every musician in the band practices for several hours each day.
gept.example_zh: 樂團裡每位音樂家每天都練習好幾個小時。

gept.example_en: The lead vocalist of the band has a powerful, soulful voice.
gept.example_zh: 樂團的主唱嗓音充滿力量與情感。

gept.example_en: She hummed a cheerful tune while washing the dishes.
gept.example_zh: 她洗碗時哼著一首歡快的曲調。

gept.example_en: The old ballad tells the story of two lovers parted by war.
gept.example_zh: 這首古老的民謠講述了一對被戰爭分離的戀人的故事。

gept.example_en: Everyone stood quietly as the national anthem was played.
gept.example_zh: 國歌演奏時所有人安靜地起立。

gept.example_en: Her piano recital was attended by friends, family, and teachers.
gept.example_zh: 她的鋼琴獨奏會有朋友、家人和老師到場聆聽。

gept.example_en: The crowd cheered loudly until the band came back for an encore.
gept.example_zh: 觀眾大聲歡呼，直到樂團回來表演安可曲。

gept.example_en: She has played the oboe in the school orchestra for three years.
gept.example_zh: 她在學校管弦樂團演奏雙簧管已經三年了。

gept.example_en: An old man played the accordion at the corner of the square.
gept.example_zh: 一位老人在廣場角落演奏手風琴。

gept.example_en: The artist mixes paints carefully on her wooden palette.
gept.example_zh: 畫家在她的木製調色盤上仔細地調和顏料。

gept.example_en: Ancient artists made pigment from minerals and plants found nearby.
gept.example_zh: 古代藝術家用附近找到的礦物和植物製作顏料。

gept.example_en: Her delicate watercolor of the harbor sold at the local gallery.
gept.example_zh: 她那幅精緻的港口水彩畫在當地畫廊賣出。

gept.example_en: The painter is famous for his peaceful countryside landscapes.
gept.example_zh: 這位畫家以寧靜的鄉村風景畫聞名。

gept.example_en: The sculptor spent two years carving the marble statue.
gept.example_zh: 這位雕塑家花了兩年時間雕刻這座大理石雕像。

gept.example_en: A bronze bust of the founder stands in the school entrance hall.
gept.example_zh: 創辦人的青銅半身像矗立在學校入口大廳。

gept.example_en: The floor mosaic depicts a beautiful scene from ancient mythology.
gept.example_zh: 地板上的馬賽克描繪了一幅美麗的古代神話場景。

gept.example_en: A large medieval tapestry covers the wall of the castle hall.
gept.example_zh: 城堡大廳的牆上掛著一幅巨大的中世紀掛毯。

gept.example_en: The museum curator selected pieces from twenty different countries.
gept.example_zh: 博物館策展人從二十個不同國家挑選展品。

gept.example_en: The cafe is designed with a minimalist aesthetic and natural materials.
gept.example_zh: 這家咖啡館以極簡美學和天然材料設計而成。

gept.example_en: The young ballerina has been training since she was four years old.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕的芭蕾舞者從四歲起就開始受訓。

gept.example_en: The choreographer created a new dance for the spring festival.
gept.example_zh: 編舞家為春季慶典編排了一支新舞。

gept.example_en: Shakespeare is perhaps the most famous playwright in the world.
gept.example_zh: 莎士比亞或許是世界上最著名的劇作家。

gept.example_en: She is writing a screenplay based on her grandmother's life.
gept.example_zh: 她正在以祖母的人生為基礎撰寫電影劇本。

gept.example_en: Let's get some snacks during the intermission of the play.
gept.example_zh: 我們在話劇中場休息時去買點點心吧。

gept.example_en: The understudy performed brilliantly when the lead actor fell ill.
gept.example_zh: 當主角生病時，替角演員表演得非常出色。

gept.example_en: The young filmmaker won several awards for her debut documentary.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕的電影製作人憑藉處女作紀錄片贏得數個獎項。

gept.example_en: The cinematographer captured the desert sunset in stunning detail.
gept.example_zh: 電影攝影師以極致細膩捕捉了沙漠日落。

gept.example_en: There is a brand-new cinema opening near the train station.
gept.example_zh: 火車站附近新開了一家全新的電影院。

gept.example_en: The animator drew thousands of frames to create the short film.
gept.example_zh: 動畫師為了製作這部短片畫了數千幀畫面。

gept.example_en: The new remake of the classic film features a modern cast.
gept.example_zh: 這部經典影片的新版重拍片由現代演員陣容主演。

gept.example_en: The ancient amphitheater could hold more than ten thousand spectators.
gept.example_zh: 這座古老的圓形劇場能容納超過一萬名觀眾。

gept.example_en: Children gathered to watch the colorful puppet show in the park.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們聚集在公園裡看色彩繽紛的木偶戲。

gept.example_en: The skilled puppeteer made the wooden figure appear truly alive.
gept.example_zh: 這位嫻熟的操偶師讓木偶看起來栩栩如生。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 默劇；啞劇演員 (v.) 用動作表演
gept.example_en: A street mime performed silently outside the museum entrance.
gept.example_zh: 一位街頭默劇演員在博物館入口外靜默表演。

gept.example_en: Public transportation in this city is fast, cheap, and reliable.
gept.example_zh: 這座城市的大眾運輸快速、便宜又可靠。

gept.example_en: Commuting by bicycle has become more popular than driving here.
gept.example_zh: 在這裡騎腳踏車通勤已變得比開車更受歡迎。

gept.example_en: Heavy rain caused several accidents on the expressway last night.
gept.example_zh: 昨晚大雨在快速道路上引發了多起事故。

gept.example_en: The accident caused complete gridlock in the city center.
gept.example_zh: 這起事故導致市中心完全交通癱瘓。

gept.example_en: Try to leave before rush-hour begins or you will be stuck for hours.
gept.example_zh: 盡量在尖峰時段開始前出發，否則你會被堵上好幾個小時。

gept.example_en: It is generally not safe to hitchhike along unfamiliar roads.
gept.example_zh: 在陌生的道路上搭便車通常並不安全。

gept.example_en: She rides a small red moped to work every morning.
gept.example_zh: 她每天早上騎著一輛小紅色助動車上班。

gept.example_en: A family minivan can comfortably seat seven passengers and their luggage.
gept.example_zh: 家用小型廂型車可舒適地容納七位乘客和他們的行李。

gept.example_en: A long black limousine waited outside the hotel for the celebrity.
gept.example_zh: 一輛長型黑色豪華轎車在飯店外等候那位名人。

gept.example_en: The wealthy family employs a chauffeur to drive them around town.
gept.example_zh: 這個富裕家庭雇用司機載他們在城裡四處跑。

gept.example_en: We had a short stopover in Singapore on our way to Sydney.
gept.example_zh: 我們前往雪梨的途中在新加坡有一段短暫的中停。

gept.example_en: After the long flight, jetlag kept her awake until dawn.
gept.example_zh: 經過長途飛行，時差讓她一直清醒到天亮。

gept.example_en: Passengers should be at the gate thirty minutes before boarding.
gept.example_zh: 旅客應於登機前三十分鐘抵達登機門。

gept.example_en: Airfare to Europe is usually cheaper during the autumn months.
gept.example_zh: 前往歐洲的機票費在秋季月份通常較便宜。

gept.example_en: Travelers often buy chocolate and perfume at the duty-free shops.
gept.example_zh: 旅客常在免稅商店購買巧克力和香水。

gept.example_en: The island's economy depends heavily on tourism in the summer.
gept.example_zh: 這座島嶼的經濟在夏季高度依賴觀光業。

gept.example_en: Backpacking through Southeast Asia is a popular gap-year adventure.
gept.example_zh: 在東南亞背包旅行是受歡迎的空檔年冒險。

gept.example_en: Don't forget to pack your swimsuit for the beach vacation.
gept.example_zh: 別忘了為海灘度假打包你的泳裝。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 呼吸管 (v.) 用呼吸管潛泳
gept.example_en: We rented snorkel gear to explore the colorful coral reefs.
gept.example_zh: 我們租了潛水呼吸管裝備去探索色彩繽紛的珊瑚礁。

gept.example_en: Skydiving from such a height is both terrifying and exhilarating.
gept.example_zh: 從那麼高的地方跳傘既恐怖又令人興奮。

gept.example_en: Canoeing on the calm lake at dawn was a peaceful experience.
gept.example_zh: 黎明時在平靜的湖上划獨木舟是寧靜的體驗。

gept.example_en: A small sailboat drifted slowly across the bay at sunset.
gept.example_zh: 一艘小帆船在日落時分緩緩漂過海灣。

gept.example_en: The narrow isthmus connects the peninsula to the mainland.
gept.example_zh: 這條狹窄的地峽將半島與大陸相連。

gept.example_en: A hidden cove offered the perfect spot for a quiet picnic.
gept.example_zh: 一個隱蔽的小海灣是安靜野餐的完美地點。

gept.example_en: The lighthouse at the cape has guided ships for over a century.
gept.example_zh: 海角上的燈塔已為船隻指引方向超過一個世紀。

gept.example_en: Wildflowers bloomed across the wide prairie every spring.
gept.example_zh: 每年春天，野花在廣闊的大草原上盛開。

gept.example_en: A small grove of orange trees grew behind the farmhouse.
gept.example_zh: 農舍後方長著一小片柑橘樹林。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 山峰；頂峰 (v.) 達到頂峰
gept.example_en: Climbing to the snowy peak takes about three days from base camp.
gept.example_zh: 從基地營攀登到雪峰大約需要三天。

gept.example_en: Scientists carefully monitor the volcano for early warning signs.
gept.example_zh: 科學家仔細監測火山以掌握早期警示徵兆。

gept.example_en: Only a small part of an iceberg is visible above the water.
gept.example_zh: 冰山只有一小部分露出水面。

gept.example_en: She has loved athletics since elementary school sports day.
gept.example_zh: 她從小學運動會時就熱愛田徑運動。

gept.example_en: Good sportsmanship means respecting both teammates and opponents.
gept.example_zh: 良好的運動家精神意味著尊重隊友與對手。

gept.example_en: The umpire signaled that the ball had landed just inside the line.
gept.example_zh: 裁判示意球剛好落在界內。

gept.example_en: Our team reached the playoff for the first time in five years.
gept.example_zh: 我們的隊伍五年來首次進入季後賽。

gept.example_en: Winning the national championship has been her lifelong dream.
gept.example_zh: 贏得全國錦標賽一直是她畢生的夢想。

gept.example_en: The huge new stadium can seat sixty thousand cheering fans.
gept.example_zh: 這座巨大的新體育場可容納六萬名歡呼的球迷。

gept.example_en: Concerts and basketball games are both held at the indoor arena.
gept.example_zh: 演唱會和籃球比賽都在這座室內競技場舉行。

gept.example_en: The young quarterback threw a perfect pass to win the game.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕四分衛投出完美的傳球贏得比賽。

gept.example_en: The pitcher struck out three batters in a single inning.
gept.example_zh: 這位投手在一局內三振了三位打者。

gept.example_en: The catcher signaled which pitch to throw with hidden hand signs.
gept.example_zh: 捕手用隱蔽的手勢示意投手該投哪種球。

gept.example_en: His final strikeout sealed the team's first championship victory.
gept.example_zh: 他最後一次三振奠定了球隊首次冠軍勝利。

gept.example_en: She grabbed the rebound and quickly passed it to her teammate.
gept.example_zh: 她搶下籃板球後迅速傳給隊友。

gept.example_en: He scored a thrilling touchdown in the final seconds of the game.
gept.example_zh: 他在比賽最後幾秒達成了一次激動人心的達陣。

gept.example_en: The goal was disallowed because the striker was offside.
gept.example_zh: 因為前鋒越位，這顆進球被判無效。

gept.example_en: A triathlon combines swimming, cycling, and running in one event.
gept.example_zh: 鐵人三項在單一賽事中結合游泳、自行車與跑步。

gept.example_en: He won the hundred-meter hurdles by less than half a second.
gept.example_zh: 他以不到半秒的差距贏得一百公尺跨欄賽。

gept.example_en: She added more weight to the barbell before her final lift.
gept.example_zh: 她在最後一次舉重前在槓鈴上加了更多重量。

gept.example_en: Doing thirty pushups every day improved his upper body strength.
gept.example_zh: 每天做三十下伏地挺身增強了他的上半身力量。

gept.example_en: Adding squats to your routine strengthens both legs and core.
gept.example_zh: 在訓練中加入深蹲能同時強化腿部與核心。

gept.example_en: Always do a short warm-up before heavy exercise to prevent injury.
gept.example_zh: 進行劇烈運動前永遠先做短暫暖身以避免受傷。

gept.example_en: A proper cool-down helps your heart rate return to normal.
gept.example_zh: 適當的緩和運動有助於心跳恢復正常。

gept.example_en: She joined a pilates class to improve her posture and flexibility.
gept.example_zh: 她報名了皮拉提斯課程以改善體態和柔軟度。

gept.example_en: Group aerobics classes can be both fun and surprisingly tough.
gept.example_zh: 團體有氧課程既有趣又出乎意料地辛苦。

gept.example_en: Kickboxing classes are a great way to release stress and build strength.
gept.example_zh: 踢拳課程是釋放壓力並建立力量的好方法。

gept.example_en: The young wrestler trained for hours every day to make the team.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕摔角選手每天訓練好幾個小時以進入隊伍。

gept.example_en: The retired boxer now coaches teenagers at the community gym.
gept.example_zh: 這位退休拳擊手現在在社區健身房教青少年。

gept.example_en: An experienced archer can hit the bullseye from a great distance.
gept.example_zh: 經驗豐富的射箭手能從遠距離射中靶心。

gept.example_en: They played a casual game of darts at the neighborhood pub.
gept.example_zh: 他們在街坊酒吧裡輕鬆地玩了一局飛鏢。

gept.example_en: Billiards requires both careful aim and steady hands.
gept.example_zh: 撞球既需要精準瞄準也需要穩定的雙手。

gept.example_en: Watching a professional snooker match is surprisingly relaxing.
gept.example_zh: 觀看職業司諾克比賽出乎意料地令人放鬆。

gept.example_en: He rides his skateboard to school whenever the weather is dry.
gept.example_zh: 天氣乾燥時他都會滑滑板去上學。

gept.example_en: Snowboarding has become very popular at ski resorts in recent years.
gept.example_zh: 滑雪板運動近年在滑雪度假村變得非常受歡迎。

gept.example_en: The mountaineer carefully checked her ropes before the steep climb.
gept.example_zh: 這位登山者在陡峭攀登前仔細檢查她的繩索。

gept.example_en: We told ghost stories around the campfire until late at night.
gept.example_zh: 我們圍著營火講鬼故事直到深夜。

gept.example_en: The campsite has clean restrooms and a small grocery shop.
gept.example_zh: 這個露營地有乾淨的廁所和一家小型雜貨店。

gept.example_en: Reading and gardening are her favorite forms of recreation.
gept.example_zh: 閱讀和園藝是她最喜愛的休閒活動。

gept.example_en: He spends his leisure time learning to play the guitar.
gept.example_zh: 他將閒暇時間花在學吉他上。

gept.example_en: Baseball remains a beloved national pastime in many countries.
gept.example_zh: 棒球在許多國家仍是備受喜愛的全民消遣。

gept.example_en: He is a passionate collector of vintage postage stamps.
gept.example_zh: 他是位熱情的老式郵票收藏家。

gept.example_en: Her grandmother taught her crocheting on a quiet winter afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 她的祖母在一個寧靜的冬日午後教她鉤針編織。

gept.example_en: Modern pedagogy encourages students to ask questions and think critically.
gept.example_zh: 現代教育學鼓勵學生提問並批判性思考。

gept.meaning_zh: (n.) 三學期制中的一學期；三個月期
gept.example_en: Final exams are held at the end of each trimester.
gept.example_zh: 期末考於每個學期末舉行。

gept.example_en: The commencement ceremony was held in the university's main hall.
gept.example_zh: 畢業典禮在大學的主大廳舉行。

gept.example_en: Hundreds of alumni returned for the school's hundredth anniversary.
gept.example_zh: 數百位校友返校參加學校百年校慶。

gept.example_en: She earned her phd in environmental science after six years of research.
gept.example_zh: 她經過六年研究後取得環境科學博士學位。

gept.example_en: An interesting footnote at the bottom of the page caught my eye.
gept.example_zh: 頁面底部一則有趣的註腳引起了我的注意。

gept.example_en: The appendix at the end of the book contains extra useful data.
gept.example_zh: 書末的附錄包含了額外有用的資料。

gept.example_en: She used a clever mnemonic to remember all the planets in order.
gept.example_zh: 她運用巧妙的助記法依序記住所有行星。

gept.example_en: Pure memorization alone rarely leads to deep understanding of a subject.
gept.example_zh: 純粹的死記硬背很少能帶來對主題的深入理解。

gept.example_en: If you procrastinate too long, the deadline will catch up with you.
gept.example_zh: 如果你拖延太久，期限就會追上你。

gept.example_en: Procrastination often comes from fear of failing rather than laziness.
gept.example_zh: 拖延往往來自害怕失敗而非懶惰。

gept.example_en: The friendly examiner helped the nervous candidate relax.
gept.example_zh: 親切的考官幫助緊張的考生放鬆下來。

gept.example_en: Grading hundreds of essays takes the teacher most of the weekend.
gept.example_zh: 批改數百篇作文佔據老師大部分的週末時間。

gept.example_en: The mentor and mentee meet once a week to discuss progress.
gept.example_zh: 導師與徒弟每週見面一次討論進展。

gept.example_en: The psychologist studies how children develop social skills over time.
gept.example_zh: 這位心理學家研究兒童如何隨時間發展社交技能。

gept.example_en: A psychiatrist can prescribe medication that other counselors cannot.
gept.example_zh: 精神科醫師可以開立其他諮商師無法開立的藥物。

gept.example_en: Talking to a therapist helped him work through his anxiety.
gept.example_zh: 與治療師談話幫助他處理了焦慮。

gept.example_en: Free counseling services are available to all university students.
gept.example_zh: 所有大學生都可以免費使用諮商服務。

gept.example_en: Your perception of a situation can shape how you respond to it.
gept.example_zh: 你對情境的認知可以塑造你的反應方式。

gept.example_en: She slowly regained consciousness several hours after the surgery.
gept.example_zh: 手術後數小時她慢慢恢復了意識。

gept.example_en: Many of our daily habits are guided by the subconscious mind.
gept.example_zh: 我們許多日常習慣都受到潛意識的引導。

gept.example_en: She has a phobia of spiders that began when she was a child.
gept.example_zh: 她從小就有蜘蛛恐懼症。

gept.example_en: Childhood trauma can affect a person's emotions long into adulthood.
gept.example_zh: 童年創傷可能影響一個人成年後的情緒。

gept.example_en: Losing a beloved pet can be a traumatic experience for children.
gept.example_zh: 失去心愛的寵物對孩子可能是創傷的經驗。

gept.example_en: The family is still in mourning after the sudden loss.
gept.example_zh: 在突如其來的喪親之後，這個家庭仍處於哀悼期。

gept.example_en: Her kind words were a great consolation during the difficult week.
gept.example_zh: 在艱難的一週中，她溫柔的話語是莫大慰藉。

gept.example_en: Even after the setback, her optimism kept the whole team going.
gept.example_zh: 即使遭遇挫折，她的樂觀仍讓整個團隊繼續前進。

gept.example_en: Constant pessimism can drain energy from the people around you.
gept.example_zh: 持續的悲觀會耗盡身旁人的精力。

gept.example_en: His perfectionism made it hard for him to finish any project on time.
gept.example_zh: 他的完美主義使他難以準時完成任何專案。

gept.example_en: She listens to motivational podcasts on her morning commute.
gept.example_zh: 她在早上通勤時聽勵志的播客節目。

gept.example_en: A small reward can be a strong incentive for young children.
gept.example_zh: 小小的獎勵對年幼的孩子來說可能是強烈的誘因。

gept.example_en: Positive reinforcement works better than punishment for most learners.
gept.example_zh: 對大多數學習者而言，正向強化比懲罰更有效。

gept.example_en: It took real willpower to skip dessert at the birthday party.
gept.example_zh: 在生日派對上不吃甜點需要真正的意志力。

gept.example_en: Success in this field requires both talent and a lot of grit.
gept.example_zh: 在這個領域成功需要才華以及大量的毅力。

gept.example_en: Her tenacity helped her finish the marathon despite an injured knee.
gept.example_zh: 她的堅韌讓她即便膝蓋受傷仍完成了馬拉松。

gept.example_en: Regular sleep and exercise are key to long-term well-being.
gept.example_zh: 規律的睡眠和運動是長期身心健康的關鍵。

gept.example_en: Self-awareness helps people understand why they feel the way they do.
gept.example_zh: 自我覺察幫助人們了解自己為何會有那樣的感受。

gept.example_en: Speaking in front of small groups gradually built her self-confidence.
gept.example_zh: 在小團體面前說話逐步建立了她的自信。

gept.example_en: Climbers must protect their fingers from frostbite at high altitudes.
gept.example_zh: 登山者在高海拔處必須保護手指免於凍傷。

gept.example_en: Heavy snowfall closed all the roads leading into the village.
gept.example_zh: 大量降雪封閉了通往村莊的所有道路。

gept.example_en: The children built a giant snowman in the front garden.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們在前院堆了一個巨大的雪人。

gept.example_en: The tropical cyclone caused heavy flooding along the coast.
gept.example_zh: 熱帶氣旋造成沿海地區嚴重淹水。

gept.example_en: Sailors stayed in the harbor because a strong gale was forecast.
gept.example_zh: 由於預報強風來襲，水手們留在港內。

gept.example_en: Sudden flooding forced many families to leave their homes overnight.
gept.example_zh: 突如其來的淹水迫使許多家庭一夜之間離開家園。

gept.example_en: Heavy rain triggered a dangerous mudslide on the mountain road.
gept.example_zh: 豪雨在山路上引發了危險的土石流。

gept.example_en: A small tremor shook the building but caused no real damage.
gept.example_zh: 一陣輕微的震動搖晃了建築物但未造成實質損害。

gept.example_en: A small meteorite landed in the field without injuring anyone.
gept.example_zh: 一顆小隕石落在田野中，沒有造成任何人受傷。

gept.example_en: The mountaintop observatory offers visitors a stunning view of the stars.
gept.example_zh: 山頂上的天文台讓訪客欣賞令人驚嘆的星空。

gept.example_en: The astronomer spent many cold nights observing a distant galaxy.
gept.example_zh: 這位天文學家花了許多寒冷的夜晚觀察一個遙遠的星系。

gept.example_en: The astronaut spent six months aboard the international space station.
gept.example_zh: 這位太空人在國際太空站上待了六個月。

gept.example_en: A new weather satellite was launched into orbit early this morning.
gept.example_zh: 一顆新的氣象衛星今天清晨被發射進入軌道。

gept.example_en: The meteorologist warned of heavy storms later in the week.
gept.example_zh: 氣象預報員警告本週稍晚將有強烈暴風雨。

gept.example_en: The park protects rare wildlife and ancient trees together.
gept.example_zh: 這座公園同時保護珍稀野生動物與古老樹木。

gept.example_en: Hundreds of puffin nests dot the rocky cliffs each summer.
gept.example_zh: 每年夏天數百個海鸚巢散布在岩石懸崖上。

gept.example_en: A bright blue kingfisher dove into the stream to catch a fish.
gept.example_zh: 一隻亮藍色的翠鳥俯衝進溪流捕捉小魚。

gept.example_en: The loud song of the cicada filled the warm summer afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 蟬鳴洪亮的歌聲充滿了溫暖的夏日午後。

gept.example_en: Always check your shoes for a scorpion when camping in the desert.
gept.example_zh: 在沙漠露營時，務必檢查鞋裡有沒有蠍子。

gept.example_en: A porcupine raises its sharp quills when it feels threatened.
gept.example_zh: 豪豬在感到威脅時會豎起尖銳的刺。

gept.example_en: A herd of antelope raced across the open plain at sunset.
gept.example_zh: 一群羚羊在日落時奔馳過開闊的平原。

gept.example_en: A small herd of buffalo grazed peacefully near the riverbank.
gept.example_zh: 一小群水牛在河岸邊安靜地吃草。

gept.example_en: The cheetah is the fastest land animal over short distances.
gept.example_zh: 獵豹是短距離內陸地上最快的動物。
